no_intro_name: 007 - The World Is Not Enough (USA, Europe)
overview_en:
Enter the sophisticated world of high-tech espionage as Her Majesty's greatest spy... James Bond. Experience all the intense action, spycraft, and state-of-the-art gadgetry synonymous with Bond. Work with helpful allies such as Dr. Christmas Jones and M to stop the treacherous villain Renard. Your mission: Save the world. Are you up to it? Of course you are. You're Bond. James Bond.

• Bond's Best Missions! Battle through 8 dangerous levels based on the hit movie.
• 14 Q-Lab Gadgets and Weapons! Bond's P2K, Night-Vision Glasses, Taser and many new surprises.
• New Power-Ups! 10 different power-ups, including access cards, grenade launcher ammunition, and health.
overview_zh:
進入女王陛下最強情報員——詹姆士．龐德——的高科技諜報世界。體驗 Bond 招牌的緊張動作、間諜技藝與最先進的小道具。與 Dr. Christmas Jones 與 M 等盟友合作，阻止陰險反派 Renard。你的任務：拯救世界。你做得到嗎？當然，你是 Bond，James Bond。

• Bond 最精彩的任務！穿越改編自賣座電影的 8 個危險關卡。
• 14 種 Q 實驗室小道具與武器！Bond 的 P2K、夜視眼鏡、電擊器以及更多新驚喜。
• 全新強化道具！10 種不同強化道具，包括門禁卡、榴彈發射器彈藥與血量補給。

overview_en: 10-PIN BOWLING brings you all the fun of bowling in miniature form on your Game Boy Color. Play by yourself or with a friend in 10 frames of simple straight-up bowling action. Challenge your friend to see who's better or challenge your own scores to see if you can beat them. Aim carefully and apply the right amount of strength and you'll be racking up strikes in no time. This cartridge also uses the Rumble technology so you can feel every strike and spare in the alley. 10-PIN BOWLING features everything but the stinky shoe rentals. Will you rule the lane, or will you just be another gutter ball?
overview_zh: 《10-PIN BOWLING》在 Game Boy Color 上以迷你形式重現保齡球的全部樂趣。可獨自或與朋友以 10 局簡單直球玩法對戰。挑戰朋友看誰更厲害，或挑戰自己的紀錄。仔細瞄準、施加適當力道，馬上就能連連 strike。本卡帶亦支援震動技術，讓你親身感受球道上的每次 strike 與 spare。《10-PIN BOWLING》應有盡有，只缺臭烘烘的租鞋。你會稱霸球道，還是只多一顆洗溝球？

no_intro_name: 102 Dalmatians - Puppies to the Rescue (USA, Europe)

overview_en:
FLY INTO THE FACE OF DANGER!

It's 1942. Get ready to climb aboard, strap in tight, and take to the skies in this timeless vertical scrolling shooter. Dodge enemy fire, execute loops, and pick up a myriad of bonus power-ups.

• Earn your wings in one of history's most treasured arcade classics.
• Features 32 action-packed, daring levels.
overview_zh:
迎向危機飛去！

時值 1942 年。準備登機、繫好安全帶，飛上天空，迎戰這款歷久不衰的縱向卷軸射擊。閃避敵火、執行翻滾，撿取各式各樣的強化道具。

• 在史上最受珍視的街機經典之一中爭取你的飛行徽章。
• 收錄 32 個動作十足、刺激的關卡。

overview_en: All the bells, whistles, and sirens of the pinball games of yesteryear come to the portable system with 3D ULTRA PINBALL: Thrill Ride. This colorful title takes all the fast action of pinball and combines it with features that only a videogame can provide. The full-sized table features multiple screens of action, with all of the staples of pinball intact. Bumpers, ramps, stoppers, and flippers litter the table, along with a variety of special bonus chutes that will take you to one of several special pinball challenges. 3D ULTRA PINBALL is highlighted by brightly colored graphics, with excellent detail on the board and its various parts. The game also features realistic ball physics and gameplay elements, so don’t bump too hard or you’ll get a "TILT"! 3D ULTRA PINBALL: Thrill Ride will test your skills and push your reflexes to their limits.
overview_zh: 舊時代彈珠台所有的鈴聲、汽笛與警報，全都在《3D ULTRA PINBALL: Thrill Ride》中登上掌機平台。本作色彩鮮豔，將彈珠台的快節奏動作與電玩才有的特色結合。完整尺寸的桌台具備多畫面動作，並保留所有彈珠台基本元素。撞球、坡道、擋板與擋桿散布桌面，並有多種特殊獎勵滑道，引導你進入幾種特別的彈珠台挑戰。《3D ULTRA PINBALL》以鮮豔的圖像為亮點，桌面與各種零件細節極佳。本作具備真實的球體物理與遊戲元素，所以別撞太用力，否則會出現「TILT」！《3D ULTRA PINBALL: Thrill Ride》將考驗你的技巧與反應極限。

overview_en: 3D Pocket Pool is a pool game, developed by Aardvark Software and published by Virgin Interactive, which was released in Europe in 2001.
overview_zh: 《3D Pocket Pool》是一款撞球遊戲，由 Aardvark Software 開發、Virgin Interactive 發行，2001 年於歐洲推出。

overview_en: Hop on and hang ten as you crash around corners, swerve on sidewalks, and leap over the locals at Skate City, a skateboarder's fantasy world where virtually every surface is skateable. Flip and twist around the street fighters, Frisbee throwers, hard bodies and killer bees that jam city streets. Polish your skills and take your act to the skate parks where you'll vie for medals and cash in downhill, jump, ramp, and slalom competition. Shoot the tubes, "catch air" as you fly off ramps - master all of the moves including the dangerous 720. You'll need every edge as you try to become champion of the skating world!
overview_zh: 踏上滑板、玩出技巧吧！在 Skate City——滑板玩家的夢幻世界，幾乎每一處都能滑板，你會撞過街角、衝上人行道、跳過路人。在街頭打架的人、丟飛盤的、健美男女與惱人黃蜂之間翻轉與旋轉，磨練好你的技巧後前往滑板公園，在下坡、跳躍、坡道與曲道項目中爭奪獎牌與獎金。穿越管道、衝上坡道後「飛上空中」，掌握所有招式包括危險的 720。要成為滑板世界冠軍，你必須用上每一分優勢！

title_en: ACTION MAN - SEARCH FOR BASE X
no_intro_name: Action Man - Search for Base X (USA, Europe)
overview_en:
Alex "Action Man" Mann makes a stop over onto the Game Boy Color where once again he must stop the world from falling into the clutches of the evil Dr. X. The player takes control of Action Man as they travel through seven different levels ranging for jungles to the Arctic, battling an army of robots with a variety of weapons and battle suits in search of Base X and stop Dr. X from launching a terrifying new weapon that could very well bring an end to the world.

The gameplay is a standard side-scrolling action platformer where the player advances throughout the level, destroying enemies and avoiding pit falls. Along the way they can pick up more powerful guns as well as a bow and arrow and even different suits that can help them on their quest. Additionally, players can find these weapons and suits by taking different paths throughout the levels.
overview_zh:
Alex「Action Man」Mann 來到 Game Boy Color，再次阻止世界落入邪惡 Dr. X 的魔掌。玩家操控 Action Man，穿越叢林到北極等七個不同關卡，運用各種武器與戰鬥服與機器人軍團對戰，尋找 Base X 並阻止 Dr. X 發射可能毀滅世界的恐怖新武器。

玩法為標準的橫向捲軸動作平台遊戲，玩家在關卡中前進，擊敗敵人並避開陷阱。沿途可拾取更強的槍械，乃至弓箭以及不同戰鬥服協助任務。此外，玩家也可透過走不同路線找到這些武器與戰鬥服。

overview_en: Ever been screaming along at Mach 2 and ordered to drop 6,000 pounds of bombs on a target no bigger than a Yugo? Or get that feeling of multiple bogeys closing in on your tail for a lock-on to blow you out of the sky? You've been contracted by a mercenary group to fuel-up, strap-in and snuff out the enemy. And to sweeten the pot in this "The more you take out, the more you take home" deal, you can upgrade your ride, choosing from over 30 different aircraft to get the job done. You in? Then get ready to grab some serious air!
overview_zh: 你曾以 2 馬赫的速度飛行，並奉命把 6,000 磅炸彈丟到一輛 Yugo 那麼大的目標上嗎？或感受過數架敵機從尾後逼近、即將鎖定把你打下天空的感覺嗎？你被一支傭兵組織雇用，加滿油料、繫好安全帶，把敵人徹底掃蕩。為了讓「打下越多賺越多」更具吸引力，你還能升級座機，從超過 30 種飛行器中挑選。準備上路了嗎？那就升空大鬧一番吧！

overview_en: Alfred's Adventure is an Action game, developed by Mobius Entertainment and published by SCi, which was released in Europe in 2000.
overview_zh: 《Alfred's Adventure》是一款動作遊戲，由 Mobius Entertainment 開發、SCi 發行，2000 年於歐洲推出。

overview_en: Prepare for horror and fright beyond your wildest nightmares, as you step into the world of ALIENS: Thanatos Encounter. The terrifying creatures made famous by the popular ALIENS movies come to Game Boy Color in a totally new adventure. You play as one of five space marines who are sent to explore an abandoned freighter. Naturally, the situation is far worse than your squad expected the ship is completely infested with thousands of vicious aliens. In this single-player shooter, you'll make your way through the various sections of the ship in 12 missions. Discover the solution to the mystery of the aliens' reappearance through the cinematic cutscenes you'll see throughout the game. You can use a variety of alien-busting weapons like machine guns and flame-throwers to fend off the incoming horde and, if all else fails, turn tail and run as fast as you can! Battle a wide variety of different breeds of aliens, including some all-new hybrids.
overview_zh: 迎接超越你最瘋狂噩夢的恐怖驚悚，踏入《ALIENS: Thanatos Encounter》的世界。因經典《異形》電影而聞名的可怕生物，登上 Game Boy Color 展開全新冒險。你扮演五名太空陸戰隊員之一，被派往探索一艘遭遺棄的貨船。當然，情勢比你的小隊預期還要糟——船上已被成千上萬隻兇猛異形寄生。在這款單人射擊遊戲中，你會在 12 個任務中穿越船艦各區域，並透過遊戲中的過場動畫揭開異形再現的謎團。可使用機關槍、火焰噴射器等多種反異形武器抵擋來襲蟲群，若情勢危急則拔腿狂奔！迎戰各種異形，包括全新混種。

overview_en: Using real licensed teams and players from the 1999 season, ALL-STAR BASEBALL 2000 challenges you to take your favorite MLB team to a World Series victory. ALL-STAR BASEBALL 2000 offers a wide variety of gameplay options. If you think you have what it takes to play through a full season of MLB action, try the Season mode. If you like to cut to the chase, go straight to the Playoffs. Practice up your swing in the Batting Practice mode, and then prove your skills in the Home Run Derby! When you're ready, take to the field with the greats of the sport in an All-Star Game. Choose between manual and automatic fielding. Need to hold off on your pennant race until another day? No problem! Save your team's progress using the handy password function.
overview_zh: 《ALL-STAR BASEBALL 2000》使用 1999 年球季的真實授權球隊與球員，挑戰你帶領最愛的 MLB 球隊奪下世界大賽冠軍。本作提供豐富的遊戲選項。若你自認有本事打完整個 MLB 賽季，就試試 Season 模式。想速戰速決，就直接進入季後賽。在 Batting Practice 模式磨練揮棒，再到 Home Run Derby 證明你的實力！準備好就上場，與棒球巨星共戰 All-Star Game。可選擇手動或自動守備。需要稍後再戰冠軍賽？沒問題！用方便的密碼功能保存進度。

overview_en: Are you ready to be an All-Star? In Acclaim's ALL-STAR BASEBALL 2001, that's just what you'll have to be to hang in the dugout with the pros. This single-player game for the PSX brings all of your favorite MLB teams to the small screen with a wide variety of gameplay options. Choose your favorite team and go through a full Season or cut right to the Playoffs to prove you are the best. Take it to a new level by playing an All-Star Game, where the top players from the MLB come to show off their stuff. For this version there's an improved batting system, as well as updated rosters, better computer AI, and enhanced graphics. Make sure to practice with the improved batting interface, because the ever-popular Home Run Derby also makes its return. ALL-STAR BASEBALL 2001...catch it!
overview_zh: 你準備好成為 All-Star 了嗎？在 Acclaim 的《ALL-STAR BASEBALL 2001》中，你必須夠格才能與職業選手並肩。本款 PSX 單人遊戲將你最愛的 MLB 球隊帶上小螢幕，並提供豐富遊戲選項。挑選最愛的球隊打完整個賽季，或直接進入季後賽證明自己最強。再上一層樓，挑戰 All-Star Game，看 MLB 頂尖球員大顯身手。本版改良打擊系統，並更新名單、強化電腦 AI 與畫面。記得先用改良的打擊介面練習，因為人氣不衰的 Home Run Derby 也回歸登場。《ALL-STAR BASEBALL 2001》……快來上手！

overview_en: This is a cartoon style tennis challenge that requires all your skill! Pick a character and journey through the game's tournament mode, or simply try your hand in free mode. Choose from different court surfaces and different match setup options. Offering games for one to four players, All Star Tennis is a great way to enjoy the action on centre court.
overview_zh: 這是一款卡通風格的網球挑戰，需要你發揮全部本事！挑選一名角色並穿越遊戲的錦標賽模式，或單純試試 Free 模式。可選擇不同球場表面與多種比賽設定。提供 1 至 4 人遊戲，《All Star Tennis》是享受中央球場精彩動作的絕佳方式。

title_en: ALONE IN THE DARK - THE NEW NIGHTMARE
no_intro_name: Alone in the Dark - The New Nightmare (USA) (En,Fr,Es)
overview_en: From the moment Edward Carnby and Aline Cedrac set foot on Shadow Island, they are confronted by mysterious, evil creatures intent on thwarting their progress to recover 3 ancient tablets believed to hold the secret key to some incredible menacing phenomenon. Fears threaten from every corner. The slightest shadow could be hiding deep secrets, or concealing worse nightmares...
overview_zh: 從 Edward Carnby 與 Aline Cedrac 踏上 Shadow Island 的那一刻起，神秘邪惡的生物就試圖阻止他們取回三塊據信掌握某個驚人威脅秘密的古代石板。恐懼從每個角落逼近。最微小的陰影裡可能藏著深沉秘密，或潛伏著更可怕的噩夢……

overview_en: The third work in the "Aniburi" series. The main character is one who lives in "Animaru World". There are more than 300 kinds of animals inhabiting various places such as forests and ponds. The goal is to improve various abilities and win the tournament held during 12 types of games. The tournament includes foot races, swimming, dancing, climbing trees, karaoke, loud voices, beauty, academic ability, etc. Of course, it is possible to marry a pet even in the third work. Moreover, the child has inherited the bloodline.
overview_zh: 「動物育成系列（Aniburi）」第三作。主角是住在「Animaru World」的人物。森林、池塘等各種地點棲息著超過 300 種動物。目標是提升各種能力，並在 12 種比賽舉行的錦標賽中奪冠。比賽項目包括賽跑、游泳、跳舞、爬樹、卡拉 OK、大聲比賽、選美、學力測驗等。當然，第三作也可以與寵物結婚，孩子還會繼承血統。

overview_en: The 4th animal breeding simulation game series! This time, we will introduce a story to generate an event and liven up the game. The theme is feuds and friendships with rivals, and scenarios with animals. Compete with five rivals in the world of the animal world "Animani" to succeed to the next throne, and raise existing and fictitious animals born in this world with the aim of becoming a "Queen of Breeders". We will complete the "Nima ni Daizukan". There are some animals that you can get only in the scenario event!
overview_zh: 動物育成模擬系列第 4 作！本作引入劇情演出觸發事件，讓遊戲更熱鬧。主題是與對手之間的對立與友情，以及與動物的故事。在動物世界「Animani」中與 5 位對手競爭，繼承下一任王位的寶座，飼養誕生於這個世界的現實與虛構動物，目標成為「育成女王」。完成「動物大圖鑑」，部分動物只能透過劇情事件入手！

overview_en: In the cyber space called "ANIMA @ NET", the race to manipulate data life forms called "mania" is booming. The main character aims to be the "animaster" who wins the anima race. The anima race progresses against the team that adopts the relay method, using the cards that can be obtained every turn and the special skills of the anima, while jamming rivals and powering up the ability of your anima. , Aim for the goal first. You must GET a rare anima to become an animastar. There are 6 types of terrain that form the course, and there are more than 150 types of anima! Defeat powerful rivals while increasing anima data!
overview_zh: 在名為「ANIMA @ NET」的賽博空間中，操控被稱為「mania」的資料生命體進行的競賽蔚為風潮。主角的目標是成為贏得 anima 競賽的「animaster」。anima 競賽以接力方式進行，使用每回合可獲得的卡片與 anima 的特殊技能，一邊干擾對手、強化自身 anima 能力，一邊搶先抵達終點。要成為 animastar 就必須取得稀有 anima。賽道地形共有 6 種，anima 種類超過 150 種！一邊累積 anima 資料，一邊擊敗強敵吧！

overview_en: ANIMORPHS is a single-player RPG based on the popular children's book series and television show. You assume the role of the Animorphs, a group of kids with the ability to transform into any animal they touch. As an Animorph, you must use these unique abilities to stop an invasion of your planet by a group of aliens known as Yeerks. You'll change into a large variety of animals including an elephant, a fish, a bird, a mouse, and many more as you fight for the survival of your planet. Explore four large areas in search of microprocessor chips that control the Yeerk ship. Make sure no one sees you using your special powers, though, or you'll be the government's newest guinea pig! Keep an eye out for the Yeerks as well, as they are more than willing to put an end to your quest. Fortunately, you can battle back with the power of the beasts. Save your progress with the password save function to continue the search another day.
overview_zh: ANIMORPHS 是改編自熱門兒童書系列與電視影集的單人 RPG。玩家扮演 Animorphs 一群擁有觸碰即可變身為任何動物能力的孩子。身為 Animorph，必須運用這些獨特能力阻止外星種族 Yeerks 對地球的入侵。為了保衛家園，你會變身為大象、魚、鳥、老鼠等多種動物。探索四個廣大區域，尋找控制 Yeerk 母艦的微處理器晶片。使用能力時切記不能被人看見，否則會成為政府的實驗品！同時也要小心 Yeerks 隨時準備阻止你的行動。所幸你能化身野獸與之對抗。可使用密碼存檔，留待日後再戰。

overview_en: Based on the hit movie from DreamWorks, ANTZ for the Game Boy Color is a wild platform adventure that spans 19 levels. Playing as both Z and Princess Bala in this single-player adventure from Infogrames, you'll advance through side-scrolling scenes taken straight from the movie. Beautifully-detailed graphics capture the essence of the jaw-dropping movie visuals in each of the levels, and varied mission goals keep the gameplay fresh throughout. Use pick-axes to dispatch your foes, but look out for common ant disasters like the dreaded magnifying glass. Even a simple shoe can prove to be a major problem when you are ant-sized! Can you defeat the evil General Mandible and save your colony? Save your progress with a handy password feature when you're finished playing for the day. ANTZ is giant-sized fun for everyone!
overview_zh: 改編自 DreamWorks 的賣座電影，Game Boy Color 版《ANTZ》是橫跨 19 關的瘋狂平台冒險。在這款 Infogrames 推出的單人冒險中，玩家可操作 Z 與 Bala 公主，闖過取材自電影的橫向捲軸關卡。精緻的圖像捕捉了原片震撼的視覺，多樣的任務目標讓玩法保持新鮮。使用十字鎬擊退敵人，但要小心螞蟻常見的災難 例如令人聞風喪膽的放大鏡。當你只有螞蟻大小時，連一隻鞋子都會是大麻煩！能否擊敗邪惡的 Mandible 將軍、拯救蟻群？遊戲結束時可使用密碼功能存檔。《ANTZ》是適合所有人的巨大樂趣！

overview_en: Who'd have thought that racing's biggest stars could be so small? Join all of your favorite insects from DreamWorks' 1998 animated classic, ANTZ, in this kart-racing take on the film. Play as favorite characters from ANTZ, such as Cutter, Azteca, Weaver, Bala, and Z. Each character will be rated in different performance areas, allowing for a number of various racing strategies and styles. Exactly what sort of vehicles to such tiny beings ride? You'll hop into the driver's seat in modes of transportation like a sardine can, a nutshell, and a leaf in this creative classic. The 10 unique tracks will be the stage for all of the heated competition, and each of the game's five environments is lifted straight from the film. Packed with awesome power-ups and wicked shortcuts, ANTZ RACING is the perfect addition to your Game Boy Color library whether you're a fan of the movie or you're just looking for a fun kart race.
overview_zh: 誰能想到賽車界的明星竟如此渺小？加入 DreamWorks 1998 年動畫經典《ANTZ》的所有可愛昆蟲，在這款卡丁車賽車作品中重溫電影世界。可選擇 Cutter、Azteca、Weaver、Bala、Z 等熟悉角色，每位角色在不同性能項目皆有評價，讓玩家能採用多樣的賽車策略與風格。這些迷你生物到底駕駛什麼樣的車輛？沙丁魚罐頭、堅果殼、樹葉……都是本作創意十足的座駕。10 條獨特賽道將是激戰舞台，5 種環境皆取自電影。搭配豐富的道具與隱藏捷徑，無論是電影迷還是純粹想體驗趣味卡丁車賽，《ANTZ RACING》都是 Game Boy Color 收藏的絕佳選擇。

overview_en: Antz World Sportz is a racing game, developed by M4 Limited and published by LSP, which was released in Europe in 2001.
overview_zh: Antz World Sportz 是由 M4 Limited 開發、LSP 發行的賽車遊戲，於 2001 年在歐洲推出。

overview_en: Choose your favorite tropical fish, aquatic plants, decorations, etc. in the aquarium, and keep the tropical fish in the Game Boy. Feed it, replace it with water to clean it, and grow it like a real tropical fish. There are more than 20 types of tropical fish in all. Some tropical fish cannot be kept in reality. It is compatible with pocket printers, and it is also possible to retrieve tropical fish data. There are two modes, a "scenario mode" in which the number of tropical fish that can be bred increases as you clear the three scenarios, and a "free mode" in which you can freely breed those fish. You can also exchange fish and eggs with your friends using the communication cable.
overview_zh: 在水族箱中挑選喜愛的熱帶魚、水草、裝飾品等，於 Game Boy 中飼養熱帶魚。餵食、換水清潔、像照顧真實熱帶魚般培育。共有超過 20 種熱帶魚，部分是現實中無法飼養的種類。支援 Pocket Printer，也可匯出熱帶魚資料。遊戲分為兩種模式：「劇情模式」中通過三個劇情後可飼養的熱帶魚種類會增加；「自由模式」可隨意飼養。也能透過通訊纜線與朋友交換魚與魚卵。

title_en: ARLE NO BOUKEN - MAHOU NO JEWEL
no_intro_name: Arle no Bouken - Mahou no Jewel (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Arles' weapons this time are the "Monstaa" who became cards. Call Monstaa from the cards you get and win the card battle with the enemies who are blocking your way! If you set the jewel that you can get in the adventure on the card (jewel tuning system), Monsta will power up and evolve. Monstaa can only get the cards that the enemy has when he beats the enemy. Monsuta that you have seen or made friends with are recorded in Arles's "Monsuta Ajiten", so collect and tune all the Monsutas to make your own "Monsuta". Let's make "Monsta Ajiten"!
overview_zh: 亞爾魯這次的武器是化為卡片的「Monstaa」。從取得的卡片召喚 Monstaa，在牌組對戰中擊敗擋路的敵人！將冒險中取得的寶石嵌入卡片（寶石調諧系統），Monstaa 就能強化進化。Monstaa 卡片只能透過擊敗敵人取得。看過或結交為夥伴的 Monstaa 都會記錄在亞爾魯的「Monsuta 字典」中，蒐集並調諧所有 Monstaa 來打造專屬於自己的「Monsuta」。一起完成「Monsta 字典」吧！

overview_en: Experience the thrills and action of standing alone against an entire alien invasion in ARMORINES: Project S.W.A.R.M. for Game Boy Color. You're just one Armorine against an entire race of vicious alien bugs bent on destroying all human life on Venus. Play through six overhead levels full of action and puzzles. Beware, because the enemy is intelligent and won't hesitate to use strategy to defeat you. Make use of five different weapons, including the laser, the flamethrower, and the plasma rifle to deal with the relentless assault. Work your way through a variety of levels all the way up to the Mothership, where you'll put a stop to this invasion for good! ARMORINES: Project S.W.A.R.M. features a wide variety of well-detailed enemies along with richly-colored graphics that will draw you right into the action. Use the password function to continue the fight another day!
overview_zh: 在 Game Boy Color 版《ARMORINES: Project S.W.A.R.M.》中，體驗孤身對抗整支外星入侵大軍的驚險刺激。你是唯一的 Armorine，要對抗整個意圖殲滅金星人類的兇殘外星蟲族。挑戰六關充滿動作與解謎的俯視關卡。當心敵人具備智能，會運用策略擊敗你。使用雷射、火焰噴射器、電漿步槍等五種武器迎擊無止盡的進攻。一路打到母艦，徹底終結這場入侵！本作敵人種類豐富、細節描繪細膩，搭配色彩豐富的畫面，將你帶入動作之中。可使用密碼功能繼續未完的戰鬥！

overview_en:
Army Men is a mission-based combat game that has you guiding a green plastic commando named Sarge in warfare against a tan-colored toy army. Soldiers use bazookas, grenades, flamethrowers, mortars, automatic rifles, and land mines to trash each other. You can also drive jeeps and tanks across the varied terrain. To help you learn the controls, a boot camp option offers a series of eight training missions. 

Once you are ready, choose from two campaigns: desert and alpine. Review your objectives before each mission on the briefing screen, and prepare for battle against an onslaught of plastic troops. A mission will fail if you exceed the time limit, allow your rivals to win, or let Sarge die. The options screen lets you view current objectives, consult a strategic map, exit vehicles, and abort your mission. You can also adjust the control scheme, select a difficulty level, and toggle music.
overview_zh:
Army Men 是任務制戰鬥遊戲，玩家操控綠色塑膠突擊隊員 Sarge，與一群棕褐色玩具軍隊作戰。士兵使用火箭筒、手榴彈、火焰噴射器、迫擊砲、自動步槍與地雷彼此攻擊，也能駕駛吉普車與戰車穿越各種地形。新兵訓練營提供 8 個訓練任務，協助你熟悉操作。

準備好之後，可選擇沙漠或高山兩個戰役。每場任務開始前可在簡報畫面確認目標，準備迎戰塑膠軍隊的猛攻。若超過時限、讓對手獲勝或讓 Sarge 陣亡，任務即告失敗。選項畫面可檢視當前目標、查看戰略地圖、下車或放棄任務，也能調整操作配置、選擇難度並切換音樂。

overview_en: Army Men 2 is an Action game, developed by Digital Eclipse and published by 3DO, which was released in 2000.
overview_zh: Army Men 2 是由 Digital Eclipse 開發、3DO 發行的動作遊戲，於 2000 年推出。

overview_en: Pilot one of four toy helicopters through the treacherous terrain of your backyard, the local playground, picnic areas and nearby beaches. Engage in both air-to-air and air-to-ground combat with enemies ranging from battleships to butterflies. Utilize the unique abilities of each 'copter to battle armies of mutant insects; destroy rampaging remote control cars; blow up sand castles; and save Sarge from being melted by kids with magnifying glasses. Real combat. Plastic men.
overview_zh: 駕駛四種玩具直升機之一，穿越家中後院、社區遊樂場、野餐區與附近海灘等險惡地形。對抗從戰艦到蝴蝶等各式敵人，進行空對空與空對地戰鬥。善用每架直升機的獨特能力，迎戰突變昆蟲大軍、摧毀失控的遙控車、炸毀沙堡，並從拿放大鏡的小孩手中救出 Sarge。真實的戰鬥，塑膠的士兵。

overview_en:
Sarge and the Bravo Company Commandos managed to foil the Tan Army's first assault, but do they have what it takes this time?
General Plasto has teamed up with Brigitte Bleu, a diabolically treacherous Blue Spy, the destroy the Green Nation once and for all.
The adventure continues as Sarge and Vikki fight their way over pool tables, around a bedroom and across desktops to the final showdown against Plastro and his troops. Prepare for another gigantic battle!
overview_zh:
Sarge 與 Bravo 連的突擊隊員雖然成功瓦解棕褐軍的第一波攻勢，但這次他們還有實力應戰嗎？
Plasto 將軍與陰險狡詐的藍方間諜 Brigitte Bleu 聯手，誓言徹底消滅綠色國度。
冒險繼續，Sarge 與 Vikki 將在撞球桌、臥室與書桌之間奮戰，迎向與 Plastro 及其部隊的最終決戰。準備迎接另一場巨大的戰鬥！

overview_en: Based on the PBS children's cartoon, ARTHUR'S ABSOLUTELY FUN DAY offers up a ton of fun for fans of the show. In this single-player game for Game Boy Color, you play as Arthur, who wants to go to the ultimate amusement park, Wonder World. There are over 15 mini-games in Arthur's neighborhood (including air hockey, shooting hoops, cooking pancakes, and a whole lot more), each with its own style of gameplay, from simple timing exercises to mild puzzle solving. You get stars for completing them and once you have enough, you will earn a free pass to Wonder World, where all the mini-games are available for you to play whenever you like. ARTHUR'S ABSOLUTELY FUN DAY is an ideal choice for a younger gamer.
overview_zh: 改編自 PBS 兒童卡通的《ARTHUR'S ABSOLUTELY FUN DAY》為粉絲帶來滿滿樂趣。這款 Game Boy Color 單人遊戲中，你扮演 Arthur，目標是前往終極遊樂園 Wonder World。Arthur 的鄰里中提供超過 15 種小遊戲（包括氣墊球、投籃、煎鬆餅等），各有不同玩法，從簡單的時機練習到輕度解謎都有。完成可獲得星星，集滿後即可獲得 Wonder World 的免費通行證，於園內隨時遊玩所有小遊戲。本作非常適合年幼的玩家。

overview_en: Caesar has erected a new barricade around the village of the indomitable gauls, to keep them trapped inside. Join Asterix and Obelix and travel across the Roman Empire. Here you will enter a bullfight, participate in a rugby match, and even take part in the Olympic Games. Bring a souvenir from each country you visit, in order to prove to Caesar that the Gauls are the strongest heroes.
overview_zh: 凱撒在不屈服的高盧村莊周圍築起新的封鎖線，想將他們困於村內。加入 Asterix 與 Obelix，橫越羅馬帝國。在此你將參加鬥牛、橄欖球賽，甚至參與奧林匹克運動會。從每個造訪的國家帶回紀念品，向凱撒證明高盧人是最強的英雄。

overview_en: Relive the adventures of Asterix and Obelix. Take control of your favourite cartoon heroes of totally addictive action. Take on the ranks of leggionnaires, the formidable Roman catapults and the unforgettable finishing levels of ever increasing difficulty. Some magic potion will make you fly.
overview_zh: 重溫 Asterix 與 Obelix 的冒險。操作你最愛的卡通英雄，體驗超上癮的動作。對抗成排的羅馬軍團、強大的羅馬投石機，以及難度逐步升高、令人印象深刻的最終關卡。某些魔法藥水還能讓你飛行。

overview_en:
If you have trouble choosing between an adventure game with a suspenseful, in-depth investigation and a game of skill made for joystick fanatics, "Asterix: search for Dogmatix" is just for you!

If you play in "adventure" mode, you set out to search for Dogmatix in six worlds and 30 levels (taking you on journeys throughout Gaul, Egypt, Rome, etc.). And the dozen or so mini-games in "instant fun" mode are sure to keep your fingers busy between two stations on the underground.

There's a catch, though: to access the whole set of mini-games, you have to win Bonus Tokens by playing in "adventure" mode. By Belenos, this is a game for the truly indomitable!
overview_zh:
如果你猶豫該選擇懸疑深入的冒險解謎遊戲，還是熱愛搖桿的技巧競技遊戲，那麼《Asterix: search for Dogmatix》正是為你打造的！

在「冒險」模式中，你將踏遍 6 個世界、30 個關卡尋找 Dogmatix（足跡遍布高盧、埃及、羅馬等地）；「即時樂趣」模式中提供約 12 種小遊戲，讓你在地鐵兩站之間也能消遣手指。

但有個前提：要解鎖所有小遊戲，必須在「冒險」模式中贏取獎勵代幣。以 Belenos 之名，這真是不屈服勇者才能征服的遊戲！

overview_en: Your spaceship is trapped in a deadly asteroid belt. You will have to destroy the drifting asteroid boulders before they destroy your spaceship. But, watch out for enemy spacecraft. Fire your missiles to destroy the boulders and the enemy.
overview_zh: 你的太空船被困在致命的小行星帶中，必須在飄移的小行星撞毀太空船前先行摧毀。但也要當心敵方太空船。發射飛彈擊毀岩塊與敵機。

title_en: ATSUMETE ASOBU KUMA NO POOH-SAN - MORI NO TAKARAMONO
no_intro_name: Atsumete Asobu Kuma no Pooh-san - Mori no Takaramono (Japan)

overview_en: Fans of AUSTIN POWERS will find a lot to do in AUSTIN POWERS: Oh Behave! This game turns your Game Boy Color into a mini-organizer, complete with a word processor (Austin's Pad), a calculator (the Shagulator), and a mockup web browser that contains facts about the popular movies. Looking for something a bit more game-related? Well, AUSTIN POWERS has those in spades, too! The largest of the games, "International Man in a Platform Game," is just what it sounds like. In it you play as Austin through a multitude of platform levels that feature full-color graphics inspired by the movie. Also available for your enjoyment are the "Mojo Maze," a takeoff on PAC-MAN, "Domination," a board game similar to OTHELLO, and finally "Rock or Paper or Scissors," which pits you against an Austin Powers villain in a play of the classic game. Customize the backdrop of all the fun by choosing wallpaper, screensavers, sound effects, and more. You can also link up to play some of the games with a friend or foe using either AUSTIN POWERS: Oh Behave! or AUSTIN POWERS: Welcome to My Underground Lair.
overview_zh: 《AUSTIN POWERS》的粉絲在《AUSTIN POWERS: Oh Behave!》中能找到許多樂趣！本作把你的 Game Boy Color 變成一台迷你管理機，內建文字處理器（Austin's Pad）、計算機（Shagulator），以及收錄電影資料的模擬網頁瀏覽器。想要更貼近遊戲的內容？《AUSTIN POWERS》也準備了不少。最大的遊戲「International Man in a Platform Game」如其名，你將操控 Austin 闖過多個取材自電影的彩色平台關卡。其他還有模仿《PAC-MAN》的「Mojo Maze」、類似《OTHELLO》的棋盤遊戲「Domination」，以及與 AUSTIN POWERS 反派對決的「Rock or Paper or Scissors」剪刀石頭布。可選擇桌布、螢幕保護程式、音效等個人化背景。亦可使用《AUSTIN POWERS: Oh Behave!》或《AUSTIN POWERS: Welcome to My Underground Lair》連線與好友或敵人對戰。

title_en: AUSTIN POWERS - WELCOME TO MY UNDERGROUND LAIR!
no_intro_name: Austin Powers - Welcome to my Underground Lair! (USA)
overview_en: Fans of AUSTIN POWERS will find a lot to do in AUSTIN POWERS: Welcome to My Underground Lair. This game turns your Game Boy Color into a mini-organizer, complete with a word processor (the Evil Launch Pad), a calculator (the Frickulator), and a mockup web browser that contains facts about the popular movies. Looking for something a bit more game-related? Well, AUSTIN POWERS has those in spades, too. The largest of the games, "Kin-Evil," has Dr. Evil and Mini-Me riding their scooter through a variety of stunt-packed stages. Also available for your enjoyment are the "Mojo Maze," a takeoff on PAC-MAN, "Domination," a board game similar to OTHELLO, and finally "Rock or Paper or Scissors," which pits you against an AUSTIN POWERS character in a play of the classic game. Customize the backdrop of all this fun by choosing wallpaper, screensavers, sound effects, and more. You can also link up to play some of the games with a friend or foe using either AUSTIN POWERS: Oh Behave! or AUSTIN POWERS: Welcome to My Underground Lair.
overview_zh: 《AUSTIN POWERS》的粉絲在《AUSTIN POWERS: Welcome to My Underground Lair》中能找到許多樂趣。本作把你的 Game Boy Color 變成一台迷你管理機，內建文字處理器（Evil Launch Pad）、計算機（Frickulator），以及收錄電影資料的模擬網頁瀏覽器。想要更貼近遊戲的內容？《AUSTIN POWERS》也準備了不少。最大的遊戲「Kin-Evil」中，Dr. Evil 與 Mini-Me 將駕駛速可達穿越各種特技關卡。其他還有模仿《PAC-MAN》的「Mojo Maze」、類似《OTHELLO》的棋盤遊戲「Domination」，以及與 AUSTIN POWERS 角色對決的「Rock or Paper or Scissors」剪刀石頭布。可選擇桌布、螢幕保護程式、音效等個人化背景。亦可使用《AUSTIN POWERS: Oh Behave!》或《AUSTIN POWERS: Welcome to My Underground Lair》連線與好友或敵人對戰。

overview_en: "Inazuma Seal", which was created in collaboration with Izumi Eda, the original author of the blockbuster character "Sushi Seal", and HAKUEI of the rock band "Penicillin", has been made into a game as a squadron. Get the transformation power and defeat the polar bear king in dance games and bowling games! Polar bear kings are playing shooting games and card battles. The game music is newly composed by "Penicillin" for this work. The four characters are inspired by each member of "Penicillin".
overview_zh: 由超人氣角色「壽司海豹」原作者江田泉與搖滾樂團「Penicillin」的 HAKUEI 合作打造的「閃電海豹」，以戰隊形式遊戲化。獲得變身力量，在跳舞遊戲與保齡球遊戲中擊敗北極熊王！北極熊王則玩著射擊遊戲與卡牌對戰。遊戲音樂由「Penicillin」為本作全新譜寫，4 位角色靈感來自「Penicillin」各成員。

overview_en:
For years the Monster Tower has beckoned to you and, today, on your fifteenth birthday, you have come of age. You can finally enter the Tower to discover what has happened to your father. Though beware, the tower changes every time you step foot into it. Do you follow in your father's footsteps or live a peaceful life in the town of Monsbaiya - it's time to choose.

- Discover demon eggs and breed them to create new viscious monsters.
- Gain fortune and fame to help your family and town grow in prosperity.
- Journey to the top of the tower with an ever- changing layout of the floors.
- Seach for more powerful monsters inside the tower with your monster tamiliars.
overview_zh:
多年來，魔物之塔一直在召喚你；今天，在你 15 歲生日之際，你終於成年。你終可踏入塔中，查明父親身上發生了什麼事。但要小心，這座塔每次踏入都會變化。要追隨父親的腳步，還是在 Monsbaiya 鎮過著平靜生活 該由你選擇。

- 發現魔物蛋，培育出新的兇猛魔物。
- 累積財富與名聲，幫助你的家庭與城鎮繁榮。
- 在不斷變化的樓層配置中向塔頂前進。
- 帶著魔物夥伴，在塔內尋找更強大的魔物。

title_en: B-DAMAN BAKUGAIDEN V - FINAL MEGA TUNE
no_intro_name: B-Daman Bakugaiden V - Final Mega Tune (Japan)

title_en: B-DAMAN BAKUGAIDEN - VICTORY E NO MICHI
no_intro_name: B-Daman Bakugaiden - Victory e no Michi (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: Puzzle fans that enjoyed the BABE movie series will find a lot to like here. BABE AND FRIENDS, a single-player puzzle game for Game Boy Color, has the little porcine hero guiding his herd through 40 levels that span such locations as the farm, the airport, and the city. In each level there is a checkered flag, to which Babe must take a herd. The sheep aren't very good at finding their own paths, so Babe has to walk them through every step of the way. Clear obstacles, set up roadblocks to make detours, and generally do what you have to in order to make a safe route for the sheep. Watch out for obstructions such as carts in the airport and rushing rivers on the farm. Detailed still-screens of all of Babe's friends appear between the levels to move the story along. A password save system is included if you need to take a break from the brain-bending action. Can Babe save the day once again?
overview_zh: 喜愛《BABE》電影系列的解謎玩家在這裡能找到許多樂趣。Game Boy Color 上的單人解謎遊戲《BABE AND FRIENDS》中，這隻小豬英雄要帶領羊群通過 40 個關卡，場景遍及農場、機場與城市。每關都有一面格紋旗，Babe 必須將羊群引導到旗下。羊不擅長自己找路，所以 Babe 必須一步步帶領。清除障礙、設置路障繞道，總之要為羊隻開闢安全路線。當心機場的推車、農場的湍流等障礙。關卡之間穿插 Babe 朋友們的精細靜畫，推進劇情。內建密碼存檔，可在燒腦中途休息。Babe 能否再次拯救大家？

overview_en: Baby Felix Halloween is a platformer developed by Bit Managers and published by Light & Shadow Productions for the Game Boy Color platform. Baby Felix Halloween was only released in European countries.
overview_zh: Baby Felix Halloween 是由 Bit Managers 開發、Light & Shadow Productions 發行的 Game Boy Color 平台遊戲，僅在歐洲國家發行。

overview_en: Backgammon, the world's most widely played and recognised board game just got portable. The ultimate game of chance and skill now available on Game Boy, chose from 3 modes of play including "Tournament, Free and Vs Match" and 6 difficulty levels.
overview_zh: Backgammon 全球最普及、最為人知的桌上遊戲，現在攜帶版來了。這款集機運與技巧於一身的終極桌遊登上 Game Boy，提供「Tournament、Free、Vs Match」3 種模式與 6 種難度可選。
publisher:
JVC Music Europe EU
Altron JP

title_en: BAKUKYUU RENPATSU!! SUPER B-DAMAN - GEKITAN! RISING VALKYRIE!!
no_intro_name: Bakukyuu Renpatsu!! Super B-Daman - Gekitan! Rising Valkyrie!! (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: An RPG based on the popular manga "Bakukyu Barrage! Super Bidaman" in "CoroCoro Comic". Many popular characters appearing in the original are all here! !! The battle is a "visual battle" that utilizes the GBC screen. Equipped with "hero growth system". Of course, you can exchange parts with your friends using the communication cable, so you can customize your own B-Daman.
overview_zh: 改編自《CoroCoro Comic》上的人氣漫畫《爆球連發!! Super B-Daman》的 RPG。原作中登場的人氣角色全部到齊！戰鬥採用活用 GBC 畫面的「視覺戰鬥」，並搭載「英雄成長系統」。當然也能透過通訊纜線與朋友交換零件，自訂專屬的 B-Daman。

title_en: BAKUSOU DEKOTORA DENSETSU GB SPECIAL - OTOKO DOKYOU NO TENKA TOUITSU
no_intro_name: Bakusou Dekotora Densetsu GB Special - Otoko Dokyou no Tenka Touitsu (Japan)

title_en: BAKUSOU SENKI METAL WALKER GB - KOUTETSU NO YUUJOU
no_intro_name: Bakusou Senki Metal Walker GB - Koutetsu no Yuujou (Japan) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: The main character is a wild child, the earth, who polishes Beyblade's skills in the remote mountains. Beyblade is a new type of beigoma that battles using the various characteristics of each part by exchanging and customizing the parts divided into 5 layers. Familiar characters such as Takao, Kai, and Max will also appear, and a hot bay battle will take place. In addition to the bay battle, which shows the movement just like the real thing, the live performance of the bay braider DJ has been added, and the battle has become more realistic. As the earth grows, it becomes stronger in battle and can exert various hidden powers such as the use of special moves. If you use infrared communication, you can have a one-on-one bay battle with your friends.
overview_zh: 主角是在偏遠山中磨練戰鬥陀螺技巧的野孩子大地。戰鬥陀螺是新型陀螺，透過交換、自訂分為 5 層的零件，運用各部位的特性對戰。Takao、Kai、Max 等熟悉的角色也會登場，展開熱血的陀螺對戰。除了動作宛如實物的陀螺戰鬥外，還新增了 Beyblader DJ 的現場演出，戰鬥更具臨場感。隨著大地成長，戰鬥力會增強，並能發揮各種隱藏力量，例如使出必殺技。使用紅外線通訊，可與朋友進行一對一陀螺對戰。

overview_en: Puzzle Players Unite! Ballistic is the exciting new action puzzle game everyone's been talking about! It's simple to play and offers endless hours of fun. Your goal is to keep the balls from reaching the center gate. rotate the launcher and shoot the balls into a constantly growing sting of balls. Matching three-of-a-kind creates a "chain reaction" and makes them disappear. Combine multiple chains for even more points!
overview_zh: 解謎玩家集合！《Ballistic》是大家都在討論的全新動作解謎遊戲！玩法簡單，樂趣無窮。目標是阻止球體抵達中央閘門。旋轉發射器，將球射入持續延長的球串中。三球同色相連會引發「連鎖反應」消除球體。多重連鎖可獲得更高分數！

no_intro_name: Balloon Fight GB (Japan) (SGB Enhanced, GB Compatible) (NP)
overview_en: Take to the skies in a balloon to save your younger brother. In the little town of Pencilvania, there lived a brother and sister who loved to play with balloons. Alice and her younger brother Jim would spend countless days filling the skies with their balloons. One day, Jim filled all of his balloons and tied them together to make a beautiful balloon rainbow across the sky. But suddenly, a strong wind came and carried Jim away. As Alice, you must save your brother from peril. Float through eight different stages as you follow Jim's trail of balloons. Collect as many balloons as possible to earn bonuses. Test your piloting skills to avoid enemies, or let go of your balloons to face enemies on the ground. In "Balloon Trip" mode, compete for the highest score and move up the ranks. Take a big gulp of courage and give Alice a hand as she searches for her missing brother.
overview_zh: 搭乘氣球升空，拯救你的弟弟。Pencilvania 小鎮上住著一對熱愛玩氣球的姊弟。Alice 與弟弟 Jim 整天放氣球填滿天空。某天 Jim 把所有氣球綁在一起做成一道美麗的氣球彩虹，卻突然被一陣強風帶走。身為 Alice，你必須拯救陷入危機的弟弟。沿著 Jim 留下的氣球痕跡飄過 8 個關卡，盡可能蒐集氣球賺取獎勵。考驗操控技巧躲避敵人，或鬆開氣球落到地面與敵人交戰。在「Balloon Trip」模式中爭取最高分、晉升排名。鼓起勇氣，幫助 Alice 找回失蹤的弟弟。

no_intro_name: Barbie - Chasse au Tresor Sous-Marine (France) (GB Compatible)
Barbie - Fashion Pack Games (USA, Europe) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Barbie: Fashion Pack Games is an Action game, developed by Hyperspace Cowgirls and published by Mattel, which was released in 2000.
overview_zh: Barbie: Fashion Pack Games 是由 Hyperspace Cowgirls 開發、Mattel 發行的動作遊戲，於 2000 年推出。

overview_en: Barbie: Magic Genie Adventure is an Action game, developed by Vicarious Visions and published by Mattel, which was released in 2000.
overview_zh: Barbie: Magic Genie Adventure 是由 Vicarious Visions 開發、Mattel 發行的動作遊戲，於 2000 年推出。

overview_en: Barbie: Ocean Discovery is an Action game, developed by Realtime Associates and published by Mattel, which was released in 1999.
overview_zh: Barbie: Ocean Discovery 是由 Realtime Associates 開發、Mattel 發行的動作遊戲，於 1999 年推出。

overview_en: Barbie: Pet Rescue is an Action game, developed by HotGen and published by Mattel, which was released in 2001.
overview_zh: Barbie: Pet Rescue 是由 HotGen 開發、Mattel 發行的動作遊戲，於 2001 年推出。

overview_en: Collect, grow and evolve. I'll teach you how to play birdigans in a fun way! How many bodies did you collect? Introducing Barroid. Get stronger with training! Barroid enhancement plan.
overview_zh: 蒐集、培育、進化。以有趣的方式教你如何玩 Bardigun！你蒐集了多少身體？介紹 Barroid。透過訓練變得更強！Barroid 強化計畫。

overview_en: Now when you can't get out to the lake, you can go fishing on your Game Boy Color with Bassmasters Classic. Choose from a variety of lures and hit your favorite fishing hole. You cast the line by stopping a power meter at one of five positions more power equals more distance. After you cast the line, you must wait for a fish to strike. When it does, get ready for a fight. Once you get the fish to the boat the game is not over, as you must stick you hand into the water and grab the catch. If you can't get a hold of it within three tries, you'll be telling stories about the one that got away. All of this action takes place in Practice and Tournament modes. If you can't get to the lake, bring the lake to you with Bassmasters Classic.
overview_zh: 現在無法到湖邊釣魚時，也能用 Game Boy Color 透過《Bassmasters Classic》享受釣魚樂。從多種擬餌中挑選，前往最愛的釣點。拋竿時讓力量計停在 5 個段位之一，力量越大距離越遠。拋線後，等待魚兒上鉤；魚一咬餌就準備搏鬥。把魚拉到船邊還沒結束，必須伸手入水把魚抓起。若三次都抓不住，就只能告訴朋友「跑掉的那一條有多大」了。所有動作可在練習與錦標賽模式中進行。無法去湖邊時，就讓《Bassmasters Classic》把湖帶到你身邊。

title_en: BATMAN BEYOND - RETURN OF THE JOKER
no_intro_name: Batman Beyond - Return of the Joker (Japan) (NP)
overview_en: In the future, a new Batman is called upon to fight the criminal element in the futuristic city of Gotham. BATMAN BEYOND: Return of the Joker, based on the animated movie, follows the adventures of Batman as he attempts to solve the mystery of the return of his fiercest foe. This side-scrolling one-player game takes the player through 16 levels patterned the animated series, which provides an authentic look. Progression through these levels is far from linear, allowing players to search out hidden rooms, weapons, and enemies. Batman must keep an eye out for more than just his enemies however, because the Joker has set a variety of traps all throughout the game. Use weapons like a club and Magnetic NunChaku, or just take to your foes with your fists and feet of fury! You can also utilize the unique abilities of five different Bat-suits, each granting their own special ability. It's up to you to finish off the Joker for good in BATMAN BEYOND: Return of the Joker.
overview_zh: 在未來的高譚未來都市，新一代蝙蝠俠被召喚對抗犯罪。改編自動畫電影的《BATMAN BEYOND: Return of the Joker》追隨蝙蝠俠調查死敵歸來之謎的冒險。這款橫向捲軸單人遊戲共有 16 關，造型仿自動畫影集，呈現原汁原味的視覺。各關卡的進行並非線性，玩家可探索隱藏房間、武器與敵人。蝙蝠俠不只要當心敵人，還要小心小丑在遊戲中佈下的各種陷阱。可使用棍棒與磁性雙截棍等武器，或直接以拳腳迎戰！亦可運用 5 套不同蝙蝠裝的獨特能力，每套都有專屬技能。在《BATMAN BEYOND: Return of the Joker》中徹底終結小丑，由你來辦到。

overview_en: The Batman returns on Game Boy Color with BATMAN: Total Chaos in Gotham City. Based on the popular animated BATMAN series, this single-player action game allows you to don the cowl of one of two Bat-heroes: Batman or Batgirl. Some of the Dark Knight's famous arch-villains have escaped and are causing serious trouble in Gotham, and it's up to you to put them back where they belong. Everyone from Poison Ivy to the Clown Prince of Crime the Joker himself is here to wreak havoc and keep the caped crusader busy. Grab your utility belt and assault 18 stages of varied action that take you on a tour of Gotham City. Much of the action is played from a side-scrolling perspective, but some levels have you taking out the Batmobile or the Batcycle in overhead high-speed excitement. Naturally, Batman and Batgirl are both packing their usual assortment of weapons and tools including the Batarang, the grappling hook, smoke bombs, and more.
overview_zh: 蝙蝠俠在《BATMAN: Total Chaos in Gotham City》中重返 Game Boy Color。改編自人氣動畫《蝙蝠俠》影集的這款單人動作遊戲讓你扮演蝙蝠俠或蝙蝠女兩位英雄之一。黑暗騎士的著名宿敵紛紛逃脫，在高譚市製造嚴重騷亂，由你將他們繩之以法。從毒藤女到犯罪小丑王子小丑本人都在這裡興風作浪，讓披風戰士忙得不可開交。穿上多功能腰帶，挑戰 18 關各式動作，遊覽整座高譚市。多數關卡採橫向捲軸視角，但部分關卡會駕駛蝙蝠車或蝙蝠機車進行俯視高速場景。當然蝙蝠俠與蝙蝠女都配備慣用的武器與工具，包括蝙蝠鏢、抓鉤、煙霧彈等。

title_en: BATMAN OF THE FUTURE - RETURN OF THE JOKER
no_intro_name: Batman of the Future - Return of the Joker (Europe) (En,Fr,De)

overview_en: Now it's your turn to sink your opponent's battleship in this Game Boy Color rendition of the classic strategic board game. Players deploy all four of their ships to different areas on a grid, and take turns firing shots at various parts of their opponent's grid. Hit each ship the required number of times, and the ship is removed from play. In a unique twist on the classic game, each ship has new weapons. For the solo player, there are 48 missions to complete with animated full-color cutscenes to inspire you to victory! The real challenge however, is taking on a human opponent via a link cable. Forget setting up the board and looking for missing pieces, this is the real way to play Battleship!
overview_zh: 輪到你在這款 Game Boy Color 版的經典戰略桌遊中擊沉對手戰艦了。玩家將四艘船部署到格子上的不同位置，輪流朝對方格子各區開砲。命中船艦達到指定次數即可擊沉。本作對經典遊戲做出獨特變化 每艘船都有新武器。單人遊玩有 48 個任務可挑戰，並搭配彩色動畫過場帶你邁向勝利！但真正的挑戰是透過連線纜線與真人對戰。不必再擺棋盤、找零件 這才是玩 Battleship 的正確方式！

overview_en: 2001 A.D. - The world as you know it is no more. A deadly virus has wiped out 99% of the female population and the few surviving women are now worshipped as QueenLords. You are Griffin Spade, warrior and Battlelord in a post-apocalyptic future. With only the BattleTanx at your command, you must save mankind from extinction! Fight your way across the wasteland that was once America and rescue the QueenLords from roving gangs of mercenaries and thugs.
overview_zh: 公元 2001 年 你所知的世界已不復存在。一場致命病毒消滅了 99% 的女性人口，少數倖存的女性如今被奉為 QueenLords。你是 Griffin Spade，後末日未來中的戰士與 Battlelord，僅有 BattleTanx 可指揮，必須拯救人類免於滅絕！打通昔日為美國的荒原，從橫行的傭兵與惡徒手中救出 QueenLords。

overview_en: Clear the stage by pressing the button at the right time according to the rhythm notes that scroll in time with the music. It will be cleared if the groove level reaches the red zone at the end of the performance. In addition to 10 songs from the arcade version and PS version, a total of 20 songs, including 10 GB original songs, are included. Various mode settings such as NORMAL, EXPERT, GB-MIX, FREE, VERSUS, etc.! You can carry it around and enjoy it in your favorite mode when you want.
overview_zh: 依照配合音樂捲動的節奏譜面，在正確時機按鍵以通關。演奏結束時 groove 等級達到紅色區段即過關。除街機版與 PS 版各 10 首歌外，再加上 GB 原創曲 10 首，共收錄 20 首樂曲。各種模式設定如 NORMAL、EXPERT、GB-MIX、FREE、VERSUS 等齊全！可隨身攜帶，隨時以喜愛的模式遊玩。

no_intro_name: Beatmania GB 2 - Gotcha Mix (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: It consists of 25 songs and famous classic songs. There are even more ways to play the game, with a total of 4 play styles. It is also possible to increase the difficulty level. Added a cooperative "DUET" mode to 2P play. Let's get along well!
overview_zh: 由 25 首歌曲與經典名曲組成。玩法更多樣，總共 4 種遊玩風格，並可調高難度。2P 對戰新增合作的「DUET」模式。一起好好相處吧！

title_en: BEAUTY AND THE BEAST - A BOARD GAME ADVENTURE
no_intro_name: Beauty and the Beast - A Board Game Adventure (USA, Australia) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

title_en: BENJAMIN BLUEMCHEN - EIN VERRUECKTER TAG IM ZOO
no_intro_name: Benjamin Bluemchen - Ein verrueckter Tag im Zoo (Germany)

overview_en: The second installment of the monthly CoroCoro Comic series "Beyblade". The previous work was an RPG in which the main character Takao aims to win the world championship, but this work is a battle-centered game in which the players themselves participate in the tournament tournament and collide. The player will become a resident of the world of GB software "Beyblade", power up Beyblade mainly in battle and remodeling, and face various rivals such as Takao and Kai in tournaments. One of the four Beyblade Registration Chapter cards is included, and the first Beyblade a player gets is determined by this card.
overview_zh: 月刊《CoroCoro Comic》連載作品《Beyblade》的第二款遊戲。前作是主角 Takao 立志贏得世界冠軍的 RPG，本作則是以對戰為主的遊戲，讓玩家親自參加錦標賽與其他選手碰撞。玩家化身 GB 軟體《Beyblade》世界中的居民，主要透過對戰與改造強化 Beyblade，於錦標賽中對抗 Takao、Kai 等多位對手。包裝內附 4 種「Beyblade 註冊章」卡片之一，玩家最初取得的 Beyblade 由此卡決定。

title_en: BIBI BLOCKSBERG - IM BANN DER HEXENKUGEL
no_intro_name: Bibi Blocksberg - Im Bann der Hexenkugel (Germany)
overview_en: Beim großen Hexentreffen geht einiges schief: Ein Blitz schlägt in die Hexenkugel ein und die Hexen trifft ein Bann. Nur Bibi Blocksberg kann mit viel Geschick den Bann der Hexenkugel aufheben. Die kleinen User erwarten sechs verschiedenartige Levels mit abwechslungsreichen Aufgaben, die Kombinationsgabe, viel Geschick und schnelle Reaktion erfordern. Ausgestattet mit allem, was die kleinen Fans von Ihrer Lieblingshexe erwarten, bietet dieser Titel lang anhaltenden Spielspaß für zu Hause und unterwegs.
overview_zh: 在大型女巫聚會上事情出了差錯：閃電擊中魔法球，使女巫們陷入魔咒。只有 Bibi Blocksberg 能憑藉技巧解除魔法球的詛咒。小玩家將迎來 6 種風格各異的關卡與多樣任務，需要組合思考、靈巧操作與快速反應。配備了所有小粉絲對最愛女巫的期待，本作為居家或外出帶來持久的遊戲樂趣。

title_en: BIBI UND TINA - FOHLEN FELIX IN GEFAHR
no_intro_name: Bibi und Tina - Fohlen Felix in Gefahr (Germany)
Bikkuriman 2000 - Charging Card GB (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: There are more than 110 types of character stickers! Players aim to complete their dreams. Card ability, sticker perfection, character knowledge ... When the three powers are the highest, you can get the title "Head Class" of the surprise man champion. The hero repeats card battles with various opponents while walking around on the map. The rules are simple! Combine the "Angel" and "Devil" cards well to create a "role" with a high score, and combine the stickers you get with the cards to power them up! Dr. Card, Dr. Chojin will kindly explain the rules of card battle. Card battles and stickers can be exchanged using a communication cable.
overview_zh: 登場角色貼紙超過 110 種！玩家以實現夢想為目標。卡片能力、貼紙完成度、角色知識……三種力量達到最高時，就能取得「驚奇人冠軍」的「Head Class」稱號。主角在地圖上行走，與各種對手反覆進行卡牌對戰。規則簡單！妥善搭配「天使」與「惡魔」卡，組成高分「役」，並把取得的貼紙與卡片組合來強化！卡片博士、超人博士會親切說明卡牌對戰規則。可使用通訊纜線進行卡片對戰與貼紙交換。

overview_en:
Experience a brand new chapter in Cpacom's classic horror survival series: Resident Evil. Now a desperate fight for survival takes place aboard a luxury cruise-liner overflowing with a host of deadly zombies. There is no escape. As S.T.A.R.S. operative Barry Burton, it's up to you to save Leon Kennedy, rescue a young survivor named Lucia and disable a deadly Bio-Organic Weapon. With countless traps to avoid, rooms to explore, puzzles to solve and mysteries to uncover, each lurking horror survived will take you closer to the source of the Resident Evil. Survival is your only option.

The Japanese edition comes with a manual and a survey/ registration card. The cartridge is wrapped into a small plastic bag, and placed inside the removable interior of the box. Japanese GBC games were not sealed.

UID: CGB-BIOJ-JPN
overview_zh:
體驗 Capcom 經典恐怖生存系列《Resident Evil》的全新章節。一場為了生存的絕望戰鬥在一艘充滿致命殭屍的豪華郵輪上展開，無路可逃。身為 S.T.A.R.S. 隊員 Barry Burton，你必須拯救 Leon Kennedy、營救年幼倖存者 Lucia，並癱瘓一隻致命的生物有機兵器。需要躲避無數陷阱、探索房間、解開謎題、揭開祕密，每熬過一個潛伏的恐怖，就更接近 Resident Evil 的源頭。生存是你唯一的選擇。

日版隨附說明書與調查/註冊卡。卡帶以小塑膠袋包裝，置於外盒可拆卸的內襯中。日版 GBC 遊戲未經密封。

UID: CGB-BIOJ-JPN

overview_en:
Bionic Commando: Elite Forces is a 2000 Game Boy Color video game developed by Nintendo Software Technology and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on January 24, 2000.

You are the ultimate weapon. You are the perfect synthesis of human and machine - a Bionic Commando. Your latest mission - to rescue a fellow commando, Commando Joe - will take you deep into the heart of enemy territory. Use your Bionic Claw to grapple and swing through more than 20 levels of forest, deserts, mountains and futuristic cities Blast through dozens of unique with your Assault Rifle, Rocket Launcher and Flame Thrower as you seek to destroy the overlord Arturus, and save your homeland of Karinia from utter destruction.
overview_zh:
Bionic Commando: Elite Forces 是 2000 年的 Game Boy Color 遊戲，由 Nintendo Software Technology 開發、Nintendo of America 於 2000 年 1 月 24 日在美國發行。

你是終極兵器，是人與機械的完美合一 一名 Bionic Commando。你的最新任務 救出戰友 Commando Joe 將深入敵境腹地。運用仿生爪鉤盪過 20 餘關的森林、沙漠、山岳與未來都市；以突擊步槍、火箭發射器與火焰噴射器擊潰各式敵人，目標摧毀霸主 Arturus，拯救你的祖國 Karinia 免於毀滅。

no_intro_name: Black Bass - Lure Fishing (USA, Europe) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Now you can enter a summer-long fishing tournament in BLACK BASS LURE FISHING. At the beginning of the tournament, you have the lowest ranking and can only fish on one lake. But if you perform well enough and move up the ranks, your class will change and you will be able to choose which of the two lakes you want to fish on. Should you do really well and move into the top two classes, you will be given access to special techniques like Let Fish Go, 8 Magic, Power Lift, Dancing Worm, Dancing Frog, and Last Strike. Along the way, you will be able to use eight different lures to attract the big fish and your progress will be recorded using a password system. So hop in your boat and try to win the tournament in BLACK BASS LURE FISHING.
overview_zh: 現在你可以在《BLACK BASS LURE FISHING》中參加為期一夏的釣魚錦標賽。比賽開始時排名最低，僅能在一座湖中釣魚；只要表現夠好、晉升排名，等級就會提升，可選擇兩座湖之一。若進入前兩個等級，便能使用 Let Fish Go、8 Magic、Power Lift、Dancing Worm、Dancing Frog、Last Strike 等特殊技巧。途中可使用 8 種擬餌引誘大魚，進度以密碼系統紀錄。跳上船，挑戰《BLACK BASS LURE FISHING》的錦標賽吧。

overview_en: You're blade, Gothic City's baddest vampire hunter. When rival vampire clams ignite a deadly feud, you go deep to do some serous demon killing. Stalk the undead through 24 gothic locations, then waste an arsenal of intense weapons. Plan on staying up late tonight 'cause and even greater evil awaits.
overview_zh: 你是 Blade，Gothic City 最強的吸血鬼獵人。當敵對的吸血鬼一族點燃致命仇怨，你便深入其中展開正面殺戮。穿越 24 個哥德場景追擊不死生物，再揮霍一整套猛烈武器。今晚要熬夜了 因為更可怕的邪惡正在等候。

no_intro_name: Blaster Master - Enemy Below (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
Jason, brave hero of yesteryear, is roused from retirement by the news that mutant lifeeorms, thought to have been long since destroyed, are once again on the move, hollowing out subterranean niches in the image of their old haunts. The decision to reactivate Sophia seems to Jason nothing more than an inevitability. Back into the cold once more...

- Eight areas to explore, to find the keys and kill the sub human bosses
- Use the tank’s suction system to drive up walls and along ceilings
- Drive Sophia or go it alone with Jason.
overview_zh:
昔日的勇者 Jason 因得知早被認為消滅殆盡的突變生命體再度活動 在地下挖掘出舊巢穴的形貌 而從退休生活中重新出山。重新啟動 Sophia 對 Jason 而言已是無可避免之事。再一次踏入冰冷之中……

- 探索 8 大區域，尋找鑰匙並擊敗次人類首領
- 利用戰車的吸附系統行駛於牆面與天花板
- 駕駛 Sophia，或單獨以 Jason 行動。

overview_en: Blue's Clues: Blue's Alphabet Book is a Puzzle game, developed by Vicarious Visions and published by Mattel, which was released in 2001.
overview_zh: Blue's Clues: Blue's Alphabet Book 是由 Vicarious Visions 開發、Mattel 發行的解謎遊戲，於 2001 年推出。

overview_en: BOARDER ZONE is a wild snowboarding action game for the Game Boy Color, and it packs in a ton of variety for boarding aficionados. Choose from four different boarders, each with their own unique skills and abilities, and then choose from four boards which all have different characteristics. Further adding to the customizability is the ability to pick your boarder's outfit. The variety doesn't stop there, however six different gameplay modes are available. In Race Attack mode, you must beat your fellow boarders in a race to the finish; Trick mode has you scoring points by performing tricks before the time runs out; Time Attack has you racing the clock; Challenge mode has you trying to either beat the clock or perform tricks on different courses; Slalom mode will have you beating a time limit on one of a number of unique courses; and Practice mode helps you brush up your skills for the real game. You can also use a password to save your progress through the various gameplay modes.
overview_zh: 《BOARDER ZONE》是 Game Boy Color 上瘋狂的滑雪板動作遊戲，為熱愛滑板的玩家準備了豐富變化。可從 4 位特色與技巧各異的滑手中挑選，再選擇 4 種特性不同的滑板，還能挑選滑手的服裝以增加自訂性。本作有 6 種玩法模式：Race Attack 模式中要在比賽中搶先衝線；Trick 模式要在時間結束前以特技賺取分數；Time Attack 與時間賽跑；Challenge 模式在不同賽道中挑戰時限或特技；Slalom 模式要在多種獨特賽道上突破時限；Practice 模式則協助你磨練技術。可使用密碼儲存各模式進度。

title_en: BOB ET BOBETTE - LES DOMPTEURS DU TEMPS
no_intro_name: Bob et Bobette - Les Dompteurs du Temps (Europe) (Fr,Nl)
overview_en: Bob et Bobette: Les Dompteurs du Temps is an Action game, developed by Standaard Multimedia and published by Infogrames, which was released in Europe in 2001.
overview_zh: Bob et Bobette: Les Dompteurs du Temps 是由 Standaard Multimedia 開發、Infogrames 發行的動作遊戲，於 2001 年在歐洲推出。

title_en: BOB THE BUILDER - FIX IT FUN!
no_intro_name: Bob the Builder - Fix it Fun! (USA)
overview_en: Bob the Builder: Fix it Fun! is an action game, developed by Tiertex Design Studios and published by BBC Multimedia, which was released in Europe in 2000.
overview_zh: Bob the Builder: Fix it Fun! 是由 Tiertex Design Studios 開發、BBC Multimedia 發行的動作遊戲，於 2000 年在歐洲推出。

overview_en: Campsite management simulation game. We will clear the rough land, mow the grass, crush the rocks, cut down the trees if necessary, improve the facilities, and increase the number of visitors. Listen to the opinions of selfish campers, check what you need, and gradually prepare the equipment. Purchase land when you have saved money and aim for a larger campsite. On the way, you can get items, get stronger, and have more than 100 kinds of events. If you don't have enough money or want to rest your bones, you can exchange the money you earned from hunting and fishing with your friends via communication.
overview_zh: 露營場經營模擬遊戲。整理荒地、割草、敲碎石頭、必要時砍樹，提升設施增加遊客數。傾聽任性露營者的意見，確認他們的需求，逐步購入裝備。存夠錢就買地，朝更大規模露營場邁進。途中可獲得道具、變強，並體驗超過 100 種事件。錢不夠或想休息時，可透過通訊與朋友交易由打獵與釣魚賺取的錢。

title_en: BOKUJOU MONOGATARI 3 GB - BOY MEETS GIRL
no_intro_name: Bokujou Monogatari 3 GB - Boy Meets Girl (Japan)

title_en: BOMBER MAN MAX - HIKARI NO YUUSHA
no_intro_name: Bomber Man Max - Hikari no Yuusha (Japan)

title_en: BOMBER MAN MAX - YAMI NO SENSHI
no_intro_name: Bomber Man Max - Yami no Senshi (Japan)

overview_en: In Bomberman Max, your task is to jump through five zones with a dozen levels each. At the beginning of the round, you're given your quota to meet -- in some levels, you'll have to destroy all the enemies. In another, wipe out all the blocks in the land. In another, rescue the level's Charabomb. And in others, simply make your way to the target square in the set amount of time. But it won't be easy, since many enemies just don't stay still for you to walk up and plant a bomb next to them. It's all in the strategy of bomb-placement. Plus, once a level's complete, you'll have to pick the proper exit that appears. Released in two versions, Blue and Red.
overview_zh: 在《Bomberman Max》中，你的任務是穿越 5 個區域，每個區域含 12 關。每回合開始會給定條件 有些關卡要消滅所有敵人，有些要清除地上所有方塊，有些要救出該關 Charabomb，有些則要在限定時間內抵達指定方格。但敵人不會乖乖等你走近放炸彈，因此關鍵在於放置炸彈的策略。此外，過關後還必須選擇正確的出口。本作分為 Blue 與 Red 兩種版本。

overview_en: n Bomberman Max, your task is to jump through five zones with a dozen levels each. At the beginning of the round, you're given your quota to meet -- in some levels, you'll have to destroy all the enemies. In another, wipe out all the blocks in the land. In another, rescue the level's Charabomb. And in others, simply make your way to the target square in the set amount of time. But it won't be easy, since many enemies just don't stay still for you to walk up and plant a bomb next to them. It's all in the strategy of bomb-placement. Plus, once a level's complete, you'll have to pick the proper exit that appears. Released in two versions, Blue and Red.
overview_zh: 在《Bomberman Max》中，你的任務是穿越 5 個區域，每個區域含 12 關。每回合開始會給定條件 有些關卡要消滅所有敵人，有些要清除地上所有方塊，有些要救出該關 Charabomb，有些則要在限定時間內抵達指定方格。但敵人不會乖乖等你走近放炸彈，因此關鍵在於放置炸彈的策略。此外，過關後還必須選擇正確的出口。本作分為 Blue 與 Red 兩種版本。

overview_en: Bomberman is on his way home when the engines on his ship are stolen. As a result, he must make an emergency landing on a strange planet. However, Bomberman is not traveling alone he's got all of the monsters he has captured on his adventures with him. After a rough crash landing, the monsters escaped. You must help Bomberman recapture the monsters and find his engines in order to return home. You'll travel to four different regions of the planet collecting bombs, finding items, and getting hints for how to proceed on your adventure. Along with the main quest a Two-Player mode is also included, in which you try to trap your opponent by setting bombs; the first person to be victimized by a bomb loses.
overview_zh: 炸彈超人在歸鄉途中，飛船的引擎被偷走，被迫迫降到一顆陌生行星。然而炸彈超人並非獨自旅行 隨行的還有冒險中捕獲的所有怪物。一場粗暴的迫降後，怪物全都逃走了。你必須協助炸彈超人重新捕獲怪物、找回引擎，回到家鄉。將遊歷行星的 4 個區域，蒐集炸彈、找尋道具，獲得推進冒險的提示。除主線外亦提供雙人模式，雙方互相設置炸彈陷害對手，先被炸到的人輸。
publisher:
Electro Brain
Hudson Soft JP
Virgin Interactive EU

overview_en: The boy who was distressed on a yacht arrived on the island "Dondoko Island" which is not on the map. It was a new world where various monsters and the mysterious creature "Mokopoco" built by the village of stone tool civilization lived. Develop the village of Mokopoco with monsters and lead a mysterious life that no one has ever experienced. Ask a mysterious creature called "Mokopoco" who is building a village on the island to invent a vehicle that can escape from the island. It starts with raising various monsters, giving them jobs suitable for their roles, and developing the island. Make good use of the characteristics of monsters to make them work.
overview_zh: 在遊艇上遭遇困境的少年，漂流到地圖上沒有的島嶼「Dondoko 島」。這是一個全新世界，住著各種怪物以及由石器文明村落「Mokopoco」這種神祕生物所建造的村莊。一邊與怪物共同發展 Mokopoco 的村莊，一邊體驗前所未有的奇妙生活。請建造村落的神祕生物「Mokopoco」發明能離開島嶼的交通工具。從培育各種怪物開始，分配適合其特性的工作來開發小島。善用怪物的特徵讓他們發揮所長。

overview_en: Asteria is a world where people's hearts are filled with peace and civilization and nature are filled with a gentle harmony. The fertile land and the outstanding civilization overlapped each other, and people lived in peace. There was no word "fight" in Asteria, and the only "villain" who once made the land quiet was sealed, and there was no evil in this world. However, the seal was broken by a boy and a robot who were confused by the words of the demon, and the demon demon Jerkin who eats the power of justice and scatters his own evil power is resurrected! Its power instantly covered the entire Asteria with dark clouds, robbing people of justice. Can the boy and the robot who brought the "darkness of darkness" regain peace in Asteria? The GBC version of Brave Saga, which is extremely popular with anime fans and hobby fans, is a completely original story. The main characters are twin brothers and sisters. The player chooses one and goes on an adventure in Asteria. Everywhere in Asteria, there are dungeons set up by the demon Demon Jerkin. The main character is to get into the dungeon, destroy the enemy, rescue his friends, and defeat the demon demon Jerkin who led Asteria to chaos. From the sunrise works produced by Takara, the Eldran series, which has been highly requested by fans, nostalgic works, and new GBC original works, a total of 20 works and more than 150 types of mecha have appeared! You can enjoy the dream battle of "Brave vs. Brave" with your friends in online battle.
overview_zh: Asteria 是人心充滿和平、文明與自然和諧共存的世界。肥沃的土地與卓越的文明相輔相成，人們生活安樂。在 Asteria 沒有「戰鬥」一詞，唯一曾擾亂大地的「壞人」也已被封印，這個世界毫無邪惡。然而封印被一名受魔語迷惑的少年與機器人解開，吞噬正義之力、散播自身邪氣的邪惡魔王 Jerkin 復活！其力量瞬間以黑雲覆蓋整個 Asteria，奪走人們的正義。將「黑暗的黑暗」帶來世界的少年與機器人，能否讓 Asteria 重歸和平？深受動畫與興趣愛好者喜愛的《Brave Saga》GBC 版本是完全原創劇情。主角為雙胞胎兄妹，玩家從中擇一展開 Asteria 的冒險。Asteria 各地都有 Jerkin 設下的迷宮，主角的目標是進入迷宮、擊敗敵人、救出夥伴，並打敗將 Asteria 帶入混亂的魔王 Jerkin。Takara 旗下日昇所製作的作品中，包括粉絲長期期盼的 Eldran 系列、懷舊作品與全新 GBC 原創作品在內，共有 20 部作品、超過 150 種機體登場！可透過通訊與朋友享受「勇者對勇者」的夢幻對戰。

overview_en: Step into the shoes of Buffy Summers, Sunnydale's hottest vampire slayer. Fight against fierce vampires using cool moves and awesome slayer weaponry. With advice from your watcher Giles, you'll destroy the most fearsome creatures of the night.
overview_zh: 化身 Sunnydale 最強的吸血鬼獵人 Buffy Summers，運用帥氣動作與絕讚的獵人武器對抗兇猛吸血鬼。在守護者 Giles 的指引下，擊敗最可怕的夜晚生物。

title_en: BUGS BUNNY ET LE CHATEAU DES CATASTROPHES
no_intro_name: Bugs Bunny et le Chateau des Catastrophes (France) (En)

overview_en: Bugs Bunny returns in BUGS BUNNYS CRAZY CASTLE 4 for Game Boy Color! Thinking he has found the Carrot Castle, Bugs has once again entered the Crazy Castle. You must help him escape in this single-player action or puzzle game. This time, more than 60 rooms await Bugs, and he'll have to use all of his wits and skills to escape with his "hare" intact. Once again, the Crazy Castle is loaded with traps and hazards that will cut your carrot-collecting career short so make sure you don't get reacquainted with them the hard way. As CRAZY CASTLE fans are probably used to, several Warner Bros. cartoon characters are here to keep Bugs on his toes. You'll have to fight off Daffy Duck, Yosemite Sam, Foghorn Leghorn, Pepe Le Pew, Tweety, and the Tazmanian Devil with one of a variety of weapons, or make tracks to the nearest safe spot. A password save will chart your progress so that you don't have to start from scratch each time you play.
overview_zh: 賓尼兔回歸 Game Boy Color 上的《BUGS BUNNYS CRAZY CASTLE 4》！以為找到 Carrot Castle 的賓尼兔再度誤闖 Crazy Castle，必須由你協助他逃出。本款單人動作 / 解謎遊戲共有超過 60 個房間等待挑戰，他必須運用所有機智與技巧，全身而退。Crazy Castle 一如既往佈滿陷阱與危險，務必小心，免得不幸再度與它們親密接觸。CRAZY CASTLE 老粉應該很熟悉 不少華納兄弟的卡通角色將輪番出現，你必須擊退達菲鴨、優山美地山姆、福洪雞、貝貝勒呼、崔弟與塔斯瑪尼亞惡魔，或是趕緊找掩護。內建密碼存檔，記錄進度，免得每次都從頭來過。

title_en: BUGS BUNNY _ LOLA BUNNY - OPERATION CARROT PATCH
no_intro_name: Bugs Bunny _ Lola Bunny - Operation Carrot Patch (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It,Nl) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
In Looney Tunes: Carrot Crazy you take control of either Bugs and Lola to find your carrots that have been stolen by an unknown Looney Tunes character. Bugs and Lola each have their special abilities and you will have to switch between them when necessary to proceed. You access the game's different stages through a Warner Bros. film studio that acts as your hub.

Yosemite Sam, Daffy Duck, The Tasmanian Devil, Marvin the Martian and Elmer Fudd have stolen Bugs and Lola's carrots and hid them in different sets in the nearby studio.  Bugs and Lola head through five different "sets" in order to reclaim them.
overview_zh:
在《Looney Tunes: Carrot Crazy》中，你可操控賓尼兔或羅拉，尋找被未知 Looney Tunes 角色偷走的紅蘿蔔。賓尼與羅拉各有獨特能力，必要時須切換兩者推進。透過華納兄弟電影攝影棚作為樞紐進入各個關卡。

優山美地山姆、達菲鴨、塔斯瑪尼亞惡魔、火星人馬文與愛默．法德偷走了賓尼與羅拉的紅蘿蔔，藏在攝影棚的不同片場。賓尼與羅拉須穿越 5 個不同的「片場」將其奪回。

no_intro_name: Burger Burger Pocket - Hamburger Simulation (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Sugoroku opening battle game. Turn the roulette wheel to become the owner. The decisive factor in the game is whether you can stop the roulette wheel in a very advantageous square. You can also take over a rival store with a hijacking card, and depending on how you use the card, you can advance the game to your advantage. There are various items on the field, and if you make the ultimate burger with the collected ingredients and win the contest, you will get a prize. Also, up to 4 players can play.
overview_zh: 雙六風開店對戰遊戲。轉動輪盤成為店主。能否將輪盤停在極為有利的格子是決勝關鍵。也能用「劫店卡」奪取對手的店，根據卡片用法可讓局勢倒向自己。場上有各式素材，用蒐集到的食材做出究極漢堡並在比賽中勝出，即可獲得獎品。最多 4 人遊玩。

overview_en: A simulation game in which you create and sell your own hamburger using various ingredients and run a hamburger chain store. In eight stages, each with a different climate, you will grow your own chain store while fighting against the unique enemy "SYOGUN Burger" group chain store. There are more than 150 kinds of ingredients that appear in the game. The number of burgers that can be made depends on the combination is infinite.
overview_zh: 用各種食材做出自己原創的漢堡並販售，經營漢堡連鎖店的模擬遊戲。在 8 個氣候各異的階段中，與獨特敵人「SYOGUN Burger」連鎖集團競爭，逐步壯大自家連鎖。遊戲中登場的食材超過 150 種，搭配的漢堡種類無窮無盡。

overview_en:
You'll be Forever Bursting Bubbles! Bust-A-Move-4 is bursting onto the scene with more advanced gameplay, and tons of new features. It's a challenge for the whole family!

* Bury opponents with the devastating new Chain Reactions.
* Keep the bubbles in balance with the new Pulley Mechanism.
* Rank yourself with the comprehensive Ranking System.
* Save custom puzzles to Memory Cards with Edit Mode.
overview_zh:
讓泡泡永不停！《Bust-A-Move-4》以更進階的玩法與大量新要素登場，是闔家同樂的挑戰！

* 用毀滅性的全新連鎖反應壓制對手。
* 透過全新滑輪機制保持泡泡平衡。
* 用完整排名系統評估自己。
* 在 Edit 模式中將自製謎題存到 Memory Card。

overview_en: BUST-A-MOVE MILENNIUM EDITION on Game Boy Color brings a bevy of often-requested new features to this classic puzzler. Bubbles of different colors descend from the top of the screen in clumps. Using your blaster that fires colored bubbles of your own, you must attempt to clear the screen as best as you can. BUST-A-MOVE MILENNIUM EDITION offers five unique modes of play. In the returning Puzzle mode, you'll play through a huge number of new stages of bubble-busting action that require careful planning and fast reflexes. Challenge mode also returns to test your BUST-A-MOVE skills. In the brand new Story mode, you'll take on a series of increasingly difficult computer opponents in a battle to the finish. Also new is a mode that allows you to play as long as you can last. Of course, the biggest and best addition to BUST-A-MOVE MILENNIUM EDITION is the two-player link cable Versus mode. Now you can grab a friend and show off your BUST-A-MOVE skills! You get all of this plus enhanced graphics and other new options.
overview_zh: Game Boy Color 上的《BUST-A-MOVE MILLENNIUM EDITION》為這款經典解謎帶來眾多粉絲期待已久的新功能。不同顏色的泡泡會成串從畫面上方下降，玩家須使用發射各色泡泡的發射器，盡力清空畫面。本作提供 5 種獨特模式：經典 Puzzle 模式中你將挑戰大量需要謹慎規劃與快速反應的全新關卡；Challenge 模式同樣回歸測試實力。全新的 Story 模式中與愈來愈強的電腦對手對戰直到結局。另有可一直玩到失敗為止的全新模式。當然《BUST-A-MOVE MILLENNIUM EDITION》最大、最棒的新增就是雙人連線對戰模式 找個朋友，展現你的 BUST-A-MOVE 實力！這些都搭配畫面強化與多種新選項。

no_intro_name: Buzz Lightyear of Star Command (USA, Europe)

overview_en: Welcome to Ceasars Palace II, the premiere gambling game where you're the next high roller in the glamerous casino enviroment of the world-famous Caesars Palace. If you're feeling lucky, then you've come to the right place. Test your gambling prowess with 19 games of chance including: Craps, Blackjack, Rouulett, Slotts, Video Poker, Mini-Baccarat, Keno and Poker Challenge.
overview_zh: 歡迎來到《Caesars Palace II》，在世界知名的 Caesars Palace 華麗賭場環境中，你將是下一位豪賭客。如果今天運氣特別好，這裡就是你該來的地方。挑戰 19 種博弈遊戲：擲骰子、21 點、輪盤、吃角子老虎、視訊撲克、迷你百家樂、Keno、Poker Challenge 等。

overview_en: Don't wait till you see the whites of their eyes! Don't kid yourself it will all be over by Christmas! Don't try to shut out the screams! And don't forget to wash your hands afterwards. CANNON FODDER. War has never been so much fun!
overview_zh: 別等到看見敵人的眼白才開火！別騙自己仗會在聖誕節前打完！別想堵住那些慘叫！還有 結束後別忘了洗手。CANNON FODDER。戰爭從來沒有這麼有趣過！

title_en: CARDCAPTOR SAKURA - ITSUMO SAKURA-CHAN TO ISSHO
no_intro_name: Cardcaptor Sakura - Itsumo Sakura-chan to Issho (Japan) (GB Compatible)

publisher:
Titus Software NA
Sales Curve Interactive EU

overview_en: Follow the adventures of the friendliest ghost around with CASPER for the Game Boy Color. Based on the hit 1995 movie, the game follows the plot of the film closely. Casper is on a mission, and he must explore Whipstaff Manor for clues and solve puzzles as he avoids the ghostly trio of Stinky, Stretch, and Fatso who are looking to put a stop to Casper's adventure. The game is played from an isometric perspective, which shows the rooms and hallways of the mansion in high color and detail. You'll have to search the rooms of this huge estate carefully for items such as keys and puzzle pieces that will help you unlock other sections. You can also learn new abilities and gain ghostly powers to further aid you in your adventure.
overview_zh: 在 Game Boy Color 版《CASPER》中，跟隨這位最友善的鬼魂展開冒險。本作改編自 1995 年賣座電影，劇情緊扣原作。Casper 肩負任務，必須探索 Whipstaff Manor 蒐集線索、解開謎題，同時躲避想阻撓他冒險的鬼魂三人組 Stinky、Stretch 與 Fatso。遊戲採等角視角，以高彩度細節呈現大宅的房間與走道。你必須仔細搜索房間，找尋鑰匙與拼圖等可解鎖其他區域的物品，也能習得新能力與鬼魂力量輔助冒險。

overview_en: Castlevania: The Adventure is a fan favorite Game Boy game that was included in Konami GB Collection Vol. 1. That compilation did provide a much needed color injection, however it was full of weird color choices and incorrect overlays on backgrounds resulting in a marred experience. This release intends to correct as many of those flaws as possible, increase the quality overall, and make the game a dedicated stand-alone experience.
overview_zh: 《Castlevania: The Adventure》是收錄於《Konami GB Collection Vol. 1》中、深受粉絲喜愛的 Game Boy 遊戲。該合輯雖加入了急需的色彩，但配色奇怪、背景上色錯誤等問題使體驗大打折扣。本版本旨在盡量修正這些缺陷、整體提升品質，並讓本作成為獨立完整的體驗。

overview_en: It might just be the purrrfect action game. As CATWOMAN, the best cat-burglar in the world, you'll move through tight spots and encounter challenging environments. Feline strength? Furtive movements? She'll have to rely on all her cat-like qualities to stay out of harm's way. An agile leap here, a lightning-fast flip there. She has all the right moves and this game has enough excitement to last a lifetime...make that NINE lifetimes!
overview_zh: 或許就是最完美的動作遊戲。身為世界第一的貓賊 CATWOMAN，你將穿越狹窄空間、面對充滿挑戰的環境。貓的力量？敏捷的身手？她必須仰賴所有貓科特性才能全身而退。輕巧一躍、瞬間翻身 她的動作齊全，本作的刺激足以延續一輩子……不對，是九輩子！

overview_en: Are you looking to adopt a pet but lack the time or space to take care of a real one? Then you may find CATZ to be of interest. Part of the small but popular virtual pet genre, CATZ lets you adopt a cat from one of three breeds: Siamese, Calico, or Persian. You can play with the pet first to decide if it's right for you. Once you've adopted the little gal or fella, it's up to you to take care of it: feed it, groom it, and play with it regularly if you want it to grow up to be a well-adjusted adult. If you mistreat your cat, your little pet will take off, never to return! Eventually, new breeds of cats and new special toys will become available for you, depending on how well you do. You can also trade toys and breeds of cats with your friends via the infrared link.
overview_zh: 想養寵物，卻沒時間或空間照顧真實動物嗎？那麼《CATZ》或許正合你意。本作屬於小眾但人氣的虛擬寵物類型，可從暹羅、三花、波斯三種品種中認養一隻貓。可以先和寵物玩耍再決定是否合適。一旦領養了這位小傢伙，就要負責餵食、梳理、定期陪玩，讓牠長成情緒穩定的成貓。如果虐待牠，小貓會離家出走、再也不回來！表現好就有機會解鎖新品種與特殊玩具。也可透過紅外線通訊與朋友交換玩具與貓的品種。

overview_en:
The classic arcade hit CENTIPEDE comes to Game Boy Color in this slightly enhanced version of the old favorite. This one- or two-player game has you firing pesticide at an oncoming centipede that is threatening the garden. As the pest weaves its way through the mushrooms dispersed throughout the screen, you'll have to use strategy as well as quickness to fight it off. The classic gameplay is replicated perfectly in this arcade port. You can play two players competitively by alternating on a single Game Boy, or grab two copies of the game and a Game Boy Link Cable to cooperate against the buggy bad guys. CENTIPEDE is enhanced for Game Boy Color, with all new brightly colored graphics that will take you back to the arcades of the '80s. Centipede is compatible with all Game Boy systems.
DMG-AC5E-USA-1
overview_zh:
經典街機名作《CENTIPEDE》以微幅強化版登上 Game Boy Color。這款 1 至 2 人遊戲讓你向來犯花園的蜈蚣噴灑農藥。蜈蚣會在散布於畫面的蘑菇間穿梭，必須結合策略與反應才能驅除。本作完美重現經典玩法。可在同一台 Game Boy 上輪流進行雙人對戰，或備兩份卡帶與一條 Game Boy Link Cable 進行雙人合作對抗害蟲。本作為 Game Boy Color 強化，色彩鮮豔，將你帶回 80 年代的街機。可相容於所有 Game Boy 主機。
DMG-AC5E-USA-1

no_intro_name: Championship Motocross 2001 featuring Ricky Carmichael (USA, Europe)
overview_en: CHAMPIONSHIP MOTOCROSS 2001 FEATURING RICKY CARMICHAEL brings all the thrills and action of motocross to your Game Boy Color. This single-player racer uses a special graphics technique to give the gameplay a smooth 3D look and feel. The racing action takes place from the third-person perspective. You can choose from 30 real licensed racers, each with their own strengths and weaknesses. Pick your bike from 16 unique bikes and hit the dirt on more than 20 tracks that take place in a variety of scenes. The tracks feature complex turns and jumps made possible by the special graphics engine. In addition to racing, you can also try the Freestyle mode, where you can show off your trick abilities. Use a password to save your scores and your progress through the various races.
overview_zh: 《CHAMPIONSHIP MOTOCROSS 2001 FEATURING RICKY CARMICHAEL》把越野摩托的刺激帶到 Game Boy Color。本款單人賽車運用特殊圖像技術營造流暢的 3D 感，採第三人稱視角呈現賽車。可從 30 位真實授權選手中挑選，每人各有強項與弱點，再從 16 款獨特機車與 20 餘條多種場景的賽道中選擇。賽道靠特殊圖像引擎呈現複雜的彎道與跳台。除競速外，也有可秀技巧的自由式（Freestyle）模式。可使用密碼保存成績與比賽進度。

no_intro_name: Chase H.Q. - Secret Police (USA) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: The chase is on in CHASE HQ: Secret Police for the Game Boy Color. Loosely adapted from the arcade game of the same name, CHASE HQ is a unique mix of racing and action for one or two players. In the One-Player mode, you'll lead a handpicked team of undercover cops, each with unique talents. You'll be shown what kind of vehicle the suspect is driving, and then you'll hit the streets to find him. When you finally locate the perp, you'll switch to a behind-the-vehicle view as you try to shoot or bump the criminal off the road. Once you've managed to lower their life-bar far enough, they'll pull over and you'll make the arrest. There are 10 levels of single-player action, so you'll be plenty busy as you try to collar the criminals. You can also grab a friend to play Head-to-Head using a link cable, with one person playing the cop and the other playing the bad guy.
overview_zh: 在 Game Boy Color 上的《CHASE HQ: Secret Police》追逐戰開打。本作鬆散改編自同名街機作品，是 1 至 2 人混合競速與動作的獨特遊戲。單人模式中，你將率領一隊各具才能的臥底警察。系統會顯示嫌犯駕駛的車種，接著你便上街搜捕。找到目標後切換為車後視角，要射擊或撞擊使其退出道路。將其體力降到一定程度後，嫌犯會靠邊停車並被你逮捕。單人共 10 關，要忙著抓嫌犯。也能透過連線纜線與朋友面對面對戰，一人扮警察、一人扮罪犯。
publisher:
Metro3D NA
Gaga Communications Inc. EU
Jorudan JP

overview_en: The wide universe is filled with dark matter called dark matter. Now, this dark matter has disappeared from space and is increasing on Earth. The cause is "little alien". The little aliens come to Earth in the light, but they also bring the dark matter on their bodies to Earth. Due to the little aliens who knew nothing, the earth turned black with dark matter, and the universe, which should have been black, turned white. If nothing is done, the balance of the universe will be lost and it will be difficult! Players catch tiny aliens, collect dark matter, return dark matter to space, and save space! A game in which the infrared communication unit of GBC catches small aliens in the light and collects dark matter attached to the body of the small aliens. It's actually a magnificent scale that collects dark matter and saves the universe! The vibration of "Susuharai" that picks up the dark matter attached to the body of a tiny alien may be addictive! ?? Rocket the collected dark matter back into space and regain the black universe! It's important to fly a rocket, but it's also important to play with tiny aliens. Playing with them will make the little aliens cheerful and open to you. You can also exchange and play small aliens with your friends via infrared communication. Only your GBC can save the universe!
overview_zh: 廣闊的宇宙中充滿稱為「暗物質」的東西。如今，這些暗物質從太空消失，並在地球上不斷增加。原因是「小小外星人」。小小外星人乘著光來到地球，卻將身上的暗物質一併帶來。受這些一無所知的小外星人影響，地球被暗物質染黑，本應漆黑的宇宙卻變白了。再不採取行動，宇宙的平衡將失衡，後果不堪設想！玩家要捕捉小小外星人、回收暗物質、把暗物質送回宇宙，拯救太空！這款遊戲利用 GBC 的紅外線通訊裝置，從光中捕捉小外星人，並回收附在牠們身上的暗物質。其實這是一款規模宏大的「回收暗物質、拯救宇宙」遊戲！清掃外星人身上暗物質的「打灰塵」震動或許會讓人上癮！？將回收的暗物質以火箭送回宇宙，奪回漆黑的宇宙！射火箭固然重要，與小外星人玩耍同樣重要。陪牠們玩，小外星人就會變得開朗親近你。也可透過紅外線通訊與朋友交換並玩弄小外星人。能拯救宇宙的，只有你的 GBC！

overview_en: Prepare to challenge the longest running console chess series, THE CHESSMASTER. In this Game Boy version of the game, you can choose to play at any one of 16 different skill levels, ranging from beginner to expert. For those just learning to play chess, take advantage of the Teaching mode that will show you all of the best moves to make. This game has a variety of options for chess fans, as you can set up the board however you like to simulate classic chess situations and challenges. You can even make your opponent’s pieces invisible for an added challenge. If you make a wrong move, the game will allow you to take back moves and try again. If you’d rather just see the outcome, merely ask THE CHESSMASTER and he’ll finish the game to checkmate. Play alone or against a friend through the use of the Game Boy Link Cable. You can also use the password function to resume a game already in progress.
overview_zh: 準備挑戰主機西洋棋系列中歷史最悠久的《THE CHESSMASTER》。Game Boy 版提供 16 種難度，從新手到專家應有盡有。剛開始學棋的玩家可使用 Teaching 模式，會示範最佳走法。本作為西洋棋愛好者準備了多種選項，可任意擺設棋盤模擬經典局勢與挑戰。甚至能讓對手棋子隱形，增加額外挑戰。若走錯一步，可悔棋重來；若想直接看結果，只要拜託 THE CHESSMASTER，他就會走到將死。可獨自遊玩，也能使用 Game Boy Link Cable 對戰朋友。亦可使用密碼功能繼續未完的對局。

title_en: CHI TO ASE TO NAMIDA NO KOUKOU YAKYUU
no_intro_name: Chi to Ase to Namida no Koukou Yakyuu (Japan)
overview_en: The purpose is to select a school from 4096 schools, take office as the manager of the high school baseball club, and raise it into a permanent corps. Reconstruction aiming for a permanent corps = The conditions under which the game can proceed are (1) to leave a record of 8 or more in the district best in the 1st and 2nd years (2) to leave a record of 8 or more in the district in the 3rd to 4th years (3) Achieve the best 8 or higher in the national tournament or selection in the 5th to 6th years (4) Win the national tournament or selection in the 7th to 9th years (5) Retire in the 10th year. After the summer tournament, the third graders will retire, and in April of the following year, new students will join the club, and the conditions must be cleared. You can also set the content of individual practice and the timing of practice games.
overview_zh: 從 4096 所學校中挑選一所就任高中棒球部監督，將其打造為常勝強隊。重建至常勝強隊 遊戲進行條件為：(1) 第 1、2 年於地區大賽留下八強以上紀錄；(2) 第 3 至 4 年在地區大賽留下八強以上紀錄；(3) 第 5 至 6 年在全國大賽或選拔賽達到八強以上；(4) 第 7 至 9 年贏得全國大賽或選拔賽冠軍；(5) 第 10 年退休。夏季大賽結束後三年級學生退役，隔年 4 月新生入部，必須在這些條件下達成目標。也可設定個人練習內容與練習賽時機。

title_en: CHIBI MARUKO-CHAN - GO CHOUNAI MINNA DE GAME DA YO!
no_intro_name: Chibi Maruko-chan - Go Chounai Minna de Game Da yo! (Japan)

overview_en: CHICKEN RUN for Game Boy Color brings all the fun and adventure of the movie to the palm of your hand. You take the role of Ginger as you guide your fellow chickens to freedom in this one-player action or puzzle game. More than 20 levels of puzzle-solving adventure span the farmyard and the pie machine, which will keep you busy for hours.
