To begin, you'll have to bring a group of chickens through the farmyard, carefully avoiding or deactivating any obstacle that may alert the farmers. Then it's off to the pie machine, where mechanical mayhem awaits you if you aren't careful. Once you've brought the chickens through the pie machine, you'll be back in the farmyard with a new bunch of chickens and all new challenges ahead of you. You'll have to avoid obstacles such as dogs, cameras, spotlights, and others, as you make a break for freedom. You can push objects, shut off power, or find shortcuts to get around the many obstacles. And don't forget to keep an eye out for objects you can use to your advantage. You can also use a password to continue your chicken-saving quest another time.
overview_zh: Game Boy Color 版《CHICKEN RUN》把電影裡的所有歡樂與冒險濃縮到掌心。在這款單人動作 / 解謎遊戲中，你扮演 Ginger，引領同伴雞群奔向自由。20 餘關的解謎冒險橫跨農場與派機，足以讓你玩上好幾個小時。一開始要帶領一群雞穿越農場，小心避開或解除可能驚動農夫的障礙。接著前往派機，若不小心，機械混亂正等著你。帶領雞群通過派機後，又會回到農場面對全新一批雞與全新挑戰。必須避開狗、攝影機、聚光燈等障礙物，奔向自由。可推動物體、關閉電源或找捷徑繞過種種阻礙，並別忘了留意可運用的物品。可使用密碼下次繼續救雞之旅。

no_intro_name: Choro Q - Hyper Customable GB (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: The addictive arcade classic comes to Game Boy Color in CLASSIC BUBBLE BOBBLE. Bob has fallen sick, and it's up to Bub to traverse a strange world to find the cure. Each of the game's 100+ levels is filled to the brim with enemies, but luckily you've got a trusty weapon at your disposal your bubble shot that you use to trap the monsters! Once trapped in their soapy prison, you can pop them just by touching the bubble. Once you clear out all the enemies in a stage, it's time to float over to the next one. Collect power-ups to increase your speed, freeze your enemies, or even shoot special bubbles that fire off dazzling electricity attacks. You'll do battle against a variety of bizarre and sometimes very large enemies as you work to cure Bob's illness. CLASSIC BUBBLE BOBBLE features new graphics, including all-new backgrounds so you're bound to have a new experience every time you play.
overview_zh: 令人上癮的街機經典在《CLASSIC BUBBLE BOBBLE》中登上 Game Boy Color。Bob 病倒了，需要 Bub 穿越奇幻世界尋找解藥。本作 100 多關每一關都擠滿敵人，所幸你身上配備可信賴的武器 用泡泡將怪物困住的「泡泡彈」！怪物被困在肥皂監獄後，只要碰一下泡泡就能消滅牠們。清除一關所有敵人後，便飄向下一關。蒐集道具可加快速度、凍結敵人，甚至能射出施放閃電攻擊的特殊泡泡。一路上你會與各種奇形怪狀、有時還非常巨大的敵人作戰，努力治癒 Bob 的病。本作提供全新圖像與全新背景，每次遊玩都能體驗新感受。
publisher:
Metro3D NA
Gaga Communications Inc. EU
Jorudan JP

overview_en: Colin McRae Rally is a Racing game, developed by Spellbound and published by THQ, which was released in Europe in 2001.
overview_zh: Colin McRae Rally 是由 Spellbound 開發、THQ 發行的賽車遊戲，於 2001 年在歐洲推出。

no_intro_name: Columns GB - Tezuka Osamu Characters (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
Columns was to the Game Gear what Tetris was to the Game Boy. Some years after the Game Gear had ceased production, it was ported to the 'Boy. To spice things up, the game has been given several game modes, and, most notably, a licence to several popular manga characters created by Osamu Tezuka. Play as famous characters such as Astro Boy, Kimba or Black Jack.

Apart from the main Columns mode, this edition features a puzzle mode like that of the Nazo Puyo games, where you must remove a set of pre-installed pieces using a set of pre-defined dropping pieces. There is also a link-up mode for battling with friends.

The Tezuka characters play no big role in the game, being displayed in a window to the right of the playfield, changing mimics according to how the game progresses. You have six characters to choose from, and three save slots to put them in. The save slots let you keep your score for upcoming sessions.
overview_zh:
Columns 之於 Game Gear，就如同俄羅斯方塊之於 Game Boy。Game Gear 停產數年後，本作被移植到 Game Boy。為了增添趣味，本作加入多種遊戲模式，最值得注意的是取得手塚治虫筆下多位人氣漫畫角色的授權。可選原子小金剛、Kimba（小白獅）或怪醫黑傑克等知名角色。

除了主要的 Columns 模式外，本版還收錄類似《Nazo Puyo》的解謎模式，必須以一組預定的下落塊消除預先擺好的方塊；亦提供連線對戰模式。

手塚角色在遊戲中沒有重大作用，會顯示在棋盤右側的視窗中，依比賽進展變換表情。共有 6 位角色可選，3 個存檔欄位可分別保存。存檔欄位可保留分數延續到下次遊玩。

overview_en: The second software for "motion sensor" that moves the GB itself to play. The ultimate experience game that realizes "technical coolness" and "fun of action" that allows you to enter more complicated commands quickly and accurately. The number of characters that the player can transform by entering a command is 80! The total number of techniques that each character can use is over 300! Furthermore, the strength changes depending on the timing of entering the transformation command. You can enjoy both collecting characters and refining techniques to create strong characters.
overview_zh: 為「動作感應器」設計的第二款軟體，透過搖動 GB 主機進行操作。終極體感遊戲，實現了能更快速、準確輸入複雜指令的「技術帥度」與「動作樂趣」。可透過指令變身的角色多達 80 種！每位角色可使用的招式總數超過 300 種！更重要的是，依輸入變身指令的時機，威力也會改變。可同時享受蒐集角色與精煉招式來打造強角的樂趣。

overview_en: Commander Keen is a 2001 video game published by Activision. It is part of the Commander Keen series, which was originally developed by id Software. Released for the Game Boy Color, it was developed with id Software's permission; however it did not involve any of the original Commander Keen developers. It was developed instead by David A. Palmer Productions. Tom Hall, creative director and designer of the original Commander Keen series, has stated that he does not consider the GBC game "canon by any means".
overview_zh: Commander Keen 是 Activision 於 2001 年發行的遊戲。屬於原由 id Software 開發的 Commander Keen 系列。在 Game Boy Color 上推出，雖獲 id Software 授權，但並未由原 Commander Keen 開發者參與，而是由 David A. Palmer Productions 製作。原系列的創意總監兼設計師 Tom Hall 表示他「絕對不認為」這款 GBC 遊戲屬於正史。

no_intro_name: Conker's Pocket Tales (USA, Europe) (En,Fr,De) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
Conker's Pocket Tales is a 1999 Game Boy Color video game developed by Rare and released by Rare Inc., under license by Nintendo of America, in the USA on June 8, 1999.

It's Conker's birthday and someone crashed his party! The Evil Acorn has stolen all of Conker's presents and kidnapped his best chipmunk friend, Berri. Now you must take on the role of the bushy-tailed hero, pursuing your nemesis throughout 6 visually-stunning worlds to rescue Berri and save your birthday from complete disaster. Strain your brain to solve challenging puzzles, battle the Evil Acorn's horde of minions with your trusty slingshot, and even flex your muscles in sporting events as you track your foe to the final showdown!
overview_zh:
Conker's Pocket Tales 是 1999 年的 Game Boy Color 遊戲，由 Rare 開發、Rare Inc. 在 Nintendo of America 授權下於 1999 年 6 月 8 日在美國發行。

是 Conker 的生日，但有人闖進派對！邪惡橡實偷走了 Conker 所有的禮物，還綁架了他最好的花栗鼠朋友 Berri。如今你必須化身這隻毛茸茸的英雄，追擊宿敵橫越 6 個視覺驚豔的世界，救出 Berri，挽救生日不被毀掉。動腦解開挑戰性的謎題，用可靠的彈弓擊敗邪惡橡實的爪牙，甚至在運動賽事中大顯身手，一路追擊到最終決戰！

overview_en: Cool Bricks is a Breakout-style game, updated for the modern market. Players use the bat and ball to smash all the breakable bricks to complete each level. Cool Bricks also features a wide range of power-ups including the Ghost, Ninja and Poison. New technological tricks allow for high-colour screens and in excess of 150 levels. The game also features a durable High-Score board.
overview_zh: Cool Bricks 是針對現代市場改良的 Breakout 風格遊戲。玩家用球拍與球擊碎所有可破壞的磚塊以通關。Cool Bricks 還包含多種道具，如 Ghost、Ninja 與 Poison。新技術讓畫面色彩豐富，並提供超過 150 關。本作亦具備耐用的高分排行榜。

overview_en: Motocross Maniacs 2 is a Racing game, developed by Konami Computer Entertainment Osaka and published by Konami, which was released in Europe in 1999.
overview_zh: Motocross Maniacs 2 是由 Konami Computer Entertainment Osaka 開發、Konami 發行的賽車遊戲，於 1999 年在歐洲推出。

overview_en: The lovable little crocodile from the PlayStation and Saturn games arrives on Game Boy Color in CROC. The evil Dantinis led by the wicked Baron Dante have kidnapped the peaceful Gobbos. You assume the role of Croc, a heroic young crocodile, as he sets out to save all of his little friends. Run, jump, and swim your way through four colorful areas. More than 30 stages await you in the desert, ice world, jungle, and the castle. CROC features several special levels to keep gameplay fresh: aside from the standard side-scrolling stages on foot, you'll have to swim through treacherous coves, ski down a bumpy incline, ride a railcart through an underground mineshaft, and more. Adding even more variety are some mini-games that change up the action between levels. CROC features detailed full-color graphics with superb animation, and is a single-player adventure that you won't soon forget.
overview_zh: 在 PlayStation 與 Saturn 推出的可愛小鱷魚現身 Game Boy Color《CROC》。邪惡的 Dantinis 在惡棍 Baron Dante 帶領下綁架了和善的 Gobbos。你扮演英勇的小鱷魚 Croc，前去救出所有小夥伴。在 4 個多彩區域中跑、跳、游 沙漠、冰之國度、叢林與城堡共有超過 30 關。本作有多種特殊關卡讓玩法保持新鮮：除標準橫向捲軸關卡外，還會穿越險峻洞穴、滑下崎嶇坡道、坐礦坑車穿越地下礦坑等。關卡之間穿插的小遊戲更增添變化。本作色彩細膩、動畫流暢，是一段難以忘懷的單人冒險。

overview_en: Join Croc in an exciting new adventure as he searches for his long lost parents. But the search soon becomes a showdown as Croc's archenemy, Baron Dante, is magically resurrected by his evil Dantinis. Join Croc's journey as he explores over 40 levels within four Gobbo tribe villages, each packed with unique Gobbos, mischievous monsters, and tons of surprises!
overview_zh: 加入 Croc 全新刺激冒險，尋找他失散已久的父母。但這場尋親之旅旋即變成決戰，因為 Croc 的死敵 Baron Dante 被邪惡的 Dantinis 以魔法復活。一同踏上 Croc 的旅程，探索 4 個 Gobbo 部落村莊中超過 40 個關卡，每個村莊都有獨特的 Gobbos、頑皮的怪物與滿滿驚喜！

overview_en: A game born from the popular reader-participation project "The Strongest RPG Plan" in "Comic BomBom". It is an orthodox RPG, and it is made with an emphasis on the basics of training, collecting, exchanging, and fighting. There are 16 types of monsters created by readers, and more than 140 monsters can be collected. The story is different for all three versions. The main character of the Monster Hunter version is Shiro. Since there are 3 versions, you can enjoy various communication variations! With a deep and three-dimensional structure, you can play as many times as you like.
overview_zh: 誕生自《Comic BomBom》人氣讀者參與企劃「最強 RPG 計畫」的遊戲。是注重培育、蒐集、交換與戰鬥基本要素的正統 RPG。讀者創作的怪物有 16 種，可蒐集的怪物超過 140 種。3 個版本各有不同劇情，Monster Hunter 版的主角是 Shiro。3 個版本之間可享受多樣的通訊變化！結構深厚立體，可重複遊玩多次。

overview_en: A game born from the popular reader-participation project "The Strongest RPG Plan" in "Comic BomBom". It is an orthodox RPG, and it is made with an emphasis on the basics of training, collecting, exchanging, and fighting. There are 16 types of monsters created by readers, and more than 140 monsters can be collected. The story is different for all three versions. The main character of the treasure hunter version is the rope. Aim to defeat the Demon King to save his sister. Since there are 3 versions, you can enjoy various communication variations! With a deep and three-dimensional structure, you can play as many times as you like.
overview_zh: 誕生自《Comic BomBom》人氣讀者參與企劃「最強 RPG 計畫」的遊戲。是注重培育、蒐集、交換與戰鬥基本要素的正統 RPG。讀者創作的怪物有 16 種，可蒐集的怪物超過 140 種。3 個版本各有不同劇情，Treasure Hunter 版的主角是 Rope，目標是擊敗魔王、拯救妹妹。3 個版本之間可享受多樣的通訊變化！結構深厚立體，可重複遊玩多次。

overview_en: A game born from the popular reader-participation project "The Strongest RPG Plan" in "Comic BomBom". It is an orthodox RPG, and it is made with an emphasis on the basics of training, collecting, exchanging, and fighting. There are 16 types of monsters created by readers, and more than 140 monsters can be collected. The story is different for all three versions. The main character of the X-Hunter version is Huga. Since there are 3 versions, you can enjoy various communication variations! With a deep and three-dimensional structure, you can play as many times as you like.
overview_zh: 誕生自《Comic BomBom》人氣讀者參與企劃「最強 RPG 計畫」的遊戲。是注重培育、蒐集、交換與戰鬥基本要素的正統 RPG。讀者創作的怪物有 16 種，可蒐集的怪物超過 140 種。3 個版本各有不同劇情，X-Hunter 版的主角是 Huga。3 個版本之間可享受多樣的通訊變化！結構深厚立體，可重複遊玩多次。

overview_en: Race in style! Cruis'n Exotica takes you to fantastic locales in even more fantastic vehicles. Race through steamy Jurassic jungles or on the ocean floor. Midair stunts keep the action nonstop! Valuable short-cuts and nitro boosts speed up the already fast-paced action!
overview_zh: 瀟灑開賽！《Cruis'n Exotica》帶你以更奇幻的車輛前往奇幻場景。穿越蒸騰的侏羅紀叢林，或在海底狂奔。空中特技讓動作從不停歇！寶貴的捷徑與氮氣加速更讓本就快節奏的賽車衝得飛快！

overview_en: CRYSTALIS for the Game Boy Color takes you to a post-apocalyptic world where an evil force named Dragonia threatens to take over. You must seek out the four powerful enchanted Swords of the Elements in order to defeat him. Explore a massive world, loaded with more than 70 enemies and 300 non-player characters to interact with in this action or RPG.
overview_zh: Game Boy Color 版《CRYSTALIS》將你帶到後末日世界，邪惡勢力 Dragonia 正威脅統治此地。你必須尋得 4 把強大的元素附魔之劍才能擊敗它。在這款動作 / RPG 中，探索擁有 70 多種敵人與 300 多位非玩家角色可互動的廣大世界。

title_en: CUBIX - ROBOTS FOR EVERYONE - RACE 'N ROBOTS
no_intro_name: Cubix - Robots for Everyone - Race 'n Robots (USA) (En,Fr,De,Es,It)
overview_en: Robots in everyday life? Believe it, folks. That's the reality of the cool cartoon series, CUBIX: Robots for Everyone. The story follows the adventures of Connor a human boy and his robot, Cubix, through Bubble Town. Attempting to repair damaged robots and ward off evil beings, the pair encounters a whole cast of wacky characters every week. The game puts its emphasis on the racing aspects of the series, sending you to Bubble Town's racing championship series. Your arch-nemesis, Dr. K, has a converted racer named Kolossal in the competition, and your goal is to earn the right to defeat it. Choose to race as any of your favorite series characters, including Hop2ix, Brutix, Don-Don, Diagnostix, and Cubix. You'll be able to customize your racers to fit your liking, using elements like Grav-grip, Zero G, and other series-based power-ups to defy gravity and reach top speeds. Full of cool options game modes, and colorful graphics, Race N Robots is not to be missed.
overview_zh: 機器人融入日常生活？相信吧 朋友。這就是酷炫卡通影集《CUBIX: Robots for Everyone》的世界。故事跟隨人類男孩 Connor 與他的機器人 Cubix 在 Bubble Town 的冒險。為修復受損機器人並抵禦邪惡勢力，他們每週都會遇上一群古怪角色。本作聚焦於影集中的賽車元素，將你送進 Bubble Town 的賽車錦標賽。死敵 Dr. K 派出改造賽車手 Kolossal，你的目標是贏得擊敗它的資格。可從 Hop2ix、Brutix、Don-Don、Diagnostix、Cubix 等愛角中挑選。可自訂車手，運用 Grav-grip、Zero G 等系列強化道具違抗重力、衝刺極速。本作選項與模式豐富，畫面繽紛 《Race N Robots》絕不能錯過。

overview_en: Rip up the rules book - anything goes! Create your own golfer to take on CyberTiger and the many other characters. Real-time analog swing and ball control - hit a fade or a draw, add topspin or backspin, all in mid-flight. Sandtraps and tall rough are just the beginning. Seven modes of play: Strokes, Skins, Match, Tournament, Practice, Driving Range and the all-new Battle and Club Challenge modes. More ways to get on the green - superdrives, hidden tricks, hidden courses, hidden golfers, and tons of secret skills!
overview_zh: 拋開規則手冊 一切照玩！打造屬於你的高爾夫球員，挑戰 CyberTiger 與其他眾多角色。即時類比揮桿與球控 隨意打出 fade 或 draw、在球飛行中加上 topspin 或 backspin。沙坑與長草只是開始。7 種模式：桿數賽、Skins、Match、錦標賽、練習、練球場，以及全新的 Battle 與 Club Challenge 模式。更多上果嶺方式 superdrives、隱藏技巧、隱藏球場、隱藏球員與大量祕密技能！

title_en: CYBORG KURO-CHAN 2 - WHITE WOODS NO GYAKUSHUU
no_intro_name: Cyborg Kuro-chan 2 - White Woods no Gyakushuu (Japan)

overview_en: Collect Kuro-chan weapons, commonly known as "Kuropon", and defeat the boss that appears at the end of the stage! In this game, the "destruction rate" that destroys and raises buildings is important. You can get a new cropon by destroying the object to be destroyed, or you can get the "strongest cropon" when the destruction rate of all 5 stages reaches 80%. There are 320 types of cropons in all. If you get "The Strongest Cropon", you will be able to fight your friends in online battles. If you win the match, you can take a penalty such as stealing the cropon used by the opponent or rewriting the name of the opponent's cartridge to your own name. At the beginning of the stage, there are visuals featuring characters familiar from anime, including Kuro-chan.
overview_zh: 蒐集俗稱「Kuropon」的小黑武器，擊敗每關末尾出現的 Boss！本作中破壞建築並提升的「破壞率」相當重要。破壞物件可獲得新 Kuropon，全 5 關的破壞率達到 80% 時還能取得「最強 Kuropon」。Kuropon 共 320 種。獲得「最強 Kuropon」後即可與朋友連線對戰。獲勝後可施加懲罰，例如奪取對手所用的 Kuropon、把對手卡帶上的名字改寫成自己的名字等。每關開始時會出現以動畫熟悉角色（包含 Kuro-chan）為主角的視覺場景。

title_en: DAA! DAA! DAA! - TOTSUZEN CARD DE BATTLE DE URANAI DE!
no_intro_name: Daa! Daa! Daa! - Totsuzen Card de Battle de Uranai de! (Japan)
Daffy Duck - Fowl Play (USA, Europe) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: DAFFY DUCK: Fowl Play brings more Looney Tunes fun and action to your Game Boy Color. In this one-player, side-scrolling action game, you'll play as Daffy Duck, who's been told by Bugs Bunny about a secret hidden treasure. Your job is to find it! Too bad Bugs and the rest of the Looney Tunes crew have decided to stop your treasure-hunting journey cold. Play through nine stages of platforming action as you look to get rich quick. There are a few puzzle elements as well that require you to push crates and use dynamite sticks to clear a path. DAFFY DUCK: Fowl Play features large, well-animated characters set on detailed backgrounds, and although it has been enhanced for Game Boy Color, this game is compatible with both Game Boy and Game Boy Color systems.
overview_zh: 《DAFFY DUCK: Fowl Play》為 Game Boy Color 帶來更多 Looney Tunes 趣味與動作。在這款單人橫向捲軸動作遊戲中，扮演達菲鴨，賓尼兔告訴他有個祕密寶藏 你的工作就是找出來！可惜賓尼與其他 Looney Tunes 夥伴決定阻撓你的尋寶之旅。穿越 9 關平台動作，目標一夜致富。其中也有解謎要素，需推箱子或用炸藥開路。本作角色巨大、動畫精細、背景細緻；雖經 Game Boy Color 強化，但仍相容於 Game Boy 與 Game Boy Color 主機。

title_en: DAFFY DUCK - SUBETTE KORON DE OOGANE MOCHI
no_intro_name: Daffy Duck - Subette Koron de Oogane Mochi (Japan) (GB Compatible)

title_en: DAIKAIJUU MONOGATARI - POYON NO DUNGEON ROOM
no_intro_name: Daikaijuu Monogatari - Poyon no Dungeon Room (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

title_en: DAIKAIJUU MONOGATARI - POYON NO DUNGEON ROOM 2
no_intro_name: Daikaijuu Monogatari - Poyon no Dungeon Room 2 (Japan)

title_en: DAIKAIJUU MONOGATARI - THE MIRACLE OF THE ZONE II
no_intro_name: Daikaijuu Monogatari - The Miracle of the Zone II (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

title_en: DAIKU NO GEN-SAN - KACHIKACHI NO TONKACHI GA KACHI
no_intro_name: Daiku no Gen-san - Kachikachi no Tonkachi ga Kachi (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: DDR is now available on GB. The GB version takes steps with your fingers! It has a dedicated finger controller, so it's easy to play. When you have a little time, you can easily play with the stage-based ARCADE MODE. With cable communication, you can play with your friends and compete with each other.
overview_zh: DDR 現於 GB 上推出。GB 版用手指踩節拍！附專用指控器，操作輕鬆。空閒一點時間就能用關卡式 ARCADE MODE 輕鬆遊玩。透過連線通訊，可與朋友互相對戰。

title_en: DANCE DANCE REVOLUTION GB - DISNEY MIX
no_intro_name: Dance Dance Revolution GB - Disney Mix (Japan)
overview_en:
Third and last console game of DanceDanceRevolution with Disney.
This is also the last game released on GameBoy.
DanceDanceRevolution GB Disney mix includes most of the songs from DanceDanceRevolution Disney's RAVE.
Just like Dancing Stage featuring Disney's RAVE and DanceDanceRevolution Disney's RAVE, there is no numerical scoring system during gameplay. Instead, a letter rank is given (starting with A), which improves or worsens throughout the song, depending on the player's performance.
One of the two GameBoy DanceDanceRevolution titles with a battery backup cartridge.
Total Songs: 16
overview_zh:
DanceDanceRevolution 與迪士尼合作的第三作、也是最後一款主機作品，同時是 Game Boy 上最後推出的遊戲。
DanceDanceRevolution GB Disney mix 收錄《DanceDanceRevolution Disney's RAVE》大部分曲目。
與《Dancing Stage featuring Disney's RAVE》及《DanceDanceRevolution Disney's RAVE》一樣，遊戲過程中沒有數值評分系統，而是給予字母評等（從 A 開始），依玩家表現在曲中升降。
本作是兩款 Game Boy DDR 中具備電池備份卡帶的其中之一。
總曲數：16

overview_en: A rhythm action game that lets you dance "Furby" to the flowing rhythm. The modes are "Dance mode" where Furby dances by key operation according to the music (there are 3 levels of difficulty), "Free play mode" where you can freely select Furby and songs, and you can dance with your own song with the composition function. There are 5 types of "Composer Mode", "Network Mode" where you can play powerfully with your friends, 4 types of mini games, and "Mini Game Mode" with "Furby Dictionary". In addition, depending on the score of the game, a signal can be sent from the infrared port of GB to the toy "Furby doll" owned by the player, and the toy "Furby doll" will perform various dances and talks.
overview_zh: 讓「Furby」隨著節奏起舞的節奏動作遊戲。模式包括：依音樂用按鍵讓 Furby 跳舞、含 3 種難度的「Dance Mode」；可自由選擇 Furby 與曲目、並用作曲功能配自己歌曲跳舞、共 5 種的「Free Play / 作曲家模式」；可與朋友熱鬧同樂的「Network Mode」；以及含 4 種小遊戲與「Furby 字典」的「Mini Game Mode」。此外，依遊戲分數，可從 GB 紅外線埠對玩家擁有的玩具「Furby 娃娃」傳送訊號，玩具 Furby 會做出多種跳舞與說話動作。

overview_en: A simulation baseball game where you can freely edit data. Players can enjoy realistically reproduced pennant races as owners, managers, and spectators. The latest real name default data that promoted the actual results, a total of 360 players. In addition to being able to set up to the year stick, the full-scale content of the baseball stadium and stadium is all real names. Many uniform team logos are also available for the original team. Since team data can be sent and received by infrared communication, it is possible to fight with a team of friends, and it also has a trading function during pennant racing.
overview_zh: 可自由編輯資料的模擬棒球遊戲。玩家能以球團老闆、總教練或觀眾身分享受擬真重現的職棒例行賽。採用反映實際成績的最新真名預設資料，登錄選手共 360 人。除可設定到「年棒」之外，球團與球場名稱皆採用真名，球衣與球團 logo 也提供原創球團使用。可透過紅外線通訊收發球隊資料，與朋友的球隊對戰，並具備例行賽進行中的交易功能。

overview_en: A simulation baseball game where you can freely edit data. Adopted the latest data at the start of the 2001 pennant race. 360 players in a professional baseball team. The stadium appears under its real name. It also supports the 140 game schedule of the Central League. Players can enjoy realistically reproduced pennant races as owners, managers, and even spectators. The number of signs that can be instructed is 11 items when attacking and 11 items when defending. You can enjoy modes such as "Penant Race Mode" to fight through the season, "All-Star Game Mode" selected for the success of the first half of the game, "Japan Series Mode" to fight with the winning team of Sepa, and "Open Battle Mode" to play anytime you like. You can exchange team data of your friends via infrared communication.
overview_zh: 可自由編輯資料的模擬棒球遊戲。採用 2001 年球季開始時的最新資料，職棒登錄選手 360 人，球場以真名登場，並支援中央聯盟 140 場賽程。玩家能以球團老闆、總教練乃至觀眾身分享受擬真重現的例行賽。攻擊與守備的可指示暗號各 11 種。可選的模式包括：完整打完一個球季的「Pennant Race 模式」、依上半季表現選出的「明星賽模式」、與兩聯盟冠軍對決的「日本一系列賽模式」，以及可隨時遊玩的「對戰模式」。可透過紅外線通訊與朋友交換球隊資料。

overview_en: The Game Boy Color gets its own BMX trick game with DAVE MIRRA FREESTYLE BMX. You'll play through eight different stages that will give you the chance to pull off some wild stunts and spectacular jumps. Each course will challenge you to complete a variety of objectives, ranging from specific stunts to collecting items. Perform each of the objectives to earn points, unlock new stages, and upgrade your bike for better tricks. The game is played from a ?-overhead perspective, which allows you a maximum view of the surrounding area. Each of the levels has a multitude of obstacles and items to perform tricks on and, with careful timing, you'll be able to create wild trick combinations off multiple objects. You can play a Tournament mode with up to three friends by passing the system after each run, and you can save your progress and high scores using the password save function.
overview_zh: Game Boy Color 也擁有自己的 BMX 特技遊戲《DAVE MIRRA FREESTYLE BMX》。挑戰 8 個不同關卡，盡情施展瘋狂特技與壯觀跳躍。每條賽道會要求完成多項目標，包括特定特技與蒐集物件。完成目標可獲得分數、解鎖新關卡，並升級單車以做出更厲害的特技。視角採俯視略傾斜，可廣闊掌握周圍環境。每關都有大量障礙與道具可施展特技，掌握時機便能在多個物件間連出瘋狂連段。可同台輪流進行最多 4 人錦標賽模式，並以密碼存檔保存進度與高分。

overview_en: From the country that lives, eats and sleeps the sport, comes David Beckham Soccer. It features: Over 200 top club and international teams using up-to-date squads and player data; fluid, motion-captured animation; awesome super-stadiums; realistic crowd atmosphere; play-by-play calls; a unique David Beckham training mode. This is the most true-to-the-game soccer experience available.
overview_zh: 來自呼吸都離不開足球的國度，《David Beckham Soccer》登場。特色包括：超過 200 支頂級俱樂部與國家隊，搭配最新陣容與球員資料；流暢的動態捕捉動畫；震撼的超大球場；逼真的觀眾氣氛；逐球播報；獨家的 David Beckham 訓練模式。是當前最忠實重現足球的體驗。

overview_en:
A portable version of PC's excellent Total Soccer series. The graphics are even more simplified for the Gameboy's capabilities, but the gameplay remains the same.

It features 10 different practice modes, 3 levels of difficulty, leagues, championships and single-matches, and 2-player-link feature also.
overview_zh:
PC 上優秀的 Total Soccer 系列攜帶版。圖像為配合 Game Boy 性能進一步簡化，但玩法保持原樣。

收錄 10 種練習模式、3 種難度，以及聯賽、錦標賽與單場比賽，並支援雙人連線對戰。

title_en: DEAR DANIEL NO SWEET ADVENTURE - KITTY-CHAN O SAGASHITE
no_intro_name: Dear Daniel no Sweet Adventure - Kitty-chan o Sagashite (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Daniel's action game. In order to meet Kitty again, you have to clear the stages all over the world and get "Love Love Points". By accumulating love love points, you can use various costumes and items, and you can go to hidden stages. The more power-up items you get, the more high-scoring techniques you can get in the jump action, and the more points you get, the easier it is to earn love love points. Mini games and communication functions all depend on love love points.
overview_zh: Daniel 的動作遊戲。為了再次與 Kitty 相見，必須通過世界各地的關卡並蒐集「Love Love Points」。累積 Love Love Points 即可使用各種服裝與道具，前往隱藏關卡。獲得越多強化道具，跳躍動作中能使出的高分技巧也越多，得分越多就越容易賺取 Love Love Points。小遊戲與通訊功能也都依靠 Love Love Points 解鎖。

overview_en: The popular pursuit of hunting comes to the portable screen in DEER HUNTER for the Game Boy Color. You play as a hunter looking to catch a nice trophy in one of four different areas using three different weapons. Hunt deer with a shotgun, a rifle, or a bow, using slightly different tactics with each. If you want to be successful, you'll have to use real-world hunting strategies. Search for droppings or other signs of movement to find the best area to wait in. Once there, use one of an assortment of tools to help you catch your prey: mask your odor with a cover scent, use a tree stand to camouflage yourself, or lure the deer with a powerful musk, a deer call, or an antler rattle. It's up to you to decide how to catch the deer; some methods are more efficient than others, so you'll have to find the one that works best for you. Detailed graphics and digitized sound round out the experience for would-be hunters.
overview_zh: 在 Game Boy Color 版《DEER HUNTER》中將熱門的狩獵活動帶到掌上螢幕。扮演獵人，使用 3 種武器在 4 個區域追求心目中的戰利品。可選擇霰彈槍、來福槍或弓，每種對應不同戰術。想成功，得運用真實狩獵策略：尋找糞便或行動跡象，鎖定最佳等候地點；到位後使用各種道具誘獵 用遮味劑掩蓋體味、躲在樹樁台上偽裝、用強烈麝香、鹿笛或鹿角碰撞聲誘鹿。如何捕到鹿由你決定，方法各有效率，得自行尋找最適合的方式。精細圖像與數位化音效讓準獵人完整體驗。

title_en: DEJA VU I _ II - THE CASEBOOKS OF ACE HARDING
no_intro_name: Deja Vu I _ II - The Casebooks of Ace Harding (USA)
overview_en:
Take on two thrilling mysteries in one Game Pak!

Life is never boring when you assume the role of Ace Harding, private detective. In Deja Vu I, you will scramble down the dark alleys of Chicago, searching for a cure for you amnesia and a killer who has framed you for a brutal murder. After solving the first case, you'll uncover a few loose strings that gradually unrabel into Deja Vu II. Trapped in the slimy town of Last Vegas, you find yourself dealing with a notorious mob leader who makes you an offer you can't refuse.

-Two detailed graphic adventure games in one Game Boy Color Game Pak!
-Detailed commands for interacting with anyone or anything!
-Return to the scene of the crime, or any of the other 140 locations!
-Sort out the real evidence from the red herrings and over 80 other items!
-Battery-backed save option for up to three save game files!
overview_zh:
一張卡帶內收錄兩段刺激懸疑故事！

當你扮演私家偵探 Ace Harding，生活絕不無聊。在《Deja Vu I》中，你將穿越芝加哥的黑暗巷弄，尋找治療失憶的方法，以及陷害你犯下凶殺案的真凶。解開第一案後，幾條線索逐漸串成《Deja Vu II》。困在污穢的 Las Vegas，你被迫面對一位讓你無法拒絕條件的惡名昭彰黑手黨頭目。

- 一張 Game Boy Color 卡帶收錄兩款細膩的圖像冒險遊戲！
- 詳細指令可與任何人或任何物互動！
- 可重返案發現場，或前往其他 140 處場景！
- 從 80 多件物品中辨別真實證據與煙幕！
- 電池備份存檔，最多 3 個檔案！

overview_en: There are 6 game modes: "Winning Battle", "Free Battle", "Gamers Mode", "Beginner Guide", "Communication Battle", and "Item Mode". You can shop at Gamers with the points that won the mahjong game. Depending on the item you bought, the attribute value of the character will change, and mahjong will be advantageous. The voice is uttered by four people (Di Gi Charat, Buchiko, Usada, Panda), so you can enjoy it with your favorite character's voice.
overview_zh: 共有 6 種遊戲模式：「優勝對戰」、「自由對戰」、「Gamers 模式」、「初學者導覽」、「通訊對戰」、「道具模式」。可用對局贏得的點數在 Gamers 商店購物，依購買的道具改變角色屬性值，麻將上更具優勢。語音由 4 位角色（Di Gi Charat、Buchiko、Usada、Panda）演出，可選擇喜愛角色的聲音同樂。

overview_en: The people of Puzzle Island love to play puzzle games. Their favorite is Denki Blocks! A game of skill that is played by sliding blocks around a board, joining colored blocks together to build shapes and solve puzzles.
overview_zh: Puzzle Island 的居民熱愛解謎遊戲，最喜歡的就是《Denki Blocks!》一款滑動方塊、把同色方塊連接成形以解開謎題的技巧遊戲。

overview_en: A train driving simulation game that stops the train at the station's stop position on Diamond Street. Stamp rally is adopted for all routes and sections as a new game system. Depending on the accuracy of the stop position, the stamp of the stop station will appear for each level. Since the stamps are stored in the backup cartridge and can be viewed freely, you can use it as a guide for achieving the station capture, and you can compete with your friends for the number of stamps you have collected. The lines that appear are the Sanin line, Keihin Tohoku line, Tokaido line, and Yamanote line, and if you collect stamps for all lines, extra lines will appear.
overview_zh: 於指定路線在站內定點精準停車的電車駕駛模擬遊戲。新增「集章遊戲」系統，所有路線、所有區段皆採用。依停止位置精準度，會出現該停靠站對應等級的章。章可儲存於備份卡帶中自由翻閱，可作為達成「集站」的參考，並與朋友比拼蒐集章的數量。登場路線有山陰本線、京濱東北線、東海道本線、山手線；蒐集所有路線的章後將出現額外路線。

overview_en: The second train driving game is now available at GBC. There are five driving routes: the Hokuhoku North Line, the Osaka Loop Line, the Kagoshima Main Line, and the Akita Shinkansen where you can enjoy high-speed driving. There is also a "fixed time system" that passes through the station at a fixed time. Adopted "Railway picture book mode" that collects railway photos by rank according to driving evaluation. The characteristics of each train are commented on the photos, and you can create a digital photo book by collecting the photos. These photos were taken by professional photographer Yosuke Shiozuka, and there are hundreds of them. It's compatible with game boy printers, so you can print out the photos you collect and exchange them with your friends. A full-scale train driving game that railroad fans will appreciate.
overview_zh: 電車駕駛遊戲第二作登上 GBC。共 5 條駕駛路線：北北線、大阪環狀線、鹿兒島本線，以及可體驗高速駕駛的秋田新幹線。亦導入「定時系統」，要求列車於固定時刻通過車站。並採用依駕駛評價蒐集鐵道照片排名的「鐵道圖鑑模式」。照片附上各列車特性的解說，蒐集照片可製作數位寫真集。這些照片由專業攝影師潮塚陽介拍攝，數量達數百張。支援 Game Boy Printer，可印出蒐集到的照片與朋友交換。鐵道迷不容錯過的正統電車駕駛遊戲。

overview_en: Robots are running amok in Dexter's lab! Based on the popular cartoon series, DEXTER'S LABORATORY: Robot Rampage for the Game Boy Color puts you in the little boots of the Dexter as he tries to reclaim his lab from Mandark's invading mechanical mayhem. You'll have to ride elevators, dive down shafts, hide in shadows, and occasionally blast the robotic intruders as you hunt down your evil nemesis. There are three different outfits you can wear to make infiltrating the lab easier: wear your standard lab-coat or one of two special robo-suits, depending on what the situation calls for. You can also use Dexter's high-tech weapons to dispatch the enemy through level after level of fast and furious action.
overview_zh: 機器人在 Dexter 的實驗室裡橫行作亂！改編自人氣卡通影集，Game Boy Color 版《DEXTER'S LABORATORY: Robot Rampage》讓你穿上 Dexter 的小靴，奪回被 Mandark 機械大軍入侵的實驗室。要搭電梯、跳下豎井、躲進陰影中，並適時射擊機器入侵者，一路追擊邪惡宿敵。可穿三種不同服裝以利潛入實驗室：標準實驗袍或兩款特製機甲服，視情況選用。也能用 Dexter 的高科技武器一關接一關擊潰敵人，享受快速激烈的動作。

no_intro_name: Dino Breeder 3 - Gaia Fukkatsu (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Incubate dinosaurs from eggs and let them travel on an adventure. Let's clear the waiting enemies and numerous events and create a new species by "fusion" while nurturing by feeding and sometimes treating. The number of scenarios will increase significantly, and the story will branch out. There are two types of dinosaurs that players can train, Stycola Saurus and Sordes, and six new types. The dinosaur grows in four stages. It is also possible to play against each other using a communication cable, and if you lose the game, the new species will become the opponent's thing.
overview_zh: 從蛋中孵化恐龍，帶牠們踏上冒險。一邊餵食、有時治療地培育牠們，並透過「融合」清除潛伏的敵人與大量事件，創造新物種。劇情數量大幅增加，故事將分歧。玩家可培育的恐龍有 Stycola Saurus 與 Sordes 兩種，新增 6 種品種。恐龍分 4 階段成長。亦可透過通訊纜線對戰，輸了的話新物種就會歸對手所有。

overview_en: Dr. Matsunaga continues to study dinosaur genes (Dinogenome). One day when the research was nearing completion, he suddenly disappeared, leaving a sample. There, Dr. Matsunaga's grandson, Dr. Matsunaga appeared, believed in the survival of the doctor, got on the time machine left by his grandfather, time slipped into the past, and set out on an adventure! The Dinoboo leader of the training series powers up with a fulfilling story and action! Not only the number of dinosaurs, but also the visual aspect, "super-futuristic DNA coalescence" in fusion, and the towering of many new systems, all of which are far beyond the previous work! The story has two screens, an action side and a bleeding side, and you will get an anesthetic bullet hitting Dino who will accompany your trip on the action side. Once you get Dino, take care of the dinosaurs and go on an adventure together. Defeat the enemies you encounter, overcome the events, obtain the items, and "DNA coalesce" with the fusion you arrived at to produce new species and complete the picture book. You can exchange new kinds of dinosaurs with your friends by installing a communication system.
overview_zh: 松永博士持續研究恐龍基因（Dinogenome）。某天研究即將完成時，他突然失蹤，只留下樣本。其孫松永博士登場，相信祖父仍然在世，搭上祖父留下的時光機，回到過去展開冒險！訓育系列領頭的恐龍 Boo 在劇情與動作上全面強化！不僅恐龍數量，視覺面、融合中的「超未來 DNA 結合」與多種新系統的高聳建立，全都遠超前作！故事分為動作面與血緣面兩個畫面，動作面要以麻醉彈打中陪你旅行的恐龍。獲得恐龍後就照顧牠並一同冒險。擊敗遭遇的敵人、克服事件、取得道具，以「DNA 結合」進行融合產生新物種，並完成圖鑑。透過內建通訊系統可與朋友交換新品種恐龍。

overview_en: Dinosaur'us is a Role-Playing game, developed by RFX Interactive and published by Electronic Arts, which was released in Europe in 2001.
overview_zh: Dinosaur'us 是由 RFX Interactive 開發、Electronic Arts 發行的角色扮演遊戲，於 2001 年在歐洲推出。

overview_en: Diva Starz: Mall Mania is an Action game, developed by Digital Illusions and published by VU Games, which was released in 2001.
overview_zh: Diva Starz: Mall Mania 是由 Digital Illusions 開發、VU Games 發行的動作遊戲，於 2001 年推出。

overview_en: Are you looking to adopt a pet but lack the time or space to take care of a real one? Then you may find DOGZ to be of interest. Part of the small but popular virtual pet genre, DOGZ lets you adopt a dog from one of three breeds: Chihuahua, Scottie, or mutt. You can play with the pet first to decide if it's right for you. Once you've adopted the little gal or fella, it's up to you to take care of it: feed it, groom it, and play with it regularly if you want it to grow up to be a well-adjusted adult. If you mistreat your dog, though, your little pet will take off! Eventually, new breeds of dogs and new special toys will become available for you, depending on how well you do. You can even trade toys and breeds of dogs with your friends via the infrared link.
overview_zh: 想養寵物，卻沒時間或空間照顧真實動物嗎？那麼《DOGZ》或許正合你意。本作屬於小眾但人氣的虛擬寵物類型，可從吉娃娃、蘇格蘭㹴或混種狗三種品種中認養一隻狗。可以先和寵物玩耍再決定是否合適。一旦領養了這位小傢伙，就要負責餵食、梳理、定期陪玩，讓牠長成情緒穩定的成犬。如果虐待牠，小狗會離家出走！表現好就有機會解鎖新品種與特殊玩具。也可透過紅外線通訊與朋友交換玩具與狗的品種。

overview_en: This is the Kingdom of Dokapon (Land), the country that gave birth to many small legends. One day, the 18th King of the Kingdom of Dokapon was troubled by an incident and put up a job advertisement all over the country. "We are looking for brave human resources! With a nap for three meals, Paradise will be waiting for you! For more information, please visit Dokopon Castle ~" An adventurer's egg came to the Kingdom of Dokapon with such a job advertisement. .. "It's not such a dangerous job because it's that king," he chose for his first job as an adventurer. However, it was a dangerous job with 151 monsters waiting for you, from the crazy guy to the mukatsuku guy! .. Combat is a "rock-paper-scissors" system, so it's important to outwit the enemy. Play hot battles with your friends and steal their equipment.
overview_zh: 這裡是孕育眾多小傳說的 Dokapon 王國（Land）。某日，第 18 代 Dokapon 國王為了某事件煩惱，於全國張貼徵才公告：「徵求勇者人才！包三餐附午睡，天堂在等你！詳情請洽 Dokapon 城～」一位冒險者菜鳥被這份徵才公告吸引來到 Dokapon 王國。「既然是這位國王，應該不會多危險吧」 他抱著這想法選了人生第一份冒險者工作。沒想到，等著他的是 151 種怪物的危險工作，從瘋癲到惡心的應有盡有！戰鬥採「剪刀石頭布」系統，重點是在心理戰中勝出。與朋友熱血對戰、奪取對手裝備吧。

overview_en:
Keeping Donald content is about as easy as herding cats, but everyone's favorite fusspot really goes off the deep
end when malodorous magician Merlock duck-naps Daisy. To add insult to injury, Donald's uppity cousin, Gladstone
Gander, vows to rescue Daisy. Thus begins Donald's great race to reach Daisy first and foil Merlock's nefarious
plans.

The player has four lives that can increase by finding special items. Each life gives Donald two opportunities to be touched by the enemy, the first time is touched, he becomes angry and throws berserk to the enemies, the second time, he loses a life. Donald can also unlock new outfits, which alter cutscenes and idle animations (such as Donald taking photos of the place if he is dressed like a tourist).
overview_zh:
讓唐老鴨開心可不容易，但這位大家最愛的小氣鬼真正爆走的時刻，是惡名昭彰的魔法師 Merlock 把黛西鴨擄走時。雪上加霜的是，唐老鴨自負的表親 Gladstone Gander 也誓言要拯救黛西。於是唐老鴨展開搶先抵達黛西、粉碎 Merlock 邪惡計畫的大競賽。

玩家有 4 條命，可透過特殊道具增加。每條命中，唐老鴨可被敵人觸碰兩次：第一次被碰他會生氣狂揍敵人，第二次則會失去 1 命。唐老鴨亦可解鎖新服裝，會改變過場與待機動畫（例如打扮成觀光客時會拍攝場景的照片）。

overview_en: The best-selling Super NES game of all time is back! Remember blasting through levels in barrels and taking wild mine cart rides? All the jammin' jungle hi-jinks are back, along with DK's animal friends Rambi the Rhino, Squawks the Parrot, Enguarde the Swordfish and more! In addition to all the original levels, you get the chest-pounding fun of new bonus levels and 2-player games.
overview_zh: 史上最暢銷的 Super NES 遊戲回歸！還記得乘著木桶轟過關卡、駕著礦坑車狂飆的時光嗎？所有歡樂的叢林惡搞通通回來，加上 DK 的動物夥伴 犀牛 Rambi、鸚鵡 Squawks、劍魚 Enguarde 等！除原版所有關卡外，還收錄令人捶胸喝采的全新獎勵關卡與雙人遊戲。

overview_en:
Donkey Kong Country is a 2000 Game Boy Color video game developed by Rare and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on November 20, 2000.

The best-selling Super NES game of all time is back! Remember blasting through levels in barrels and taking wild mine cart rides? All the jammin' jungle hi-jinks are back, along with DK's animal friends Rambi the Rhino, Squawks the Parrot, Enguarde the Swordfish, and more! In addition to all the original levels, you get the chest-pounding fun of new bonus levels and 2-player games.
overview_zh:
《Donkey Kong Country》是 Rare 開發、由美國任天堂於 2000 年 11 月 20 日在美國發行的 Game Boy Color 遊戲。

史上最暢銷的 Super NES 遊戲回歸！還記得乘坐木桶飛越關卡、體驗瘋狂礦車之旅的感覺嗎？所有歡騰的叢林冒險都回來了，DK 的動物夥伴 Rambi 犀牛、Squawks 鸚鵡、Enguarde 旗魚等也再度登場！除了原版所有關卡之外，還新增了刺激的額外關卡與雙人遊戲。

title_en: DONKEY KONG GB - DINKY KONG _ DIXIE KONG
no_intro_name: Donkey Kong GB - Dinky Kong _ Dixie Kong (Japan)
overview_en:
Fame-and-fortune seekers have flooded Donkey Kong Country in search of the fabled Lost World. You command Dixie Kong and Kiddy Kong through 36 Kong-sized levels of action and adventure. Use your animal friends - Squitter the spider, Squawks the parrot, Ellie the elephant, Enguarde the swordfish and Parry the parallel bird - to help you prove your adventuring skills and find the Lost World before someone else does!

In this updated version of Donkey Kong Land III, enjoy the classic adventure now in full color exclusively released in Japan.
overview_zh:
尋求名利的人們湧入 Donkey Kong Country，搜尋傳說中的失落世界。你將操控 Dixie Kong 與 Kiddy Kong 闖過 36 個 Kong 級規模的動作冒險關卡。善用動物夥伴：蜘蛛 Squitter、鸚鵡 Squawks、大象 Ellie、旗魚 Enguarde 與平行鳥 Parry，證明你的冒險實力，搶在別人之前找到失落世界！

本作是《Donkey Kong Land III》的更新版本，僅於日本發行，讓玩家以全彩享受這部經典冒險。

overview_en: "Navigation (navigation action game)" that guides five familiar friends to the goal while making a good path. When the game starts, the character once starts walking. The lamp demon is made of smoke, so it is full of enemy characters, clouds, and smoke that block the way. The player uses the gimmicks well to defeat the enemy and guide the character. You must finish the character within the time limit while getting items such as Dorayaki so as not to touch the thunder and enemy characters. There are 60 stages including the back mountain of the school. In addition, a post stage, a hidden stage, and a battle play original stage are available.
overview_zh: 一款帶領五位熟悉的好夥伴邊鋪路邊走向終點的「導航動作遊戲」。遊戲開始後，角色會自行向前走。燈魔由煙霧構成，沿途滿是阻擋去路的敵人、雲朵與煙霧。玩家需妥善運用機關擊敗敵人並引導角色前進。必須避開雷電與敵人，邊蒐集銅鑼燒等道具，邊在時限內讓角色抵達終點。共 60 關，包含校園後山等場景，另有後續關卡、隱藏關卡與對戰專用關卡。

overview_en: The previous work used secret tools to win the race, but this time we will race to collect secret tools. Moreover, secret tools cannot be collected just by winning the race. The total number of secret tools is 132. There are three modes: "Scenario mode" where you race to regain secret tools from the king of karts, "VS mode" where you can play 2P with a communication cable, and "Time attack" where you compete for 3 laps with 1P. There are courses with different designs in one world, and there are 5 worlds in that world. Flat ground course, underwater course, cloud course, ice course, etc. are available.
overview_zh: 前作是用秘密道具贏得比賽，這次則改為在比賽中蒐集秘密道具。而且，秘密道具不是光靠贏得比賽就能蒐集到的，總數共有 132 種。遊戲共有三種模式：從卡丁車之王手中奪回秘密道具的「劇情模式」、可用通訊纜線進行 2P 對戰的「VS 模式」，以及 1P 競逐三圈的「計時挑戰」。同一個世界中有多條設計各異的賽道，共有 5 個世界，包含平地、水底、雲端、冰雪等不同類型的賽道。

title_en: DORAEMON - KIMI TO PET NO MONOGATARI
no_intro_name: Doraemon - Kimi to Pet no Monogatari (Japan) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: An RPG where players can adventure with Doraemon. The theme this time is friendship between players and pets! Depart with Doraemon and others on a pet hunting trip that I loved. The main character can be selected from two boys and two girls, and you can enjoy different adventures by changing the character. You can enjoy battle with "friendship attack", "brave point", and "secret tool" techniques. Equipped with a "consultation system" when you don't know what to do next during the game. It is also possible to collect characters and secret tools with trading cards. Of course, you can also exchange with friends using a communication cable.
overview_zh: 可以與哆啦A夢一同冒險的 RPG。本作主題是玩家與寵物的友情！與哆啦A夢等夥伴踏上喜愛的寵物搜索之旅。主角可從兩名男孩與兩名女孩中挑選，更換角色即可體驗不同的冒險過程。戰鬥中可使用「友情攻擊」、「勇氣值」、「秘密道具」等技巧。內建「諮詢系統」，遊戲中遇到不知該怎麼辦時可隨時求助。亦可透過交換卡片蒐集角色與秘密道具。當然也能透過通訊纜線與好友交換。

title_en: DORAEMON MEMORIES - NOBITA NO OMOIDE DAIBOUKEN
no_intro_name: Doraemon Memories - Nobita no Omoide Daibouken (Japan) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: Select the type of quiz such as "up-down quiz", "time try", and "panel attack", and compete for benefits depending on the correctness of the problem. In "Communication Battle Mode", you can select your favorite character from familiar characters such as Doraemon, Nobita, Gian, and Shizuka-chan, and in "Challenge Mode", you can play against two friends. The quiz questions are based on learning questions from the first to sixth grades of elementary school, and about 4,500 questions are prepared, including sports and trivia.
overview_zh: 可選擇「上下問答」、「計時挑戰」、「面板攻擊」等不同類型的問答，依答題正確率競爭分數。「通訊對戰模式」中可從哆啦A夢、大雄、胖虎、靜香等熟悉角色挑選喜愛的角色登場；「挑戰模式」則可與兩位朋友對戰。題目以小學一到六年級的學習內容為主，並包含體育與雜學等共約 4,500 題。

overview_en: "Doraemon learning software" that allows you to study while playing. Contains more than 5,000 learning quizzes that correspond to the new course of study from 2002. The range of questions is the same as the timetable for music, physical education, life sciences and elementary school students, including Kokusaisha. Furthermore, in the "genre" genre, questions about computers, English, and welfare are also given. There are four game modes: "Up Down Quiz", "Bingo Quiz", "Panel Attack Quiz", and "Time Trial". There are three difficulty levels: low, middle and upper grades. It is also possible to take advantage of the quiz by using secret tools.
overview_zh: 可邊玩邊學的「哆啦A夢學習軟體」。收錄 5,000 題以上對應 2002 年新版學習指導要領的題目。出題範圍涵蓋音樂、體育、生活科等小學課程，題庫由國際社等出版社提供。此外「綜合」分類中還會出現電腦、英文、福利等相關題目。遊戲模式有「上下問答」、「賓果問答」、「面板攻擊問答」、「計時挑戰」四種，難度分為低、中、高年級三階段。也能運用秘密道具讓答題更有利。

title_en: DORAEMON NO STUDY BOY - GAKUSHUU KANJI GAME
no_intro_name: Doraemon no Study Boy - Gakushuu Kanji Game (Japan)
overview_en: The third learning support material for Doraemon. Learning software that covers all 1006 learning kanji learned in the 6th year of elementary school. Since it is set so that students can study by designating a grade, it can be effectively used for reviewing not only the grade but also those before that. Includes a "question mode" with random questions that you won't get tired of, and a "game mode" that allows you to check what you have learned in a fun way. You can play against your friends in "Game Mode". You can search by reading, number of strokes, radicals, etc., and it also has a dictionary function that shows the stroke order, on-yomi, and kun-yomi. Let's enjoy mastering kanji in the game!
overview_zh: 哆啦A夢學習支援軟體第三作。完整收錄小學六年內所學的全部 1006 個學習漢字。可指定年級進行學習，不僅能複習當前年級，還能複習以前所學的內容。內建出題隨機、玩不膩的「問題模式」，以及能愉快確認學習成果的「遊戲模式」。「遊戲模式」也能與朋友對戰。可透過讀音、筆畫數、部首等檢索，並具備顯示筆順、音讀、訓讀的字典功能。一起在遊戲中愉快地征服漢字吧！

title_en: DORAEMON NO STUDY BOY - KANJI YOMIKAKI MASTER
no_intro_name: Doraemon no Study Boy - Kanji Yomikaki Master (Japan)
overview_en: Kanji problem software that corresponds to the new course of study notified by the Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology from 2002. You can set several levels from basic to advanced according to the level of kanji. Equipped with a dictionary function, it contains kanji learned in the first and second grades of elementary school.
overview_zh: 對應文部科學省自 2002 年起公告之新版學習指導要領的漢字練習軟體。可依漢字程度設定基礎到進階等多種難度。內建字典功能，收錄小學一、二年級所學的漢字。

title_en: DORAEMON NO STUDY BOY - KUKU GAME
no_intro_name: Doraemon no Study Boy - Kuku Game (Japan)
overview_en: The second learning support material for Doraemon. A fun and fun learning software to help you learn and use multiplication tables perfectly. Includes a "problem mode" for mastering multiplication tables, a "practice mode" for learning while listening to multiplication tables, a "game mode" for checking multiplication tables in a fun way, and a "game mode" for checking multiplication tables in a fun way. You can play against your friends in "Game Mode". You can also enjoy measuring the progress of multiplication tables using the "clock". If you get lost in the middle of a problem, you can press the select button to see the hint box. Let's have fun mastering multiplication tables in the game!
overview_zh: 哆啦A夢學習支援軟體第二作。讓你完美熟練九九乘法的歡樂學習軟體。內建用來精通九九乘法的「問題模式」、邊聽邊學的「練習模式」、能愉快檢驗成果的「遊戲模式」，以及同樣有趣的「遊戲模式」。「遊戲模式」中可與朋友對戰。亦可透過「時鐘」測量九九乘法的學習進度。解題途中卡住時，按下選擇鍵即可查看提示。一起在遊戲中愉快地精通九九乘法吧！

overview_en:
This hack transforms Dr. Mario Game Boy game into a Game Boy Color game.

Enjoy the Game Boy classic now in full color with a very cool new feature: character selection!

That’s it! Dr. Luigi, Dr. Daisy and Dr. Wario join the virus battle! Choose your favorite doctor to play as, each one with their own sprite, palettes.

It also has a couple of slight QoL tweaks to the original game code.
overview_zh:
本 hack 將 Game Boy 的《Dr. Mario》改造為 Game Boy Color 版本。

以全彩享受這款 Game Boy 經典之作，並追加非常酷的新功能：角色選擇！

沒錯，路易吉醫生、黛西醫生與壞利歐醫生都加入了對抗病毒的行列！挑選你喜愛的醫生上場，每位都有專屬的角色圖像與配色。

另外也對原版程式碼進行了一些細微的體驗優化。

title_en: DR. RIN NI KIITEMITE! - KOI NO RIN FUUSUI
no_intro_name: Dr. Rin ni Kiitemite! - Koi no Rin Fuusui (Japan)

overview_en: Dracula: Crazy Vampire is an Action game, developed by Planet Interactive and published by DreamCatcher Interactive, which was released in 2001.
overview_zh: 《Dracula: Crazy Vampire》是 Planet Interactive 開發、DreamCatcher Interactive 發行的動作遊戲，於 2001 年推出。
publisher:
DreamCatcher Interactive NA
Cryo Interactive EU

title_en: DRAGON BALL Z - DENSETSU NO CHOU SENSHI-TACHI
no_intro_name: Dragon Ball Z - Densetsu no Chou Senshi-tachi (Japan)

title_en: DRAGON BALL Z - GUERREROS DE LEYENDA
no_intro_name: Dragon Ball Z - Guerreros de Leyenda (Spain)

title_en: DRAGON BALL Z - I LEGGENDARI SUPER GUERRIERI
no_intro_name: Dragon Ball Z - I Leggendari Super Guerrieri (Italy)

title_en: DRAGON BALL Z - LEGENDARY SUPER WARRIORS
no_intro_name: Dragon Ball Z - Legendary Super Warriors (USA)
overview_en: Dragon Ball Z: Legendary Super Warriors is a mixture of a card game and a turn-based fighting game for the Game Boy Color. The game is played with original in-game cards for attacks, techniques and support items and initially has only two modes trade and story. Legendary Super Warriors’ story spans from the Saiyan saga to the end of the Buu Saga. Once beaten, a battle mode is unlocked, allowing players to square off with random enemies. Once the game is beaten, any character is usable in any battle, such as Frieza vs. Cell.
overview_zh: 《Dragon Ball Z: Legendary Super Warriors》是 Game Boy Color 上一款結合卡片遊戲與回合制格鬥的作品。攻擊、技巧與輔助道具皆透過遊戲內專屬卡片進行，初始僅有交換與劇情兩種模式。劇情模式涵蓋從賽亞人篇到魔人布歐篇的完整故事。通關後會解鎖對戰模式，可隨機與敵人對決；再次破關後，所有角色皆可在任意對戰中使用，例如弗利沙對上沙魯。

title_en: DRAGON BALL Z - LES GUERRIERS LEGENDAIRES
no_intro_name: Dragon Ball Z - Les Guerriers Legendaires (France)

overview_en: Addictive breakout-style action meets fast and furious arcade fun. With 100 levels, challenging end bosses and multiple power-ups, Dragon Dance is the game you can't put down! Head-to-head combat with boss enemies every 10th level. Random events like earthquakes shake up the gameplay. Dragon control and length add to the complexity of each puzzle. Enjoy Vs. mode and play with friends via Game Link Cable.
overview_zh: 讓人欲罷不能的打磚塊式動作，遇上節奏緊湊的街機樂趣。100 個關卡、刁鑽的頭目戰與多種強化道具，《Dragon Dance》讓你愛不釋手！每 10 關就有一場頭目對決，地震等隨機事件會打亂遊戲節奏，操控龍的方向與長度也讓每道謎題更具挑戰。亦可透過 Game Link Cable 與好友享受對戰模式。
publisher:
Crave Entertainment NA/EU
Bottom Up JP

no_intro_name: Dragon Quest I _ II (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
Dragon Quest (ドラゴンクエスト, Doragon Kuesuto?, titulado Dragon Warrior en América del Norte) es el videojuego original y el primero de la saga Dragon Quest. Fue desarrollado por Enix y lanzado en 1986 en Japón para MSX y Famicom (NES).
Fue uno de los primeros videojuegos de batalla por turnos en obtener un gran éxito y es considerado un pionero en el desarrollo del género. Precediendo a Final Fantasy y junto con esta otra saga RPG, Dragon Quest pasaría a ser una franquicia exitosa que se convertiría en un estándar para los videojuegos de rol.
overview_zh:
《勇者鬥惡龍》（ドラゴンクエスト，北美版名為 Dragon Warrior）是 Dragon Quest 系列的初代原作。由 Enix 開發，於 1986 年在日本登上 MSX 與 Famicom（NES）。
本作是最早獲得巨大成功的回合制 RPG 之一，被視為該類型的開創者。緊接著《最終幻想》問世，《勇者鬥惡龍》與其並列為成功的 RPG 系列，成為角色扮演遊戲的標竿。

title_en: DRAGON QUEST III - SOSHITE DENSETSU E...
no_intro_name: Dragon Quest III - Soshite Densetsu e... (Japan)

title_en: DRAGON QUEST MONSTERS 2 - MARUTA NO FUSHIGI NA KAGI - IRU NO BOUKEN
no_intro_name: Dragon Quest Monsters 2 - Maruta no Fushigi na Kagi - Iru no Bouken (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

title_en: DRAGON QUEST MONSTERS 2 - MARUTA NO FUSHIGI NA KAGI - RUKA NO TABIDACHI
no_intro_name: Dragon Quest Monsters 2 - Maruta no Fushigi na Kagi - Ruka no Tabidachi (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

title_en: DRAGON QUEST MONSTERS - TERRY NO WONDERLAND
no_intro_name: Dragon Quest Monsters - Terry no Wonderland (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: Dirk the Daring is back! Control the fate of Dirk the Daring in the long-awaited return of Dragon's Lair, now for Game Boy Color. The fair princess, Daphne has been seized by the evil dragon, Singe and only Dirk the Daring can rescue her from his clutches. On your quest, you must fight your way through the castle of the dark wizard who has enchanted it with treacherous monsters, traps and other obstacles. Lead on brave adventurer!
overview_zh: 勇敢的 Dirk 回來了！在睽違多年的《Dragon's Lair》Game Boy Color 版中，由你掌握 Dirk 的命運。美麗的 Daphne 公主被邪惡之龍 Singe 抓走，只有勇敢的 Dirk 能將她從魔爪中救出。冒險途中，你必須闖過被黑暗巫師施法的城堡，迎戰各種險惡的怪物、陷阱與障礙。勇敢的冒險者，前進吧！

overview_en: It's off to Dragon Land with your favorite Dragon Tales friends. Wish on Dragon Scale and get whisked away to Dragon Land. Then choose your adventure from five different fun-filled stories. While searching for Dragon Berry cupcakes, gems, and musical Notes you will travel to magical places like Puzzlewood in the Crystal Caves! So grab your Dragon Scale and let's Go!
overview_zh: 與你最愛的《Dragon Tales》好友一起前往龍之國！對著龍鱗許願，便能瞬間飛往龍之國。然後從五個充滿樂趣的故事中挑選你的冒險。在尋找龍之莓杯子蛋糕、寶石與音符的路上，你將造訪水晶洞窟中的迷題森林等魔法地點！握緊你的龍鱗，出發吧！

overview_en: The popular animated television series is now a magical hand-held game! You take on the role of a dragon that has yet to learn the secrets of flight in this exciting adventure. You'll attend Quetzal's School in the Sky, where you'll practice your wing flapping, hovering, treasure carrying, and breathing. Once your confidence is high and your skills honed, you'll enter the enchanted Dragon Land, where all sorts of mischief awaits you. Journey through 15 levels of difficult obstacles and dangerous terrain, meeting up with a few friendly faces straight out of the television show along your path. There are three difficulty levels to choose from, so gamers at all skill levels can get in on the action. The game is only intended for one player, but you can always complete a game and then challenge a friend to match your progress. Learning to fly has never been so fun or safe.
overview_zh: 熱門電視動畫變身魔法掌機遊戲！本作中你將扮演一隻尚未掌握飛行祕訣的小龍，展開精彩的冒險。你將進入 Quetzal 的天空學校，練習拍翅、滯空、搬運寶物與吐息。等到信心十足、技巧純熟，便能進入魔法龍之國，那裡有各種惡作劇等著你。穿越 15 個充滿艱難障礙與危險地形的關卡，沿途會遇見動畫中熟悉的友善面孔。三種難度可選，各種程度的玩家都能享受。本作為單人遊戲，但你可以通關後挑戰朋友的成績。學飛從來沒有這麼有趣又安全過。

no_intro_name: Dragon Warrior I _ II (USA) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
Dragon Warrior I & II is a 2000 Game Boy Color video game developed by Tose and released by Enix America in the USA on September 27, 2000.

Step back into the wondrous land of Alefgard and defeat the evil DracoLord in the standard-setting Dragon Warrior I. Continue your amazing adventure and banish the foul Hargon in Dragon Warrior II. With tons of monsters to fight, treasures to find and mysteries to explore, you may never want to turn off your Game Boy Color again!
overview_zh:
《Dragon Warrior I & II》是 Tose 開發、由 Enix America 於 2000 年 9 月 27 日在美國發行的 Game Boy Color 遊戲。

再次踏上奇幻的 Alefgard 大地，在奠定 RPG 標竿的《Dragon Warrior I》中擊敗邪惡的 DracoLord。延續精彩冒險，在《Dragon Warrior II》中放逐邪惡的 Hargon。豐富的怪物、寶藏與待解之謎，讓你捨不得關掉 Game Boy Color！

overview_en:
Dragon Warrior III is a 2001 Game Boy Color video game developed by Tose and released by Enix America in the USA on July 17, 2001.

Your father, the brave Ortega, is dead. He set off to destroy the Demon Lord Baramos but fell in glorious battle. Unless stopped, Baramos will unleash a torrent of evil that will destroy the world. You must stop Baramos and discover the legend of Dragon Warrior! Your journey starts on Aliahan. Only you decide where it ends...
overview_zh:
《Dragon Warrior III》是 Tose 開發、由 Enix America 於 2001 年 7 月 17 日在美國發行的 Game Boy Color 遊戲。

你那勇敢的父親 Ortega 已經身亡。他出發討伐魔王 Baramos，卻在英勇的戰鬥中壯烈犧牲。若不阻止 Baramos，他將釋出毀滅世界的邪惡洪流。你必須阻止 Baramos，揭開《Dragon Warrior》的傳說！旅程從 Aliahan 出發，終點由你決定……

no_intro_name: Dragon Warrior Monsters (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
In Dragon Warrior Monsters, enter Terry’s Wonderland, a magical place of kings, monsters and magic spells.  Make monsters your allies to fight through the dangers that lie ahead in the long quest.  Find your kidnapped sister and become the most powerful monster master in the world!

Each monster has unique special skills to use in battle.  Train and treat them well, and you’ll be victorious!  Over 40,000 different combinations - can you breed the rarest and most powerful monsters?

* Over 200 cute & cool monsters to collect, tame, and train.
* Breed your trained monsters to make more powerful monsters, each receiving special skills from their parent monsters.
* Play solo, or use the Game Link cable to link to Game Boy game systems and battle and breed with your friends’ monsters.
* A spin off of Japan’s best selling RPG game, Enix’s Dragon Quest.
overview_zh:
在《Dragon Warrior Monsters》中，進入 Terry 的奇幻世界，一個充滿國王、怪物與咒文的魔法之地。讓怪物成為你的夥伴，攜手對抗漫長旅程中的危險。找回被擄走的姊姊，成為世上最強的怪物大師！

每隻怪物在戰鬥中都有獨特技能。妥善訓練與照料，便能贏得勝利！超過 40,000 種配種組合——你能配出最稀有、最強大的怪物嗎？

* 超過 200 種可愛又帥氣的怪物可蒐集、馴服與培育。
* 將培育好的怪物配種出更強的怪物，繼承雙親的特殊技能。
* 可單人遊玩，或透過 Game Link Cable 與其他 Game Boy 系統連線，與朋友的怪物對戰、配種。
* 改編自日本最暢銷 RPG、Enix 的《勇者鬥惡龍》系列衍生作品。

no_intro_name: Dragon Warrior Monsters 2 - Cobi's Journey (USA) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: When Cobi and Tara's family of monster farmers moves out to the island of GreatLog, it quickly becomes apparent that all is not well in their new homeland. The island's prince, Kameha, and his ill-willed accomplice, Warubou, quickly confront the brother-and-sister team. Now, the dastardly pair has embarked on a plot to sink the entire island, and you'll have to train an army of Dragon Warrior Monsters to help stop the evil crime. This installment casts you as the brother, Cobi challenging you to find hidden keys and prepare all of your monsters for battle. There are more than 300 battling beasts in all, which means that you'll have your work cut out for you if you hope to effectively utilize your troops. As you wander through the land, you'll encounter different monsters, which you can persuade to join your team by offering up treats. You can also trade beings with other players who own the game or have a copy of DRAGON WARRIOR MONSTERS 2: Tara's Adventure (the parallel release, which follows the story of Cobi's sister).
overview_zh: 當 Cobi 與 Tara 一家怪物農場主搬到 GreatLog 島，他們很快就察覺新故鄉並不平靜。島上的王子 Kameha 與心懷不軌的同夥 Warubou 立刻找上這對兄妹。這對惡徒企圖讓整座島嶼沉入海底，玩家必須訓練一支怪物大軍阻止他們的惡行。本作由哥哥 Cobi 出場，挑戰你尋找隱藏的鑰匙、訓練所有怪物上陣。共有 300 多種戰鬥怪物，要善用部隊就得花一番工夫。在地圖上漫遊時會遇見各種怪物，給予點心便可說服牠們加入。也可與其他擁有本作或姐妹作《Dragon Warrior Monsters 2: Tara's Adventure》（同步推出，由 Cobi 妹妹的視角展開）的玩家交換怪物。

no_intro_name: Dragon Warrior Monsters 2 - Tara's Adventure (USA) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: The wildly successful DRAGON WARRIOR MONSTERS returns to handheld form with parallel releases DRAGON WARRIOR MONSTERS 2: Tara's Adventure and DRAGON WARRIOR MONSTERS 2: Cobi's Journey. This installment focuses on the efforts of the sister, Tara, as she tries to end an evil plot to stop her new homeland from sinking. Prince Kameha and his ill-willed accomplice, Warubou, are responsible for the mischief, and you've got to help Tara collect and train more than 300 fighting monsters in order to reverse the deadly plan. Make your way through the countryside, collecting valuable keys and recruiting monsters to help battle evil. Each beast you encounter will need to be persuaded to help you out, which you can do by offering up various forms of foods and treats. With better graphics than most of its competition, the game even lets you trade monsters with other players who own either installment of the addicting DRAGON MONSTER WARRIORS 2 collection.
overview_zh: 大紅大紫的《Dragon Warrior Monsters》以掌機形式回歸，並推出姐妹作《Dragon Warrior Monsters 2: Tara's Adventure》與《Dragon Warrior Monsters 2: Cobi's Journey》同步發行。本作聚焦於妹妹 Tara 的努力，她要終結讓新故鄉沉沒的邪惡陰謀。Kameha 王子與心懷不軌的同夥 Warubou 是幕後黑手，玩家需協助 Tara 蒐集並訓練超過 300 隻戰鬥怪物，阻止這場危險的計畫。穿越鄉野，蒐集珍貴鑰匙並招募怪物對抗邪惡。每隻遇到的怪物都需要說服才會加入，可給予各種食物或點心。畫面表現勝過同類作品，更可與擁有本作或姐妹作的玩家交換怪物。

overview_en:
In Driver, the driving (pun intended) force of the world is crime. The main character, an ex-race car driver, takes on the role of an undercover cop. It seems your superior officer has decided to put your talents to the test. He orders you to infiltrate the local mob group, and to help bring it down from the inside. As a result, the game takes place from the perspective of a low-level gang member. The action speeds into a number of different cities, ranging from San Francisco to Miami. It is on the streets that the main part of the game will take place. 

Basically, Driver is broken into a number of mini-missions. In total, over 30 different challenges await the persistent gamer. The missions are divided between the various locales of the game. The different assignments will each require a special tactic. As an example, consider the mission in which the objective is to destroy an enemy getaway vehicle. In such a situation, the primary goal is to keep an eye on the target and ram it into submission. If the orders are to pick up a gang member within a time limit, speed and secrecy become of utmost importance. If the cops see the exchange, the badges will be on you like glue. Each situation will require a measure of thought and intelligence. 

Driver also offers a couple of extra side games. The survival mode sets the player against a horde of maniacal police officers. The crazed cops will do anything to smash you into submission. The result is a race through the city with a bunch of cops on your tail. It is a test of endurance. In the getaway mode, the idea is to flee for safety from the encroaching stiffs. The game places you in an area of the city, with a cop on your tail. Your only goal is to avoid the authorities. Be careful, though, as the cops may set up a roadblock to impede your progress.

Driver is designed with the Game Boy Color in mind. It offers a password save system to keep your data under wraps.
overview_zh:
在《Driver》中，世界的驅動力（雙關語）是犯罪。主角是一名前職業賽車手，現在轉任臥底警探。上司打算考驗你的本事，下令你滲透當地黑幫並從內部瓦解。因此遊戲將以一名底層幫派分子的視角展開，舞台橫跨舊金山到邁阿密等多座城市，主要劇情皆在街頭上演。

《Driver》的玩法由多個小型任務組成，總共有超過 30 種挑戰等待你完成，分散於遊戲各個城市。每個任務都需要不同戰術。例如有的任務目標是摧毀敵人的逃逸車輛，這時就要緊盯目標、把它撞到動彈不得。如果命令是在時限內接走某名幫派分子，速度與隱密就是關鍵；萬一交易被警方目擊，警徽就會緊咬不放。每個情境都需要思考與判斷力。

《Driver》也提供額外的支線玩法。生存模式中你必須對抗成群瘋狂的警察，他們會不擇手段把你撞到動彈不得，整場便是穿城逃亡的耐力戰。逃脫模式則是要從追兵手中逃脫，遊戲將你置於某座城區內、後方有警察緊追。唯一目標就是甩開警方，但要小心警方可能設置路障阻撓你。

《Driver》專為 Game Boy Color 設計，以密碼存檔系統保護你的資料。

overview_en: Dropzone is an Action game, developed by Awesome Developments and published by Acclaim, which was released in Europe in 1999.
overview_zh: 《Dropzone》是 Awesome Developments 開發、Acclaim 發行的動作遊戲，於 1999 年在歐洲推出。

no_intro_name: DT - Lords of Genomes (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Time is the near future. A nanomachine (ultra-small robot) called "DT" was developed in secret, and governments and giant companies were conducting intelligence activities over the technology. Players will fight as DT masters who make full use of cards that express DT, units, and skill data. There are about 200 types of cards, and the battle is a full-fledged battle with 40 decks and full strategy. Understanding the story on every card and using it effectively is the key to becoming a true master. The more you read the card novel written on the card, the deeper your knowledge and mystery of DT. "When you get all the cards, you embody the final evolution of life on Earth ..."
overview_zh: 故事設定在不遠的未來。一種名為「DT」的奈米機器（超小型機器人）被秘密研發出來，各國政府與大型企業圍繞此技術展開情報戰。玩家化身為 DT 大師，運用代表 DT、單位與技能資料的卡片進行戰鬥。卡片約有 200 種，採用 40 張牌組的正統策略對戰。理解每張卡片背後的故事並善加運用，是成為真正大師的關鍵。卡片上記載的小說讀得越多，對 DT 的知識與謎團就理解得越深。「集齊所有卡片時，便能體現地球生命的最終進化⋯⋯」

overview_en:
Is Game Boy Color man enough to handle Duke? You'd better believe it.

The master of one-liners and undisputed king of carnage has conquered Nintendo 64, and now he's preparing to get down and dirty on Game Boy Color. The most recent Duke Nukem titles have been played using a first-person perspective, but GT Interactive broke that pattern with Zero Hour for the N64, and this platform adventure for Game Boy Color. Duke's ego must be growing out of control now that millions of gamers will actually be able to admire his pumped-up pecs while playing.

Duke Nukem delivers 16 levels of alien annihilation, with a different visual theme for each area. Duke is equipped with all new moves for his small screen debut, including a perfect backflip which leads us to believe that he may have been dating a gymnast in the off-season.

Duke Nukem is compatible only with Game Boy Color.
overview_zh:
Game Boy Color 夠不夠格挑戰 Duke？絕對沒問題。

這位金句之王、無可爭議的殺戮王者征服了 Nintendo 64，現在準備在 Game Boy Color 上痛快開幹。近期幾款《Duke Nukem》作品都採第一人稱視角，但 GT Interactive 在 N64 的《Zero Hour》與這款 Game Boy Color 平台冒險中打破了這項慣例。如今數百萬玩家終於能一面遊玩、一面欣賞 Duke 那壯碩胸肌，他的自信心想必更加膨脹了。

《Duke Nukem》提供 16 個外星殲滅關卡，每個區域都有不同的視覺主題。Duke 為了在小螢幕首登場新增了多種動作，包括完美的後空翻——讓人不禁懷疑他休賽季是不是和體操選手約會去了。

《Duke Nukem》僅相容於 Game Boy Color。

title_en: DUKES OF HAZZARD, THE - RACING FOR HOME
no_intro_name: Dukes of Hazzard, The - Racing for Home (USA)

overview_en: Competitive dungeon RPG maker. Invade each other's dungeon created by you or your friends, and defeat the opponent's boss waiting in the enemy dungeon before your friends capturing your own dungeon to win! There are four dungeon types: "dungeon", "tower", "castle", and "jungle". There are more than 200 types of monsters that protect and attack dungeons. There are more than 200 types of items that can be obtained by searching dungeons and defeating monsters. By connecting the communication cable, you can play against your friends and trade monsters and items.
overview_zh: 競技型地下城 RPG 製作工具。可入侵自己或好友打造的地下城，搶在朋友攻陷你的地下城之前，先擊敗對方地下城最深處等待的頭目即可獲勝！地下城種類有「地下城」、「塔」、「城」、「叢林」四種。守護與襲擊地下城的怪物超過 200 種，可在地下城探索與擊敗怪物時取得的道具也超過 200 種。透過通訊纜線可與好友對戰，並交換怪物與道具。

overview_en: That life game has become GBC and is getting more and more powerful. There are three game modes: "Waiwai mode" where you can enjoy normal life games, "Love love mode" where you can enjoy your marriage, and "Yamatani mode" where you can enjoy a turbulent life. More than 1000 events such as university entrance exams, exams, and romance create a variety of life. A total of 16 people, including familiar characters such as Angel and Akuma, as well as Captain and Fuchu Alien, will appear. My character can be created as a montage, and more than 50 million patterns are prepared. Every time you clear the main game, Life Game Island will develop steadily. You can also enjoy 10 types of mini games.
overview_zh: 知名的人生遊戲登上 GBC，威力大幅升級。三種模式：能享受一般人生遊戲的「Waiwai 模式」、感受婚姻生活的「Love love 模式」，以及體驗波瀾人生的「Yamatani 模式」。超過 1,000 種事件——大學考試、檢定、戀愛等等——構成豐富多變的人生。包含 Angel、Akuma、隊長、府中外星人等熟悉角色在內共 16 名角色登場。自製角色採用組合臉譜，組合超過 5,000 萬種。每次破關主遊戲，人生遊戲島就會逐步發展。另收錄 10 種小遊戲。

overview_en: As a portable Monopoly game, it has a save function, so you can enjoy it anytime. Full-scale without any unnecessary rule changes. You can enjoy various modes such as "Tournament Mode" where you win 4 tournaments against CP characters and "Free Play" where you can play freely. There are 15 characters. Each character makes a big difference in playing.
overview_zh: 可隨身攜帶的《大富翁》遊戲，內建存檔功能可隨時遊玩。維持原汁原味、未做不必要的規則改動。多種模式可玩，包含挑戰 4 場 CPU 角色的「錦標賽模式」與自由遊玩的「Free Play」模式。共 15 名角色，操作不同角色感受截然不同。

title_en: E.T. - THE EXTRA-TERRESTRIAL AND THE COSMIC GARDEN
no_intro_name: E.T. - The Extra-Terrestrial and the Cosmic Garden (USA)
overview_en: He might be wrinkled and a little bit slimy on the outside, but his heart is pure gold. Perhaps the most famous cinematic space alien ever to capture kids' imaginations, E.T. stars in this delightful adventure for the Game Boy Color. The title character's green thumb comes out to make its presence known in this installation of the story (remember, E.T. is an excellent gardener). Help the little guy travel to the farthest reaches of space collecting specimens of various plants for the Cosmic Garden that lives on his spaceship. Once you've collected all of the plants, the object of the game is to make sure they can stay alive in the Garden. New friends, Space Bee and Space Slug a couple of adorable additions to the saga will assist you. With addicting gameplay, excellent graphics, and classic characters, this is one game that's certainly worth phoning home about.
overview_zh: 他外表皺巴巴又有點黏滑，內心卻是純金般善良。或許是有史以來最知名、最能擄獲孩子幻想的銀幕外星人，E.T. 在這款 Game Boy Color 的歡樂冒險中擔綱主角。本作中 E.T. 充分展現他的園藝天賦（沒錯，E.T. 是一流的園丁）。協助這位小傢伙穿越宇宙的最遠端，蒐集各種植物標本，種進太空船上的宇宙花園。集齊所有植物後，目標就變成讓它們在花園裡存活下來。可愛的太空蜂與太空鼻涕蟲將成為新夥伴，協助你冒險。讓人上癮的玩法、出色的畫面與經典角色，這款遊戲絕對值得「打電話回家」報告一聲。

overview_en: If you have any doubt as to E.T.'s ability to help you get organized, witness the stunning efficiency with which he expressed his desperate need to make a phone call. There's no need for a separate digital organizer anymore, as you can now keep track of your life on a Game Boy Color. Everyone's favorite little alien being provides a calendar, an address book, a working clock, and even a "to-do" list that will keep young science fiction fans motivated and productive. There are even five mini-games included, several of which involves helping the titular mascot evade the authorities and collect the necessary items to construct an inter-global telephone system. One of the games challenges you to raise a "Flopgopple" pet, and all of the options are compatible with the Nintendo Game Boy Printer. Kids can even protect all of their personal data with the use of an original password. Now, that's organization.
overview_zh: 若你還懷疑 E.T. 能不能幫你打理生活，看看他當年要打電話回家時展現的驚人效率就知道了。現在不必另外買數位行事曆，靠 Game Boy Color 就能打理你的生活。大家最愛的小外星人提供行事曆、通訊錄、即時時鐘，甚至「待辦清單」，讓年輕的科幻迷保持積極與生產力。內含五款小遊戲，其中數款讓你協助這位招牌主角躲開當局、蒐集打造星際電話系統所需的零件。其中一款挑戰你飼養 Flopgopple 寵物，所有功能皆相容於 Nintendo Game Boy Printer。孩子們還能用原創密碼保護所有個人資料。這才叫做整理。

title_en: E.T. - THE EXTRA-TERRESTRIAL - ESCAPE FROM PLANET EARTH
no_intro_name: E.T. - The Extra-Terrestrial - Escape from Planet Earth (USA)
overview_en: As long-time fans of the classic film know, it's not easy being a visitor on another planet. This handheld game for the GBC closely mirrors the plot of Steven Spielberg's 1982 classic science fiction masterpiece, putting you in the shoes of E.T. or his human friend, Elliot. Of course, the game's main objective is to collect the parts necessary to construct an interplanetary communicator that E.T. can use to "phone home." All the while, Earth-based authorities will try to apprehend you, so make sure you bring your wits and reflexes to the table. There are 45 quests in all, each of which presents new traps and obstacles to avoid, and the game even has three separate difficulty levels to master. With six main game areas and 10 detailed environments, E.T. THE EXTRA TERRESTRIAL: Escape from Planet Earth has unusually high replay value, wonderful graphics, and more gameplay than you can shake a stick at.
overview_zh: 經典電影老粉都知道，當外星訪客可不容易。這款 GBC 掌機遊戲緊貼史匹柏 1982 年科幻經典的劇情，讓你扮演 E.T. 或他的人類好友 Elliot。當然，主要目標是蒐集零件，組裝出能讓 E.T.「打電話回家」的星際通訊器。一路上地球當局會試圖逮捕你，因此頭腦與反應都不能少。共有 45 場任務，每場都有新陷阱與障礙，並提供三種難度。本作有 6 大主要區域與 10 個細緻的場景，《E.T. THE EXTRA TERRESTRIAL: Escape from Planet Earth》具備極高的耐玩度、出色的畫面，以及多到玩不完的內容。

no_intro_name: Earthworm Jim - Menace 2 the Galaxy (USA, Europe) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Earthworm Jim is back, and he's brought a ton of mayhem and destruction with him! EARTHWORM JIM: Menace 2 the Galaxy is the second Game Boy Color adventure for everyone's favorite worm-turned-superhero. Playing as Jim in this one-player action game, you must blast your way through 12 bizarre stages packed with enemies and other hazards. To aid you in your endeavor, you'll be able to pick up and use four different weapons to toast your foes. The typical wry humor present in the EARTHWORM JIM series is here as well, resulting in some crazy situations for you to jump, shoot, and fly your way through. Although EARTHWORM JIM: Menace 2 the Galaxy is compatible with all Game Boy systems, it includes a special exclusive level when played on Game Boy Color.
overview_zh: Earthworm Jim 回來了，這次帶來大量混亂與破壞！《EARTHWORM JIM: Menace 2 the Galaxy》是這位人見人愛的蚯蚓超級英雄登上 Game Boy Color 的第二部作品。這款單人動作遊戲中你將扮演 Jim，闖過 12 個怪奇關卡、面對成群的敵人與危險。沿途可拾取並使用 4 種不同武器烤熟敵人。系列招牌的冷面笑點也再度登場，讓你在跳躍、射擊與飛行中陷入各種瘋狂情境。本作相容所有 Game Boy 系統，但用 Game Boy Color 遊玩可解鎖獨家關卡。

overview_en:
When the wrestling-license musical chairs ended last year, Acclaim must have felt like it was on the hurtin' end of a Stone Cold suplex, what with EA snagging the WCW license from THQ and an enraged THQ, its spirit meter jacked up to stratospheric levels, responding by wresting the prized WWF license from Acclaim's grasp.

All's fair in love and corporate lumberjack matches, though, so Acclaim pulled itself off the canvas and went out in search of a new franchise. The answer lay as close as the nearest TV, where Extreme Championship Wrestling (ECW) holds court weekly on The Nashville Network. Sealing the deal for a long time to come, Acclaim has invested some of its many WWF and Turok bucks in the ECW.
overview_zh:
去年職業摔角授權大風吹結束時，Acclaim 想必感覺像是被 Stone Cold 一記後翻摔砸進地裡——EA 從 THQ 手中搶走 WCW 授權，怒火中燒的 THQ 鬥志值飆破天際，反過來把寶貴的 WWF 授權從 Acclaim 手中奪走。

不過愛情與職摔商戰一向不擇手段，Acclaim 從擂台上爬起、四處尋找新版權，答案就在最近的電視機上：每週在 The Nashville Network 開戰的 Extreme Championship Wrestling（ECW）。Acclaim 投入大筆從 WWF 與 Turok 賺來的鈔票簽下長期合約，押注在 ECW 身上。

overview_en: Elevator Action EX is an update to the Game Boy version of Elevator Action published by Altron in 2000. In addition to colour, players can choose between three characters: Mike, an all rounded character, Guy, a slower yet more durable character, and Sarah, a faster yet weaker character.
overview_zh: 《Elevator Action EX》是 Altron 於 2000 年發行的 Game Boy 版《Elevator Action》的更新版。除了加入色彩，玩家還能從三名角色中選擇：均衡型的 Mike、速度較慢但耐打的 Guy，以及速度快但較脆弱的 Sarah。
publisher:
Taito JP
TDK Mediactive EU
BAM! Entertainment NA

no_intro_name: Elie no Atelier GB (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: After graduating from the academy and A gaiden story that is a little different from the main story (PS version). Elfir (commonly known as Erie) and Marlone (commonly known as Marie) are alchemists in Saarburg. For some reason, such Erie and others decided to take care of the fairies in the atelier. The purpose given to Erie and others is to "grow a half-serving fairy into a full-fledged fairy in four years." There are many things that fairies have to learn, such as collecting ingredients, dodging monsters, and blending items! The character of a fairy changes in various ways depending on how it responded to the fairy and what kind of behavior the fairy did. Can Erie and his friends raise a good fairy alchemist? Events and characters are different from the Marie version.opening up a alchemy shop, Elfir Traum is requested by the fairy tribe's elder to take care of an apprentice fairy.
overview_zh: 從學園畢業後，與本傳（PS 版）略有差異的外傳故事。Elfir（暱稱 Erie）與 Marlone（暱稱 Marie）是 Saarburg 的鍊金術士。某次機緣下，Erie 等人決定在工房中照顧妖精。Erie 等人收到的任務是「在四年內把半人前的妖精養成獨當一面的妖精」。妖精要學的事情非常多——蒐集材料、躲開怪物、調合道具等等！妖精的個性會依你對牠的應對與牠所做的行為而有所變化。Erie 與夥伴們能否養出優秀的妖精鍊金術士呢？事件與角色都和 Marie 版本不同。Elfir Traum 開設鍊金術店後，受妖精族長老委託照顧一名見習妖精。

overview_en: ESPN INTERNATIONAL TRACK & FIELD brings all the excitement of a real athletic contest to Game Boy Color. Try to win the gold medal in 12 different events including fencing, skeet shooting, the 100-meter dash, the long jump, the javelin toss, 100-meter freestyle swimming, 110-meter hurdles, the high jump, weightlifting, the pole vault, the gymnastics vault, and table tennis. Each event requires a mix of speed, stamina, and timing to succeed it’s all about the button mashing! Can you win all the events and become the ultimate champion? Full-colored, detailed graphics bring the knuckle-busting action to life. Use the Game Boy Link Cable to hook up with a friend and challenge him or her to a two-player contest to see who can win the most medals. This game includes battery backup to save all your high scores and world records.
overview_zh: 《ESPN INTERNATIONAL TRACK & FIELD》將真實田徑競技的全部刺激搬上 Game Boy Color。在 12 個項目中爭取金牌，包括擊劍、定向飛靶、100 公尺短跑、跳遠、擲標槍、100 公尺自由式游泳、110 公尺跨欄、跳高、舉重、撐竿跳、體操跳馬與桌球。每個項目都需要混合速度、體力與時機才能勝出——一切都在你的連按手指上！能在所有項目奪金、成為終極冠軍嗎？全彩細緻的畫面讓緊張刺激的動作躍然螢幕。透過 Game Boy Link Cable 與好友連線，挑戰雙人賽看誰能拿下最多獎牌。本作具備電池備份，可保存所有最高分與世界紀錄。

overview_en: Exciting NHL action comes to the Game Boy Color with ESPN NATIONAL HOCKEY NIGHT. Since the game is fully licensed by the NHL, all of the teams (including the expansion Columbus Blue Jackets and Minnesota Wild) and players are here. When you want a quick puck fix, play a single game in the Exhibition mode. True hockey fanatics will want to take all of the challenges of a full Season, but if you're not interested in hockey until it's Cup time, you can skip the season and go straight to the Playoffs. If you think you are as good as anyone in the NHL, you can even put yourself into the game with the Create-a-Player mode. Now you can literally get into the game with ESPN NATIONAL HOCKEY NIGHT.
overview_zh: 刺激的 NHL 動作來到 Game Boy Color：《ESPN NATIONAL HOCKEY NIGHT》。本作獲 NHL 完整授權，所有球隊（含擴編的 Columbus Blue Jackets 與 Minnesota Wild）與球員一應俱全。想速戰速決就玩 Exhibition 模式打一場單場比賽。真正的冰球迷會挑戰整個 Season 模式，若你只在搶杯期間才看冰球，也可以跳過例行賽直接進入季後賽。若你自認實力不輸 NHL 球員，還可以用 Create-a-Player 模式把自己加入比賽。現在就用《ESPN NATIONAL HOCKEY NIGHT》親身投入比賽吧。

overview_en:
Sporting 16 fully licensed team and stadium endorsements, European Super League brings together the talent from many teams in Europe to create a 'European Super League Championship'.

Features:
- Entries from clubs such as AC Milan, Bayern Munich, Marseille, Liverpool, Chelsea and Paris Saint Germain
- Stadiums are modelled to real-life specifications
- Control interface when played in novice mode is limited to simple button combinations, allowing for a newcomer to play the game more easily; for the advanced gamer, the alternate mode, although more complex and demanding, will give them improved control over the game
- Authentic crowd chants
overview_zh:
獲 16 支球隊與球場完整授權，《European Super League》集結眾多歐洲球隊好手，打造一場「歐洲超級聯賽冠軍盃」。

特色：
- 收錄 AC 米蘭、拜仁慕尼黑、馬賽、利物浦、切爾西、巴黎聖日耳曼等俱樂部
- 球場依現實規格建模
- 新手模式下操作介面簡化為簡單按鍵組合，方便初學者上手；高階玩家則可選用較複雜但操控更精細的進階模式
- 真實球迷加油聲

overview_en: Follow in the tire tracks of America's most beloved stuntman, Evel Knievel! Experience Evel's live-on-the-edge lifestyle as you pull off death-defying feats ordinary men only dream of! With all the stunts, all the excitement, and none of the broken bones, you control the actions of the most daring man in history!
overview_zh: 追隨美國最受歡迎特技演員 Evel Knievel 的車轍！體驗 Evel 那種挑戰極限的生活，完成一般人只能夢想的玩命特技！包含所有特技與刺激，卻不會讓你骨折——由你掌握史上最大膽男子的一舉一動！
publisher:
Rockstar Games NA
Take 2 Interactive EU

overview_en: In an attempt to takeover the world, the newly liberated and powerful ectoplasmic forces, led by the half-human, half-demo Count Mercharior, have kidnapped two key members of the Extreme Ghostbusters team. Without wasting a second, Eduardo and Kylie jump into the famous Ecto-1 ambulance and race off to the rescue... Play as Eduardo and Kylie as you uncover the clues to the kidnapping, confront the evil Count Mercharior and return your teammates, Roland and Garrett, to safety!
overview_zh: 為了征服世界，剛獲解放、力量強大的靈漿勢力在半人半魔 Count Mercharior 率領下，綁架了 Extreme Ghostbusters 隊中的兩名重要成員。Eduardo 與 Kylie 立刻跳上知名的 Ecto-1 救護車奔馳救援。扮演 Eduardo 與 Kylie，揭開綁架案的線索、迎戰邪惡的 Count Mercharior，把隊友 Roland 與 Garrett 平安救回！

title_en: EXTREME SPORTS WITH THE BERENSTAIN BEARS
no_intro_name: Extreme Sports with the Berenstain Bears (USA, Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It)
overview_en: Get extreme with Mama, Papa, Brother, and Sister Bear in their first Game Boy Color game, EXTREME SPORTS WITH THE BERENSTAIN BEARS! In this single-player game you'll control the members of the family as they participate in an assortment of extreme sports events. Use Brother or Sister Bear in kayaking, dirt boarding, biking, and luge, or take the whole family in the river rafting and toboggan sequences. All of the events take place from an overhead perspective, which provides the best view of the playing field. In each event you can perform a wild range of tricks and stunts to gain speed and shave seconds off the clock. Can you beat the high scores and become the best bear you can be? Well-animated characters set on colorful, detailed backgrounds ensure a bright presentation.
overview_zh: 與貝倫斯坦熊家族的熊媽、熊爸、熊哥、熊妹一起極限挑戰！這是熊家族的首部 Game Boy Color 作品《EXTREME SPORTS WITH THE BERENSTAIN BEARS》！這款單人遊戲讓你操控家族成員參加各式極限運動。可選擇熊哥或熊妹進行皮艇、滑沙板、單車、雪橇等項目，或是讓全家上陣參加泛舟與雪橇隊。所有項目皆採俯視視角，便於掌握全場狀況。每個項目中可施展各種瘋狂特技，加速並縮短時間。能否打破最高紀錄、成為最棒的熊呢？精細動畫角色搭配色彩豐富的場景，呈現亮眼畫面。

overview_en: F-1 World Grand Prix straps you into the driver's seat as you experience the high-octane rush of an actual Formula One season. Compete in the FIA Formula One World Championship with your choice of 22 drivers. You'll race through 17 of the most challenging Formula One circuits. Five game modes including: Grand Prix, Exhibition, Time Trial, Challenge and Two-Player. Realistic racing effects include real-time tire wear, skid marks and exhaust flames.
