overview_zh: 《F-1 World Grand Prix》讓你坐進駕駛座，親身體驗實際 F1 賽季的高速狂飆。從 22 名車手中挑選，參加 FIA 一級方程式世界錦標賽，挑戰 17 條最艱難的 F1 賽道。五種遊戲模式：Grand Prix、Exhibition、計時挑戰、Challenge 以及雙人對戰。寫實賽車效果包括即時輪胎磨損、煞車痕與排氣火焰。

overview_en: Supersonic jet dogfighting comes to the small screen in F-18 THUNDERSTRIKE for the Game Boy Color. In this one-player flight sim, you take the role of a daring pilot who's flying an elite fighter jet. Slide into an inside-the-cockpit view, battle against multiple enemies, and practice your aerial combat and evasion maneuvers to prove your air superiority. You can play in either Arcade or Simulation mode, each affording you a unique experience. Arcade mode offers looser controls that make things easier for rookie pilots, while experts will want to jump right into Simulation mode, which will challenge the ability of even the most experienced flyboy. Head into multiple missions of dogfighting action and perform aerial tricks that will break the sound barrier, but don't think that it's all fun and games. When the mission's complete, you'll have to carefully land your jet on an aircraft carrier.
overview_zh: 音速噴射機空戰登上掌機！《F-18 THUNDERSTRIKE》是 Game Boy Color 上的飛行模擬。本作為單人作品，由你扮演駕駛精銳戰鬥機的勇敢飛行員。切入駕駛艙視角，迎戰多名敵人，磨練空戰與閃避技巧，證明你的制空實力。可選 Arcade 或 Simulation 模式，各有不同體驗。Arcade 模式操作較寬鬆，適合新手飛行員；高手則會直接挑戰 Simulation 模式，連最老練的飛行員都會被考驗。投入多場空戰任務，使出突破音障的特技，但別以為只是玩玩——任務結束後你還得小心翼翼地降落航空母艦。
publisher:
Majesco Sales NA
Take 2 Interactive EU

overview_en: F1 CHAMPIONSHIP Season 2000, featuring all the drama, action, and emotion of the 2000 season, takes the player right to the heart of the thrilling world of Formula One racing. Re-live the gladiatorial battles between Michael Schumacher and David Coulthard or tear up the record books and take an outsider to World Championship glory. In-depth behind the scenes technical support from the Orange Arrows and Benetton Formula One teams allows the game player to enter the world of Formula One racing in unprecedented detail and authenticity.
overview_zh: 《F1 CHAMPIONSHIP Season 2000》收錄 2000 年賽季的全部戲劇張力、動作與情感，讓玩家直接置身於 F1 一級方程式賽車的火熱世界。重溫 Michael Schumacher 與 David Coulthard 的角鬥對決，或撕毀紀錄、帶領冷門車隊登上世界冠軍寶座。Orange Arrows 與 Benetton Formula One 車隊提供深入的幕後技術支援，讓玩家以前所未有的細膩度與真實感踏入 F1 世界。

overview_en: Strap yourself in for high-octane excitement in F1 RACING CHAMPIONSHIP for Game Boy Color. The goal of this game is to provide a realistic Formula 1 racing experience in every aspect: the game has the full F1 license, which gives you a choice of 11 real racing teams such as McLaren and Ferrari. Choose the vehicle that suits your racing style, then take to one of 16 real licensed tracks, each accurately modeled to reflect its real-life counterpart. You can play in multiple gameplay modes, including a quick Single Race or the more grueling Formula 1 Championship. Watch the action from several camera angles, including a behind the vehicle view and first-person perspective. The full color graphics contain large, detailed vehicles and smoothly animated tracks that help to put your right in the middle of the action. As an added bonus, try to prove your championship skills by taking on a friend with the link cable Two-Player mode. F1 RACING CHAMPIONSHIP is only compatible with Game Boy Color systems.
overview_zh: 繫好安全帶，迎接 Game Boy Color 的高辛烷熱血——《F1 RACING CHAMPIONSHIP》。本作目標是在各方面提供寫實的 F1 賽車體驗：完整 F1 授權，可從 McLaren、Ferrari 等 11 支真實車隊中挑選。挑出符合自己風格的賽車，再馳騁於 16 條真實授權賽道，每一條皆精準呈現實際樣貌。多種遊戲模式可選，包含快速 Single Race 與更折磨人的 F1 錦標賽。多種鏡頭可切換，包括車後視角與第一人稱視角。全彩畫面呈現大尺寸細緻車輛與流暢動畫的賽道，讓你身歷其境。額外加碼：透過連線雙人模式挑戰好友，證明你的冠軍實力。《F1 RACING CHAMPIONSHIP》僅相容於 Game Boy Color 系統。

title_en: F1 WORLD GRAND PRIX II FOR GAME BOY COLOR
no_intro_name: F1 World Grand Prix II for Game Boy Color (Japan) (En,Ja)

title_en: FAIRY KITTY NO KAIUN JITEN - YOUSEI NO KUNI NO URANAI SHUGYOU
no_intro_name: Fairy Kitty no Kaiun Jiten - Yousei no Kuni no Uranai Shugyou (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: Brace yourself for a soccer game that brings all of the wild fun of soccer home on your Game Boy Color! FIFA 2000 is a fully-licensed soccer game that has more than 60 teams from around the world with updated rosters appropriate to the 2000 season. You can choose to play one of five different gameplay modes. Exhibition mode is a quick game where you set the teams and the rules then hit the field. In Tournament mode, you'll square off against an assortment of other teams to see who can take home the final victory. Playoff mode has you playing the final teeth-to-the-grindstone matches where every victory counts. In League mode, you'll play through a full season that culminates in the playoffs to see who is the greatest. Finally, Indoor mode takes the game inside and changes up the rules a little bit, resulting in a fast-paced version of the original. Options available for every mode include weather settings, foul settings, wind, and more. You can also use the password to save all of your stats in League and Tournament modes.
overview_zh: 做好準備，迎接把所有足球瘋狂樂趣裝進 Game Boy Color 的足球遊戲！《FIFA 2000》獲完整授權，收錄全球 60 多支球隊，並依 2000 賽季更新名單。可從五種模式中挑選：Exhibition 是快速設定球隊與規則就能開踢；Tournament 模式中你會與多支球隊較量，看誰能笑到最後；Playoff 模式則是場場全力以赴的決賽，每場勝負都至關重要。League 模式進行整個賽季最後決出霸主。最後 Indoor 模式把比賽搬入室內、稍微改動規則，化身節奏更快的版本。每種模式皆可調整天氣、犯規規則、風向等選項。亦可使用密碼保存 League 與 Tournament 模式的所有戰績。

overview_en:
Despite having thousands of remakes in different systems, Final Fantasy Adventure was still missing a Game Boy Color version, so here it is!

Changes in this version are:

Full colorization
New world map (the old one was basically an empty space with 4 or 5 house icons)
Some of the bugs in the original game are fixed here: after casting Heal your defense power is not reduced anymore; a moogle item can now be used to heal a moogle status.
Inspired by the great hack made by xenophile, the sprites of the main characters are displayed in the char name selection menus.
overview_zh:
儘管已有眾多平台的重製版，《Final Fantasy Adventure》卻一直沒有 Game Boy Color 版本，現在終於登場！

本版本的改動如下：

全彩化
全新世界地圖（原版基本上是一片空地，只有四五個房屋圖示）
修正了原版的部分 bug：施放 Heal 後防禦力不再下降；Moogle 道具現在可治癒 Moogle 狀態。
受 xenophile 出色的 hack 啟發，主要角色的圖像會顯示在角色命名選單上。

overview_en: In Fix & Foxi - Episode 1 Lupo you must help the plucky and cool Lupo on his incredible adventure to make it through the enchanted lands and out the other side alive and in one piece! You only have a certain amount of lives to make it through each level so tread wisely and jump on all the enemies to eliminate them and collect the precious coins they leave behind!
overview_zh: 在《Fix & Foxi - Episode 1 Lupo》中，你必須協助勇敢又酷帥的 Lupo，闖過奇幻地帶並完整無傷地走到終點！每一關的命數有限，請謹慎行事，跳到敵人身上把他們踩扁，並蒐集他們留下的珍貴金幣！

overview_en: Flipper & Lopaka is an Action game, developed by Planet Interactive and published by Ubisoft, which was released in Europe in 2001.
overview_zh: 《Flipper & Lopaka》是 Planet Interactive 開發、Ubisoft 發行的動作遊戲，於 2001 年在歐洲推出。

overview_en: PC fans craving real-time strategy action on Game Boy Color may have found their title with FORCE 21. In the year 2015, World War III has broken out. Technology has progressed to the point that air-based nuclear attacks are ineffective, so warfare will be conducted the old-fashioned way: through large-scaled attacks of armored units and infantry. In this one-player strategy or action game, you'll choose to either control the American or the Chinese military forces, each side comprised of the same eight different unit types. From the speed and power of a tactical helicopter attack to the all-out brawn of a platoon of tanks, you'll have all the warfare options you'll need to carry out your plan of attack. In order to complete the game, you'll have to battle your way through 16 different missions that take place all over the world, in such locations as barren snowfields, yawning deserts, and crowded cityscapes.
overview_zh: 渴望在 Game Boy Color 上玩到即時戰略的 PC 玩家，或許找到了答案：《FORCE 21》。故事設定於 2015 年，第三次世界大戰爆發。科技已進步到讓空中核武攻擊失效，戰爭得回歸傳統——以大規模裝甲部隊與步兵作戰。在這款單人策略／動作遊戲中，可選擇美方或中方軍隊，雙方各擁有相同的 8 種兵種。從戰術直升機的速度與火力，到坦克部隊的強悍蠻力，種種作戰選項讓你執行作戰計畫。要破關需闖過 16 場散布全球的任務，地點包括荒涼雪原、無垠沙漠與擁擠都市。

overview_en: Formula One 2000 is a Racing game, developed by Tarantula Studios and published by Take-Two Interactive, which was released in 2000.
overview_zh: 《Formula One 2000》是 Tarantula Studios 開發、Take-Two Interactive 發行的賽車遊戲，於 2000 年推出。

overview_en: You will need courage, cunning and teamwork to beat the traps and pitfalls the Fort has in store and carry of its legendary treasure.
overview_zh: 你需要勇氣、機智與團隊合作，才能突破 Fort 內的陷阱與難關，奪走它的傳說寶藏。

overview_en: It's tough to be a frog! Life isn't all lazy days and lily pads--it abounds with dangers. Can you help Frogger survive some perils and spring him home to safety? First hop your frogs across a busy highway. Then cross a raging river to reach the safety of home. But your frogs will have to leap away from one danger after another before they're safe. Watch out for the tricky diving turtles...jump away from the frog-eating snakes...hop from the jaws of the hungry alligators!
overview_zh: 當青蛙真不容易！日子可不是只有荷葉與懶洋洋的時光，到處充滿危險。能幫 Frogger 穿越重重危機、平安回家嗎？先讓青蛙跳過繁忙的高速公路，再橫渡湍急的河流抵達家門口。但你的青蛙必須一次又一次跳開危險才能安全。小心狡猾的潛水龜……閃開吃青蛙的蛇……從飢餓的鱷魚口中跳開！

title_en: FROM TV ANIMATION ONE PIECE - MABOROSHI NO GRAND LINE BOUKENKI!
no_intro_name: From TV Animation One Piece - Maboroshi no Grand Line Boukenki! (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: The second Game Boy version of "ONE PIECE" RPG! Solve the incidents that occur on the landed islands, find the "log pose" that will be the door to your next adventure, go to all the islands, and complete the nautical chart. The first order is the original route, and the second order is the original story of the game. The game system has been greatly enhanced from the previous work. "Shocking action system" where the character accidentally takes action, "Dream combo" which is a dynamic combined attack that is launched when certain conditions are met, "Adrenaline battle" where you can release powerful special moves according to the character's anger, etc. Is newly added. Communication is possible not only in online battles and character exchanges, but also in the previous work "Dream Luffy Pirates Birth!"
overview_zh: 《ONE PIECE》Game Boy 版 RPG 第二作！解決登島時發生的事件、找出開啟下段冒險之門的「記錄指針」，前往所有島嶼，完成航海圖。第一輪走原作路線，第二輪走遊戲原創劇情。遊戲系統較前作大幅強化，新增角色出乎意料行動的「Shocking 動作系統」、特定條件下發動的華麗合擊「Dream Combo」，以及配合角色怒氣釋放強力必殺技的「Adrenaline Battle」等元素。通訊功能除了線上對戰與角色交換，還可與前作《Yume no Luffy Kaizokudan Tanjou!》互通。

title_en: FROM TV ANIMATION ONE PIECE - YUME NO LUFFY KAIZOKUDAN TANJOU!
no_intro_name: From TV Animation One Piece - Yume no Luffy Kaizokudan Tanjou! (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Weekly Shonen Jump, a popular anime game on TV. Select the route you want to go from the blank map, play new adventures and events, and gather crew members to join. When you clear the event, that part will be added to the map. The player moves the blank map with the crew, clears various events, defeats the enemies on the field, and aims to complete the map. By selecting the episode, you can enjoy the story as it was originally written or your own original story. Of course, you can play online battles with your friends and exchange characters. Open up the world yourself!
overview_zh: 改編自週刊少年 JUMP 旗下熱門電視動畫的遊戲。從空白地圖中選擇前進路線，展開新的冒險與事件，招募船員入夥。事件破關後，該區域便會加入地圖。玩家帶著船員在空白地圖上移動，破解各種事件、擊敗場上敵人，目標是完成整張地圖。可依集數選擇按原作劇情進行，或走自己原創的故事線。當然也能與好友線上對戰、交換角色。親手開拓自己的世界！

overview_en: You can easily enjoy detailed and realistic machine settings (engine, tires, body) like a real F1. Machine (team) can be selected from 8 types. Equipped with a full-scale world tour mode that aims to become a world champion by racing on all 16 courses around the world, including Japan, England, and Australia. In addition, a single race mode where you can choose your favorite course and enjoy the race, and a time attack mode aiming for the fastest lap are also installed. Of course, the communication function allows two people to fight hotly.
overview_zh: 可如真實 F1 般輕鬆享受詳盡又寫實的引擎、輪胎與車身設定。賽車（車隊）共 8 種可選。內建正規的世界巡迴模式，挑戰日本、英國、澳洲等全球 16 條賽道，目標成為世界冠軍。另收錄可挑選喜愛賽道遊玩的 Single Race 模式，以及衝刺最快單圈的計時挑戰模式。當然也可透過通訊功能與另一名玩家激戰。

title_en: FUSHIGI NO DUNGEON - FUURAI NO SHIREN GB 2 - SABAKU NO MAJOU
no_intro_name: Fushigi no Dungeon - Fuurai no Shiren GB 2 - Sabaku no Majou (Japan) (AFMJ)

overview_en: All the other space pilots have been eliminated. Somehow you survived. The Galaga enemies are on the move. Now, you must fight or doom Earth to extinction. There's no time to plan strategies. Just find your targets and come out blasting. Battle wave upon wave of alien attack craft in this dazzling edition of the arcade classic. Use special weapons, retrieve captured craft to multiply your firepower and of course, rack up big points in the Challenge Stages. This is Galaga - Strap yourself in and come out firing!
overview_zh: 其他太空飛行員都被消滅了，你不知怎麼活了下來。Galaga 敵軍正在進攻，現在你必須奮戰，否則地球將陷入滅絕。沒時間擬定戰略，找到目標就開火吧！在這款街機經典的精彩新作中，迎戰一波又一波的外星攻擊艦隊。使用特殊武器、奪回被擄的僚機加倍火力，當然也別錯過 Challenge Stages 的高分機會。這就是 Galaga——繫好安全帶，開火上場！

title_en: GAMBLER DENSETSU TETSUYA - SHINJUKU TENUN HEN
no_intro_name: Gambler Densetsu Tetsuya - Shinjuku Tenun Hen (Japan)
overview_en: This is the story of a legendary game master who was called "Jongsei" in the mahjong world. A four-player mahjong game of the mahjong manga "Tetsuya-The Legend of the Gambler" serialized in Weekly Shonen Magazine. You can enjoy the characters and episodes of the TV anime version, as well as various Ikasama-themed games anytime, anywhere. "Scenario game mode" where you play against experts according to the story, "Free game mode" where you can freely set characters and rules, and "Communication game mode" where you can play a combination game with 2 players vs. 2 computers. , Equipped with game modes such as "Dunch's Mahjong Course Mode" that is easy and fun to remember.
overview_zh: 麻將界中被稱為「雀聖」的傳說性遊戲達人故事。改編自連載於週刊少年 Magazine 的麻將漫畫《哲也—雀聖と呼ばれた男》的四人麻將遊戲。可隨時隨地享受 TV 動畫版的角色與橋段，以及各式以詐術為題的局。內建多種模式：依劇情與高手對決的「劇情遊戲模式」、自由設定角色與規則的「自由遊戲模式」、2 人對 2 電腦組隊對戰的「通訊遊戲模式」，以及輕鬆有趣、邊玩邊記的「Dunch 麻將講座模式」。

overview_en:
Game and Watch Gallery 3 (Known as Game Boy Gallery 4 in Australia and Game Boy Gallery 3 in Japan) is a  1999  flash back to the '80s with original and updated versions of five Game & Watch hand-held games! Relive the birth of hand-held gaming in Classic Game & Watch games. Then join your favorite Nintendo characters in Modern versions featuring improved play control, graphics, color and sound! The Classic and Modern versions of Egg, Greenhouse, Turtle Bridge,
Mario Bros., and Donkey Kong Jr. are unlocked by default. Flagman, Judge, Lion,
Spitball Sparky, Donkey Kong II, and Fire must be unlocked by earning stars.
The hidden games only have Classic versions.
overview_zh: 《Game & Watch Gallery 3》（澳洲名為 Game Boy Gallery 4，日本名為 Game Boy Gallery 3）是 1999 年作品，重溫 80 年代——五款 Game & Watch 掌上遊戲皆有原版與更新版！透過 Classic 模式重溫掌機遊戲的誕生年代，再用 Modern 模式與你最愛的任天堂角色一起玩，操作手感、畫面、色彩與音效全面升級！Egg、Greenhouse、Turtle Bridge、Mario Bros.、Donkey Kong Jr. 的 Classic 與 Modern 版本皆預設解鎖；Flagman、Judge、Lion、Spitball Sparky、Donkey Kong II 與 Fire 則需累積星星才能解鎖。隱藏遊戲只有 Classic 版本。

overview_en: Flash back to the '80s with original and updated versions of five Game & Watch hand-held games! Relive the birth of hand-held gaming in Classic Game & Watch games. Then join your favourite Nintendo characters in Modern versions featuring improved play control, graphics, colour and sound!
overview_zh: 重溫 80 年代——五款 Game & Watch 掌上遊戲皆有原版與更新版！透過 Classic Game & Watch 重溫掌機遊戲的誕生年代，再用 Modern 模式與你最愛的任天堂角色一起遊玩，操作手感、畫面、色彩與音效全面升級！

overview_en: The first Hudson "Game Boy Color" compatible. The masterpiece of strategy simulation has evolved further. A total of 100 offensive and defensive maps, and the computer's thinking engine speed has increased by 30% from the previous work.
overview_zh: Hudson 首款支援「Game Boy Color」的作品。傑出的策略模擬名作再進化。共 100 張攻防地圖，電腦思考引擎速度比前作提升 30%。

overview_en: An orthodox strategy simulation in which a magnificent strategy runs through the battlefield. The player becomes the commander of the Red Star Army or the White Moon Army and gives instructions to his army to occupy the capital of the enemy army or to annihilate the enemy's troops. The game mode is "Beginner mode" where you can learn how to play and units while playing 16 types of maps, "Campaign mode" where you can fight through all 45 types of maps according to the scenario, and you want to play from all 60 types of maps. There are three "standard modes" where you can freely select the map. It also supports "Mobile System GB", and you can "download maps" and "call mercenary units".
overview_zh: 正統的策略模擬，宏大戰略貫穿戰場。玩家化身紅星軍或白月軍指揮官，發號施令讓部隊佔領敵軍首都或殲滅敵軍。遊戲模式有三：邊玩邊認識玩法與兵種的 16 張地圖「Beginner 模式」、依劇情打通全 45 張地圖的「Campaign 模式」，以及可在全 60 張地圖中自由選擇的「Standard 模式」。亦支援「Mobile System GB」，可下載地圖、召喚傭兵單位。

no_intro_name: Game _ Watch Gallery 2 (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
Game & Watch Gallery 2 features six games based upon the Game & Watch brand of handheld games. Each game contains a 'Classic' mode, resembling the gameplay and presentation of the original Game & Watch title, and a 'Modern' mode, which contains revised graphics and additional features. For every 200 points players accrue in each game, they earn 'stars' which can be used to unlock additional features, entries in an in-game gallery displaying animations of other Game & Watch titles, and a sixth game, Ball; up to five stars can be earned in each mode and difficulty of each game, for a total of 120 stars.

Ball: The player juggles two to three balls in the air, requiring the player to catch and toss them up again, with one point earned for each successful catch. In the 'Modern' version, Bob-Ombs will also sometimes appear, which the player must avoid catching; multiple playable characters can also be unlocked.
Chef: The player moves left and right to catch food in their frying pan to toss up into the air. In the 'Modern' version, the player can rotate and turn on the spot to feed Yoshi.
Donkey Kong: The player moves left and right and jumps to avoid barrels, making their way up platforms and ladders towards Donkey Kong. In the 'Modern' version, platforms disappear and levels change for greater variation.
Helmet: The player moves left and right to avoid tools falling from the sky, making their way between two doors, with a point awarded for every journey. In the 'Modern' version, a button on the floor occasionally appears, awarding coins for bonus points if stomped upon.
Parachute: The player controls a boat, and must collect parachutists before they fall into shark-infested waters, in which case a life is lost. In the 'Modern' version, parachutists sometimes land in a cannon to be shot back into the sky.
Vermin: The player moves left and right to hit moles with a hammer as they appear out of ground. In the 'Modern' version, the player controls Yoshi, who can also move up and down, and must guard eggs from vermin that come from all sides.
overview_zh:
《Game & Watch Gallery 2》收錄 6 款源自 Game & Watch 系列的遊戲。每款都有貼近原作玩法與呈現的「Classic」模式，以及加入新畫面與額外要素的「Modern」模式。每款遊戲累積 200 分可獲得「星星」，可用來解鎖額外功能、欣賞遊戲內收錄其他 Game & Watch 動畫的展廳，以及第六款遊戲 Ball；每款遊戲在每種模式與每種難度下最多可拿到 5 顆星，總共 120 顆星。

Ball：玩家拋接 2 至 3 顆球，每接住一次得 1 分。Modern 版本中會出現 Bob-Omb，需避免接到；亦可解鎖多名可操作角色。
Chef：玩家左右移動，用平底鍋接住食物再拋向空中。Modern 版本中可原地轉身，把食物餵給耀西。
Donkey Kong：玩家左右移動並跳過木桶，沿平台與梯子向上接近 Donkey Kong。Modern 版本中平台會消失、關卡也會變化，增加變化性。
Helmet：玩家左右移動躲避從天落下的工具，在兩道門之間穿梭，每來回一次得 1 分。Modern 版本會偶爾出現地板按鈕，踩下可得到金幣加分。
Parachute：玩家操控小船，在跳傘者落入鯊魚海域前接住他們，否則會失去一條命。Modern 版本中跳傘者有時會落入大砲被射回空中。
Vermin：玩家左右移動，用槌子打從地裡冒出的鼴鼠。Modern 版本中改操作耀西，可上下移動，需保護蛋不被四面八方來的害蟲吃掉。

no_intro_name: Game _ Watch Gallery 3 (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
Game & Watch Gallery 3 is a 1999 Game Boy Color video game developed by Nintendo R&D1 and Tose and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on December 6, 1999.

Flash back to the '80s with original and updated versions of five Game & Watch hand-held games!

Relive the birth of hand-held gaming in Classic Game & Watch games. Then join your favourite Nintendo characters in Modern versions featuring improved play control, graphics, colour and sound!

Egg - Catch your eggs before they hatch!
Turtle Bridge - Carry the packages across the turtles' backs!
Green House - Protect your plants from the pesky pests!
Mario Bros. - Help Mario & Luigi keep the factory flowing!
Donkey Kong, JR. - Grab the key and free DK!

-Save & Quit feature lets you stop and restart your game anytime!
-Battery-backed memory saves all your scores!
-Collect stars to access new features and open hidden classic games!
overview_zh:
《Game & Watch Gallery 3》是 Nintendo R&D1 與 Tose 開發、由美國任天堂於 1999 年 12 月 6 日在美國發行的 Game Boy Color 遊戲。

重溫 80 年代——五款 Game & Watch 掌上遊戲皆有原版與更新版！

透過 Classic Game & Watch 重溫掌機遊戲的誕生年代，再用 Modern 模式與你最愛的任天堂角色一起遊玩，操作手感、畫面、色彩與音效全面升級！

Egg — 在蛋孵化前接住它們！
Turtle Bridge — 踩著烏龜背把貨物送過去！
Green House — 保護植物對抗惱人害蟲！
Mario Bros. — 協助馬力歐與路易吉維持工廠運作！
Donkey Kong, JR. — 拿到鑰匙救出 DK！

- Save & Quit 功能讓你隨時暫停與繼續！
- 電池備份記憶保存所有分數！
- 蒐集星星以解鎖新功能與隱藏的 Classic 遊戲！

title_en: GANBARE GOEMON - MONONOKE DOUCHUU TOBIDASE NABEBUGYOU!
no_intro_name: Ganbare Goemon - Mononoke Douchuu Tobidase Nabebugyou! (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: "Goemon Goemon" is now available as a collectible role-playing game. The feature of this time is the collection of "Mononoke". There are 146 types of unique "Mononoke" of various attributes and aristocrats. What is unique is not only the appearance but also the skill that each person has to liven up the battle scene. "Mononoke" can be made friends by using the "Fuin" command during battle, and becomes stronger by gaining battle experience with Goemon. Furthermore, it is possible to inherit special skills by fusing "Mononoke" with each other. Raised mononoke can be played against or exchanged via communication.
overview_zh: 《我們的英雄！五右衛門》以收集型 RPG 之姿登場。本作特色是蒐集「妖怪」，共有 146 種屬性與貴族設定各不相同的獨特妖怪。不僅外觀各異，每隻妖怪還擁有讓戰場熱鬧非凡的獨門技能。戰鬥中使用「封印」指令即可收服「妖怪」，與五右衛門一同累積戰鬥經驗變得更強。此外妖怪之間還能融合，繼承彼此的特殊技能。培養出的妖怪也可透過通訊與好友對戰或交換。

no_intro_name: Ganbare Goemon - Tengutou no Gyakushuu (Japan) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: The main character is Hajime, an active and adventurous fourth grader. Now, there is a Goemon boom among children, and Hajime is of course an enthusiastic Goemon fan. One day, when I went to my grandma's house in the countryside, I heard a legend about a big tree towering in the forest of the company, and out of curiosity, I went through a big hole in the trunk of the big tree. Suddenly, a dubious bandit attacks Hajime and asks Ebisu Maru to help him with a close call. Hajime was back in time in the Edo period! He heads to Oedo to meet his longing Goemon, but Goemon goes to the mountain of deception to recover the treasure stolen by a bandit called the Tengu Party. In this way, Hajime and his friends were involved in this incident ... The player is a modern elementary school student who is the main character. The hero solves the incident that happened in Oedo while traveling back and forth between Hyundai and Oedo. In Oedo, we meet friends such as Goemon and Ebisu Maru and cooperate with each other. Each character has a unique special move, and there is also a combined attack by multiple people. The theme is adventure and friendship. In a heartwarming story, the friendship between the main character and the Goemons is depicted.
overview_zh: 主角是行動派愛冒險的小學四年級生 Hajime。最近孩子們之間掀起五右衛門熱潮，Hajime 當然是熱情粉絲。某天他到鄉下奶奶家時，聽說神社森林裡有棵高聳大樹的傳說，出於好奇便鑽進樹幹裡的大洞。突然間，一名可疑的山賊襲擊 Hajime，他在千鈞一髮之際喊住惠比壽丸求救——Hajime 竟穿越時空回到江戶時代！他前往大江戶想見到嚮往的五右衛門，但五右衛門卻為了奪回被「天狗黨」山賊偷走的寶物而前往騙之山。就這樣，Hajime 與夥伴被捲入這場事件……玩家扮演現代小學生主角，往返現代與大江戶之間，解決發生於大江戶的事件。在大江戶會結識五右衛門與惠比壽丸等夥伴並合作行動。每名角色都有獨門必殺技，亦有多人合擊招式。本作主題是冒險與友情，溫馨故事中描繪主角與五右衛門一行人的情誼。

overview_en: A nurturing RPG that develops various adventures while nurturing the robot pet "Halo" who longs for the player with the master in battles and mini games. There are more than 120 types of robots that Haro transforms into 44 titles! Equipped with a "combinize" system that can be transformed into various robots by incorporating halo into various parts. Find out the rules of combination of parts and create the strongest robot data. Even in the four mini-games, halo will be trained and strengthened. You can also play online battles and convert parts and robot data with your friends. Moreover, you can create new Robo data by shining the light beam on Robo data using the infrared function!
overview_zh: 養成型 RPG，與作為主人的玩家一起，透過戰鬥與小遊戲培育嚮往的機器人寵物 Halo，展開各式冒險。Halo 可變形為 44 部作品中的逾 120 種機器人！內建「組裝（Combinize）」系統，把 Halo 拼進各種零件即可變身為不同機器人。摸索零件組合規則，打造最強機體資料。四款小遊戲也能訓練、強化 Halo。亦可進行線上對戰，與好友交換零件與機體資料。此外還能利用紅外線功能將光束打在機體資料上，創造全新的機體資料！

title_en: GB KARAN KORON GAKUEN - HANAFUDA MAHJONG
no_intro_name: GB Karan Koron Gakuen - Hanafuda Mahjong (Japan)

title_en: GEKISOU DANGUN RACER - ONSOKU BUSTER DANGUN DAN
no_intro_name: Gekisou Dangun Racer - Onsoku Buster Dangun Dan (Japan)

title_en: GENSOU MADEN SAIYUUKI - SABAKU NO SHIJIN
no_intro_name: Gensou Maden Saiyuuki - Sabaku no Shijin (Japan)
overview_en: The story after Sanzo and his group went to Tianzhu. At one point, there was a dispute over which was stronger, Red Boy or Gojo, and he decided to hold a martial arts tournament to see who was stronger. The player chooses one of the eight characters and participates in the martial arts competition. The purpose is to walk anywhere on the map, talk with the people you meet there, raise the level while fighting with youkai, and win the tournament.
overview_zh: 三藏一行人前往天竺之後的故事。某日，紅孩兒與悟淨爭論誰更強，於是決定舉辦武術大會一決高下。玩家從 8 名角色中選擇一人參加比武。目標是在地圖上自由移動，與所遇之人交談，邊與妖怪戰鬥邊提升等級，最終贏得大會冠軍。

title_en: GET CHUU CLUB - MINNA NO KONCHUU DAIZUKAN
no_intro_name: Get Chuu Club - Minna no Konchuu Daizukan (Japan) (Rumble Version) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: Even a lost island hideaway in the wet South Pacific isn't far enough away from the long arm of Rez. While GEX was whiling away the hours living on the fruits of his recent successes, the madman of the Media Dimension was working on his new hobby - secret agent-napping. Agent Xtra was now struggling for her freedom as a hostage in the lair of Rez. As a master of disguise, GEX had his work cut out for him. Another descent into bad TV movies is at hand. To the GEXCaves!
overview_zh: 即使是潮濕南太平洋上的失落小島，也躲不過 Rez 的魔爪。GEX 正享受著前作勝利的果實虛度時光，而媒體次元的瘋子卻迷上了新嗜好——綁架特務。Agent Xtra 如今淪為 Rez 巢穴的人質，正在掙扎求自由。身為偽裝大師的 GEX 工作可不少，又一次跳進爛電視電影裡的時刻到了。前進 GEXCaves！

no_intro_name: Gex - Enter the Gecko (USA, Europe) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: After saving the television realm from destruction, Gex retired to Maui. Unfortunately, Rez has returned and wants to take over the television realm again. Now Gex must come out of retirement. Guide him through 26 levels, each with a number of missions to complete. Finishing a mission will earn a remote control; collect enough remotes and new stages open. In all of the levels, Gex will have to either avoid or fight enemies. Luckily, he is equipped with a tail that can whip the bad guys into shape. To further aid in the fight, Gex can eat flies that will grant him an extra life or increase the power of his attacks, among other things. Help the gecko with attitude save the television realm in GEX: Enter the Gecko.
overview_zh: 拯救電視次元免於毀滅後，Gex 退休到茂宜島。可惜 Rez 又回來了，再度想接管電視次元，Gex 只好重出江湖。帶領他闖過 26 個關卡，每關都有多項任務要完成。完成任務可獲得遙控器，蒐集足夠數量便能解鎖新關卡。所有關卡中 Gex 都得閃避或對抗敵人。所幸他有條尾巴可甩飛壞蛋。除此之外，Gex 還能吃蒼蠅獲得額外生命或加強攻擊力。在《GEX: Enter the Gecko》中，協助這隻有個性的壁虎拯救電視次元吧。
publisher:
Crave Entertainment NA
Interplay Entertainment EU

overview_en:
Unlike its big 3D brother on the PC and Playstation 2, Gift for the Game Boy Color is a top down 2D action game.

As Gift, a small cute red devil-like creature with an attitude, players must save Lolita Globo and defeat the Shadow of Black Deep Dark Night. To do so Gift must find seven treasures and seven gnomes in seven different worlds. Worlds are divided in rooms, in rooms puzzles have to be solved, and enemies fought. Finally each world is guarded by a level boss.
overview_zh:
與 PC 與 PlayStation 2 上的大型 3D 兄弟版本不同，Game Boy Color 版的《Gift》是俯視 2D 動作遊戲。

玩家扮演 Gift——一隻嬌小可愛、態度十足、像紅色小惡魔的生物——必須拯救 Lolita Globo 並擊敗 Shadow of Black Deep Dark Night。為此 Gift 需在 7 個世界中找到 7 件寶物與 7 名地精。每個世界由多間房間組成，房內有謎題待解、敵人待戰，每個世界最後都有頭目鎮守。

overview_en: GOBS OF GAMES brings many childhood games to the Game Boy Color. The 16 different games are broken into four categories: Paper games, Peg games, Puzzle games, and Board games. The Paper games include Hangman, Dot Boxes, Triangle Boxes, Share, Color Snakes, and Tic-Tac-Toe. Peg Game is a series of boards in which the goal is to remove all of the pegs by jumping over them. Scramble and Move It are Puzzle games, and the only Board game is Checkers. All of the games can be played solo, but some can also played against another person via a link cable. Try to relive your younger days with GOBS OF GAMES.
overview_zh: 《GOBS OF GAMES》把眾多童年遊戲搬上 Game Boy Color。共 16 款遊戲分為四大類：Paper、Peg、Puzzle、Board。Paper 類包含 Hangman、Dot Boxes、Triangle Boxes、Share、Color Snakes 與圈圈叉叉。Peg Game 則是一系列盤面，目標是用跳吃方式移除所有釘子。Puzzle 類有 Scramble 與 Move It，唯一的桌遊是西洋跳棋。所有遊戲皆可單人遊玩，部分還能透過連線纜線雙人對戰。和《GOBS OF GAMES》一起重溫童年吧。

overview_en: Giant monsters are attacking Earth, and Godzilla, a 200-foot tall, fire-breathing lizard, is the only thing that can save the world. Unfortunately, the military wants to destroy all giant creatures, good or bad. You take control of Godzilla as he travels through seven action-packed levels. In each one, Godzilla must work his way past the military to fight a giant monster. Luckily, Godzilla has fire breath that will destroy almost anything. While fighting through the levels, Godzilla will earn new attacks like the stomp, bite, and tail-whip. Will Godzilla be able to save the planet from the monster menace? Find out by playing GODZILLA: The Series.
overview_zh: 巨型怪獸襲擊地球，這隻 200 英尺高、能噴火的蜥蜴 Godzilla 是唯一能拯救世界的存在。可惜軍方想消滅所有巨型生物，不分善惡。你將操控 Godzilla 闖過 7 個熱血關卡，每關他都得突破軍方阻撓，再迎戰一隻巨型怪獸。所幸 Godzilla 的火焰吐息幾乎能摧毀一切。隨著關卡推進，他還會學到踩踏、撕咬、尾擺等新招式。Godzilla 能否拯救地球擺脫怪獸威脅？答案就在《GODZILLA: The Series》中。

overview_en: Aliens are creating mutants on Earth, and it is up to Godzilla to save the planet from the giant monsters in GODZILLA THE SERIES: MONSTER WARS. You take control of the giant lizard in 10 levels of action that take place in deserts, cities, and underwater. Free-scrolling technology gives you total control of Godzilla, and new cross-hairs improve the accuracy of Godzilla’s attacks that include fireball, tail whip, bite, claw, stomp, and flame breath. As an added bonus, all of the attacks can be linked together for unlimited combinations. And you are going to need those combinations to destroy the 16 types of enemies that Godzilla will face. Try to save the planet from giant monsters and aliens in GODZILLA THE SERIES: Monster Wars.
overview_zh: 外星人在地球製造突變生物，《GODZILLA THE SERIES: MONSTER WARS》中由 Godzilla 出面解決這些巨型怪獸。你將操控這隻巨型蜥蜴，闖過沙漠、城市與水底等 10 個熱血關卡。自由捲動技術讓你完整掌控 Godzilla，新加入的瞄準準星提升火球、尾擺、撕咬、爪擊、踩踏與火焰吐息等招式的命中率。額外加碼：所有招式都能無限連段。要擊倒 Godzilla 將面對的 16 種敵人，這些連段不可或缺。在《GODZILLA THE SERIES: Monster Wars》中拯救地球免於巨怪與外星人侵襲吧。

title_en: GOLD AND GLORY - THE ROAD TO EL DORADO
no_intro_name: Gold and Glory - The Road to El Dorado (USA)
overview_en: After stowing away on Cortes's ship bound for the New World, Miguel and Tulio find themselves in a strange land with no food. However, they do find part of a map that might lead them to El Dorado, the lost city of gold. You take the role of either Miguel or Tulio as they search 20 levels of action that span swamps, rainforests, Spanish galleons, and even El Dorado for treasure and the other pieces of the map. Along the way, the heroes will have to fight bulls, native warriors, Spanish soldiers, wild boars, and rhinos, and they'll also have to brave the Circle of Fire. Luckily, the heroes are equipped with swords to dispatch any problems they might run into. If you play the game well, you just might get to ride Altivo, the horse. Help Miguel and Tulio find GOLD AND GLORY: The Road to El Dorado.
overview_zh: 潛上 Cortes 開往新大陸的船後，Miguel 與 Tulio 來到陌生的土地、卻沒有食物。所幸他們找到一張地圖殘片，可能通往失落黃金之城 El Dorado。你將扮演 Miguel 或 Tulio，在涵蓋沼澤、雨林、西班牙大帆船甚至 El Dorado 本身的 20 個關卡中尋找寶物與其餘地圖殘片。途中得對抗公牛、原住民戰士、西班牙士兵、野豬與犀牛，還要勇闖火環。所幸主角配有劍可解決問題。玩得好的話還能騎上駿馬 Altivo。協助 Miguel 與 Tulio 完成《GOLD AND GLORY: The Road to El Dorado》之旅。

overview_en: Power and atmosphere are powered up! Not only the shot screen, but also the flying ball scene and just before the cup-in are all progressing in 3D scene. Since data such as the undulations, conditions, and wind of the ground are prepared, you can devise a game strategy that is the same as real golf. When selecting a club, the short cursor displays how far you will fly. When playing a match, if the opponent's ball comes within 50 cm of the cup, you can judge the victory or you can gear cup yourself, so the game will develop smoothly. In online competition, you can have a hot fight against each other's clubs, and you can get a new club set depending on the number of points.
overview_zh: 力道與氛圍全面強化！不僅揮桿畫面，球的飛行軌跡與接近球洞的瞬間皆以 3D 場景呈現。地形起伏、狀況、風向等資料一應俱全，可像真實高爾夫一樣擬定策略。選桿時短游標會顯示飛行距離。對戰時若對手球落在洞口 50 公分內可直接判勝，自己也能 gear cup，讓比賽流暢推進。線上對戰可拿球桿一較高下，依得分數可獲得新的球桿組。

title_en: GOLF OU - THE KING OF GOLF
no_intro_name: Golf Ou - The King of Golf (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: There are 54 holes in 3 courses, Japan, USA and World. The world is made up of 9 difficult holes from Japan and USA, but the distance is getting longer and more difficult. Since the pin position changes from game to game, you can play with a fresh feeling no matter how many times you play. In addition, the course situation created by changes in wind direction and their combinations is infinite! There are three online matches, which are regular hole matches plus Dracon and Near Pin. Each course can save up to the best 5 scores, so you can always see the emotional record. In addition, you can print your scorecard on a pocket printer, so you can show off your hole-in-one or Albatross to your friends.
overview_zh: 共 3 場球場 54 洞——日本、美國、世界。世界球場由日本與美國中 9 個高難度球洞構成，但距離拉長、難度更高。針位每局變動，玩多少次都有新鮮感。風向變化的多重組合讓球場狀況變化無窮！線上對戰除一般洞數對戰外，還有 Dracon 與 Near Pin 兩種模式。每場球場可保存最佳 5 名成績，隨時回顧感動紀錄。亦可用口袋印表機列印成績單，向朋友炫耀你的一桿進洞或信天翁。

overview_en: Familiar with pet food commercials, the dog Gonta has become a game! An adventure game where you can enjoy Gonta's easy everyday life. Players can become Gonta and enjoy the Gonta world. Many CM scenes also appeared in the game. BGM is all that I have heard once.
overview_zh: 寵物食品廣告中熟悉的小狗 Gonta 變成遊戲了！這款冒險遊戲讓你體驗 Gonta 悠哉的日常生活。玩家可化身 Gonta 享受 Gonta 的世界。多場 CM 場景也在遊戲中重現，BGM 則是聽過一次就難忘的旋律。

overview_en: A puzzle game where you go around 7 archaeological sites around the world, move letters such as "katakana" and "hiragana" to match the keywords, combine words, and solve the mystery. The seven locations in the world are the ruins of Japan, northern Syria, Greece / Rome, Scandinavia, Ireland, Maya Steka, and Mu. Five stages consisting of three questions are prepared for one stage, and 105 questions are prepared in all seven places. The player can move the disjointed letters up, down, left and right to create a word that suits the subject. The number of answers to clear one theme varies depending on the stage and is 3 to 11. There are also various help cards.
overview_zh: 走訪世界 7 處古蹟，移動「片假名」、「平假名」等文字拼出關鍵字、組合詞語、解開謎題的拼字解謎遊戲。世界 7 處包括日本遺跡、敘利亞北部、希臘／羅馬、斯堪地那維亞、愛爾蘭、馬雅斯特卡與穆大陸。每個關卡由 3 題組成 5 個小關，全部 7 處共 105 題。玩家可上下左右移動散落的字母，組成符合主題的詞。每題的答案數依關卡不同，從 3 到 11 個不等，亦提供各種提示卡。

overview_en:
Experience for yourself every classic car chase ever seen. Race at breakneck speed through an immense, living city out-running and out-witting rival gang members, mercenaries, hired killers and an entire police force.

Drive dozens of varied vehicles around three of America's toughest cities. Only the best will be able to tame the fastest cars. Only the smartest will know all the short-cuts and the whereabouts of the hottest wheels. Only the toughest will be able to take on the world and finish the job like a professional...
overview_zh:
親身體驗每一場經典飛車追逐。在廣闊鮮活的城市裡狂飆，甩開並智取敵對幫派、傭兵、職業殺手以及整支警力。

駕駛各式車輛穿梭美國最險惡的三座城市。只有最厲害的人才能馴服最快的車輛；只有最聰明的人才能熟記所有捷徑與最辣的車源；只有最強悍的人才能挑戰整個世界，並像專家一樣完成任務。

overview_en: Grand Theft Auto comes to Game Boy Color! Seven ruthless gangs are involved in a brutal power struggle. Make a name for yourself, but watch your back. Respect is earned, not given. Intelligent gang system - earn and maintain the respect of gangs to get the best jobs and special favors or play the gangs off against each other in turf wars. Completely open and non-linear gameplay frees you to carve your own way to the top. Fully reactive urban environment which responds to your every move.
overview_zh: 《Grand Theft Auto》登上 Game Boy Color！7 個無情幫派陷入殘酷的權力鬥爭。打響名號之餘，也要小心背後。尊敬是靠贏來的，不是別人給的。智慧型幫派系統——博取並維持各幫派的尊敬以接到更好的任務與特殊好處，或挑撥幫派彼此打地盤戰。完全自由、非線性的玩法讓你自行開拓登頂之路。整個都市環境會對你的每個舉動作出反應。

overview_en: The main character, Yuhi, and his friends Mizuki and Shirou, were sent from school to another dimension in the wake of a certain incident. It was a girl named Sue who helped Yuhi, who had lost her mind after being separated from Mizuki and Shirou. Liete, the caretaker of the world who knows that Yuhi and others are human beings in another world, teaches that "keys" scattered all over the world are necessary to return to the original world. Yuhi embarks on a journey with his encouraging ally Justin Sue Fina to collect the "keys" and return to the original world with his friends. Why did Yuhi and his friends get lost in another dimension? "Grandia", synonymous with adventure, is now available on GBC! A full-scale RPG that follows the flow of SS and DC versions. Depending on the play, a completely different scenario will occur and the number of party members will increase. As with the Grandia series, IP (Initiative Point) gauges are used for battle. Place actions on the gauge for each character and fight using battle cards. Depending on the placement of the cards, defensive effects and combos of techniques may occur, requiring strategicity. There are many types of cards such as magic and techniques, and you can learn new techniques by synthesizing them. You can also play against friends and card trading using online battles.
overview_zh: 主角 Yuhi 與好友 Mizuki、Shirou 因某起事件從學校被送往異次元。和 Mizuki、Shirou 失散後失魂落魄的 Yuhi 被名為 Sue 的女孩搭救。知道 Yuhi 等人是異界人的世界守護者 Liete 告訴他們：要回到原本的世界，必須找回散布世界各地的「鑰匙」。Yuhi 與一路打氣的夥伴 Justin、Sue、Fina 啟程蒐集「鑰匙」，要與好友一起回到原本的世界。Yuhi 等人為何會迷失到異次元？冒險的代名詞《Grandia》登上 GBC！這是承襲 SS 與 DC 版脈絡的正統 RPG。隨遊玩方式不同會發生完全不同的劇情，隊伍成員也會增加。延續 Grandia 系列傳統，戰鬥使用 IP（Initiative Point）量表。為每名角色在量表上安排行動、運用戰鬥卡片戰鬥。卡片擺放位置可能觸發防禦效果或技能連段，相當講究策略。卡片種類豐富，包含魔法與技能，亦可合成學會新技能。亦可透過線上對戰與好友切磋並交換卡片。

no_intro_name: Great Battle Pocket, The (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: In this game, the film's hero, Gizmo, attempts to find the gremlins and capture them all. In the meantime, the sinister Stripe and his army of 30 different gremlins decide to invade the town of Kingston Falls and try to transform Gizmo into a gremlin. The game can be played as either character. Gremlins: Unleashed! features 10 levels based in locations featured in the film, including Billy's house, the school laboratory, the department store, and the movie theater.
overview_zh: 本作中電影主角 Gizmo 嘗試找出小精靈並全部捕獲。同時，邪惡的 Stripe 與其 30 種小精靈大軍決定入侵 Kingston Falls 鎮，並企圖把 Gizmo 變成小精靈。兩名角色皆可選擇遊玩。《Gremlins: Unleashed!》共 10 個關卡，皆取自電影中的場景，包括 Billy 家、學校實驗室、百貨公司與電影院。

overview_en: GBC version of the picture book "Hanamaru-kun" for young children. Educational software that allows you to learn the knowledge you need in your daily life through games such as errands, hideouts, and shiritori. You can enjoy the story as if you were watching a TV program, and you can study without knowing it.
overview_zh: 幼兒繪本《Hanamaru-kun》的 GBC 版。教育軟體，透過跑腿、捉迷藏、接龍等遊戲，讓孩子在生活中習得必要知識。可像看電視節目般享受故事，並在不知不覺間學習。

no_intro_name: Gute Zeiten Schlechte Zeiten Quiz (Germany) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
Good Times, Bad Times: The Quiz for GameBoy Color - The quiz about the series!

Features:

- Over 1000 questions about the series and stars
- Seven subject areas
- Approx. 3000 different answer options
- Single player mode against the clock

Which do you know best? Whether it's love, fate, trick or deception - seven subject areas with over 1000 questions ensure fast-paced guessing fun in Good Times, Bad Times: The Quiz for GameBoy Color. Think carefully about the answer, but also make sure that your fellow player doesn't snatch the point from under your nose in Good Times, Bad Times: The Quiz for GameBoy Color.
overview_zh:
《Good Times, Bad Times: The Quiz》Game Boy Color 版——以該影集為主題的問答！

特色：

- 超過 1,000 道與影集及明星相關的題目
- 七大主題分類
- 約 3,000 種不同答案選項
- 計時的單人模式

你最熟哪一塊？無論是愛情、命運、伎倆或欺騙——七大主題、超過 1,000 題，《Good Times, Bad Times: The Quiz》Game Boy Color 版讓你享受節奏明快的猜謎樂趣。仔細思考答案，但也要當心對手在你眼皮底下搶走分數。

title_en: GYOUTEN NINGEN BATSEELOR - DOCTOR GUY NO YABOU
no_intro_name: Gyouten Ningen Batseelor - Doctor Guy no Yabou (Japan)
overview_en: Comic BomBom's popular manga game. It is also a TV anime. The game is a role-playing game linked to the story of a manga. The player controls the main characters Guts and Jeanne to fight Doctor Guy. You can collect stickers of various characters as the game progresses. The stickers collected in the game can be exchanged with friends by communication.
overview_zh: Comic BomBom 人氣漫畫的遊戲化作品。同時也是 TV 動畫。本作為與漫畫劇情連動的角色扮演遊戲。玩家操控主角 Guts 與 Jeanne 對抗 Doctor Guy。隨遊戲進度可蒐集各種角色貼紙，遊戲中蒐集到的貼紙可透過通訊與好友交換。

overview_en: Halloween Racer is an racing game with a Halloween theme. It mostly reassembles a karting game, where you choose one of the different characters and race through each track of the game to win the Halloween trophy. To do so the player have to beat the competing monsters for each of the five tracks. On the road there is goodies to collect and traps to avoid to make it more challenging. Before going into the championship each track can be played in practise mode.
overview_zh: 《Halloween Racer》是一款萬聖節主題的賽車遊戲，整體類似卡丁車作品——選擇喜愛的角色，在各賽道中競賽以贏得萬聖節獎杯。為此玩家必須在 5 條賽道上擊敗對手怪物。賽道上有道具可蒐集、陷阱要避開，挑戰性十足。進入錦標賽前，每條賽道皆可在練習模式中先行體驗。

overview_en: A training simulation game that raises hamsters and aims to become a breeder master. Select one of the three animals, "Shigecchi", "Boo-chan", and "Endo-kun", and raise and breed them based on the funds you have. If you participate in various competitions (cups), you will compete for the hamster's ability and cuteness. Up to 4 hamsters can be kept in one cage at the same time. Of course, it is compatible with communication cables and can print cute hamsters.
overview_zh: 養倉鼠並以成為飼育大師為目標的養成模擬遊戲。從「Shigecchi」、「Boo-chan」、「Endo-kun」三隻動物中挑選一隻，運用手中資金培育繁殖。參加各種比賽（杯賽）較量倉鼠的能力與可愛度。同一籠最多可飼養 4 隻倉鼠。當然支援通訊纜線，並可列印可愛的倉鼠。

overview_en: The second hamster breeding simulation game. In addition to the familiar "Shigecchi", cute new characters are appearing one after another. A new mini-game has been added to the new story, and it is full of fun and cuteness. Comes with a mascot doll as a first-time limited benefit.
overview_zh: 倉鼠養成模擬遊戲第二作。除了招牌的 Shigecchi 之外，可愛的新角色一一登場。新故事中追加新小遊戲，樂趣與可愛度滿載。首批限定附贈玩偶吊飾。

title_en: HAMSTER MONOGATARI GB + MAGI HAM NO MAHOU SHOUJO
no_intro_name: Hamster Monogatari GB + Magi Ham no Mahou Shoujo (Japan)

overview_en: "Hamster Paradise" where you can make a cute hamster a pet. Hamsters' behavior, personality, and behavior change depending on how they are raised and taken care of. When raised with love, hamsters perform tricks (such as ball riding) and perform various gestures. You can use the communication cable to meet your friend's hamster or race in a racing game. You can take a picture of a hamster's funny gesture and print it with a printer.
overview_zh: 可以把可愛倉鼠當寵物的《Hamster Paradise》。倉鼠的行為、個性與舉止會依飼養與照顧方式而變化。用心養育，倉鼠會表演特技（如踩球）並做出各種逗趣動作。可透過通訊纜線與好友的倉鼠碰面，或在賽車小遊戲中比拼。可拍下倉鼠的逗趣動作並用印表機列印。

overview_en: First of all, I got a hamster from Dr. Hamuzou of the ham center. Give the hamster you got a cute name. Basically care! If you grow up lovingly, your hamster will grow bigger and bigger. Grow carefully by feeding and taking a walk. If you take a walk with your hamster, there will be many events. You can get money by clearing the mini game. Use this money to buy food, toys, and birdhouses for your hamster. Hamsters can get married when they grow up. If you grow your hamster well, new species may be born. The game is more cute because it reacts more than a real hamster! ??
overview_zh: 首先，從 ham 中心的 Hamuzou 博士那裡得到一隻倉鼠。給牠取個可愛名字。基本就是照顧！用心養大，你的倉鼠會越長越壯。妥善餵食、帶牠散步以細心養育。帶倉鼠散步時會發生許多事件。破關小遊戲可獲得金錢，用來購買飼料、玩具與小屋。倉鼠長大後可結婚。若養得好，還可能誕生新品種。比真倉鼠反應更豐富，更顯可愛！

overview_en: In this work, you can grow your favorite kind of hamster from Golden Hamster, Jungarian, and Roborovski. In addition to the mini rabbit that was popular in the previous work, a squirrel also appeared. There are also plenty of fun mini games to play with hamsters. In addition to familiar games such as ham wheels and ham catches, new games have been added, and there are more than dozens of them. The cage is also transformed into a two-story building. You can enjoy playing around by going up and down. Not only parks and shops, but also amusement parks and schools, where you can go out with hamsters has increased. You can now collect stickers that you can get at various places in the game, and exchange emails with your friends via infrared communication.
overview_zh: 本作可從黃金倉鼠、加卡利亞倉鼠與羅波羅夫斯基倉鼠中挑選喜愛的種類培養。除前作大受歡迎的迷你兔之外，還新增松鼠登場。與倉鼠互動的小遊戲也豐富多樣，除了滾輪與抓倉鼠等熟悉項目，更新增不少新遊戲，總數達數十款以上。籠舍也升級為兩層樓，可上下穿梭遊玩。可帶倉鼠出門的地點除了公園、商店外，還新增遊樂園與學校等。如今還能蒐集遊戲中各處取得的貼紙，並透過紅外線通訊與好友互傳訊息。

overview_en: The hamster paradise series is now even more cute! The types of hamsters that can be raised have increased to eight types: Golden, Jungarian, Roborovski, Blue Sapphire, White, Black, Panda, and Pudding! In addition, it has become possible to keep two hamsters at the same time. When you feed them, you can see cute gestures that the two animals share and eat. You can marry your own hamsters or play with your friend's hamsters using the communication function. The contents of the mini-game have been renewed, new walking places have been added, 16 new types of hamsters can be discovered, and you can meet the discovered hamsters at "Maison de Hamster".
overview_zh: Hamster Paradise 系列更上一層樓的可愛！可飼養品種增至 8 種：黃金、加卡利亞、羅波羅夫斯基、藍寶石、白、黑、貓熊、布丁。此外還能同時飼養兩隻倉鼠。餵食時可看到兩隻倉鼠分食的可愛動作。可讓自己的倉鼠結婚，或透過通訊功能與好友的倉鼠玩耍。小遊戲內容煥然一新，新增散步地點，可發現 16 種新倉鼠，並可在「Maison de Hamster」中與發現的倉鼠重逢。

overview_en: Hamtaro hops from your TV to your Game Boy Color for an adventure starring all the Ham-Hams from the hit animated series! See school yards, supermarkets, and other everyday places from the viewpoint of the pint-sized hamster. Help him round up his fellow Ham-Hams and meet back at the Clubhouse for a big surprise!
overview_zh: Hamtaro 從電視跳到你的 Game Boy Color，與熱門動畫中所有 Ham-Ham 一同冒險！從這隻迷你倉鼠的視角看校園、超市與其他日常場所。協助他召集所有 Ham-Ham 夥伴回到俱樂部會所，迎接大驚喜！

title_en: HANA YORI DANGO - ANOTHER LOVE STORY
no_intro_name: Hana Yori Dango - Another Love Story (Japan)
overview_en: Tsukushi Makino, the main character of the general people, who entered the high school of Eitoku Gakuen of the super bourgeois school, which is dominated by the ultra-high-class boys' four-member group "F4", at the request of parents aiming for "Tama no Koshi", is just a sober school life. I was going to send it. However, my friend accidentally kicked F4 leader Tsukasa Domyoji, and the rugged Tsukasa cut a rebellion against F4, so it's hard! Tsukushi's school life will change completely. "Your guts, I'll rehash you. Declaration of war!" The game story is based on the original comic volume 12 (episode of the teen of Japan). An adventure game in which the player becomes the main character, Makino Tsukushi, and weaves romance and friendship without losing the various hardships that occur in school life. Depending on your choice, you can enjoy the original story of each member of F4 and Tsukushi's elementary school classmate Aoike, who are not told in the original story. Adopted a multi-ending that allows you to enjoy the ending with each character according to the flow of the scenario followed by the player. If you play the game, you can enjoy the further charm of the character. Feel free to enjoy the development along with the original story or enjoy your own love story!
overview_zh: 進入由超有錢男生四人組「F4」掌控的超級貴族學校英德學園的平民主角槙野司，受家人「飛上枝頭」的期望進入這所高中後，原本只想過平淡的校園生活。然而朋友不小心踢到 F4 領袖道明寺司，個性莽撞的道明寺司向 F4 宣戰，引發大麻煩！槙野司的學園生活從此天翻地覆。「你的膽量我重新調教！宣戰布告！」遊戲劇情以原作漫畫第 12 集（日本青春篇）為基底。玩家化身主角槙野司，在校園生活的種種磨難中編織愛情與友情的冒險遊戲。依選擇可體驗 F4 各成員與槙野司小學同學青池等人在原作中未述說的故事。採用多重結局，玩家依劇情走向可獲得各角色專屬結局。實際遊玩可體會角色更深層的魅力。隨原作劇情推進，或編織自己的戀愛故事，盡情享受！

title_en: HANASAKA TENSHI TENTEN-KUN NO BEAT BREAKER
no_intro_name: Hanasaka Tenshi Tenten-kun no Beat Breaker (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Tenten-kun, who is very popular in Weekly Shonen Jump, will appear. It's exciting to think of a music puzzle like adding Pazuru Dama and Beatmania and dividing by two. Anyway, let's aim for a big chain by pressing the button at the right time according to the music.
overview_zh: 週刊少年 JUMP 高人氣的 Tenten-kun 登場。把《Pazuru Dama》與《Beatmania》加在一起再除以二的音樂解謎想想就刺激。總之配合音樂在對的時機按鈕，目標是大連鎖！

overview_en: Hands of Time is an Action game, developed by Mirage and published by Titus Software, which was released in 2001.
overview_zh: 《Hands of Time》是 Mirage 開發、Titus Software 發行的動作遊戲，於 2001 年推出。

title_en: HARLEY-DAVIDSON MOTOR CYCLES - RACE ACROSS AMERICA
no_intro_name: Harley-Davidson Motor Cycles - Race Across America (USA)

title_en: HARRY POTTER AND THE CHAMBER OF SECRETS
no_intro_name: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets (USA, Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It,Nl,Pt,Sv,Da)
overview_en: Ignoring Dobbya the house-elf's grave warning that disaster will strike if he returns to Hogwarts, Harry embarks on his second year to find Dobby's predictions coming true! Harry soon finds himself entangled in a dark plot against his "Mudblood" classmates, as students keep turning up petrified! Could Draco Malfoya be to blame, or is something even more malevolent at work? With the help of returning friends Hermione, Ron, Hagrida and Hedwiga, players attend new classes to learn second-year spells that will aid them in a quest to uncover the true identity of the "Heir of Slytherin".
overview_zh: 無視家庭小精靈 Dobby 警告——若回到霍格華茲將大難臨頭——哈利展開二年級生活，卻發現 Dobby 的預言一一成真！哈利很快被捲入一場針對「麻種」同學的黑暗陰謀，學生紛紛被石化！是 Draco Malfoy 搞的鬼，還是更邪惡的勢力在運作？玩家將與妙麗、榮恩、海格與嘿美一起上新課，學會二年級咒語，揭開「史萊哲林傳人」的真實身分。

title_en: HARRY POTTER AND THE SORCERER'S STONE
no_intro_name: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone (USA, Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It,Nl,Pt,Sv,No,Da,Fi)
overview_en: Unlike other game versions of the first Harry Potter book, the Game Boy Color rendition of Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone is a traditional roleplaying game, complete with NPCs to talk to and random beastie battles to challenge you. The game begins with the receipt of an acceptance letter into Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry. From there, you (as Harry Potter, of course) will go shopping for your school supplies, catch the train on the 9 3/4 platform, take a boat ride, and finally arrive at your new home.
overview_zh: 與其他第一部《哈利波特》遊戲版本不同，Game Boy Color 版的《Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone》是傳統角色扮演遊戲，包含可對話的 NPC 與隨機怪物戰鬥。遊戲從收到霍格華茲魔法與巫術學院的入學通知開始。從那裡你（當然是哈利波特）會去採購學校用品、在 9 又 3/4 月台搭上火車、乘船渡湖，最後抵達新家園。

title_en: HARRY POTTER TO KENJA NO ISHI
no_intro_name: Harry Potter to Kenja no Ishi (Japan)
overview_en:
Harry Potter & the Mystical Halo is a Bootleg/Shoot 'Em Up video game published by Vast Fame released on August 2nd, 2002 for the GB Color.

This is an unlicensed Chinese shoot 'em up known as "Harry Potter 3".
overview_zh:
《Harry Potter & the Mystical Halo》是 Vast Fame 推出的盜版／彈幕射擊遊戲，於 2002 年 8 月 2 日在 GB Color 上發行。

這是一款未授權的中國彈幕射擊遊戲，又名「Harry Potter 3」。

overview_en:
Rebuild the farm of your grandfather and start raising cows, chickens and sheep. Keep them happy and they’ll make you rich! Discover the fantastic Harvest Moon world with cool friends ready to help you succeed in your mission.

- The awaited Harvest Moon sequel for GBC with even more fun!
- Choice of playing a boy or girl farmer
- Hours and hours of gameplay
- Hidden arcade games include Mole Bash and Cherry Cup Horse Race
- Special Game Link cable options allow trading between Harvest Moon 2 and Legend of the River King 2
overview_zh:
重建祖父的農場，飼養乳牛、雞與羊。讓牠們開心，牠們就會讓你致富！與一群樂於相助的酷夥伴共同探索奇幻的 Harvest Moon 世界。

- 玩家期待已久的 GBC 續作，樂趣加倍！
- 可選男農夫或女農夫
- 大量遊玩時數
- 隱藏小遊戲：Mole Bash、Cherry Cup Horse Race
- 特殊 Game Link 纜線可在《Harvest Moon 2》與《Legend of the River King 2》之間交換物品
publisher:
Victor Interactive Software JP
Natsume Inc. NA
Ubi Soft EU

overview_en:
The third entry in the down-home series of RPGs boasts a bevy of new options and features. You can play as a male or female farmer, get married, play with new pets and enjoy new minigames.

Essentially a farming role-playing game, Harvest Moon 3 requires you to clear a patch of land, till the soil, plant seeds and tend the new shoots. Take a twice-weekly ferry to the mainland (the island locale is new to this game) to purchase animals and other supplies.

Despite -- or perhaps because of -- the lack of swordplay, magic spells and other traditional RPG fare, the Harvest Moon series exerts its own unique charm that has won over thousands of would-be farmers worldwide.
overview_zh:
這款溫馨的 RPG 系列第三作，端出大量新選項與新功能。可選男或女農夫，可結婚，亦可與新寵物互動並享受新小遊戲。

本質上仍是農場 RPG，《Harvest Moon 3》要求你開墾土地、翻土、播種並照料新苗。每週兩次搭乘渡輪前往本島（島嶼設定為本作新增），購買動物與物資。

儘管——或正因為——沒有刀劍、魔法咒語等傳統 RPG 元素，Harvest Moon 系列展現出獨樹一幟的魅力，征服了全球無數想當農夫的玩家。
publisher:
Victor Interactive Software JP
Natsume Inc. NA

overview_en: You have inherited the family ranch from an ancestor. With only a shed of rusted tools and a small amount of money, you must prove yourself worthy of owning the ranch by returning it to its former glory. To do this, you must till the soil and cultivate vegetables. When you have earned enough money, you can add chickens and livestock to help increase your profits. While you work, you will receive visits from the local townsfolk, who will ask for your help. You should always help them as much as possible, because they will be willing to return the favor later. Once you have built your ranch to a significant level, you can trade it with other farm masters via link cable. Try to restore the family ranch in HARVEST MOON.
overview_zh: 你從祖先手中繼承了家族牧場。憑著一間放滿生鏽工具的小屋與微薄資金，你必須證明自己有資格擁有它，並讓牧場恢復昔日榮光。為此你得翻土、種植蔬菜，存夠錢後再加入雞與牲畜以增加收入。工作期間鎮民會來訪，請你幫忙，請盡量回應——他們之後會回報你。當牧場規模壯大後，可透過連線纜線與其他農場主交流。在《HARVEST MOON》中重建家族牧場吧。

overview_en:
Harvest Moon GBC is a 1999 Game Boy Color video game developed by Victor Interactive Software and Tose and released by Natsume Inc. in the USA on November 25, 1999.

You have inherited the family ranch from an ancestor. With only a shed of rusted tools and a small amount of money, you must prove yourself worthy of owning the ranch by returning it to its former glory. To do this, you must till the soil and cultivate vegetables. When you have earned enough money, you can add chickens and livestock to help increase your profits. While you work, you will receive visits from the local townsfolk, who will ask for your help. You should always help them as much as possible, because they will be willing to return the favor later. Once you have built your ranch to a significant level, you can trade it with other farm masters via link cable. Try to restore the family ranch in HARVEST MOON.
overview_zh:
《Harvest Moon GBC》是 Victor Interactive Software 與 Tose 開發、由 Natsume Inc. 於 1999 年 11 月 25 日在美國發行的 Game Boy Color 遊戲。

你從祖先手中繼承了家族牧場。憑著一間放滿生鏽工具的小屋與微薄資金，你必須證明自己有資格擁有它，並讓牧場恢復昔日榮光。為此你得翻土、種植蔬菜，存夠錢後再加入雞與牲畜以增加收入。工作期間鎮民會來訪，請你幫忙，請盡量回應——他們之後會回報你。當牧場規模壯大後，可透過連線纜線與其他農場主交流。在《HARVEST MOON》中重建家族牧場吧。

no_intro_name: Hello Kitty no Beads Factory (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
Hello Kitty no Magical Museum (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Hello Kitty no Magical Museum is a Puzzle game, developed by Atelier Double and published by Imagineer, which was released in Japan in 1999.
overview_zh: 《Hello Kitty no Magical Museum》是 Atelier Double 開發、Imagineer 發行的解謎遊戲，於 1999 年在日本推出。

title_en: HELLO KITTY NO SWEET ADVENTURE - DANIEL-KUN NI AITAI
no_intro_name: Hello Kitty no Sweet Adventure - Daniel-kun ni Aitai (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: Hello Kitty comes to the Game Boy Color with HELLO KITTY'S CUBE FRENZY. The objective of each stage is simple: Kitty must collect all of the items scattered throughout each level. However, you can only tell Kitty to move left or right, and if you are not careful, Kitty will fall off the edge and say hello to the grim reaper. Luckily, blocks fall from the sky, which can be rotated and used to create staircases and bridges to the objects. However, placing three blocks with identical colors next to each other will make them disappear; this can both help and hurt. In addition to the block problems, Badz Maru, Hanamaru, and Pandaba will wander around and cause problems for Hello Kitty. Can you handle the pressure and collect all of the items in HELLO KITTY'S CUBE FRENZY?
overview_zh: Hello Kitty 登上 Game Boy Color 推出《HELLO KITTY'S CUBE FRENZY》。每關目標很簡單：Kitty 必須蒐集散落各處的所有物品。但你只能命令 Kitty 向左或向右走，一不小心 Kitty 就會墜崖、與死神打招呼。所幸天上會掉下方塊，可旋轉並用來搭建到達目標的階梯與橋樑。但若三個同色方塊相鄰會消失，這既能幫忙也能添亂。除了方塊外，Badz Maru、Hanamaru 與 Pandaba 還會在地圖上來回走動製造麻煩。能扛住壓力、蒐集到《HELLO KITTY'S CUBE FRENZY》中的所有物品嗎？

title_en: HELLO KITTY TO DEAR DANIEL NO DREAM ADVENTURE
no_intro_name: Hello Kitty to Dear Daniel no Dream Adventure (Japan)
overview_en: Kitty and Daniel have a London date together for the first time in a long time! It was a lot of fun, but Daniel has to go back to New York tomorrow. For Kitty, who feels lonely, Daniel presented her with a stuffed blue rabbit. However, one night, when Kitty wakes up with a noise, what a stuffed rabbit is running! Kitty chased a stuffed rabbit. When the stuffed rabbit stood in front of the mirror in the living room and cast a mysterious spell, the mirror glowed and the stuffed rabbit jumped into the mirror. Following the stuffed rabbit, Kitty jumped into the mirror ... This time, Kitty will take a big adventure in the fushigi world! A romantic Kitty and Daniel love story unfolds in a world where the past, present and future are mixed. If you change your costume during the game, you can power up Kitty's action. "Boss battle" appears at each turning point of the story! Compete in a game different from the action stage. There are lots of extra elements this time too!
overview_zh: Kitty 與 Daniel 久違一同在倫敦約會！玩得很開心，但 Daniel 明天就要回紐約。為了安撫覺得寂寞的 Kitty，Daniel 送她一隻藍色兔子玩偶。沒想到某天晚上 Kitty 被聲響吵醒，竟看見玩偶兔子在跑！Kitty 追著玩偶兔子，玩偶兔子站在客廳鏡子前唸出神秘咒語，鏡子發光、兔子玩偶跳了進去。Kitty 跟著跳進鏡子……這次 Kitty 將在不可思議的世界展開大冒險！過去、現在、未來交織的世界中，浪漫的 Kitty 與 Daniel 愛情故事就此展開。途中換裝可強化 Kitty 的動作。劇情關鍵節點會出現「頭目戰」！與動作關卡截然不同的玩法登場。本次也有大量額外要素！

overview_en:
Are you a true God?

You are Hercules, son of Zeus, and you must prove you are a true God to mortal eyes. Get ready for an extraordinary journey! This thrilling game, based on world-known TV series by Universal, mixes fast-paced action and adventure.

-Wide range of characters and adventures riddled with several missions and pitfalls.
-Link mode: play with your friends and exchange characters if you have Titus game Xena on Game Boy Color; Play as Xena in Hercules game and as Hercules in Xena game. You will access to hidden worlds.
overview_zh:
你是真神嗎？

你是宙斯之子海克力斯，必須在凡人面前證明自己是真神。準備好踏上非凡旅程！本作改編自 Universal 全球熱播電視劇，融合節奏緊湊的動作與冒險。

- 多樣的角色與冒險，內含大量任務與陷阱。
- 連線模式：若你擁有 Titus 的 Game Boy Color 版《Xena》，可與好友連線並交換角色——以 Xena 在《Hercules》中遊玩，或以 Hercules 在《Xena》中遊玩，可進入隱藏世界。

overview_en: "Suya Suya" was the first friend of a player who had transferred to Ukiuki Town. However, there is something wrong around them playing with them. Everyone in Ukiuki Town has fallen asleep! that? Did you sleep too? The player is awakened by "Herohero-kun", but everyone else stays asleep. It seems that you have to go into your dreams to wake everyone up ... Kodansha's "Comic BomBom" and NHK Educational TV's popular "Herohero-kun" are now available! !! An orthodox RPG, but a "role-playing gag" game that mixes gag and laughter. The secret of popularity is the unique personality of the characters that appeared! You can enjoy a wider world of heroes, such as the appearance of characters recruited for readers in "Comic BomBom". The main character of the game can be selected from "boy" or "girl", and the gag changes depending on the selected main character. The main character can also communicate via infrared communication.
overview_zh: 「Suya Suya」是剛轉學到 Ukiuki 鎮的玩家結交的第一個好友。沒想到周遭出了大事，Ukiuki 鎮的所有人都睡著了！咦？你也睡了嗎？玩家被「Herohero-kun」叫醒，但其他人仍在沉睡，看來只能進入夢境把大家叫醒……講談社的《Comic BomBom》與 NHK 教育台人氣節目《Herohero-kun》改編登場！正統 RPG，但結合搞笑元素的「角色扮演 gag」遊戲。受歡迎的祕密在於登場角色獨特的個性！包含《Comic BomBom》讀者票選角色登場等英雄世界更廣闊的內容。主角可選「男孩」或「女孩」，搞笑橋段也會隨選擇變化。主角亦可透過紅外線通訊與他人互動。

overview_en: Travel to a world of wizards, knights, dragons, and minotaurs in HEROES OF MIGHT AND MAGIC. You can choose from four different heroes and take control of part of a map. The goal is to defeat the other three warlords and rule the entire map. In order to do this, you must travel throughout the land, finding new areas and new towns. If you can get a town to help you, you can recruit new warriors and uncover information to find artifacts that will increase your powers and abilities. When you encounter the enemy, the armies square off in tactical combat where you can try to cut down the opposition with ranged attacks or cause status problems with magic spells. Destroy the opposition and rule the world in HEROES OF MIGHT AND MAGIC.
overview_zh: 前往《HEROES OF MIGHT AND MAGIC》的世界，與巫師、騎士、龍與牛頭怪相遇。可從 4 名英雄中挑選並掌控部分地圖，目標是擊敗其餘三位軍閥、統治整張地圖。為此你必須遊歷大地，找出新區域與新城鎮。讓城鎮支持你後可招募新戰士，並挖掘情報尋找能提升能力的神器。遭遇敵人時，雙方軍隊將以戰術對戰較量——可用遠程攻擊削弱對手，或用魔法施加狀態異常。在《HEROES OF MIGHT AND MAGIC》中擊潰對手，統治世界。

title_en: HEROES OF MIGHT AND MAGIC II
no_intro_name: Heroes of Might and Magic II (USA) (En,Fr,De)
overview_en: If you love role-playing games, you're sure to be jazzed about the fact that they've started releasing more of them for the Game Boy Color. Now you can take the power of the influential HEROES OF MIGHT AND MAGIC series with you wherever you go, challenging yourself with the intense action of this awesome sequel. Choose from a selection of unique hero types (including eight new ones) to take through this epic quest, gathering resources, creatures, and additional party members along the way. In addition to the new hero types, there are an amazing 30 total character classes for monsters those you control and those you fight against. The object is to gather enough material to create an entire army, taking your force into battle against those of enemy warlords. Dedicated fans of the series will definitely want to pick this one up as there is material that is exclusive to this GBC-only release. Don't have a GBC? Well, this is a perfect excuse to pick one up.
overview_zh: 若你愛玩角色扮演遊戲，肯定會為 Game Boy Color 推出更多此類作品而興奮。如今你可以隨身攜帶具影響力的《HEROES OF MIGHT AND MAGIC》系列力量，挑戰這款續作熱血的玩法。從多位獨特英雄類型（含 8 個全新類型）中挑選，踏上史詩任務，沿途蒐集資源、生物與額外隊員。除新英雄類型外，怪物角色職業共達 30 種——含可操縱與敵對者。目標是蒐集足夠資源組成大軍，與敵方軍閥對戰。死忠系列粉絲絕對要入手——本作是 GBC 獨佔，含有獨家內容。沒有 GBC？這正是入手的好理由。

no_intro_name: Hexcite - The Shapes of Victory (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: The world's best strategy games have two things in common: they start with a deceptively simple board and the goal of taking territory from your opponents. Now HEXCITE brings a whole new shape to strategy games. In HEXCITE, 1 or 2 players battle to dominate the board with pieces of different shapes and sizes. Like any great strategy game, HEXCITE is simple to learn, but challenging to master. And every round is unpredictable until the last play. Who knows? HEXCITE could be the shape of things to come!
overview_zh: 世界最頂尖的策略遊戲都有兩個共通點：起始於看似簡單的棋盤，目標則是從對手手中奪下地盤。如今《HEXCITE》為策略遊戲帶來全新形狀。1 至 2 名玩家以不同形狀與大小的棋子爭奪盤面主導權。如同所有經典策略遊戲，《HEXCITE》規則易學、精通卻具挑戰，每局直到最後一手都難以預料。誰知道呢？《HEXCITE》或許正是未來潮流的形狀！
publisher:
Ubi Soft NA/EU
NEC Interchannel JP

title_en: HISSATSU PACHINKO BOY - CR MONSTER HOUSE
no_intro_name: Hissatsu Pachinko Boy - CR Monster House (Japan)
overview_en: The model includes the super popular "CR Monster House". Not only the LCD screen of the actual machine, but also the movement of the pachinko ball is realistically reproduced! There are 3 modes in total. In the "capture mode", you can set the cash rate and simulate the play at a pachinko parlor while checking the balance status, rotation speed, number of jackpots, number of reach, etc. "Tamare mode" is a mode that allows you to start digitally at any time. You can change the jackpot probability and enjoy the digital movement of the LCD screen. In the "Reach Catalog", you can see all the reach patterns of Monster House at any time.
overview_zh: 收錄超人氣機型「CR Monster House」。不僅還原實機 LCD 畫面，連柏青哥珠的滾動也擬真重現！共 3 種模式。「攻略模式」可設定現金匯率，邊確認餘額、轉速、累積大獎次數、Reach 次數等資料邊模擬店內遊玩。「Tamare 模式」是隨時可數位起跑的模式，可調整大獎機率，享受 LCD 畫面的數位演出。「Reach 圖鑑」可隨時查看 Monster House 的所有 Reach 模樣。

no_intro_name: Hole In One Golf (USA) (Rumble Version) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: It's a quiet day on the links. You tee up your ball, and drive it 200 yards down the center of the fairway, leaving a 150-yard approach shot. After taking the approach shot, the ball stops rolling 3-feet from the pin. On the green, you sink the relatively easy putt, and you start your round with a birdie. While most golfers never have days like this, they can with HOLE IN ONE GOLF. Get out on three different courses and try to get the lowest score possible. However, the courses are located in rural areas, so you never know when birds, squirrels, or bears will come onto the course and mess with your shots. Try to play the round of your life with HOLE IN ONE GOLF.
overview_zh: 球場上一個寧靜的日子。你把球放上球座，一桿開出 200 碼直奔球道中央，剩 150 碼接近果嶺。下一桿停在離旗桿 3 英尺處，輕鬆推進，以 birdie 開局。多數高爾夫球手永遠遇不上這種日子，但《HOLE IN ONE GOLF》可以做到。在 3 條球場中爭取最低桿數。不過球場位於鄉下，誰也不知道何時會冒出小鳥、松鼠或熊來搗亂。在《HOLE IN ONE GOLF》中打出此生最佳一輪吧。

overview_en: Hollywood Pinball is an Action game, developed by Tarantula Studios and published by Starfish, which was released in 1999.
overview_zh: 《Hollywood Pinball》是 Tarantula Studios 開發、Starfish 發行的動作遊戲，於 1999 年推出。

overview_en: The eponymous Game Boy version of "Quest 64", or in other regions called "Quest: Fantasy Challenge".
overview_zh: Game Boy 版同名作品，即《Quest 64》，其他地區則名為《Quest: Fantasy Challenge》。

overview_en: The content of the game includes 3 competitions, "Koikoi", "Oicho Kabu", and "Flower Matching". A gem of thinking that even Hanafuda enthusiasts will groan, such as abundant option settings and formidable opponents with full-scale thinking. "Winning mode" and "Free battle mode" are available. In "Winning Mode", 7 characters appear as opponents, and the competition can be played in the order of "Koikoi", "Flower Matching", and "Oicho Kabu", and the strength of the rivals will increase as they win. "Free battle mode" is ideal for training, as you can freely select your favorite competition and character.
overview_zh: 本作收錄三種競技：「來來」、「Oicho-Kabu」與「合花」。豐富的選項設定與正規思考的強敵，讓花札迷玩到嘆服的一品。包含「優勝模式」與「自由對戰模式」。「優勝模式」中 7 名角色登場，依「來來」、「合花」、「Oicho-Kabu」順序對戰，連勝後對手會越來越強。「自由對戰模式」則可任意選擇喜歡的競技與角色，最適合練功。

no_intro_name: Honkaku Shougi - Shougi Ou (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

title_en: HONKAKU YONIN UCHI MAHJONG - MAHJONG OU
no_intro_name: Honkaku Yonin Uchi Mahjong - Mahjong Ou (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
Hot Wheels - Stunt Track Driver (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: The little die-cast cars from Matchbox make their way to the Game Boy Color with HOT WHEELS STUNT TRACK DRIVER. You can choose from five different Hot Wheels cars, including Way 2 Fast, Tow Jam, Shadow Jet, Saltflat Racer and the Twin Mill each with unique strengths and weaknesses. After picking the right car, take it for a test drive on one of the six tracks in the Single Race mode. When you want some stiff competition, try to win successive races in the Tournament mode. And if your friends think they can drive better than you, make them prove it with the two-player link cable option. In all of the modes, the key to winning is to maximize your speed by pulling off big stunts. Find out if you have what it takes to become a Hot Wheels Driver in HOT WHEELS STUNT TRACK DRIVER.
overview_zh: Matchbox 旗下的小型壓鑄玩具車登上 Game Boy Color——《HOT WHEELS STUNT TRACK DRIVER》。可從 Way 2 Fast、Tow Jam、Shadow Jet、Saltflat Racer、Twin Mill 等 5 款 Hot Wheels 車中挑選，每輛皆有獨特優劣。挑好車後在 Single Race 模式於 6 條賽道上試駕。想要硬碰硬挑戰時可在 Tournament 模式連勝多場。如果朋友自認車技更好，就用雙人連線纜線一較高下。所有模式中勝出的關鍵是：靠華麗特技拉滿速度。試試你能否在《HOT WHEELS STUNT TRACK DRIVER》中成為合格的 Hot Wheels Driver。

overview_en: If you like to play cards, then you should get a copy of HOYLE CARD GAMES. There is a total of 14 different games to play including six variations of solitaire (Four Free, Golf Par 6 and Par 7, Klondike draw 1 and draw 3, and Pyramid), Crazy Eights, Cribbage, Gin, Go Fish, Hearts, Old Maid, Spades, and War. When you play, you can choose from 14 different personas like a balding professor, a crocodile, and a teddy bear. You can also play against a friend using the same system or via a link cable. Now you don't have to worry about finding a full deck of cards when you want to play, thanks to HOYLE CARD GAMES for the Game Boy Color.
overview_zh: 若你喜歡撲克牌，那就該入手《HOYLE CARD GAMES》。共有 14 種遊戲可玩，包括 6 種接龍變體（Four Free、Golf Par 6 與 Par 7、Klondike draw 1 與 draw 3、Pyramid）以及 Crazy Eights、Cribbage、Gin、Go Fish、Hearts、Old Maid、Spades 與 War。遊玩時可從禿頭教授、鱷魚、泰迪熊等 14 種角色中挑選。亦可使用同一台主機與好友對戰，或透過連線纜線連線。想玩牌時不必再煩惱湊不齊整副牌——感謝 Game Boy Color 上的《HOYLE CARD GAMES》。

overview_en: All of the excitement of beating the house in Las Vegas or Atlantic City can be put in the palm of your hand with HOYLE CASINO for the Game Boy Color. You can gamble your money away in seven different games: Blackjack, Video Poker, slots, Roulette, Craps, Pai Gow, and Poker. Learning how to play each game is easy, thanks to the tutorials included. All of the games are played just like they are in real life you get to see the dealer's hands as he deals the card, and you get to shake the dice in Craps. In most of the games, digitized voices call out the hands or the winning numbers. As an added bonus, you and a friend can link up to play any of the table games together. Now's your chance to try and break the bank in HOYLE CASINO.
overview_zh: 拉斯維加斯與大西洋城贏錢的所有刺激，全都裝進 Game Boy Color 的《HOYLE CASINO》。可在 7 種賭局中揮霍：21 點、Video Poker、吃角子老虎、輪盤、Craps、Pai Gow 與撲克。每種玩法皆內建教學，學起來毫無壓力。所有遊戲皆貼近真實——你能看見荷官發牌的手勢，也能在 Craps 中親手搖骰。多數遊戲還會以數位語音報出牌型或得獎號碼。額外加碼：可與好友連線同玩任一桌上遊戲。在《HOYLE CASINO》中嘗試大殺四方吧。

overview_en: Hugo 2 1/2 is an Action game, developed by Bit Managers and published by Infogrames, which was released in Europe in 1999.
overview_zh: 《Hugo 2 1/2》是 Bit Managers 開發、Infogrames 發行的動作遊戲，於 1999 年在歐洲推出。

overview_en: The evil Scylla is back and this time has found a way to make herself the most powerful witch of all time and take over the world. For this, she requires very rare black diamonds, which are to be found on the jungle island where the Kikurians live. She takes them all prisoner and forces them to work day and night in search of black diamonds. The elder King Kikurian asks Hugo the troll to liberate the slaves and stop Scylla's plot before it is too late. When Fernando arrives a letter from King Kikurian, Hugo reads it, but finds poor King Kikurian imprisoned in a cell and unable to help his people, and has absolutely no time to waste. Can Hugo free all the slaves and stop Scylla's plot?
overview_zh: 邪惡的女巫 Scylla 再度回歸，這次她想成為史上最強大的女巫並征服世界。為此她需要極為稀有的黑鑽石，而黑鑽石就藏在 Kikurians 族居住的叢林島上。她抓走所有族人，逼迫他們日夜挖掘黑鑽石。年邁的 King Kikurian 請求巨魔 Hugo 解救奴隸，並在一切為時已晚之前阻止 Scylla 的陰謀。當 Fernando 帶來 King Kikurian 的信件時，Hugo 讀完後發現可憐的 King Kikurian 已被囚禁在牢房中無法相助族人，刻不容緩。Hugo 能否解救所有奴隸並阻止 Scylla 的陰謀？

overview_en: The wicked witch Scylla wants to get rid of Hugo the troll once and for all. She has used her powers to trap Hugo in a magic mirror that she then cracked it into three pieces and magically scattered the fragments across the world. Scylla also once again kidnapped Hugo's wife, Hugolina. Hugo and Hugolina's three children, Rit, Rat, and Ruth, are the only ones who can free their parents. To break the witch's curse, each child must find a piece of the broken mirror. If the kids put the mirror together, Hugo is able to defeat Mirror Scylla and break the spell. After the fight Hugo gets out of the mirror, traps Scylla in it and smashes it into little pieces, and saves Hugolina.
overview_zh: 邪惡女巫 Scylla 想徹底除掉巨魔 Hugo。她運用魔力將 Hugo 困在魔鏡中，再將魔鏡裂成三片，用法術將碎片散落世界各地。Scylla 同時又綁架了 Hugo 的妻子 Hugolina。Hugo 與 Hugolina 的三個孩子 Rit、Rat、Ruth 是唯一能解救父母的人。要破解女巫的詛咒，每個孩子都必須找到一片碎鏡。當孩子們將鏡子拼回後，Hugo 便能擊敗鏡中的 Scylla 並破除咒語。戰鬥結束後 Hugo 從鏡中脫身，反將 Scylla 困入鏡中並將其砸成碎片，救出 Hugolina。

title_en: HUNTER X HUNTER - HUNTER NO KEIFU
no_intro_name: Hunter x Hunter - Hunter no Keifu (Japan)
overview_en: Everything is a hunter legend that starts here. Aim to become a hunter by participating in the "Hunter Exam" that appeared in the Weekly Shonen Jump series "Hunter x Hunter". A character who has become a hunter can be selected as a master when creating a new character, and episodes of that technique and item can be reproduced and passed on to the next generation. By combining the items that appear in the game, more than 400 types of items will appear. It is also linked to the "Hunter x Hunter" card released by Bandai, and you can get various effects such as acquiring items by entering the 8-digit code printed on the card. The package includes 3 out of 6 original limited edition Carddass.
overview_zh: 獵人傳說的一切從這裡開始。挑戰《週刊少年 JUMP》連載作品《獵人 HUNTER × HUNTER》中登場的「獵人試驗」，目標成為一名獵人。成為獵人的角色可在創建新角色時被選為師父，將其招式與道具的演出傳承給下一代。透過遊戲中道具的組合，可衍生出超過 400 種道具。本作也與萬代發行的《HUNTER × HUNTER》卡牌連動，輸入卡片上印製的 8 位數密碼可獲得道具等各種效果。包裝內附 6 種原創限定卡達中的 3 張。

title_en: HUNTER X HUNTER - KINDAN NO HIHOU
no_intro_name: Hunter x Hunter - Kindan no Hihou (Japan)
overview_en: On the way back to Whale Island after leaving the sky stadium, a storm hits the ship and the ship is in distress. After arriving at a mysterious island, Gon begins exploring the island in search of the missing Kirua. There are various archaeological sites on the island, full of dangerous beasts and traps! Can you really solve the mystery of this island and find the lost Kirua? The second GBC-only game, a completely original story. The stage is structured according to the atmosphere of the original manga. Whereas the previous work was a simulation, this time it is a side-scrolling type action game in which Gon and Kirua are very active. There are experience points and levels, so even formidable enemies can easily win if they challenge after raising the level! Recommended for those who are not good at action games!
overview_zh: 離開天空競技場、返回鯨魚島途中，船隻遭遇暴風雨陷入危機。漂流至神秘島嶼後，小傑為了尋找失蹤的奇犽展開探索。島上散布著各式遺跡，遍布危險的猛獸與機關！你能否真正解開島嶼之謎並找到失蹤的奇犽？這是 GBC 限定的第二款作品，採用完全原創的故事，舞台依原作漫畫氛圍構築。前作為模擬遊戲，本次則是小傑與奇犽大顯身手的橫向動作遊戲。導入經驗值與等級制度，即使面對強敵，只要先練等也能輕鬆獲勝！推薦給不擅長動作遊戲的玩家。

overview_en: Hype: The Time Quest is an action and adventure game where you can interact with NPCs in fighting as well as in dialogue in search of information, goods, and services. You play has Hype, a medieval knight who happens to fall victim to the curse of Barnak. During this time, he is thrown into the past here he must find his way back. Will his future become worst from anything he does during this time in the past?
overview_zh: 《Hype: The Time Quest》是一款動作冒險遊戲，玩家可與 NPC 戰鬥或對話，蒐集情報、物品與服務。你扮演中世紀騎士 Hype，他不幸中了 Barnak 的詛咒，被丟進過去，必須設法返回現代。他在過去的所作所為，會不會讓未來變得更糟？

title_en: HYPER OLYMPIC SERIES - TRACK _ FIELD GB
no_intro_name: Hyper Olympic Series - Track _ Field GB (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

title_en: IDE YOUSUKE NO MAHJONG KYOUSHITSU GB
no_intro_name: Ide Yousuke no Mahjong Kyoushitsu GB (Japan)

title_en: INDIANA JONES AND THE INFERNAL MACHINE
no_intro_name: Indiana Jones and the Infernal Machine (USA, Europe) (En,Fr,De)
overview_en: The Communists are trying to reassemble a machine that will open the door to a parallel universe. However, many of the key parts are missing. It is up to you as Indiana Jones to search the globe and recover the pieces before the Soviets do. You will have to run, jump, swim, and fight his way through 19 levels of action. Luckily, you can use a whip, pistol, machine gun, and grenades on the Soviet soldiers, spiders, scorpions, snakes, wolves, jaguars, sharks, jellyfish, and poisonous lice you encounter. After completing a level, you will be treated to a cinematic clip that will advance the plot and reveal the password you need to continue the game. The world will only be safe when the missing parts are recovered and the Communist threat is quelled in INDIANA JONES AND THE INFERNAL MACHINE.
overview_zh: 共產黨人正試圖重新組裝一台能開啟通往平行宇宙之門的機器，然而許多關鍵零件下落不明。身為印第安納瓊斯的你必須走遍全球，搶在蘇聯人之前找回零件。你必須奔跑、跳躍、游泳、戰鬥，闖過 19 個動作關卡。所幸你可以使用鞭子、手槍、機關槍與手榴彈，對付蘇聯士兵、蜘蛛、蠍子、蛇、狼、美洲豹、鯊魚、水母與毒蝨。每通過一關，會播放推進劇情的過場動畫，並揭示繼續遊戲所需的密碼。唯有找回所有零件並平息共產主義威脅，世界才能重歸安全。

overview_en: The evil Dr. Claw is about to unleash the deadly MadKactus virus on the world, and it's up to Inspector Gadget to stop him. Since Gadget always needs a little help, his niece Penny and their dog Brain are at the ready to make their contribution. You, as the enigmatic Inspector, will have to work your way through 20 levels that span five different worlds. Luckily, many of your famous devices are available to help out including the helicopter, spring arms, rocket-powered roller skates, and hammer hat. If there is something that you can't do as Gadget, you can switch characters and use Penny or Brain to get past an obstacle or solve a puzzle. Gather up your go-go gadgets and get ready to save the world from Dr. Claw in INSPECTOR GADGET.
overview_zh: 邪惡的 Dr. Claw 即將釋放致命的 MadKactus 病毒禍害世界，必須由神探 Gadget 出馬阻止。由於 Gadget 總是需要一點幫助，他的姪女 Penny 與愛犬 Brain 隨時待命協助。你將扮演這位神秘的探長，闖過橫跨五個世界的 20 個關卡。所幸你能使用許多招牌道具，包括直升機帽、彈簧手臂、火箭溜冰鞋與槌子帽。當 Gadget 無法處理某些狀況時，可切換為 Penny 或 Brain，越過障礙或解開謎題。準備好你的萬能道具，從 Dr. Claw 手中拯救世界吧！

overview_en: The classic karate fighter is back on the Game Boy Color, remade with the nostalgic gameplay that fans around the world will adore, and new playmodes to keep the action fresh and exciting. HIYAH!
overview_zh: 經典的空手道格鬥遊戲重返 Game Boy Color，重製了全球玩家熟悉的懷舊玩法，並加入新的對戰模式以保持新鮮感。HIYAH！

overview_en: International Rally is a Racing game, developed by Konami Computer Entertainment Nagoya and published by Konami, which was released in 1999.
overview_zh: 《International Rally》是一款由 Konami Computer Entertainment Nagoya 開發、Konami 發行的賽車遊戲，1999 年推出。

overview_en: Konami's premier soccer franchise, INTERNATIONAL SUPERSTAR SOCCER, has come to the Game Boy Color. You can choose your team from 36 international squads that include traditional powerhouses like Brazil and Italy, as well as some less-respected teams like the United States and Cameroon. After you select your team you will compete in pool play for the International Cup. If you are not ready for the international limelight, you can play and Exhibition game or participate in a League. During the game there are number of coaching options available, like the ability to pick your formations and match-ups. When you get a big winning streak going, you can keep track of your progress with a password. Now you can enjoy the world's most popular sport without getting dirty with INTERNATIONAL SUPERSTAR SOCCER.
overview_zh: Konami 旗艦足球系列《實況世界足球》登陸 Game Boy Color。可從 36 支國家代表隊中挑選，包含巴西、義大利等傳統強隊，也有美國、喀麥隆等較不被看好的隊伍。選定球隊後，可參加分組賽爭奪 International Cup。若還不打算進軍國際舞台，可進行表演賽或聯盟賽。比賽中提供多項戰術選項，例如選擇陣型與對位。連勝時可透過密碼記錄進度。現在你不必弄髒自己也能享受全球最受歡迎的運動。

overview_en: So, you don't think realistic international soccer is possible on the Game Boy Color? Think again; INTERNATIONAL SUPERSTAR SOCCER 99 has all of the rules, physics, and intensity of the real thing. You can play as any of 32 worldwide squads, competing for the rights to the International Cup. Choose whether you want to play three, five, or seven-minute halves, and decide whether you want your overtime decisions to be made Golden Goal or Extended Time-style.
