The gameplay and decisions are so detailed, you can even select your starting lineup and reserve players, pick a formation, and set up your own strategies. You can engage in any number of exhibition games (alone or against a friend), but the real fun begins in International Cup mode, in which you claw your way up from a ranking of 32nd in the world. Beginners and seasoned veterans alike will get plenty of mileage out of the game, as there are three different difficulty settings to master.
overview_zh: 你以為 Game Boy Color 上做不出真實的國際足球嗎？《實況世界足球 99》具備真實規則、物理表現與比賽張力。可選擇 32 支世界代表隊之一，爭奪 International Cup。半場時間可選 3、5 或 7 分鐘，延長賽則可選黃金進球或加時賽制。比賽細節豐富，可自訂先發與替補名單、選擇陣型與戰術。可進行任意數量的表演賽（單人或雙人對戰），但真正樂趣在於 International Cup 模式，從世界排名第 32 開始一路向上挑戰。提供三種難度，新手與老手都能長時間上手。

overview_en: With International Track & Field it takes a little bit more to be a champion. Ten grueling decathalon events put your stamina and your will power to the test as you battle it out with athletes from around the world. Heart-pumping gameplay and vibrant graphics truly capture the pageantry of International competition. Be careful not to get too caught up in the global spotlight - or you may find yourself missing from the victory podium!
overview_zh: 《International Track & Field》要成為冠軍可不容易。十項艱辛的十項全能項目，將考驗你的體能與意志力，與來自世界各地的選手一較高下。緊張刺激的玩法與鮮明的畫面真實呈現國際賽事的盛況。但小心別被全球聚光燈沖昏頭，否則你可能無緣登上頒獎台！

no_intro_name: It's a World Rally (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

title_en: ITSUDEMO PACHINKO GB - CR MONSTER HOUSE
no_intro_name: Itsudemo Pachinko GB - CR Monster House (Japan)
overview_en: The super popular pachinko machine "CR Monster House" is now available on GB! Faithfully reproduce from the movement of the ball to the reach action and the pattern of the jackpot. There are two modes in the game, "Story mode" where you play against monster characters such as the familiar witch Franken with quotas, and "Play mode" where you can find a strategy according to the platform, and the position and inclination of the nails are highlighted. There is also a function that you can check. It also has a backup function that allows you to save your money and progress, so you can easily play games while you are on the move or in a little spare time. This is the only way to play pachinko in GB!
overview_zh: 超人氣柏青哥機台「CR Monster House」登陸 GB！從鋼珠的動向、Reach 演出到大獎花樣都忠實重現。遊戲共有兩種模式：「劇情模式」可與熟悉的女巫 Franken 等怪物角色挑戰課題對戰；「練習模式」則可依機台找出攻略法，並會醒目標示釘子的位置與角度。具備備份功能，可記錄金錢與進度，方便外出或空閒時隨時遊玩。這是在 GB 上享受柏青哥的唯一選擇！

overview_en: A ported version of the soccer game that was a big hit with the Super Nintendo version. The appearance clubs are all 16 J1 teams at the time of 1999. There are a total of 256 players, 16 players per club. There are 4 modes. "Pre-season match" is a practice match with only one match. Let's get used to the operation here and challenge the J-League match. In the "J-League match", one team will be selected from all 16 teams, and 15 games and 2 championship games will be played on the 1st and 2nd stages. In "Communication Battle", you can enjoy a heated game of two-player battle. The match results are saved, and if you win, the number of spectators will gradually increase. In "Options", you can freely set the match time, stadium, rules, etc.
overview_zh: 在超任版大獲好評的足球遊戲移植版。登場球隊為 1999 年當時的 J1 全 16 隊，每隊 16 名選手，總計 256 名球員。遊戲共四種模式：「賽季前熱身賽」是僅進行一場的練習賽，可在此熟悉操作後再挑戰 J 聯賽；「J 聯賽模式」可從 16 隊中選擇一隊，於前後兩階段進行 15 場聯賽與 2 場冠軍賽；「通信對戰」可享受兩人對戰的熱血賽事，比賽結果會被記錄，獲勝可逐漸增加觀眾人數；「選項」中可自由設定比賽時間、球場、規則等。

overview_en: A full-scale simulation soccer game with J League (J1 and J2) + World Mode (Japan National Team). He becomes a manager when practicing, becomes a player during training and games, and sometimes becomes a manager. On the management side, you can not only get transfers and change directors, but you can also set admission fees. The official data of 16 teams for J1, 11 teams for J2, and 28 teams in total including the Japan national team are used. If you add 23 overseas countries and hidden teams, 52 teams will appear in the game. Up to 26 people can be registered for each team data. Player data is over 1300! The face of the edit player can also be created by the montage method. Of course, by using a communication cable, the trained teams can play against each other.
overview_zh: 結合 J 聯盟（J1 與 J2）與世界模式（日本國家代表隊）的正統模擬足球遊戲。練習時擔任教練，訓練與比賽時化身選手，有時又轉為經理人。經營面除了選手轉會與更換教練外，還可設定門票價格。收錄 J1 共 16 隊、J2 共 11 隊及日本國家隊合計 28 隊的官方資料，加上 23 支海外隊與隱藏隊伍，共可使用 52 隊。每隊最多可登錄 26 名球員，球員資料超過 1300 筆！自訂選手的臉部可透過拼貼方式建立。當然，使用通信線可讓自己培育的隊伍互相對戰。

title_en: JACK NO DAIBOUKEN - DAIMAOU NO GYAKUSHUU
no_intro_name: Jack no Daibouken - Daimaou no Gyakushuu (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: "Jagainu-kun" is a music picture book game (a heartwarming dance that enhances the sense of rhythm). Choose story mode when playing for the first time. As the story goes on, the dance begins with a certain trigger. There are choices in the middle of the story, and the dance songs and the characters you meet will change depending on how you proceed. At first, the purpose is to select various routes and collect characters and dances. When you finish the story, the result will be reflected and you can make your own picture book, you can read it in "picture book mode", and you can also enjoy dancing with the songs and characters collected on the way. Unlike traditional music games, there are no commands, so it's simple, easy to remember, and easy to get used to.
overview_zh: 《Jagainu-kun》是一款音樂繪本遊戲（藉由舞蹈培養節奏感的溫馨小品）。初次遊玩請選擇劇情模式。隨著故事進行，會在某些觸發點開始跳舞。劇情中有選擇分支，依進行方式不同，跳舞的曲目與遇到的角色會有所變化。最初的目標是選擇各種路線並收集角色與舞蹈。完成劇情後成果會反映出來，可製作專屬繪本，並在「繪本模式」中閱覽，也可使用一路收集的曲目與角色盡情跳舞。與傳統音樂遊戲不同，本作沒有指令操作，簡單易記、容易上手。

title_en: JAGUAR MISHIN SASHI SENYOU SOFT - MARIO FAMILY
no_intro_name: Jaguar Mishin Sashi Senyou Soft - Mario Family (Japan)
overview_en:
Contains 32 patterns of Mario family cut embroidery data such as Mario, Yoshi, Princess Peach, Wario, and Goomba
Easily embroider with Game Boy Color! !!
overview_zh:
收錄 32 種瑪利歐家族剪繡圖樣資料，包含瑪利歐、耀西、碧姬公主、瓦利歐、栗寶寶等。
用 Game Boy Color 輕鬆刺繡！！

overview_en: The main character is Tsumorou, a Gutara university student who is scheduled to graduate next spring. The major is the teacher's egg in the teaching process. The time for practical training is finally approaching for the protagonist who has been a student. However, I wanted to practice teaching differently from others, so I decided to go to two schools and do each for a week. How can we make this training fruitful ... So the hero wondered. I wanted to make a club by making the best use of mahjong, which I am good at, and build a relationship of trust with the students. If you can't get the trust in your area of ​​expertise, then the hero isn't a teacher. Will there be a demon or a snake? Okite-breaking educational training is about to begin! A dream mahjong battle with 12 characters, straddling the two worlds of the two major elf titles, "Classmate" and "Lower Classmate"! There are two game modes, a "free match mode" where you can enjoy mahjong in earnest with two or four players, and a "story mode" where you can make the other girl cosplay in various ways if you win the game. The cosplay screen scrolls all over! You can see the girl's slightly embarrassing facial expressions and gestures. If you clear "Story Mode", you can proceed to "Interleague Play" where you play mahjong with the characters of the two schools. Cosplay that cannot be seen in story mode is added.
overview_zh: 主角是預定明年春天畢業的廢柴大學生 Tsumorou，主修教育學程，是個準教師。即將進入教育實習的他，希望能與眾不同地完成實習，於是決定到兩所學校各實習一週。怎樣才能讓這次實習有所收穫……主角苦思之下，決定善用自己擅長的麻將開設社團，藉此與學生建立信賴關係。如果連自己最擅長的領域都無法獲得信賴，那他根本不是當老師的料。前方究竟是龍是蛇？破天荒的教育實習即將展開！橫跨 ELF 兩大名作《同級生》與《下級生》兩個世界、與 12 名角色進行的夢幻麻將對戰！遊戲提供「自由對戰模式」，可享受認真的二人或四人麻將；以及「劇情模式」，獲勝後可讓對方女孩進行各種 cosplay。Cosplay 畫面可全螢幕捲動！能看到女孩略帶害羞的表情與動作。通關「劇情模式」後可進入「校際對戰」，與兩校角色進行麻將對戰，並追加劇情模式中看不到的 cosplay。

overview_en: You can experience the future of racing today with JEFF GORDON XS RACING. Choose from five different cars and race on seven different tracks. You can use the Time Trial mode to get the fastest lap time possible on an empty track. In the Championship mode, you will have to race through two seasons. The first season has you racing against five other cars, and you must finish in first place overall to gain access to the second season. In the second season you will face seven other competitors, including Jeff Gordon. Win the second season, and you can challenge Gordon to a one-on-one race on any track you choose. Should your friends want in on the action, they can join you via a link cable. Get behind the wheel of a futuristic racecar and take first place in JEFF GORDON XS RACING.
overview_zh: 《JEFF GORDON XS RACING》讓你今天就體驗未來的賽車。可從五輛賽車與七條賽道中選擇。Time Trial 模式可在無人賽道上跑出最快單圈成績；Championship 模式則須跑完兩個賽季：第一賽季與五輛車競速，必須拿下總冠軍才能進入第二賽季；第二賽季有七位對手，包括 Jeff Gordon 本人。贏得第二賽季後，可挑選任一賽道與 Gordon 進行一對一對決。若朋友也想加入，可透過連線通信線連線同樂。坐上未來感賽車，奪下冠軍吧！

overview_en: Professional supercross racing comes to the Game Boy Color with JEREMY MCGRATH SUPERCROSS 2000. You can race with or against professional motocross riders like Jeremy McGrath, Travis Pastrana, Kevin Windham, Sebastian Tortelli, Jimmy Button, John Dowd, and Greg Albertyn. When you have selected the proper rider, you can race on any track in the Arcade mode. For a bigger challenge, work your way through the ranks to become champion in the 80cc, 125cc, and 150cc Seasons. In all of the races, you can gain an advantage by performing stunts to make power-ups appear, which you can collect to give you an advantage. Do you have what it takes to beat McGrath and the other professionals in JEREMY MCGRATH SUPERCROSS 2000?
overview_zh: 職業超級越野摩托車賽登陸 Game Boy Color。你可與 Jeremy McGrath、Travis Pastrana、Kevin Windham、Sebastian Tortelli、Jimmy Button、John Dowd、Greg Albertyn 等職業越野車手並肩或對抗競技。選好車手後，可在 Arcade 模式自由挑選賽道；想挑戰更大難度，則可在 80cc、125cc、150cc 賽季中一路向上爭取冠軍。比賽中可施展特技讓強化道具現身，撿取後獲得優勢。你有實力擊敗 McGrath 與其他職業選手嗎？

title_en: JET DE GO! - LET'S GO BY AIRLINER
no_intro_name: Jet de Go! - Let's Go by Airliner (Japan)
overview_en: "JET de GO!", Which was popular in PS, is now available as GBC exclusive software. You can easily enjoy the actual aviation operations from takeoff, landing, and cruising. Weather changes such as rain and snow, and flights in the evening and midnight are also beautifully reproduced. Of course, you can take off and land at real airports (New Chitose Airport, Tokyo International Airport, Komatsu Airport, Nagoya Airport, Kansai International Airport, Matsuyama Airport, Hiroshima West Airport, Fukuoka Airport, Naha Airport) through the actual route. .. The initial appearances are three models, "J-31", "B767-300", and "B747-400D". As the game progresses, the aircraft becomes available.
overview_zh: 在 PS 上廣受歡迎的《JET de GO!》以 GBC 專屬軟體再現。可輕鬆體驗起飛、降落與巡航等實際飛航操作。雨雪等天候變化以及黃昏與深夜飛行也都精美呈現。當然也能依實際航線於真實機場（新千歲、東京國際、小松、名古屋、關西國際、松山、廣島西、福岡、那霸）起降。初始機型為「J-31」、「B767-300」與「B747-400D」三款，隨遊戲進度逐步解鎖更多機型。

title_en: JIM HENSON'S BEAR IN THE BIG BLUE HOUSE
no_intro_name: Jim Henson's Bear in the Big Blue House (USA) (En,Fr,De,Es,It,Nl)
overview_en: Come spend a day of fun and discovery with Bear and all his pals as you play through delightful lessons like Pondball, Feathers, and Popcorn. The BIG BLUE HOUSE has never been this much fun!
overview_zh: 與 Bear 和他的好夥伴度過充滿樂趣與發現的一天，挑戰 Pondball、Feathers、Popcorn 等趣味學習關卡。BIG BLUE HOUSE 從未如此好玩！

overview_en: Jimmy White's Cueball is a pool game, developed by Vicarious Visions and published by Vatical Entertainment, which was released in Europe in 2000.
overview_zh: 《Jimmy White's Cueball》是一款由 Vicarious Visions 開發、Vatical Entertainment 發行的撞球遊戲，2000 年於歐洲推出。

title_en: JINSEI GAME - TOMODACHI TAKUSAN TSUKUROU YO!
no_intro_name: Jinsei Game - Tomodachi Takusan Tsukurou yo! (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Players create their own characters with montages (400,000 face patterns) and start with a baby. While growing "intellect," "physical strength," "sense," and "morality," clear life events such as going on to school, getting a job, and getting married, and aim to become a millionaire. Up to 50 characters created by the player can be registered and exchanged with a communication cable. In addition, you can enjoy "today's fortune-telling" and "compatibility fortune-telling" using the registered character data, and you can print it out with a pocket printer.
overview_zh: 玩家可使用拼貼方式（40 萬種臉部組合）創造專屬角色，從嬰兒時期開始遊戲。在培育「智力」、「體力」、「感性」與「品德」的同時，完成升學、就業、結婚等人生大事，朝百萬富翁邁進。最多可登錄 50 名玩家自創角色，並能透過通信線與他人交換。也可使用已登錄的角色資料享受「今日運勢」與「速配占卜」，並透過口袋印表機列印出來。

title_en: JORYUU JANSHI NI CHOUSEN GB - WATASHI-TACHI NI CHOUSEN SHITENE!
no_intro_name: Joryuu Janshi ni Chousen GB - Watashi-tachi ni Chousen Shitene! (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: JumpStart: Dino Adventure Field Trip is an Action game, developed by Digital Illusions and published by Knowledge Adventure Inc., which was released in 2001.
overview_zh: 《JumpStart: Dino Adventure Field Trip》是一款動作遊戲，由 Digital Illusions 開發、Knowledge Adventure Inc. 發行，2001 年推出。

title_en: JUNGLE BOOK, THE - MOWGLI'S WILD ADVENTURE
no_intro_name: Jungle Book, The - Mowgli's Wild Adventure (USA) (En,Fr,De,Es,It)
Juukou Senki Bullet Battlers (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: A role-playing game in which you control a huge armed warrior "Bullet Butler" and seek the legendary "Ultra-Ancient Butler" in a different world "Alha Raus". We will proceed with the "collecting" and "raising" games of butlers with their own characteristics. Butler has a variety of shapes and abilities such as human type, insect type, animal type, marine life type, fantasy monster type, and dinosaur type. You can also search for hidden "rare" butlers, exchange data, and play against each other. As Butler grows up, he will speak to the player.
overview_zh: 操作巨大武裝戰士「Bullet Butler」，於異世界「Alha Raus」尋找傳說中的「超古代 Butler」的角色扮演遊戲。玩家將進行各具特色的 Butler「收集」與「養成」。Butler 形態與能力多樣，包括人型、昆蟲型、動物型、海洋生物型、奇幻怪物型、恐龍型等。也可挖掘隱藏的「稀有」Butler，與他人交換資料或對戰。Butler 成長後會與玩家對話。

overview_en: Supervised by JBC (Japan Boxing Association). The boxing life is beautifully reproduced in the game. Steady practice is a training simulation, and the game is a real-time action that actually operates the trained boxer. You can create and select your favorite boxer, and there are countless boxer creation patterns such as height, class, and face. It's up to the player to take advantage of their abilities and to train to reinforce their weaknesses. Not only the basic movements of boxing, but also the special moves unique to the game are hidden.
overview_zh: 由 JBC（日本拳擊協會）監修，將拳擊手的職業生涯精彩重現於遊戲中。穩紮穩打的練習採訓練模擬，比賽則是即時動作，操作親手培育的拳擊手。可創建並選擇自己喜愛的拳擊手，身高、量級、臉部等創角組合多到數不清。如何發揮優勢、彌補弱點，全憑玩家拿捏。除了拳擊基本動作之外，遊戲還暗藏專屬的特殊招式。

overview_en: The monster hunting tournament, a specialty of the Kingdom of Iraldi, was held for the first time in five years. Of course, the main character Kevin aims only for the championship. The rules are simple! All you have to do is go through a pitch-black dungeon and defeat the monsters. However, in addition to seeing only a limited view in the dungeon, the attack is a turn system with a time limit. Therefore, the first step to victory is to devise a strategy by believing in your own intuition and as much time as you can. If you defeat a monster, you can get Montaku as proof. , You can take out a special ability called Montaku skill from Montaku, and you will power up by acquiring it. With infrared communication, you can compare your friends with Montak.
overview_zh: Iraldi 王國的特色活動「怪物狩獵大賽」時隔五年再度舉辦。當然，主角 Kevin 的目標只有冠軍。規則很簡單：穿越漆黑地下城並擊敗怪物。然而，地下城視野有限，攻擊也採有時間限制的回合制。因此，相信自己的直覺，並善用有限時間制定策略，是勝利的第一步。擊敗怪物後可取得 Montaku 作為證明，從中也能取出名為 Montaku Skill 的特殊能力，獲得後便能強化自己。透過紅外線通信，也可與朋友比較自己的 Montaku。

title_en: KAKUTOU RYOURI DENSETSU BISTRO RECIPE - GEKITOU FOODON BATTLE HEN
no_intro_name: Kakutou Ryouri Densetsu Bistro Recipe - Gekitou Foodon Battle Hen (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

title_en: KAKUTOU RYOURI DENSETSU BISTRO RECIPE - KETTOU BISTGARM HEN
no_intro_name: Kakutou Ryouri Densetsu Bistro Recipe - Kettou Bistgarm Hen (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: Difficulty can be set at a level based on the Kanji Kentei from 7 balls to 2nd grade. The flow of the game can be played according to tasks, characters can be introduced, and children and adults can enjoy learning. Various other mini games are also available. There are also introductions to the Kanji Kentei and mock exams, which support players. The player starts after selecting the stage to challenge (6 stages in total).
overview_zh: 難度可依漢字檢定 7 級至 2 級設定。遊戲流程可依任務進行，並導入角色介紹，兒童與大人皆能愉快學習。另收錄各式迷你遊戲。並提供漢字檢定介紹與模擬考，輔助玩家。玩家在挑選關卡（共 6 關）後即可開始。

overview_en: Learning software supervised by the Japan Kanji Aptitude Testing Foundation. Learning software that is constructed based on questions that were actually asked in the past. This time, we have added "Children's Kanji Kentei Mode" and "Semi-Second Grade" for elementary school students and foreigners, and renewed a mini-game using kanji that can be played to take a break from the game. If you use a communication cable, you can play with your friends in the Kanji fast-press problem.
overview_zh: 由日本漢字能力檢定協會監修的學習軟體。以歷年實際出題的題目為基礎建構而成。本次新增「兒童漢字檢定模式」與「準二級」，提供小學生與外國學習者使用，並更新可用於休息時的漢字迷你遊戲。使用通信線時，還可與朋友進行漢字搶答對戰。

overview_en: The third installment of "Kanji BOY" that makes you smarter while playing games. The number of questions recorded is over 7,000! As you play, you will naturally acquire kanji. There are two game modes. There is a "existing question collection mode" where you can play the exams from the 2nd to 10th grades that have been asked in the past, and a "mini game mode" where you can get idioms about your body, health, animals, and living.
overview_zh: 《Kanji BOY》系列第三作，邊玩邊變聰明。收錄題目超過 7000 題！只要持續遊玩，自然就能掌握漢字。提供兩種遊戲模式：「歷屆考題模式」可挑戰 2 級至 10 級的歷年實際題目，「迷你遊戲模式」可學習與身體、健康、動物、生活相關的成語。

overview_en: You can enjoy the world of puzzle game magazines published in various ways on GB. Most of the kanji to be asked are 1006 kanji learned in the 1st to 6th grades of elementary school. Acquire perfect while playing antonyms, synonyms, stroke order, okurigana, homophones and idioms. There are four types of games: Kanji quiz "Spartan Z", Kanji crossword "Kankuro", "Kanji puzzle", and original puzzle "Elephant Dragon". It can also be used as a kanji learning tool for children from general education.
overview_zh: 可在 GB 上享受各種益智雜誌的世界。出題的漢字大多為小學一至六年級習得的 1006 個漢字。一邊玩反義詞、同義詞、筆順、送假名、同音字與成語，一邊精通漢字。共四種遊戲：漢字猜謎「Spartan Z」、漢字填字「Kankuro」、「漢字拼圖」與原創益智「Elephant Dragon」。也可作為一般小學兒童的漢字學習工具。

no_intro_name: Karamuchou wa Oosawagi! - Okawari! (Japan) (SGB Enhanced, GB Compatible) (NP)

title_en: KARAMUCHOU WA OOSAWAGI! - POLINKIES TO OKASHINA NAKAMA-TACHI
no_intro_name: Karamuchou wa Oosawagi! - Polinkies to Okashina Nakama-tachi (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

title_en: KASEKI SOUSEI REBORN II - MONSTER DIGGER
no_intro_name: Kaseki Sousei Reborn II - Monster Digger (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: On that day, I set foot on "Hokora", which has long been said not to be entered. According to a strange doctor who lives in the town, a mysterious underground world inhabited by unknown creatures spreads out beyond the hole of "Hokora", and fossils with life are buried in it ...・. Apparently, the guy next door, who is always fighting, went looking for a legendary monster. "Let's lose! I'm going on an adventure with courage!" At that time, the doctor's words came to my mind. "Without the power of friendship, you can't know the world ..." The fossil excavation game is back! Collect the fossil fragments buried in the dungeon and revive the monsters on the Lab's Reborn Machine. Various monsters can be created depending on the attributes and combinations of fossils. Some monsters evolve when the parameters of a specific character exceed a certain value. Strategicity has increased due to the advantages and disadvantages of the character's orientation, the compatibility between attributes, and the character's "friendship parameter". You can exchange monsters with a communication cable, or use a pocket printer to seal monsters.
overview_zh: 那一天，我踏進了長久以來被禁止進入的「Hokora」。據住在鎮上的怪博士所言，「Hokora」洞口的另一端，藏著一個棲息著未知生物的神秘地下世界，那裡埋藏著仍有生命的化石……。據說隔壁那位總是與我較勁的傢伙，已經跑去尋找傳說中的怪物了。「不能輸！我要鼓起勇氣去冒險！」那時博士的話浮現腦海：「沒有友情的力量，就無法看見這個世界……」化石發掘遊戲再度回歸！蒐集埋在地下城的化石碎片，用實驗室的 Reborn Machine 復活怪物。依化石屬性與組合可創造各種怪物，部分怪物在特定數值超過一定值時會進化。角色性格的優劣、屬性相剋與「友情參數」等要素提升了戰略性。可透過通信線交換怪物，亦可使用口袋印表機封存怪物。

no_intro_name: Katou Hifumi Kudan - Shougi Kyoushitsu (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
Kawa no Nushi Tsuri 4 (Japan) (Rumble Version) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
Kawaii Pet Shop Monogatari (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: A new sense RPG that raises pets while running a pet shop. The protagonist runs a pet shop on behalf of a sick grandmother and searches for a remedy for her. Pet shops can receive rewards if they receive requests from customers (want pets, deposit pets, pet medicine, etc.) and clear them by the deadline. Pets can be raised at the ranch in the pet shop, and the raised pets can participate in competitions (comparison of strength, foot race, etc.). Including the remedy for grandma, the medicine finds and formulates the ingredients by itself.
overview_zh: 一邊經營寵物店、一邊飼養寵物的新感覺 RPG。主角代替生病的奶奶經營寵物店，並尋找治療奶奶的方法。寵物店接受顧客委託（想要寵物、寄放寵物、寵物用藥等），在期限內完成即可獲得報酬。寵物可在店內牧場飼養，並參加比賽（比力氣、賽跑等）。包含奶奶的藥在內，藥物的成分需自行尋找與調配。

overview_en: The second pet breeding RP game with very cute animals. The player manages the requests of customers who visit the pet shop well. Customers' requests include pet capture, custody, breeding, and drug preparation. The number of pets has increased from 38 in the previous work to 60. Lots of cute mammals to unusual reptiles. There are also 10 types of competitions such as disc catch competitions, gliding competitions, and diving competitions that test the abilities of the pets that have been raised. You can use the communication function to hold competitions and exchange pets.
overview_zh: 充滿可愛動物的寵物養成 RPG 第二作。玩家妥善處理光顧寵物店的客人各種委託，包括捕捉、寄放、飼養與調配藥品等。寵物數量從前作的 38 種增加至 60 種，從可愛哺乳類到稀有爬蟲類應有盡有。還有飛盤接接看、滑翔競賽、潛水比賽等 10 種考驗養成成果的競賽。也可透過通信功能舉辦競賽或交換寵物。

overview_en: Keep the balance! is a puzzle game, where you have to balance a big weighing scale. The longer it stays in balance the more point you gain. To do this, you have a catapult at your disposal, the objects you need to use to balance the scale are given to you by conveyor belt. One on the left and one on the right. But these objects differ in weight, so you must carefully choose the scales bucket you're going to put the objects in. To make things worse, all kinds of trouble appear on screen to make it just a little bit more challenging. Like crocodiles that eat object or jokers that throw around playing cards offsetting your carefully balance scale. The game stages 5 different game worlds each divided into 16 levels.
overview_zh: 《Keep the Balance!》是一款益智遊戲，要設法維持一座大型天平的平衡。維持平衡時間越長，獲得的分數越多。你可以使用一台彈射器，左右各一條輸送帶會送來必須用來保持平衡的物件。但物件重量不一，必須仔細選擇要放入哪一側秤盤。更糟的是，畫面中還會出現各種搗亂的角色，例如吞食物件的鱷魚或丟撲克牌打亂平衡的小丑，增加挑戰難度。遊戲共有 5 個世界，每個世界 16 關。

no_intro_name: Keitai Denjuu Telefang - Power Version (Japan) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
2020. One of the most popular games for children who had few places to play was to use their mobile phones to go to the electric beast world and make friends with them. Since I get a phone number from Denju as a proof of my friend, making friends with a stronger Denju has begun to become a new status. In order to make friends with stronger electric beasts, children enter the inner part of the electric beast world, but there are electric beasts that have not yet come into contact with humans in the inner part, and the electric beast that is the bodyguard of the children Children are enthusiastic about fighting! A new boy / girl called "Denju Tsukai" has appeared, and the Denju boom has reached its climax. The main character, Shigeki, lived a life unrelated to such an electric beast boom, but decided to go to the electric beast world with the appearance of one electric beast. A new sensation RPG that makes full use of the functions of mobile phones to clear the game by turning "Keitai Denju Telefang" serialized in Comic BomBom into a game. The main character is Shigeki, a boy who longs for "T. Fanger" who uses electric beasts (monsters). The purpose is to battle with Denju, get the phone number of Denju, make friends with many Denju, and complete the address book of Denju. The point of the game progress is how to communicate with the electric beasts and humans and deepen the bond. If you use a communication cable, you can battle with your friends. If you win, you can get the phone number of the other party's Denju, but if you lose, your Denju's phone number will be erased from the memory. The power version and the speed version have different electric beasts.

The game was not released in English, and is best known among English audiences for the a bootlegged game version which was hacked and sold as a fake Pokémon game.
overview_zh:
2020 年。沒有什麼地方可玩的孩子們之間，最流行的玩法之一就是用手機前往電獸世界，與電獸結為朋友。由於與電獸成為朋友後可獲得對方的電話號碼作為證明，因此和更強的電獸交朋友逐漸成為新的身份象徵。為了與更強的電獸結交，孩子們深入電獸世界內部，但內部仍有未與人類接觸過的電獸，作為孩子們護衛的電獸便會奮戰應戰！號稱「電獸使」的新世代少年少女登場，電獸熱潮達到巔峰。主角茂與這股熱潮無緣，但因一隻電獸的出現，他決定動身前往電獸世界。本作是充分活用手機功能、將《Comic BomBom》連載漫畫《Keitai Denjuu Telefang》遊戲化的全新感覺 RPG。主角茂嚮往使用電獸（怪獸）的「T. Fanger」。目標是與電獸戰鬥、取得電獸的電話號碼，與眾多電獸結為朋友，完成電獸的通訊錄。遊戲推進的關鍵在於如何與電獸及人類溝通並加深羈絆。使用通信線可與朋友對戰，獲勝可取得對方電獸的電話號碼，但若戰敗自己電獸的號碼會從記憶中消失。Power 版與 Speed 版登場的電獸不同。

本作未發行英文版，在英文圈最為人知的是被改造後冒充寶可夢販售的盜版。

no_intro_name: Keitai Denjuu Telefang - Speed Version (Japan) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
2020. One of the most popular games for children who had few places to play was to use their mobile phones to go to the electric beast world and make friends with them. Since I get a phone number from Denju as a proof of my friend, making friends with a stronger Denju has begun to become a new status. A new boy / girl called "Denju Tsukai" has appeared, and the Denju boom has reached its climax. The main character, Shigeki, lived a life unrelated to such an electric beast boom, but decided to go to the electric beast world with the appearance of one electric beast. The game was not released in English, and is best known among English audiences for the a bootlegged game version which was hacked and sold as a fake Pokémon game.

overview_en: All of the action of professional baseball has been shrunk and put on the Game Boy Color with KEN GRIFFEY JR.'S SLUGFEST. You can play as any Major League team, complete with real players. Once you have the right team, play an Exhibition game to work on putting all aspects of the game together. If you want some extended competition, play a 26, 78, or 162 game Season, during which all of the performance stats for each player are tracked. If you don't want to deal with the ups and downs of a Season, skip right to the World Series and try to win it all. And if you don't have time for a full game, see how many dingers you can hit in the Home Run Derby. Will you be able to handle the pressures of professional baseball? The only way to find out is to play KEN GRIFFEY JR.'S SLUGFEST.
overview_zh: 職業棒球的精彩動作完整濃縮在 Game Boy Color 上。你可以選擇任何大聯盟球隊，球員陣容皆為實際選手。挑好球隊後，可進行表演賽磨合各方面戰術。想要長期競爭，可挑戰 26、78 或 162 場的賽季模式，每位球員的成績都會被詳實記錄。若不想經歷漫長的賽季起伏，可直接跳入世界大賽爭奪冠軍。沒時間打完整場比賽，則可挑戰 Home Run Derby 看你能擊出幾支全壘打。你能否承受職棒的壓力？只有實際遊玩才能知曉。

title_en: KETTOU TRANSFORMERS BEAST WARS - BEAST SENSHI SAIKYOU KETTEISEN
no_intro_name: Kettou Transformers Beast Wars - Beast Senshi Saikyou Ketteisen (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

title_en: KIDOU SENKAN NADESICO - RURI RURI MAHJONG
no_intro_name: Kidou Senkan Nadesico - Ruri Ruri Mahjong (Japan)

title_en: KINDAICHI SHOUNEN NO JIKENBO - 10 NENME NO SHOUTAIJOU
no_intro_name: Kindaichi Shounen no Jikenbo - 10 Nenme no Shoutaijou (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: A simple human figure drawn only with circles and lines. It's like a tree branch and hangs its neck. Below that eerie picture is a short message. "Wait at Shiomiso" That was the letter received by Akira Kawai, a freshman at Fudo High School. A letter whose sender and purpose are unknown. Is it just a prank? Or ...! ?? A detective novel game based on "The Kindaichi Case Files" serialized in Weekly Shonen Magazine. The player solves the serial murder case that occurred at the pension "Shiomiso" with the Kindaichi boy and the mysterious case that occurred 10 years ago while deciding the options. Of course, it is equipped with multi-scenario and multi-ending. Equipped with an "investigation mode" in which the scenario changes depending on how the player listens to the investigation, and an "operation status comment system" in which Akechi police evaluates the player's procedure with plenty of dislike. The scenario reading rate and scenario recollection mode are also adopted. Let's find the criminal in the name of Jichan!
overview_zh: 一張只用圓圈與線條畫成的簡單人形，像是樹枝吊著脖子。詭異圖案下方是一行短訊：「在汐見莊等你」。這是不動高中一年級新生川井明收到的信，寄件人與目的不明。是惡作劇？還是……！？本作是改編自《週刊少年 Magazine》連載作品《金田一少年事件簿》的偵探小說遊戲。玩家在決定選項的同時，與金田一少年一同破解汐見莊的連續殺人案，以及十年前發生的神秘事件。當然具備多重劇情與多重結局。配備依玩家詢問方式改變劇情走向的「調查模式」，以及由明智警官嚴厲評價玩家辦案手法的「操作評語系統」。並導入劇情閱讀率與劇情回顧模式。以「爺爺的名義」找出真兇吧！

title_en: KINNIKU BANZUKE GB 2 - MEZASE! MUSCLE CHAMPION
no_intro_name: Kinniku Banzuke GB 2 - Mezase! Muscle Champion (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

title_en: KINNIKU BANZUKE GB 3 - SHINSEIKI SURVIVAL RETSUDEN!
no_intro_name: Kinniku Banzuke GB 3 - Shinseiki Survival Retsuden! (Japan)
overview_en: The third in the GB series! The software is exclusively for GBC, and the graphics are more realistic and upgraded. Equipped with "SASUKE2000" that was aired as a special in the fall of 2000. Of course, there are also hidden competitions that are popular in the series, such as "Service Ace," "Power Force," "Super Shot," "Spray Hitter," and "Struck Out Bingo." Including the familiar Kane Kosugi, unique original players only for the game have also appeared! There are plenty of competitions where friends can play against each other with communication cable support, and new rules will expand the play.
overview_zh: GB 系列第三作！本作為 GBC 專屬軟體，畫面更具真實感並全面升級。收錄 2000 年秋季特別節目播出的「SASUKE2000」。當然也包含系列人氣競技項目的隱藏關卡，如「Service Ace」、「Power Force」、「Super Shot」、「Spray Hitter」、「Struck Out Bingo」等。除了熟悉的小杉健之外，還登場了遊戲限定的原創獨特選手！通信線對戰可讓朋友之間競技，新規則也擴大了遊戲的玩法。

title_en: KINNIKU BANZUKE GB - CHOUSENSHA WA KIMIDA!
no_intro_name: Kinniku Banzuke GB - Chousensha wa Kimida! (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en:
his is an extensive hack of Kirby’s Dream Land 2 that provides support for the Game Boy Color, fully colorizing every visual asset of the game while also enhancing the overall experience.

FEATURES BREAKDOWN
    Full Colorization - All backgrounds, tilesets, and sprites have been fully colorized, taking full advantage of the GBC’s graphics capabilities.
    Extra Visual Snazz - Smoother fade effects, some color animation, and other little details to push the hardware just a bit more.
    Slowdown Eliminated - The GBC’s double speed mode is enabled to diminish virtually any lag present in the original game.
    All-new Settings Menu - Change the Status Bar Color, toggle color animation in the Status Bar, or toggle the Animal Friends’ BGMs interrupting the level music.
    SGB Support Intact - Play with the SGB border enabled in emulators that support the unofficial “SGB+GBC” mode.
overview_zh:
這是《卡比之夢幻島 2》的大規模改版，新增 Game Boy Color 支援，將遊戲所有視覺資源全面上色，並提升整體體驗。

特色一覽
    全面上色－所有背景、tileset 與 sprite 都已完整上色，充分發揮 GBC 的繪圖能力。
    視覺強化－更平滑的淡入淡出效果、部分色彩動畫，以及其他將硬體性能再推進一些的小細節。
    消除緩慢－啟用 GBC 的雙倍速度模式，幾乎消除原版遊戲的延遲。
    全新設定選單－可變更狀態列顏色、開關狀態列色彩動畫，或開關動物夥伴的 BGM 蓋過關卡音樂。
    保留 SGB 支援－在支援非官方「SGB+GBC」模式的模擬器上，可在啟用 SGB 邊框下遊玩。

overview_en:
Just like Legend of Zelda: Link’s Awakening DX and Tetris DX, Dream Land DX is a port of the monochrome Gameboy game to the Gameboy color. Experience Masahiro Sakurai’s first game in an all new light.

The gluttonous King Dedede has stolen all of the food from the inhabitants of Dream Land for a midnight feast, so Kirby, a resident of Dream Land, goes to retrieve the food and stop Dedede. Kirby's Dream Land plays like other platformers of the 8-bit and 16-bit era of video games: Kirby must use various natural abilities and occasionally external abilities or items while heading toward the goal at the end of each level. Like many 1980s-era platformers, the player can accumulate points, with an extra life granted when the player has enough points. However, because Kirby lacks a save function, scores are not recorded. Also, there are no save files, so the player has to start over again when the Game Boy is turned off, if the player chooses to return to the title screen after a Game Over, or if the player resets the game. All levels are played on a two-dimensional plane, letting Kirby move only left, right, up, and down. Kirby can walk, jump, and fly. Kirby can also inhale objects and enemies, swallowing them or spitting them out as projectiles.
overview_zh:
如同《薩爾達傳說：織夢島 DX》與《俄羅斯方塊 DX》一樣，《Dream Land DX》是將單色 Game Boy 遊戲移植到 Game Boy Color 上的版本。以全新色彩體驗櫻井政博的處女作。

貪吃的迪迪大王偷走了夢幻島居民所有的食物，準備舉行深夜大餐，於是夢幻島居民卡比出發奪回食物並阻止迪迪大王。《卡比之夢幻島》玩法類似 8 位元、16 位元時代的其他平台動作遊戲：卡比必須運用各種天生能力，偶爾搭配外部能力或道具，闖向每關終點。如同許多 1980 年代的平台遊戲，玩家可累積分數，達一定分數即獲得額外機會。但因卡比沒有存檔功能，分數並不會記錄。也沒有存檔，因此 Game Boy 關機、Game Over 後返回標題畫面或重置遊戲時，玩家都必須從頭來過。所有關卡皆於二維平面進行，卡比只能左右上下移動。卡比可以走、跳、飛，也能吸入物體與敵人，吞下或當作彈丸吐出。

overview_en:
Kirby Tilt 'n' Tumble is a 2001 Game Boy Color video game developed by Nintendo R&D2 and HAL Laboratory and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on April 9, 2001.

Peacefully sleeping in his Dream Land, Kirby drifts lazily amongst the beauty of the sky. A beauty that King Dedede cannot abide with. Jealous of the sky's wondrous splendor, King Dedede has acquired a tool that will let him steal the night's stars, plunging the world into eternal drab daylight. When Kirby awoke, he found that it was still daytime. And evermore, it would be daytime, unless Kirby made the journey to find King Dedede and recover the stars to restore the night's sky. So begins the latest Kirby adventure, another action adventure with the morphing marshmallow in a strange fantasy world. However, the one thing separating this latest adventure is the control scheme. Here, you don't control Kirby directly. Instead, you guide Kirby by tipping your system to roll the little round pink puff through a series of mazes. If you get in a jam you can make Kirby jump by a controller press, and Kirby can still acquire weapons from other enemies, but the real skill is using the tilting to your advantage.
overview_zh:
《Kirby Tilt 'n' Tumble》是 2001 年由 Nintendo R&D2 與 HAL Laboratory 開發、北美任天堂於 2001 年 4 月 9 日在美國發行的 Game Boy Color 遊戲。

卡比在夢幻島悠閒地飄盪於美麗的天空中睡覺。但這份美景讓迪迪大王看不順眼。對天空的壯麗深感嫉妒的迪迪大王，取得了一件能偷走夜晚星辰的工具，要讓世界永遠陷入單調的白晝。卡比醒來時發現天還是亮著，而且若不出發找到迪迪大王並奪回星辰，世界將永遠是白天。卡比的最新冒險就此展開，這位棉花糖般的角色再度於奇幻世界展開動作冒險。然而本作最大的不同在於操作方式：玩家不直接操作卡比，而是傾斜主機，讓粉紅小圓球在迷宮中滾動。卡住時可按鈕讓卡比跳起，仍可從敵人身上奪取武器，但真正的關鍵是善用傾斜操作。

overview_en: Kirikou is a 2001 platform video game based upon the 1998 French film Kirikou and the Sorceress. It was developed by Étranges Libellules for the PlayStation, Planet Interactive for the Game Boy Color and Krysalide for Microsoft Windows. It was published Wanadoo.
overview_zh: 《Kirikou》是一款 2001 年的平台遊戲，改編自 1998 年的法國電影《Kirikou and the Sorceress》。PlayStation 版由 Étranges Libellules 開發、Game Boy Color 版由 Planet Interactive 開發、Microsoft Windows 版由 Krysalide 開發，並由 Wanadoo 發行。

overview_en: The second in the Kisekae series! This time, the contents include all fashionable items, including accessories and hair arrangements. You can get various types of clothes such as casual, street, and romantic, and you can combine them freely. Of course, special clothes are also available! In addition to face makeup, pierced earrings, rings, cuticles, etc. have also appeared, and hair can be arranged at the beauty salon. Six boys and four girls will appear, and the drama will develop in a fun high school life. Various events such as clubs and school events occur. If you go on a date with your favorite boy ...
overview_zh: Kisekae 系列第二作！本次內容包含飾品、髮型等所有時尚單品。可取得休閒、街頭、浪漫等多種服飾，自由搭配組合。當然也有特別服裝！除了臉部彩妝外，還新增耳環、戒指、美甲等，髮型也可在美髮沙龍中變化。登場 6 名男生與 4 名女生，將在愉快的高中生活中展開劇情，發生社團與校園活動等各種事件。如果與心儀的男生約會……

overview_en: The Kisekae series following "Kisekae Monogatari" and "Fashionable Diary". In the game, I go to a ham school to study and challenge a vocational exam. If you pass the desired occupation, you can get clothes suitable for that occupation. There are more than 100,000 combinations of coordination, more than 10 times the previous work! Moreover, boy characters can also be played. You can also strengthen the communication function to make friends' characters appear and enjoy e-mails and bulletin boards. Personality fortune-telling is classified into 64 patterns, so the probability of hitting it may be high!
overview_zh: 繼《Kisekae Monogatari》與《Oshare Nikki》之後的 Kisekae 系列作品。在遊戲中前往倉鼠學校學習並挑戰職業考試。通過心儀職業的考試後，可取得適合該職業的服飾。搭配組合超過 10 萬種，是前作的 10 倍以上！而且也可操作男生角色。透過強化的通信功能，可讓朋友的角色登場，享受電子郵件與留言板。性格占卜可分為 64 種類型，命中率或許很高！

overview_en: KLAX - It's simple in concept and easy to play. Catch the colored tiles with the paddle and flip them into bins to make same colored stacks, diagonals and rows of three. Sounds easy? It is. The hard part is pulling yourself away from this fun and addictive game!
overview_zh: 《KLAX》概念簡單、容易上手。用板子接住彩色方塊，翻入格子中組成相同顏色的縱列、對角線或橫排。聽起來簡單？確實如此。難的是要從這款好玩又上癮的遊戲中抽身！

overview_en: KLUSTAR takes TETRIS and twists it around. Rather than moving falling pieces, you must move and rotate a group of pieces that is stuck together. The goal is to get the moving pieces to stick together, forming a solid square of blocks. One that is done, the square disappears and the remaining pieces collapse inward, creating more room to maneuver. If you miss a piece, it will stick to the sides of the play area and cannot be removed. The game ends when the cluster of pieces becomes so big that it cannot fit into the screen. With 16 skill levels, the degree of challenge is always appropriate. If friends want to join the action, they can via a link cable. See how long you can last in KLUSTAR.
overview_zh: 《KLUSTAR》將《俄羅斯方塊》翻轉重塑。你不是移動掉落的方塊，而是移動並旋轉一整團黏在一起的方塊。目標是讓移動中的方塊互相黏合，組成完整的方形方塊團。一旦組成方形便會消失，剩餘方塊向內塌縮，騰出更多操作空間。錯過的方塊會黏在遊戲區邊緣，無法移除。當方塊團大到無法塞進畫面時，遊戲結束。提供 16 種難度，挑戰程度始終合適。朋友想加入時可透過通信線連線。看你能在《KLUSTAR》中撐多久。

title_en: KNIGHTS OF THE ZODIAC - THE PHOENIX RETURNS
no_intro_name: Knights of the Zodiac - The Phoenix Returns
overview_en:
The knights always appear when evil tries to harm the world, the zodiac knights come to the GameBoy Color in this fan made with love for all the fans.

Relive your childhood imagining what it would have been like to have a title like this in your time.
overview_zh:
聖鬥士總在邪惡危害世界時現身，這款由粉絲傾心製作的同人作品讓黃道十二宮聖鬥士登陸 Game Boy Color，獻給所有粉絲。

重溫童年想像－如果當年就有這樣一款遊戲該有多好。

overview_en: Professional boxing comes to the Game Boy Color with KNOCKOUT KINGS. Choose from 38 professional boxers from all weight classes including Evander Holyfield, Ike Quartey, Lennox Lewis, Michael Moore, Shane Mosley, Oscar De La Hoya, "Sugar" Ray Leonard, and Muhammad Ali. For some quick action, choose any two boxers and enter an Arcade match. Arcade matches are less realistic and can result in quick knockouts. However, you can also choose to play in a simulation Exhibition match, where you must master ring strategies and wear down your opponent. If you are looking for a real challenge, create a boxer and fight through the ranks and become world champion. KNOCKOUT KINGS brings the subtlety of the sweet science to your handheld, without having pay outrageous pay-per-view prices.
overview_zh: 職業拳擊登陸 Game Boy Color。可從 38 名各量級職業拳手中選擇，包括 Evander Holyfield、Ike Quartey、Lennox Lewis、Michael Moore、Shane Mosley、Oscar De La Hoya、「Sugar」Ray Leonard 與 Muhammad Ali。想快速上手，可挑兩名拳手進行 Arcade 比賽。Arcade 模式較不寫實，可能很快出現 KO。也可選擇模擬式表演賽，必須掌握場內戰術並消耗對手體力。想要真正的挑戰，可自創拳手，一路打上世界冠軍。本作將拳擊運動的細膩之處帶到掌機上，免去高昂的付費觀賽費用。

title_en: KOENIG DER LOEWEN, DER - SIMBAS GROSSES ABENTEUER
no_intro_name: Koenig der Loewen, Der - Simbas grosses Abenteuer (Germany)

overview_en:

4 great games to choose from!
More Konami classic games coming soon.

-Gradius

-Castlevania II: Belmont's Revenge
-Yie Ar Kung-Fu
