overview_zh:
在 Game Boy 上享受 Konami 的經典作品。
收錄 4 款精選遊戲！
更多 Konami 經典即將推出。

-Gradius II
-Castlevania II: Belmont's Revenge
-Yie Ar Kung-Fu
-Antarctic Adventure

overview_en: Take part in all your favourite winter sports from the palm of your hand with 8 of the most popular events including snowboarding, skiing, speed skating and bobsleigh.
overview_zh: 在掌心享受最受歡迎的冬季運動，收錄 8 種熱門項目，包括滑雪板、滑雪、競速滑冰與雪橇。

overview_en: A breeding RPG that raises larvae and creates strong genomic insects. The period for raising larvae is 20 days. The type after becoming an adult changes depending on the type of food and training (mini game). When you become an adult, go on a journey to fight killer insects and level up. Three genomic insects participate in the battle. When you fight and defeat the enemy, it is recorded in the insect picture book. There are 97 types of insects. You can play against your friend's insects using the communication cable.
overview_zh: 飼育幼蟲、培育出強大基因昆蟲的養成 RPG。幼蟲飼育期為 20 天，依餵食種類與訓練（迷你遊戲）不同，成蟲後的型態也會改變。羽化為成蟲後便可踏上旅程，與兇猛害蟲戰鬥升級。每場戰鬥可派出 3 隻基因昆蟲。打倒敵人後會記錄至昆蟲圖鑑，共 97 種昆蟲。可使用通信線與朋友的昆蟲對戰。

overview_en: The second installment of Dr. Insect. The player goes out to collect insects with his companion character. Items can be obtained by clearing a number of waiting events, and all 255 types of insects living in the field will be caught to complete the insect pictorial book. You can raise the caught insects, participate in the competition to win the championship, enjoy the auction, and play freely. You can exchange insects with your friends via communication.
overview_zh: 《Dr. Insect》第二作。玩家與夥伴角色一同外出採集昆蟲。完成多項待辦事件可取得道具，目標是捕捉野外棲息的全部 255 種昆蟲完成圖鑑。捕到的昆蟲可以飼養、參加比賽爭奪冠軍、出席拍賣會等自由遊玩。成功飼育的昆蟲將登錄圖鑑。可透過通信與朋友交換昆蟲。

overview_en: A game that focuses on "the fun of finding and catching insects" by collecting insects that live in mountains and rivers in various ways. Take on the challenge of collecting insects by making full use of various actions such as crouching, dashing, catching hats, and catching directly above! Collected insects can be bred at home or exhibited at fairs. Insects that have been successfully bred will be recorded in the picture book. You can exchange insects with your friends by using a communication cable.
overview_zh: 聚焦於「尋找與捕捉昆蟲的樂趣」，蒐集棲息於山間溪流等各處的昆蟲。靈活運用蹲下、衝刺、戴帽捕蟲、正上方捕捉等動作，挑戰昆蟲蒐集！採集到的昆蟲可在家中飼養或於展覽會上展出，成功飼育的昆蟲會登錄圖鑑。可使用通信線與朋友交換昆蟲。

overview_en: Las Vegas is the gambling capital of the world. Every game in the world has some kind of action in Sin City. Now you can travel to Vegas and try to win some virtual dollars in LAS VEGAS COOL HAND. Play three classic card games: Blackjack, Solitaire, and Cribbage. All of the games have four different variations to play. In Blackjack, the goal is to get as close to 21 as possible without going over, while also beating the dealer's hand. Solitaire has the player trying to place stacks of cards in order and removing the cards one by one. The goal in Cribbage is to be the first person to score 121 points. Take a trip to sin city and try to break the bank in LAS VEGAS COOL HAND.
overview_zh: 拉斯維加斯是世界賭博之都，世上每一種賭博遊戲在這座罪惡之城都找得到。現在你也能前往維加斯，在《LAS VEGAS COOL HAND》贏取虛擬鈔票。可遊玩三款經典紙牌：21 點、接龍與 Cribbage，每款各有 4 種變化版本。21 點的目標是儘量逼近 21 點而不爆，並擊敗莊家；接龍要將牌依序疊好並逐一移除；Cribbage 則是看誰先取得 121 分。前往罪惡之城，挑戰把莊家口袋掏空吧。

overview_en: Take a little trip around the world for grueling, 24-hour race action. Based on the annual racing series that takes place in the south of France, this version will lead you from Toronto to Detroit, to the peaks of Everest. Take your pick from 10 real racing vehicles, like the Nissan R390 and the BMW V12VMR. With more than 10 courses to race on, you'll certainly have your work cut out for you. Along the tour, you'll use oil slicks, engine upgrades, invincibility power-ups, and more to get an edge on the competition. The better you do, the more cars you'll be able to unlock, and thereby improving your chances of taking the cup. There are three different play modes: Le Mans pits you against tough competition in a real Le Mans circuit; Championship takes you through a full season; and Arcade allows you play a single race. The graphics are great, the gameplay is smooth, and there are more options than you could ever ask for. Buckle up and put the pedal to the metal!
overview_zh: 進行一場橫跨世界、艱苦的 24 小時耐力賽。本作以法國南部年度賽事為原型，賽道從多倫多、底特律一路延伸到聖母峰之巔。可從 Nissan R390、BMW V12VMR 等 10 款真實賽車中挑選。賽道超過 10 條，足以讓你忙個不停。比賽中可使用滑油、引擎升級與無敵強化道具等取得優勢。表現越好可解鎖越多賽車，提高奪冠機會。共有三種模式：Le Mans 模式讓你在真實的勒芒賽道與強敵對抗；Championship 模式為完整賽季；Arcade 模式則是單場比賽。畫面精美、操作流暢、選項豐富。繫好安全帶，全力踩下油門吧！

no_intro_name: Legend of the River King 2 (USA) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Mean-hearted spirits control the River King and Sea King, the biggest fish in the world. Now an angel wants you and your brother to track down the elusive beasts, but your mission is anything but divine. First you'll need to fish for smaller fry to feed yourself and save up for top-notch tackle and rods, provided some animal doesn't make off with your catch of the day first. Legend of the River King 2 is a massive role-playing adventure that features all manner of angling from fresh water fly-fishing to deep sea trolling. A new trade mode allows you to trade your fish for produce with farmers in Harvest Moon GBC2!
overview_zh: 心懷惡意的精靈控制著 River King 與 Sea King，這兩條全世界最大的魚。如今天使要你與哥哥追蹤這對神秘的巨魚，但這項任務並不神聖。首先你必須釣些小魚溫飽自己，並存錢購買頂級釣具，前提是別讓野獸搶走你的漁獲。《Legend of the River King 2》是一款大型角色扮演冒險遊戲，從淡水飛蠅釣到深海拖釣應有盡有。新增的交易模式可將漁獲與《Harvest Moon GBC2》中的農夫交換農產。
publisher:
Victor Interactive Software JP
Natsume Inc.NA
Ubi Soft EU

title_en: LEGEND OF THE RIVER KING GB
no_intro_name: Legend of the River King GB (Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

title_en: LEGEND OF THE RIVER KING GBC
no_intro_name: Legend of the River King GBC (USA) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Your sister is ill and you must find the Guardian Fish to save her in LEGEND OF THE RIVER KING. Travel throughout the world and blaze trails to find the best fishing holes. Be careful though, because you might have to fight wild animals with your bare hands. You can catch fish with either bait or lures, each with relative strengths and weaknesses. After catching a small one, keep it stress-free in an aquarium and watch it grow. Hopefully, you will be able to find the Guardian Fish and save your sister in LEGEND OF THE RIVER KING.
overview_zh: 妹妹生病了，你必須找到守護之魚才能救她。走遍世界，開闢道路尋找最佳釣點。但要小心，有時得徒手與野獸搏鬥。可使用魚餌或擬餌釣魚，各有相對的優缺點。釣到小魚後可放入水族箱悉心照料看牠成長。但願你能找到守護之魚，救活妹妹。

title_en: LEGEND OF ZELDA, THE - LINK'S AWAKENING DX
no_intro_name: Legend of Zelda, The - Link's Awakening DX (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

title_en: LEGEND OF ZELDA, THE - LINK'S AWAKENING DX - REDUX
no_intro_name: Legend of Zelda, The - Link's Awakening DX - Redux (USA)

title_en: LEGEND OF ZELDA, THE - ORACLE OF AGES
no_intro_name: Legend of Zelda, The - Oracle of Ages (USA, Australia)

title_en: LEGEND OF ZELDA, THE - ORACLE OF SEASONS
no_intro_name: Legend of Zelda, The - Oracle of Seasons (USA, Australia)

overview_en: The much-loved, interlocking, colored plastic pieces aren't going to get caught in the vacuum cleaner or make the dog choke anymore. Presenting a series of challenging puzzles to tickle your brain and keep your fingers moving, LEGO ALPHA TEAM lets you control Dash and his Underlings as they try to squelch the evil plans of Ogel. Redirect your team by placing stairs, trampolines, chutes, Changer Tiles, and other pieces on the board. You'll have a limited number of pieces on hand to complete each mission, making the action very difficult and the stress factor high. The game is full of great devices and items: two team members can seesaw or use anti-gravity generators, and there are explosive dynamite detonators, cutting lasers, and other items as well. A great blend of classic LEGO building and modern-day videogame action, LEGO ALPHA TEAM is a great way to give your brain a little bit of exercise and fun.
overview_zh: 那些深受喜愛、互相卡接的彩色塑膠積木，再也不會被吸塵器吸走或讓狗噎到了。本作呈現一系列考驗腦力與手指的益智謎題，玩家操作 Dash 與其同伴，阻止 Ogel 的邪惡計畫。你必須在棋盤上放置樓梯、彈跳床、滑道、Changer Tiles 等元件，引導隊伍前進。每關可用元件數量有限，使任務難度與壓力倍增。遊戲中充滿巧妙的裝置與道具：兩名隊員可玩翹翹板或使用反重力裝置，還有炸藥引爆器、切割雷射等等。本作完美融合經典樂高搭建與現代電玩動作，是讓大腦輕鬆運動兼娛樂的絕佳選擇。

overview_en: The mildly wicked Brickster is back, and this time he's angry! Construct your very own racing vehicle out of virtual versions of the famous plastic LEGO bricks, then steer your new creation into action. You can build whatever type of transport you'd like, with helicopters, boats, cars, and skateboards available. Of course, the type of racer you construct will determine your competition and mode of play, so choose wisely. You'll enjoy all of the action on super-slick speedways, raging rivers, and state-of-the-art skate parks. Each competition takes place on a different island, creating a wide range of LEGO-themed locales and circumstances. The better you perform, the closer you'll get to earning a showdown with the malicious Brickster to determine who's the real champion. Graced by incredible graphics and stunningly original gameplay LEGO ISLAND 2: The Brickster's Revenge is perfect for gamers of all ages and backgrounds. Play alone or take on a friend in this awesome extension of the imaginative LEGO dynasty.
overview_zh: 略帶邪惡的 Brickster 又回來了，而且這次他怒火中燒！用塑膠樂高積木的虛擬版打造你專屬的賽車載具，再駕著它衝鋒陷陣。可任選喜愛的交通工具，包括直升機、船、汽車與滑板，但你的選擇會決定對手與遊戲模式，請慎重選擇。比賽舞台包括超滑賽道、湍急河流與最先進的滑板樂園，每項比賽都在不同島嶼舉行，呈現多元的樂高主題場景。表現越好，越能逼近與邪惡 Brickster 一決雌雄、爭奪真正冠軍的最終對決。畫面精緻、玩法獨創，《LEGO ISLAND 2: The Brickster's Revenge》適合各年齡層玩家。可單人遊玩或與朋友對戰，盡情擴展富想像力的樂高世界。

overview_en: Take your LEGOs where no plastic interlocking pieces have been before: the racetrack. Using the logic and creativity behind the classic multicolored bricks, LEGO RACERS brings the action out to a series of high-speed courses. You get to customize your racer with different bricks and pieces, ultimately creating your very own LEGO dream machine. Try your luck against five other LEGO racers on over a dozen unique tracks each based on traditional LEGO series. Speed through the swashbuckling seas of Space Pirates, see what's in store for your character in Adventurer,; or gallantly rev it up in the Castle setting. Many of the familiar faces from the age-old series of toys make appearances Sam Grant and Captain Redbeard, among others, show up as drivers. There are also plenty of secret items and important shortcuts to discover, so keep your eyes on the road at all times. Whether you're a LEGO-maniac or a die-hard racing fan, you'll want to catch this one.
overview_zh: 把樂高帶到塑膠積木前所未至的地方－賽道。本作以經典彩色積木的邏輯與創意為核心，將動作搬上一連串高速賽道。你可使用各種積木與元件自訂賽車，打造專屬樂高夢幻車。在十多條以經典樂高系列為主題的賽道上，與其他 5 名樂高選手一較高下。在 Space Pirates 全速衝刺、Adventurer 看角色有何冒險，或在 Castle 裡英姿煥發地加速前進。Sam Grant、Captain Redbeard 等熟悉的樂高玩具角色化身賽車手登場，賽道中也充滿隱藏道具與重要捷徑，請隨時注意路面。無論你是樂高迷還是賽車狂，都不容錯過。

overview_en: LEGO STUNT RALLY on Game Boy Color is a racer with a leg up on the competition! As in many racers, your goal is to get to the finish line first in order to win fame and fortune or at least a few first-place medals. However, LEGO has always been about building, and LEGO STUNT RALLY is no different. You'll have to construct each of the tracks yourself using a variety of pieces containing curves, stunt pieces, and others. There are four different track themes, each with their own pieces: you can create a city track, a desert track, a mud track, and an ice track. Once you've built the track, it's time to race! Your competitors on the track will fight tooth and nail to beat you to the finish, so you'd better make sure you use the knowledge of the track's setup to your strategic advantage. If you manage to do well enough, you may uncover some new track themes. LEGO STUNT RALLY is for one player only, and is only compatible with Game Boy Color systems.
overview_zh: 《LEGO STUNT RALLY》是一款比同類賽車遊戲多了一個賣點的競速作品！如同許多賽車遊戲，目標是搶先抵達終點，贏得名利或至少幾面金牌。但樂高的精髓向來在於組裝，本作也不例外。你必須使用包含彎道、特技元件等多種積木自行打造每條賽道。共四種賽道主題，各有專屬零件：可建造城市、沙漠、泥地與冰雪賽道。蓋好賽道後便能開賽！對手會拼死搶在你之前抵達終點，所以必須利用熟悉賽道的優勢制定策略。表現夠好或許能解鎖新的賽道主題。本作僅支援單人遊玩，且僅相容於 Game Boy Color 主機。

overview_en: Lemmings & Oh No! More Lemmings is a Puzzle game, developed and published by Take Two Interactive in 2000.
overview_zh: 《Lemmings & Oh No! More Lemmings》是一款益智遊戲，由 Take Two Interactive 開發並發行，2000 年推出。

overview_en: The world is filled with energy crystals, which can be turned into monsters, using a special tin can. For centuries humans have trained the monsters to battle each other. However, a trainer named Cool Joe keeps breaking the rules of battle, and it's up to you to find out what he is up to. Collect crystals and turn them into monsters. Make your monster battle other monsters to gain experience and improve its abilities. You can also capture more crystals by winning battles. In addition to creating monsters, the crystals can be used by the monster to learn attacks and healing abilities. With over 60 monsters to collect, there is plenty to keep you busy. Try to find the truth regarding Cool Joe in LIL' MONSTER.
overview_zh: 世界上充滿能量水晶，使用特殊鐵罐可將其轉化為怪物。數百年來，人類訓練怪物互相戰鬥。然而一名叫 Cool Joe 的訓練師不斷違反戰鬥規則，要由你來查清他的陰謀。蒐集水晶、轉化為怪物，讓怪物與其他怪物對戰累積經驗、提升能力。獲勝也能取得更多水晶。除了創造怪物外，水晶還可讓怪物學習攻擊與治療技能。可蒐集的怪物超過 60 種，足以讓你樂此不疲。揭開 Cool Joe 真相吧。

title_en: LION KING, THE - SIMBA'S MIGHTY ADVENTURE
no_intro_name: Lion King, The - Simba's Mighty Adventure (USA, Europe)

overview_en: A puzzle-solving game with a POP story woven by cute characters drawn with beautiful graphics. The main character "May" uses two magics, "Magical Technique" and "Magic Sphere", and just carries a heart-shaped magic jewel and puts it on the pedestal. If you're not careful, you may be beaten by the enemy or you may get stuck. There are 3 "story modes" in all. You can enjoy the stages and endings of each level of "apprenticeship course, training course, final exam course".
overview_zh: 由可愛角色與精緻畫面交織出 POP 風格故事的解謎遊戲。主角「May」運用「魔法技」與「魔法球」兩種魔法，將心形魔法寶石放上台座即可。一不小心可能會被敵人擊倒或卡關。共有 3 種「故事模式」，可享受「學徒篇、修行篇、結業考試篇」各等級的關卡與結局。

title_en: LITTLE MERMAID II, THE - PINBALL FRENZY
no_intro_name: Little Mermaid II, The - Pinball Frenzy (USA) (En,Fr,De,Es,It) (Rumble Version)

overview_en: Satan wants to appoint a new ruler in Hell. However, nobody meets his high standards, so the dark prince must remain atop Hell's throne. Displeased by their father's lack of confidence in them, Adrian and Cassius leave Hell and go to Earth to create a new Hell. Since Satan has no time to deal with Adrian and Cassius, he sends his other son Nicky to stop them. You take the role of Nicky as he travels through 24 levels, where he must collect a certain number of items or destroy demons. However, the key to making it through all of the levels is Nicky's power. When Nicky gets close to fire, his powers increase. He will run faster, jump higher, and spit fireballs. Should he get too hot, Nicky will be unable to control his powers until he cools down. Help Nicky capture Adrian and Cassius in LITTLE NICKY.
overview_zh: 撒旦想任命新的地獄統治者，但沒人達到他的高標準，黑暗王子只好繼續坐穩地獄王座。對父親的不信任感到不滿，Adrian 與 Cassius 離開地獄前往人間打造新地獄。撒旦無暇處理兩人，便派出另一個兒子 Nicky 去阻止他們。你扮演 Nicky 走過 24 個關卡，收集指定數量的物品或消滅惡魔。但通關的關鍵在於 Nicky 的能力－當他靠近火焰時力量會增強，跑得更快、跳得更高，還能吐出火球。但若太熱，Nicky 會無法控制能力，須等冷卻後才能恢復。協助 Nicky 抓回 Adrian 與 Cassius 吧。

title_en: LODE RUNNER - DOMUDOMU DAN NO YABOU
no_intro_name: Lode Runner - Domudomu Dan no Yabou (Japan) (GB Compatible)
Lodoss-tou Senki - Eiyuu Kishiden GB (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: LOGICAL adds a distinctive puzzle game experience to the Game Boy Color. Each of the 99 levels starts with a unique arrangement of pipes and slotted gears. Balls of various colors roll through a pipe at the top of the screen, and they'll fall into the gear and pipe arrangement. The goal is to get balls of the same color to fill all of the slots of a gear. Once that happens, the balls disappear. But time is always a factor in doing this, so you've got to be efficient. As the game progresses, several complicating factors enter the mix: some pipes will only allow balls to travel one way, and other will only let balls of one color pass through. The biggest problem is that some levels require colors be removed in a particular order. Try to solve as many puzzles as you can with LOGICAL
overview_zh: 《LOGICAL》為 Game Boy Color 帶來別具特色的解謎體驗。99 個關卡各有獨特的水管與帶槽齒輪配置。各色彩球從畫面頂端的水管滾出，落入齒輪與水管組合中。目標是讓相同顏色的球填滿單一齒輪的所有槽位，球便會消失。但時間始終是關鍵，必須有效率地解題。隨著進展會出現更複雜的要素：部分水管只允許單向通過，有些只讓特定顏色通過。最棘手的是某些關卡要求依特定順序消除顏色。盡可能解開更多謎題吧！

overview_en: The Looney Tunes have been a staple of popular culture since the 1940s. Now, they have come to the Game Boy Color. You must navigate through seven stages that are reminiscent of Saturday morning cartoons. In each of the levels you must help a different character get through a tough situation: Bugs and Daffy must use Frisbees to destroy enemies and defeat the boss at the end of a stage; Porky pilots a spaceship to destroy satellites and an evil star that wants to eat him; Tweety must fly through his stage avoiding bottles and Sylvester; and Speedy Gonzales must enter an Aztec temple to defeat Dracula. If you love the Looney Tunes, then you need to get a copy of LOONEY TUNES for the Game Boy Color.
overview_zh: 《Looney Tunes》自 1940 年代起便是流行文化的常駐成員，如今登陸 Game Boy Color。你必須闖過 7 個彷彿週六早晨卡通氛圍的關卡，每關協助不同角色脫離困境：Bugs 與 Daffy 用飛盤擊敗敵人並擊破關底頭目；Porky 駕駛太空船摧毀衛星與想吞掉他的邪惡星球；Tweety 在關卡中飛行，閃避瓶子與 Sylvester；Speedy Gonzales 則進入阿茲特克神殿擊敗德古拉。如果你愛 Looney Tunes，就不能錯過 GBC 版的本作。

overview_en: Coming home after a long day at work, Bugs and Lola find their garden ransacked and all of their carrots stolen. Now the two must explore the Warner Bros. Lot to discover the identity of the carrot thief. You guide the bunnies through five worlds, collecting carrots that will allow the characters use special powers like the ability to walk on thin air and using their ears as a helicopter propeller. The two can also collect Super Carrots that will allow them to use their powers longer and Habanero Carrots that make them invincible. The player must switch between the Bugs and Lola to solve puzzles with each character's special skills. Try to find the carrot thief in Looney Tunes: Carrot Crazy.
overview_zh: Bugs 與 Lola 結束漫長的一天回到家，發現菜園被翻過、所有紅蘿蔔不翼而飛。兩人必須在華納兄弟片場中尋找紅蘿蔔大盜的身分。你引導兩隻兔子穿越 5 個世界，蒐集紅蘿蔔讓角色獲得特殊能力，例如在空中行走、用耳朵當作直升機螺旋槳。也能蒐集 Super Carrot 延長能力使用時間，或 Habanero Carrot 取得無敵狀態。玩家須切換 Bugs 與 Lola，運用各自的特殊技能解開謎題。一同找出紅蘿蔔大盜吧！

overview_en: Marvin the Martian's faithful companion K-9 cleaned out the flying saucer. In doing so, K-9 accidentally threw out 10 pieces of the teleporter that are required to execute Marvin's plan to destroy the Earth. Bugs Bunny happens to overhear the Martian's plan, and now he must travel throughout the world and collect the other Looney Tunes characters 47 in all. While Bugs can perform basic tasks, solving all of the game's puzzles and collecting all 10 teleporter pieces requires the special skills and talents of each character. For example, Elmer Fudd can blast obstacles with his gun, while Daffy Duck can swim and dive into deep water. Learning how and when to use each character is the key to success in LOONEY TUNES COLLECTOR: Alert!
overview_zh: 火星人 Marvin 忠實的夥伴 K-9 清理飛碟時，意外丟棄了 Marvin 摧毀地球計畫所需的 10 個傳送器零件。Bugs Bunny 偶然聽到火星人的計畫，於是必須走遍世界，集合其餘 47 名 Looney Tunes 角色。Bugs 雖能完成基本任務，但要解開所有謎題並收齊 10 個零件，需要每個角色的特殊技能：Elmer Fudd 能用槍轟掉障礙，Daffy Duck 則能游泳潛入深水。學會何時使用何角色，是通關的關鍵。

overview_en: Rev your engines - It's time to burn some Looney Tunes rubber! ACME Corporation, the corporate juggernaut behind such successful products as the Acme Disintegrator Gun and the Acme Portable Hole, is sponsoring a number of racing contests all over the universe for the Looney Tunes characters to compete for the looniest racing champion title.
overview_zh: 發動引擎－燃燒 Looney Tunes 的輪胎吧！ACME Corporation，這家推出 Acme Disintegrator Gun 與 Acme Portable Hole 等成功產品的企業巨擘，正在全宇宙舉辦多場賽車競賽，邀請 Looney Tunes 角色一同爭奪「最瘋狂賽車冠軍」頭銜。

overview_en: The antics of two of your favorite Looney Tunes characters come to life in TWOUBLE for the Game Boy Color. In this single-player adventure you play as Sylvester, everyone's favorite hungry cat, in pursuit of his yellow songbird rival Tweety. TWOUBLE gives you two ways to play: in the first type of stage, you will attempt to catch Tweety in a fast-moving side-scrolling adventure. Duck, jump, and dodge through obstacles in your hunt for lunch. In the other type of level, you will control Sylvester in an isometric viewpoint, and you'll have to use your wits along with keys and other items to progress through these levels. Watch out for Hector, Granny, and other popular Looney Tunes characters in both types of levels, because they are dedicated to making poor Sylvester go home hungry. Will Sylvester finally catch Tweety Bird, or will he have to enjoy lunch from a garbage can again? With three difficulty levels and a password save system, TWOUBLE has more than enough action for fans of the cartoon duo and their wacky tricks and chases!
overview_zh: 兩位人氣 Looney Tunes 角色的胡鬧戲碼，在 GBC 版《TWOUBLE》上重現。本作為單人冒險，玩家扮演大家最愛的飢餓貓 Sylvester，追逐黃色小鳥 Tweety。遊戲提供兩種玩法：第一種關卡是高速橫向卷軸冒險，要在追逐 Tweety 的同時躲避障礙、跳躍、潛行；第二種關卡採等角視角，操作 Sylvester 運用智慧與鑰匙等道具推進。兩種關卡都要小心 Hector、Granny 等熟悉的 Looney Tunes 角色，他們無不致力讓 Sylvester 餓肚子回家。Sylvester 終於能抓到 Tweety，還是又得從垃圾桶找午餐？提供三種難度與密碼存檔，是這對搞笑搭檔愛好者不能錯過的動作量足夠的作品。

title_en: LOPPI PUZZLE MAGAZINE - HIRAMEKU PUZZLE DAI-2-GOU
no_intro_name: Loppi Puzzle Magazine - Hirameku Puzzle Dai-2-gou (Japan) (SGB Enhanced, GB Compatible) (NP)
overview_en: Loppi Puzzle Magazine: Hirameku Puzzle Dai-2-gou is a puzzle game, developed by Game Studio and published by Success, which was released in Japan in 2001.
overview_zh: 《Loppi Puzzle Magazine: Hirameku Puzzle Dai-2-gou》是一款由 Game Studio 開發、Success 發行的益智遊戲，2001 年於日本推出。

title_en: LOS CABALLEROS DEL ZODIACO - EL RETORNO DEL FENIX
no_intro_name: Los Caballeros del Zodiaco - El Retorno del Fenix

overview_en: Today is the day of the announcement of the results of the University of Tokyo. Keitaro, who thought, "Maybe it's no good again ..." was afraid to go to see the result announcement, and was vacant at the park of memories. "It's been a lot of trouble since I came to Hinata-so." When I was looking up at the clear sky while remembering that, I suddenly became sleepy ... When I woke up, for some reason Hinata-so It was a caretaker room! ?? The second GBC! This time, while spending a lively day in Hinata-so, we will talk with everyone and challenge mini-games that occur in various places. If you clear the mini-games well, you can improve the compatibility with them! There are plenty of mini-games such as "Don't let Naru meet Seta!", A memory / reflex test game "Hamacaya de part-time job", and a "cult game" with more than 200 questions! !! The first limited privilege is a newly written A4 clear pinup.
overview_zh: 今天是東大放榜的日子。心想「大概又落榜了……」的景太郎不敢去看榜單，呆坐在回憶之園。他一邊回想「自從來到日向莊發生了好多事啊」，一邊抬頭望向晴朗的天空，忽然睡意襲來……醒來時不知為何已身在日向莊管理員室！？GBC 版第二作！這次將在日向莊度過熱鬧的日常，與大家對話並挑戰各處發生的迷你遊戲。順利通過迷你遊戲可提升好感度！包含「別讓 Naru 遇到 Seta！」、考驗記憶與反應的「在 Hama 茶屋打工」，以及超過 200 道題目的「Cult 遊戲」等豐富迷你遊戲！！首批限定特典為新繪製的 A4 透明海報。

overview_en: The popular manga "Love Hina" is now available on GB. For some reason, "Keitaro Urashima", who is aiming for the University of Tokyo, has become the manager of the pure Japanese-style female dormitory "Hinataso", which is a former hot spring inn. At "Hinata-so" where unique girls live, the days of being busy with love and taking exams, such as having a relationship with the heroine "Naru" who is aiming for the University of Tokyo, and receiving thoughts from "Shinobu". .. One day, Keitaro won the special prize "5 nights and 6 days trip to Guam and Saipan, invited as a pair!" At Fukubiki in the shopping district! The player becomes the main character, Keitaro, spends a week traveling with the girls at Hinataso, and searches for a girl to go on a trip with. Well, can I go on a trip safely? Who are you going with?
overview_zh: 人氣漫畫《Love Hina》登陸 GB。立志考上東大的「浦島景太郎」，不知為何當上了由舊溫泉旅館改建的純日式女子宿舍「日向莊」的管理員。在個性鮮明的女孩們聚集的日向莊，他每天忙著戀愛與升學考試，與同樣立志東大的女主角「成瀨川 Naru」之間發生關係，又收下「忍」的心意……。某天，景太郎在商店街抽獎抽中特獎「招待兩人 5 夜 6 日關島塞班島之旅！」。玩家化身主角景太郎，與日向莊的女孩們度過一週，尋找一同出遊的對象。這次能否順利成行？最後又會與誰一起去呢？

no_intro_name: Luca no Puzzle de Daibouken! (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: A baby dolphin "Luka" who is separated from her mom goes on a journey to find her in her home aquarium. On the way to meet Mama, 100 number places stand in front of Luca. Every time you solve 2 questions, you will see a stage clear screen where Luca will perform a trick, and every time you solve 20 questions, you will get one extra mini-game, and if you solve 100 questions, you will get an ending screen where you can meet mom. When the ending comes out, all the questions are replaced with new questions, and 100 new puzzles appear.
overview_zh: 與母親走散的小海豚「Luka」，從家中的水族館出發，踏上尋母之旅。途中有 100 道數獨題目擋在 Luka 面前。每解 2 題會看到 Luka 表演的關卡通過畫面，每解 20 題可獲得一款迷你遊戲，解完 100 題就能看到與媽媽團聚的結局畫面。結局出現後所有題目會替換為新題，再次出現 100 道全新拼圖。

overview_en: Hey! COWBOY! How'd you like a crazy chase through the Old West? Yep, Dalton and his brothers are on the run ... and we count on you to catch them. Mississippi, Colorado, your ride will not be easy:  Trigger happy Desperados, Indians on the war-path and rampaging herds of bison may send you six feet under. You must shoot faster than your own, be more cunning than a sioux and be as agile as a puma.
overview_zh: 嘿！COWBOY！想不想來一場橫越西部的瘋狂追逐？沒錯，Dalton 與他的兄弟們正在逃亡……我們指望你抓住他們。從密西西比到科羅拉多，這趟路可不好走：好戰的亡命之徒、出草的印地安人，以及狂奔的野牛群可能讓你提早入土。你必須拔槍比自己更快、比蘇族更狡猾、比美洲獅更敏捷。

overview_en: Lucky Luke: Desperado Train is an Action game, developed and published by Infogrames, which was released in Europe in 2000.
overview_zh: 《Lucky Luke: Desperado Train》是一款由 Infogrames 開發並發行的動作遊戲，2000 年於歐洲推出。

overview_en: The island of the Sinistrals, Doom Island, sank deep into the sea after the second Doom Island War. It was believed to be in an eternal sleep, but has once again begun silently beating, preparing to make its appearance in the sky for the third time. The evil Sinistrals have again been resurrected and released an unforseen terror on the land. A force has awaken witin you... a spiritual flow that draws you to a conflict that will save the world! The power of Maxim's legendary bloodline lives in you... The thread of destiny guides you through an adventurous journey looking for an unknown destination!
overview_zh: 邪神之島 Doom Island 在第二次 Doom Island 大戰後深沉海底，原以為將永眠不醒，卻再度悄悄甦動，準備第三次現身天空。邪神再度復活，向大地降下未曾預料的恐怖。一股力量在你心中覺醒……一道將你引向拯救世界之戰的靈魂之流！傳說中的 Maxim 血脈在你體內延續……命運之線將引領你踏上目的地未知的冒險旅程！
publisher:
Natsume Inc. NA
Taito JP
Ubi Soft EU

overview_en: The Minis have escaped and are wreaking havoc on the M&M factory. It is up to four intrepid heroes Red, Green, Yellow, and Blue to capture the Minis and return the factory to normal. You must choose the appropriate character for each situation the heroes encounter, as they each have a special skill. Blue can swim, Green has a deadly kiss attack, Yellow can bounce high into the air, and Red can use a spin attack to destroy enemies. If you encounter an area the current character is not able to get past, you can switch to another characters with the select button. Learning how and when to use these abilities is key to conquering all 12 levels in the game. So play M&M MINI MADNESS and try to save the factory before the Minis destroy it.
overview_zh: 迷你 M&Ms 們逃了出來，正在 M&M 工廠裡大鬧。要由 Red、Green、Yellow、Blue 四位英雄出馬抓回 Minis、讓工廠恢復正常。每位角色各有專長：Blue 會游泳、Green 有致命之吻、Yellow 能高高彈跳、Red 可使用旋轉攻擊摧毀敵人。必須依場合選擇合適的角色，遇到目前角色無法通過的場景，可用 SELECT 鍵切換為其他角色。學會何時使用各能力，是通關 12 關的關鍵。協助拯救工廠、阻止 Minis 搗亂吧。
publisher:
Majesco Sales NA
JoWooD Productions EU

title_en: MACROSS 7 - GINGA NO HEART O FURUWASERO!!
no_intro_name: Macross 7 - Ginga no Heart o Furuwasero!! (Japan)

overview_en: The speed and power of NFL football! Faster moves and breakaway speed for bigger plays. Body slams and collisions, drag-downs and de-cleaters, explosive sticking and crunching gang tackles. Ultra-fast blur moves, helmet-popping hits, more scoring, special animations, and in-your-face commentary. Multiplayer Franchise mode, authentic stadium atmosphere, Hot Routes, Madden Challenge and more!
overview_zh: 感受 NFL 美式足球的速度與力量！更敏捷的動作與爆發速度造就更精彩的進攻、撞擊、拖倒、剷球、強硬擒抱等場面。極速殘影動作、震得頭盔飛掉的撞擊、更多得分、特殊動畫與貼臉的講評。多人 Franchise 模式、真實球場氛圍、Hot Routes、Madden Challenge 等內容應有盡有！

overview_en: Get ready for a dose of bone-crunching football action on the PlayStation 2 with Madden NFL 2001. Madden NFL 2001 features an all-new and exclusive NFL Coaches Club license, which means you'll see coaches on the sidelines and hear them yelling encouragement, comments and criticisms. Madden 2001 also features individualized details, easy-to-use interface, dynamically enhanced audio and play-by-play recorded with John Madden and his broadcast partner, Pat Summerall, and more!
overview_zh: 在 PlayStation 2 上來一場硬碰硬的美式足球。《Madden NFL 2001》搭載全新獨家的 NFL Coaches Club 授權，讓你看見場邊教練的身影，並聽見他們的鼓舞、評論與斥責。本作也加入個人化細節、易上手的介面、強化動態音效，並由 John Madden 與其搭檔 Pat Summerall 錄製的實況講評等更多內容！

overview_en: Everyone's favorite coach-turned commentator is back with another dose of hard-hitting pigskin. MADDEN NFL's signature style goes to the next level in this unbelievable game, delivering realistic football physics and photo-quality cutscenes. You'll have access to all of the real NFL teams and players all with accurate uniforms, abilities, and appearances. All of the standard modes of play are included, and there are a few new entries, such as Two-Minute Drill (earn points on offense by moving the ball quickly up the field) and Create-a-Team (build your franchise from the ground up including uniforms, helmets, and coaching philosophy). Coach's Corner will teach you about all the ins and outs of NFL Football, and all of the action is called by (you guessed it) John Madden, himself. All of the real playbooks and coaching strategies of the pro teams are at your fingertips, so you have no excuse for losing in this one, folks.
overview_zh: 大家最喜愛的教練轉播專家又回來了，帶來新一輪硬派美式足球。MADDEN NFL 招牌風格在本作再上層樓，呈現真實的足球物理表現與媲美照片的過場演出。可使用所有真實 NFL 隊伍與球員，並具備正確的球衣、能力與外觀。標準遊戲模式一應俱全，並新增 Two-Minute Drill（迅速推進贏取進攻分數）與 Create-a-Team（從球衣、頭盔到教練哲學一手打造球隊）等新模式。Coach's Corner 教導你 NFL 美式足球的各種眉角，比賽則由 John Madden 本人實況講評。各隊的真實戰術手冊與教練策略任你掌握，輸了可沒藉口。

overview_en: What would you do if you found yourself in a strange land, face-to-face with a mysterious presence and catapulted into an adventure to save an entire civilization? Well, find out! Explore a world of color and imagination that will challenge your every notion of reality. Experience the rush of dueling a Shadow Magi, with everything on the line. Find yourself going toe-to-toe with the awesome Timber Hyren, or the gargantuan Ormagon. Be the savior of an entire civilization. And find uses for jellybeans that you never thought possible.
overview_zh: 如果你發現自己置身於陌生大陸、面對神秘存在，被推上拯救整個文明的冒險之路，你會怎麼做？來親自體驗吧！探索一個色彩與想像力交織、不斷挑戰你對現實認知的世界。感受與 Shadow Magi 性命相搏的緊張、與壯碩的 Timber Hyren 或巨大的 Ormagon 正面對決。成為整個文明的救世主。並發現 jellybeans 出乎意料的用途。

title_en: MAGICAL CHASE GB - MINARAI MAHOUTSUKAI KENJA NO TANI E
no_intro_name: Magical Chase GB - Minarai Mahoutsukai Kenja no Tani e (Japan)
overview_en: There are two levels of difficulty that anyone can easily play. There are 11 types of attack methods. Attacks that devise and use flexible star partners can be switched between normal attacks and special forces with one touch. With a shop system like an RPG, you can buy various items.
overview_zh: 提供任何人都能輕鬆遊玩的兩種難度。攻擊方式共 11 種。靈活運用星之夥伴的攻擊，可一鍵切換普通攻擊與必殺技。具備類似 RPG 的商店系統，可購買各種道具。

overview_en: MAGICAL DROP has a character facing imminent doom as bubbles slowly make their way towards him from the top of the screen. To get rid of the bubbles, you can grab bubbles of one color from the pile and move them to another area. When three or more bubbles of the same color touch, they will explode and destroy all of the like-colored bubbles around them. When bubbles are destroyed, those remaining in the pile float up and cause more to bubbles to burst in a chain reaction. This is a rather simple premise, but it's not easy to master. While the single-player game is fun, use a link cable and share the fun with a friend. Try to clear as many bubbles as possible with MAGICAL DROP.
overview_zh: 《MAGICAL DROP》中，泡泡會從畫面頂端緩緩朝角色逼近。要消除泡泡，可從堆中抓取同色泡泡，移到別處。三顆以上同色泡泡相連時會爆炸，將周圍同色泡泡一併消除。被消除後，剩餘泡泡會向上漂浮，引發更多連鎖反應。概念雖簡單，但要精通並不容易。除了單人模式之外，使用通信線可與朋友同樂。盡可能多消除泡泡吧！
publisher:
Classified Games NA
Swing! Entertainment AG DE

overview_en: Join Disney's Mickey, Minnie, Donald and Goofy as they embark on a non-stop adventure full of challenging fun and excitement in Magical Tetris Challenge. Completely addictive, deceptively simple, you'll go wild in a kaleidoscopic shower of falling Tetris pieces in this magical version of the world's most popular video game.
overview_zh: 與迪士尼的米奇、米妮、唐老鴨與高飛一同踏上充滿挑戰與樂趣的不停歇冒險。《Magical Tetris Challenge》易上手卻令人欲罷不能，在這款全球最受歡迎的遊戲魔法版本中，盡情享受落下方塊的萬花筒風暴。

overview_en: There are three modes. "Queen's Palace" where you can play seriously with 12 female professional quizzes without squid, "Free game" where you can easily play with your favorite professionals according to your favorite rules, challenge the difficult problems that professionals thought Equipped with "Queen's Quiz". Of course, red tiles can also be inserted.
overview_zh: 共有三種模式。「皇后宮殿」可與 12 名女子職業雀士進行真劍對戰；「自由對戰」可依喜好規則與專業選手輕鬆對戰；「皇后猜謎」則挑戰專業選手構思的難題。當然也可加入紅牌。

overview_en: Nurturing mahjong game. Choose one of the eight unique characters that appear, and play mahjong games to grow. By winning with mahjong, you will grow and transform and learn various special skills. There are three game modes: "Enthusiastic! 100 games", "Unlimited games", and "Free games". You can select 2-player, 3-player, or 4-player in all modes. Original rules are set to eliminate the differences caused by the rules that differ from region to region.
overview_zh: 養成型麻將遊戲。從 8 名特色角色中擇一，透過麻將比賽培育角色。獲勝後角色會成長變身，學會各種特殊技能。共三種遊戲模式：「熱血！100 戰」、「無限對戰」與「自由對戰」，所有模式皆可選擇 2 人、3 人或 4 人。為消弭各地規則差異，採用了原創規則。

no_intro_name: Majokko Mari-chan no Kisekae Monogatari (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: The objective is simple - roll your marbles to the goal line. But add spectacular 3D runways, breathtaking cliffs, deadly enemies and non-stop craziness - and Marble Madness becomes one of the most exciting, challenging and addicting games you've ever played! Speed across dazzling full-color raceways, complete with cliffs, hills, ramps, and hairpin turns. Use pipelines, catapults and waves to find shortcuts to the goal line.
overview_zh: 目標很簡單－把彈珠滾到終點線。但加上華麗的 3D 賽道、令人屏息的懸崖、致命敵人與不間斷的瘋狂演出，《Marble Madness》就成了你玩過最刺激、最具挑戰、最容易上癮的遊戲！穿越色彩繽紛的賽道，迎戰懸崖、山丘、坡道與急彎。利用管道、彈射器與波浪尋找通往終點的捷徑。

no_intro_name: Marie no Atelier GB (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: A gaiden story that is a little different from the main story (PS version). Marlone (commonly known as Marie) and Elfir (commonly known as Erie) are alchemists in Saarburg. For some reason, Marie and his friends decided to take care of the fairies in their atelier. The purpose given to Marie and others is to "grow a half-serving fairy into a full-fledged fairy in four years." There are many things that fairies have to learn, such as collecting ingredients, dodging monsters, and blending items! The character of a fairy changes in various ways depending on how it responded to the fairy and what kind of behavior the fairy did. Can Marie and his friends raise a good fairy alchemist? Events and characters are different from the Erie version.
overview_zh: 與本傳（PS 版）略有不同的外傳故事。Marlone（暱稱 Marie）與 Elfir（暱稱 Erie）是 Saarburg 的鍊金術師。某次因緣際會，Marie 等人決定在工房中照顧妖精。她們收到的任務是「以四年時間將半人前的妖精培育成獨當一面的妖精」。妖精要學的事情很多，包括蒐集素材、躲避魔物、調合道具！妖精的性格會依玩家對應方式與妖精的行為而有各種變化。Marie 等人能否培育出優秀的妖精鍊金術師？事件與角色與 Erie 版有所不同。

overview_en:
Mario Golf is a 1999 Game Boy Color video game developed by Camelot Software Planning and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on October 5, 1999.

Forget buying expensive golf gear--Mario brings the game to you. Mario Golf features four complete 18-hole courses, 11 golfers, and precise play control. Create your own golfer and build up his or her experience and skill levels by competing in various tournaments and head-to-head matches. The more you play, the stronger and more accurate your golfer becomes. There are many different modes of play in Mario Golf, including a wide variety of minigames designed to challenge even the most level-headed swingers.
overview_zh:
《Mario Golf》是 1999 年由 Camelot Software Planning 開發、北美任天堂於 1999 年 10 月 5 日於美國發行的 Game Boy Color 遊戲。

別再花大錢買高爾夫裝備－瑪利歐把高爾夫帶到你眼前。本作收錄四座完整的 18 洞球場、11 名球員與精準的操作。可自創專屬球員，透過參加各式錦標賽與一對一對戰累積經驗與技能等級。玩越久，球員越強、越精準。本作具備多種模式，包含豐富的迷你遊戲，連最沉穩的揮桿好手也得拿出全力。

overview_en:
Mario Tennis is a 2001 Game Boy Color video game developed by Camelot Software Planning and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on January 16, 2001.

Take your game to the next level with Mario Tennis! Get advice from coaches, test your groundstrokes against "The Wall," then hit the courts to ace the competition and earn a spot on the varsity squad. Play your way to the top on your own in singles, or power up a partner for doubles competition. When you're good enough, you'll enter the Island Open, where you'll face the fiercest players around...and maybe even challenge the greatest player of all-Mario!
overview_zh:
《Mario Tennis》是 2001 年由 Camelot Software Planning 開發、北美任天堂於 2001 年 1 月 16 日在美國發行的 Game Boy Color 遊戲。

用《Mario Tennis》讓你的網球球技再上一層樓！接受教練指導、對「The Wall」磨練底線抽球，再上場痛宰對手、爭取進入校隊。可單打獨自登頂，亦可拉夥伴打雙打。實力夠強就能進軍 Island Open，迎戰最強悍的選手……甚至挑戰史上最強的選手—瑪利歐！

overview_en: Looney Tunes: Marvin Strikes Back! (Looney Tunes Collector: Martian Revenge in Europe) is a Looney Tunes game published by Infogrames for the Game Boy Color in 2000. It is both a direct and spiritual sequel to "Looney Tunes Collector: Alert!", as both share near-identical gameplay. Its name could be a reference to Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back.
overview_zh: 《Looney Tunes: Marvin Strikes Back!》（歐洲版名為《Looney Tunes Collector: Martian Revenge》）是 Infogrames 於 2000 年為 Game Boy Color 發行的 Looney Tunes 遊戲。本作是《Looney Tunes Collector: Alert!》的直接與精神續作，玩法幾乎相同。標題或許是在致敬《星際大戰五部曲：帝國大反擊》。

no_intro_name: Mary-Kate and Ashley - Crush Course (USA, Europe)
overview_en: Some totally cute boys have invited Mary-Kate and Ashley to a beach party but the directions have met a terrible fate! Someone has torn up the map that the twins were going to use to get to the shindig, and now they must pool their resources and find all of the pieces before the party starts without them. Some of the map is split up between the classrooms at school, some of them are in the hands of some weird girl that won't give them back, and others have completely disappeared. There are tons of mini-games to keep young gamers busy here, including a mini-golf outing, a cheerleading challenge, and many others. One of the game's best features is a creative music-making program that allows kids to punch in their own cool beats and tunes. You'll start out the game in the freshman class, but piecing together the map and completing a few of the side games will earn you a pass to the higher grades. Get good marks and chase after good-looking boys in this fabulous adventure.
overview_zh: 幾位超可愛的男孩邀請 Mary-Kate 與 Ashley 參加海灘派對，但路線地圖卻慘遭厄運！有人撕碎了雙胞胎要用的地圖，她們必須集思廣益，在派對開始前找回所有碎片。地圖部分散落在學校教室裡，部分落在某個拒絕歸還的奇怪女孩手中，還有一些徹底消失了。遊戲提供多款迷你遊戲，包括迷你高爾夫、啦啦隊挑戰等等。其中最棒的是創意音樂製作功能，可讓孩子打造自己的節奏與旋律。一開始你會在新生班級，拼回部分地圖並完成一些副遊戲後可進入更高年級。在這場精采冒險中拿好成績、追逐帥哥吧。

no_intro_name: Mary-Kate and Ashley - Pocket Planner (USA, Europe) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Is your life totally disorganized? Do you lose track of what you need to do? Have you lost the phone number of the cutest guy in school? Get organized with MARY-KATE & ASHLEY: Pocket Planner for the Game Boy Color. Use the calendar to keep track of all those really important messages and never forget a phone number with the phone book. You can also write super-secret messages to your friends and beam them to another Game Boy Color. In addition to these features, several games have been included. You can help raise Mary-Kate and Ashley's dog, Clue. If you have a question, go to Ask Ashley, and she will check her crystal ball for an answer. If you are completely unorganized and need some help, run out and get MARY-KATE & ASHLEY: Pocket Planner.
overview_zh: 你的生活一團亂嗎？老是忘記該做的事？弄丟學校最帥男生的電話？用 GBC 版《MARY-KATE & ASHLEY: Pocket Planner》整理生活吧。日曆可記錄重要事項，電話簿讓你不再忘記號碼。也可以寫超機密訊息傳給朋友，傳到另一台 Game Boy Color。除此之外還收錄多款遊戲，可幫忙養 Mary-Kate 與 Ashley 的狗 Clue。有問題可詢問 Ask Ashley，她會用水晶球給你答案。如果你完全沒組織能力又需要幫忙，現在就快入手吧。

no_intro_name: Mary-Kate and Ashley - Winners Circle (USA, Europe)
overview_en: MARY-KATE AND ASHLEY: Winners Circle for the Game Boy Color is a unique racing title that pits players against a plethora of obstacles while riding horseback. There are four different horses to choose from, each with a distinct look and style. Each horse has varying statistics for speed, jumping, and handling, requiring the player to make a careful choice to find the horse best-fitted to their racing style. Before riding you can also alter the clothing of the athlete to something of your choosing, then watch the changed sprite during gameplay. There are two modes of play: the first is a Training mode that lets you practice the controls and the course for the real competitions, and the second is the Steeplechase mode, where the real challenges lie. In this mode you must race through a course without being stopped by any of the many obstacles strewn about. MARY-KATE AND ASHLEY: Winners Circle is meant for young gamers, as the theme and graphics are sure to be loved by those looking for a light and exciting adventure.
overview_zh: GBC 版《MARY-KATE AND ASHLEY: Winners Circle》是一款獨特的競速遊戲，玩家騎馬閃避眾多障礙物。共有 4 匹外觀風格各異的馬可選，每匹馬在速度、跳躍、操控等數值上各有不同，必須慎選最適合自己風格的馬。騎乘前還可變更選手服裝，並在遊戲中看到對應的造型。共兩種模式：第一種是 Training 模式，可練習操作與賽道為正式比賽做準備；第二種是真正的挑戰－Steeplechase 模式，必須在不被各種障礙絆住的情況下完成賽道。本作主題與畫風適合年輕玩家，適合尋找輕鬆刺激冒險的人。

no_intro_name: Mary-Kate _ Ashley - Get a Clue! (USA, Europe) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Mary-Kate, Ashley, and their dog Clue are on the case in MARY-KATE & ASHLEY: Get a Clue! You take control of the adorable twins and their dog as they try to collect clues to solve five different mysteries. Each character has a special ability: Mary-Kate can bounce on her head and spring to high places, Ashley can flip switches or pick up Clue to use as a weapon, and Clue can travel through tight spaces and carry the girls on his head. In each of the 50 levels, the girls must collect puzzles pieces, which requires using all of the characters' special abilities. Should any one character die while trying to solve a stage, the stage has to be repeated from the beginning. Help the Olsen twins solve the cases with MARY-KATE & ASHLEY: Get a Clue!
overview_zh: Mary-Kate、Ashley 與她們的狗 Clue 一同辦案！你操作這對可愛雙胞胎與愛犬，蒐集線索解開 5 樁不同謎案。每位角色各有特殊能力：Mary-Kate 可彈跳到高處、Ashley 可扳動開關或抱起 Clue 當作武器、Clue 則能穿過狹窄空間並讓女孩騎在頭上。50 個關卡中，三人必須蒐集拼圖碎片，需要靈活運用各角色的能力。任一角色於關卡中陣亡時，整關都得重來。協助 Olsen 雙胞胎破案吧！

overview_en: He might spell his name a little strange, but 10-time BMX Vert Champ Mat Hoffman knows his bikes. Lending his expertise to the creation of this game, Hoffman makes sure that every turn, ramp, and flip is up to snuff. Stunt biking has never been more exciting, as you choose from a list of professional BMX riders and see what magic you can make to out-duel the competition. If you can't handle the Vert competition, move on over to Dirt or Street tracks, trying to best your rivals for money and fame. The graphics set the game apart from similar fare, while the gameplay has to represent the most realistic stunt biking possible on the Game Boy Color. Hoffman proves that he knows all there is to know about the up-and-coming sport, providing every last detail of a genuine Vert competition without all of the scrapes, bruises, and breaks. Don't worry, though: if you're looking to get hurt, there's always the agony of defeat.
overview_zh: 他的名字拼法或許有點奇怪，但 10 屆 BMX Vert 冠軍 Mat Hoffman 對自行車瞭若指掌。Hoffman 親自監修本作，確保每一次轉彎、坡道與翻轉都到位。特技自行車從未如此刺激，從一份職業 BMX 車手名單中挑選，看你能變出什麼把戲擊敗對手。若無法應付 Vert 比賽，可挑戰 Dirt 或 Street 賽道，奪取獎金與名聲。畫面表現出色，玩法則展現 Game Boy Color 上可能達到的最寫實特技自行車體驗。Hoffman 證明他對這項新興運動瞭如指掌，呈現逼真的 Vert 賽事細節，又不會讓你擦傷、瘀青或骨折。但若你真想痛一下，也還有失敗的滋味等著你。

overview_en: Who do you call when there's an emergency in Matchbox County? The Matchbox Emergency Patrol, that's who! Play as a firefighter, police officer, or paramedic in this high-energy challenge based on real-life crises. Whichever hero you choose, you'll receive word of a situation over your radio, hop in your designated vehicle, and navigate your way to the scene of the potential disaster. Of course, there's really no way to know exactly what the scene is going to be when you arrive, so you'd better be on your toes. You might find a robbery in progress, but it might just be two people having an argument, so use your best judgment as to how to handle the situation. Modeled after the Matchbox Emergency Patrol series of die-cast toy vehicles, MATCHBOX EMERGENCY PATROL (the game) is an in-depth adventure revolving around crimes, accidents, and medical emergencies. There are nine different missions for each of the three emergency workers, making it a very diverse game.
overview_zh: Matchbox County 出狀況時要找誰？當然是 Matchbox Emergency Patrol！在這款根據真實急難改編的高張力作品中，可扮演消防員、警察或急救人員。無論選哪位英雄，都會從無線電收到求援、跳上指定車輛趕赴現場。當然，抵達前無法確切知道現況，所以得隨機應變。可能是搶劫案，也可能只是兩人爭吵，請憑判斷力處理。本作以 Matchbox Emergency Patrol 系列壓鑄玩具車為原型，是圍繞犯罪、事故與醫療急難的深度冒險。三種急難工作各有 9 個任務，內容相當多元。

no_intro_name: Maya the Bee _ Her Friends (Europe) (En,Fr,De) (GB Compatible)

title_en: MCDONALD'S MONOGATARI - HONOBONO TENCHOU IKUSEI GAME
no_intro_name: McDonald's Monogatari - Honobono Tenchou Ikusei Game (Japan)

overview_en: The stage is an RPG in which the main character of an elementary school student develops an adventure based on the theme of "Robot Battle (commonly known as Robottle)", a play in which robot pets (Medabots) fight each other in the near future. The Medabots that appear is a robot of the near future that will be completed by attaching medals and parts to the framework called Tinpet. By collecting and assembling parts, you can create Medabots with various abilities. This part can also be exchanged or scrambled against a friend by communication. “
overview_zh: 舞台是以「機器人對戰（俗稱 Robottle）」為主題的 RPG，描述近未來機器寵物 Medabots 互相戰鬥的玩法。主角是名小學生，展開一段冒險旅程。登場的 Medabots 是近未來的機器人，將獎牌與零件裝在名為 Tinpet 的骨架上即可完成。透過收集與組合零件，可創造出各種能力的 Medabots。零件也可透過通信與朋友交換或對戰。

overview_en: The stage is an RPG in which the main character of an elementary school student develops an adventure based on the theme of "Robot Battle (commonly known as Robottle)", a play in which robot pets (Medabots) fight each other in the near future. The Medabots that appear is a robot of the near future that will be completed by attaching medals and parts to the framework called Tinpet. By collecting and assembling parts, you can create Medabots with various abilities. This part can also be exchanged or scrambled against a friend by communication.
overview_zh: 舞台是以「機器人對戰（俗稱 Robottle）」為主題的 RPG，描述近未來機器寵物 Medabots 互相戰鬥的玩法。主角是名小學生，展開一段冒險旅程。登場的 Medabots 是近未來的機器人，將獎牌與零件裝在名為 Tinpet 的骨架上即可完成。透過收集與組合零件，可創造出各種能力的 Medabots。零件也可透過通信與朋友交換或對戰。

overview_en: Introducing the strongest version where you can get the entire collection of "Medabots 2" + new medals and parts. Software that combines both Kabuto and Stag versions. In addition to all medals (30 types) and all parts (316 parts) of "Medabots 2", hidden medals (2 types) and hidden parts (52 parts) are also included. Of course, communication transfer and exchange with "Medabots 2" is also possible.
overview_zh: 推出可一次取得《Medabots 2》全部收藏＋全新獎牌與零件的最強版本。將獨角仙與鍬形蟲版整合於一張卡帶。除了《Medabots 2》全 30 種獎牌與全 316 件零件之外，還收錄 2 種隱藏獎牌與 52 件隱藏零件。當然也可與《Medabots 2》進行通信轉移與交換。

overview_en: The main character, Ikki, goes around each stage with his friends and wins the "Medarin Pick", the strongest selection tournament for elementary school students in Japan. The mysterious "spirit" spirit that stands in the way, the battle with the Roborobo corps, and the mystery of the Medabots world that is unraveled. If you look up, you will see a perfect starry sky, the aim is "the universe", and finally ... This time, the meda change (transformation). When you change the meda, power-ups and functional changes will make Robottle (robot battle) even more incandescent! Popular characters speak with familiar voices in TV anime. "Medabots 3" is also two versions of Kabuto and Stag. Kabuto is a shooting version that shoots and shoots.
overview_zh: 主角一輝與夥伴們走訪各舞台，挑戰小學生最強選拔賽「Medarin Pick」奪冠。神秘的「Spirit」精靈擋路、與 Roborobo 軍團的戰鬥、Medabots 世界之謎隨之揭曉。抬頭仰望會看到滿天星空，目標是「宇宙」，最終……。本次新增「Meda Change（變形）」，變形後的強化與功能變化讓 Robottle 更白熱化！人氣角色也使用 TV 動畫熟悉的聲優配音演出。《Medabots 3》同樣分為獨角仙與鍬形蟲兩個版本。獨角仙版是射擊型，以遠距離射擊為主。

overview_en: The main character, Ikki, goes around each stage with his friends and wins the "Medarin Pick", the strongest selection tournament for elementary school students in Japan. The mysterious "spirit" spirit that stands in the way, the battle with the Roborobo corps, and the mystery of the Medabots world that is unraveled. If you look up, you will see a perfect starry sky, the aim is "the universe", and finally ... This time, the meda change (transformation). When you change the meda, power-ups and functional changes will make Robottle (robot battle) even more incandescent! Popular characters speak with familiar voices in TV anime. "Medabots 3" is also two versions of Kabuto and Stag. The stag beetle is a fighting type that slashes, hits, and knocks down.
overview_zh: 主角一輝與夥伴們走訪各舞台，挑戰小學生最強選拔賽「Medarin Pick」奪冠。神秘的「Spirit」精靈擋路、與 Roborobo 軍團的戰鬥、Medabots 世界之謎隨之揭曉。抬頭仰望會看到滿天星空，目標是「宇宙」，最終……。本次新增「Meda Change（變形）」，變形後的強化與功能變化讓 Robottle 更白熱化！人氣角色也使用 TV 動畫熟悉的聲優配音演出。《Medabots 3》同樣分為獨角仙與鍬形蟲兩個版本。鍬形蟲版屬於格鬥型，以斬擊、毆打、擊倒為主。

title_en: MEDAROT 3 - PARTS COLLECTION - Z KARA NO CHOUSENJOU
no_intro_name: Medarot 3 - Parts Collection - Z kara no Chousenjou (Japan)
overview_en: The third Medabots parts collection. Since it is independent of "Medabots 3", you can enjoy it without knowing the scenario. If you win the battle, you will get "Robin points" out of 100 points depending on the content of the battle. You can purchase parts and medals with points. You can get more than 600 kinds of parts and more than 30 kinds of medals, and some of them are not available in "Medabots 3". Of course, the obtained parts and medals can also be used in "Medabots 3". Detailed explanations are attached to the parameters, and the map structure is intentionally made simple.
overview_zh: Medabots 零件收藏第三作。本作獨立於《Medabots 3》之外，未玩過劇情也能盡情享受。戰鬥獲勝後，會依戰鬥內容獲得最高 100 分的「Robin 點數」，可用點數購買零件與獎牌。可取得 600 多種零件與 30 多種獎牌，部分為《Medabots 3》中無法取得的內容。當然，所獲零件與獎牌也可在《Medabots 3》中使用。各參數附有詳細說明，地圖結構則刻意簡化。

overview_en: Ikki won the national elementary school robin strongest selection tournament "Medalympic", but I was wondering how much he understood Medabots. Meanwhile, a new homeroom teacher came to the school. Outrageously, the teacher collected the medallotter titles of all the class members and erased the data as soon as he was assigned! "I erased the data that I haven't trained yet. In order to get the title of true Medabots," Medabots, "you can't grow lukewarm so far." To be recognized by the teacher, re-grow Medabots from scratch. Ikki takes on the challenge of the teacher to shake off his worries. Meanwhile, kidnappings occur frequently in the town, and Karin is also kidnapped. The final battle of Ikki begins! Ikki edition is finally complete! All Medabots of "Medabots 3" can be transferred with a communication cable, and compatibility is perfect. Approximately 100 Medabots have been added to the 151 Medabots that appeared in "3", and 250 Medabots can be used! From this time, 3 types of battles, "Meda Speed ​​King", "Meda Road Race", and "Meda Bird Contest" have been added. It is required to determine the performance of Medabots and assemble Medabots that match the event. It is now possible to have a conversation with the "medal" that is the heart of Medabots. A library function is also installed, and you can check the name and performance of the Medabots you got at any time. Lots of mini games! One rare card is randomly included from three types.
overview_zh: 一輝雖在全國小學生強者選拔大賽「Medalympic」中奪冠，卻不確定自己究竟有多了解 Medabots。此時學校來了一位新班導，他竟然蒐集全班同學的 Medarotter 資格證書，並在上任後立刻刪除資料！「我把訓練不夠扎實的資料都刪了。要拿到真正的 Medarotter 稱號『Medabots』，可不能靠到目前為止這種半吊子的養成。」為獲得老師認可，必須從零重新培育 Medabots。一輝決定接下老師的挑戰擺脫迷惘。同一時間，鎮上頻繁發生綁架事件，香鈴也遭綁架。一輝的最終決戰即將開始！一輝篇終於完結！全部《Medabots 3》的 Medabots 都可透過通信線轉移，相容性完美。在《3》登場的 151 隻 Medabots 之外新增約 100 隻，可使用的 Medabots 達 250 隻！本次新增 3 種比賽類型：「Meda 速度王」、「Meda 公路賽」與「Meda 飛鳥比賽」，必須掌握 Medabots 的性能、組合適合該項目的 Medabots。也可與作為 Medabots 心臟的「獎牌」對話，並搭載資料庫功能，可隨時查閱已取得 Medabots 的名稱與性能。豐富的迷你遊戲！附贈 3 種隨機之一的稀有卡片。

"I erased the data that I haven't trained yet. To get the true medalotter title" Medabots ", I can't grow lukewarm so far." To be recognized by the teacher, re-grow Medabots from scratch. .. A library function is also installed, and you can check the name and performance of the Medabots you got at any time. Lots of mini games! One rare card is randomly included from three types.

title_en: MEDAROT 5 - SUSUTAKE MURA NO TENKOUSEI - KABUTO
no_intro_name: Medarot 5 - Susutake Mura no Tenkousei - Kabuto (Japan)
overview_en: "Koishimaru" who has transferred to Susutake Village is involved in an incident everywhere he goes. Confront many difficulties with your own efforts and a sense of justice! The new system is "Medal Evolution" where players can choose the direction of evolution when the medal evolves, "Combo attribute" for all parts, and "Meda combo" where you can get various bonuses depending on the combination of attributes. , "Medal skills" that are divided into various types according to their abilities and status effects. All new robots have appeared, and the number is 150! Something happens when you play in advance.
overview_zh: 轉學至 Susutake 村的「Koishimaru」每到一處都會捲入事件。憑自身努力與正義感面對重重難關！本次新系統包含「獎牌進化」可在獎牌進化時選擇進化方向、所有零件均具備的「Combo 屬性」，以及依屬性組合可獲得各種加成的「Meda Combo」，還有依能力與狀態效果分類的多種「獎牌技能」。全新機體登場，數量達 150 隻！事先遊玩會發生意想不到的事。

no_intro_name: Medarot 5 - Susutake Mura no Tenkousei - Kuwagata (Japan)

no_intro_name: Medarot Cardrobottle - Kabuto Version (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
Medarot Cardrobottle - Kuwagata Version (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en:
This is a full GBC conversion for Mega Man World 2 by SpecialAgentApe, with an included soundtrack hack by forple.

Features:

Full color conversion
Soundtrack selector: Press the Select Button on the title screen to switch between a remixed OST and the original OST.
Redone soundtrack by forple also includes redone sound effects; those wishing for the original experience can disable it.
Slide and tiptoe graphics corrected
New sprite animations added:

Mega Man blinks while riding Rush Marine
Mega Man’s damage animation now has an extra frame
Energy tank’s “E” blinks on and off like the other entries in the series
New tile animations added:
Metal Man’s, Top Man’s, and Air Man’s stages have received animations and graphical touch-ups similar to their NES counterparts
The magnet generators in Magnet Man’s stage are now animated
Water is now animated in every level containing it
Redone graphics:

The final boss’s graphics have been redrawn by Kensuyjin33 to be more on-model with the rest of the series
The Mag Fly enemy was redrawn to be more on-model while retaining its hitbox
Redone pause menu and icons, along with weapon colors
Bugs fixed:

Mini-bosses in Wood Man’s and Top Man’s stages now disappear when you change screens while they are onscreen
Other changes and features:

Quint’s arena now plays the boss theme
The sky in Crash Man’s stage now changes with Mega Man’s elevation to mimic the effect seen in the NES title
Using Hard Knuckle now makes Mega Man’s hand disappear, rather than him firing it from his gun
overview_zh:
由 SpecialAgentApe 製作的《Mega Man World 2》完整 GBC 改造版，並收錄 forple 的音軌改造。

特色：

全彩轉換
音軌切換器：在標題畫面按 SELECT 鍵可在重新編曲與原版 OST 之間切換。
forple 重做的音軌也包含重做的音效；想保留原版體驗者可關閉。
修正 Slide 與墊腳尖的圖像
新增 sprite 動畫：

洛克人騎乘 Rush Marine 時會眨眼
洛克人受傷動畫多了一格
能量槽的「E」會像系列其他作品一樣閃爍
新增 tile 動畫：
Metal Man、Top Man、Air Man 關卡新增類似 NES 版的動畫與圖像修飾
Magnet Man 關卡的磁鐵發生器現在會動
所有含水關卡的水現在都會動
重繪圖像：

最終 Boss 圖像由 Kensuyjin33 重繪，更貼近系列其他作品形象
Mag Fly 敵人重繪以更貼近設定，同時保留判定範圍
重做暫停選單與圖示，並調整武器顏色
修正 bug：

Wood Man、Top Man 關卡的中 Boss 在切換畫面時會正確消失
其他變更與功能：

Quint 的競技場現在播放 Boss 主題曲
Crash Man 關卡的天空會隨洛克人高度變化，模擬 NES 版效果
使用 Hard Knuckle 時，洛克人的手會消失，而非從砲口射出

overview_en: The third entry in the Mega Man World series gets a coat of paint! Enjoy another blue bomber classic in full color and defeat Wily one more time with colorful backgrounds along gameplay fixes and enhancements.  FEATURES  full color conversion slowdowns removed NES styled pause screen hitbox and animation fixes works in real GBC hardware and emulators
overview_zh: Mega Man World 系列第三作換上新衣！再次全彩享受這款藍色轟炸機的經典之作，配合精彩背景與遊戲性修正、強化，再次擊敗 Wily。 特色  全彩轉換 消除遲緩 NES 風格暫停畫面 修正判定範圍與動畫 可在實體 GBC 主機與模擬器上運作

overview_en:
Mega Man World 4 DX is a hack of Mega Man IV (1993) created by Marc Max and Kensuyjin33 that converts this game developed by Minakuchi Engineering (Solar Striker, Rabio Lepus Special, Bionic Commando (Game Boy), Magic Sword (SNES)) combining content from Mega Man 4 and Mega Man 5 from NES into a Game Boy Color game, working as a hypothetical re-release like The Legend of Zelda: Link's Awakening DX that adds color and improves performance by eliminating slowdowns, as well as other improvements such as a new pause screen based on the style of NES games.

FEATURES

-full color conversion
-slowdowns removed
-NES styled pause screen
-option to toggle charged megabuster recoil
-works in real GBC hardware and emulators
overview_zh:
《Mega Man World 4 DX》是 Marc Max 與 Kensuyjin33 製作的《Mega Man IV》（1993 年）改造版。本作將 Minakuchi Engineering（曾開發 Solar Striker、Rabio Lepus Special、Game Boy 版 Bionic Commando、SNES 版 Magic Sword）開發的這款遊戲，結合 NES 版《洛克人 4》與《洛克人 5》的內容轉換為 Game Boy Color 遊戲，仿照《薩爾達傳說：織夢島 DX》的假想再版，加入色彩、消除遲緩以提升性能，並導入 NES 風格的全新暫停畫面等改進。

特色

-全彩轉換
-消除遲緩
-NES 風格暫停畫面
-可選是否啟用蓄力 Mega Buster 的後座力
-可在實體 GBC 主機與模擬器上運作

overview_en:
"A romhack of Mega Man V.

Fully colorized
Removes slowdown
Pause screen NES style

Released By marc_max"
overview_zh:
「《Mega Man V》的 ROM Hack。

全彩化
消除遲緩
NES 風格暫停畫面

由 marc_max 發布」

title_en: MEGA MAN WORLD - DR. WILY'S REVENGE DX
no_intro_name: Mega Man World - Dr. Wily's Revenge DX (USA)

overview_en:
Mega Man Xtreme is a 2000 Game Boy Color video game developed by Capcom and released by Capcom USA in the USA on December 27, 2000.

The future world is in turmoil. The peace keeping mother computer has been hacked and a virus runs rampant throughout the world. Only Mega Man X has the ability to traverse eight dangerous levels in cyberspace, battle huge bosses along the way and restore the mother computer to its normal state. When the going gets too intense, Mega Man X's pal, Zero can be summoned to help him out of the most dangerous situations. It's an Xtreme situation that only Mega Man X can resolve!
overview_zh:
《Mega Man Xtreme》是 2000 年由 Capcom 開發、Capcom USA 於 2000 年 12 月 27 日於美國發行的 Game Boy Color 遊戲。

未來世界陷入混亂。維持和平的母電腦遭到入侵，病毒在全世界肆虐。只有 Mega Man X 能闖過電腦空間中的 8 個危險關卡、擊敗沿途的巨大 Boss，將母電腦恢復正常。在情勢過於緊張時，Mega Man X 的夥伴 Zero 可前來協助度過最危險的場面。這是只有 Mega Man X 才能解決的 Xtreme 局勢！

overview_en:
Mega Man Xtreme 2 is a 2001 Game Boy Color video game developed by Capcom and released by Capcom USA in the USA on November 12, 2001.

Something mysterious is going on at the reploid research island. The reploids have ceased functionality... their data strangely erased. Now the investigation team encounters "irregular" reploids infected with a strange new DNA chip. This strange DNA chip, known as "DNA Soul", replaces useful data with a devastating Sigma virus and places all reploids in imminent danger. Now, it's up to Mega Man X and his comrade, Zero, to get to the damaged island and find out who is behind the DNA Soul virus.
overview_zh:
《Mega Man Xtreme 2》是 2001 年由 Capcom 開發、Capcom USA 於 2001 年 11 月 12 日於美國發行的 Game Boy Color 遊戲。

Reploid 研究島上發生神秘事件。Reploid 紛紛停止運作……資料離奇消失。調查隊接著遇到感染了奇怪 DNA 晶片的「異常」Reploid。這枚名為「DNA Soul」的晶片會以毀滅性的 Sigma 病毒取代有用資料，使所有 Reploid 陷入危險。現在，必須由 Mega Man X 與夥伴 Zero 前往受害島嶼，找出 DNA Soul 病毒幕後黑手。

no_intro_name: Megami Tensei Gaiden - Last Bible (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

title_en: MEGAMI TENSEI GAIDEN - LAST BIBLE II
no_intro_name: Megami Tensei Gaiden - Last Bible II (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: The sequel "II" released in 1993 is back with Game Boy Color support. This time, many new elements are included. One of them is the "moon age system" that influences the adventure of the player by the tide of the moon. In addition, real-time conversations with demon beasts and the concept of time were incorporated into the game. You can now use traps to join monsters, and some monsters can also be equipped with weapons and armor like humans for adventure. In addition, there is a 5v5 tag battle mode where you can fight while exchanging 5 characters with commands.
overview_zh: 1993 年發行的續作《II》以支援 Game Boy Color 重返舞台。本次新增多項要素，其中之一是依月相影響玩家冒險的「月齡系統」。此外還導入與魔獸的即時對話與時間概念。可使用陷阱讓魔物加入夥伴，部分魔物也能像人類一樣裝備武器與防具進行冒險。並追加 5 對 5 的標籤對戰模式，可透過指令切換 5 名角色作戰。

title_en: MEITANTEI CONAN - KARAKURI JIIN SATSUJIN JIKEN
no_intro_name: Meitantei Conan - Karakuri Jiin Satsujin Jiken (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Conan and Ran go to an old temple in the remote mountains in search of their missing classmate's sister. Can Conan solve the incident that happens in the old temple? ?? The scenario adopted is Game Boy original. Full-scale scenarios and tricks are content that even adults can fully enjoy. Various mysteries are hidden in the game, and it is not easy to solve by Conan alone. In such a case, changing the character may lead to an incident or mystery. At the end of the game, the player's detective degree is evaluated based on the situation and actions that solved the case. If the detective rating is good, something will happen! ?? maybe. Operate Conan to solve the mysterious murder case!
overview_zh: 柯南與小蘭為了尋找同學失蹤的姊姊，前往深山中的古寺。柯南能否解開古寺中發生的事件！？本作劇本為 Game Boy 原創，正式的劇情與詭計連大人也能盡情享受。遊戲中暗藏各種謎團，光靠柯南一人並不容易破解。此時切換角色或許能引出事件或謎題的線索。遊戲結束時，會依破案的情況與行動評價玩家的偵探等級。偵探評價良好，或許還會發生什麼……？？操作柯南破解神秘殺人案吧！

no_intro_name: Meitantei Conan - Kigantou Hihou Densetsu (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: The second detective adventure of Conan's great success, following the "Karakuri Temple Murder Case". The next stage is an isolated island called Strange Rock Island. A mysterious incident involving a treasure awaits Conan and his friends! The basic flow of the game is to operate Conan and others to solve the mysterious incidents that occur in temples and strange rock islands in the mountains. The process of resolving the case finally evaluates the degree of detectiveness. This depends on what action (choice) the player makes. One of the pleasures is not just to solve the case, but to aim for the highest evaluation.
overview_zh: 繼《機關寺殺人事件》之後，柯南偵探冒險的第二作。下一個舞台是名為「奇岩島」的孤島，一場與寶藏有關的神秘事件正等著柯南與夥伴們！遊戲基本流程是操作柯南等人，解開山中寺院與奇岩島上發生的離奇事件。在破案過程中最終會評鑑你的偵探程度，這取決於玩家所做的行動（選擇）。除了破案之外，挑戰最高評價也是樂趣之一。

no_intro_name: Meitantei Conan - Norowareta Kouro (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Conan and his friends will participate in a mystery cruise where participants will solve the mystery of an incident that occurs on a voyage whose destination and schedule are unknown. On the first day of the cruise on the luxury liner Mariel, "Phantom Thief Hummer" suddenly appeared at a dinner party and stole the treasure "Rose Princess Necklace". Who is he? Eventually, Conan and his friends develop into an unexpected incident ... Conan and his friends are invited to a mystery cruise on a luxury liner whose destination and schedule are unknown. A completely original story to be solved. Conan can choose one of Ran, Heiji, and Sonoko as partners, and the event will change depending on the partner chosen. Of course, the ending will also be different. The event scene, which is the key to solving the case, is a mini-game that changes depending on the partner, and you can play alone after clearing the game. If you clear all 51 types of events, the event title will be recorded in the event file, and you can see it at any time once the ending is reached.
overview_zh: 柯南與夥伴們參加一場目的地與行程未知的推理郵輪之旅，要解開航行中發生的事件之謎。豪華郵輪「Mariel」首日的晚宴上，「怪盜Hummer」突然現身，盜走寶物「玫瑰公主項鍊」。他到底是誰？最後，柯南一行人捲入了意想不到的事件……柯南可從小蘭、平次、園子當中選一位當搭檔，事件會依所選搭檔而改變，結局當然也不同。作為破案關鍵的事件場景是隨搭檔變化的迷你遊戲，通關後可單獨遊玩。若清完全部51種事件，事件名稱會記錄到事件檔案中，達成結局後可隨時觀看。

overview_en: Based on the cartoon series of the same name, MEN IN BLACK: The Series 2 starts with aliens invading the Earth. It is up to a covert organization, known only as Men In Black, to stop the invasion. You take the role of Agent J as he hunts down 12 different alien races, including the Skraaldians and the Fmeck. Luckily, J has a wide range of weapons to help him put an end to the alien menace; most notable is the Noisy Cricket. While most aliens are relatively easy to spot, some can change shape and will not reveal themselves until J gets close to them...so keep your eyes peeled. When a stage is cleared, you are treated to an animated sequence that advances the plot. Will the Agent J be able to save the world? Play MEN IN BLACK: The Series 2 and find out.
overview_zh: 改編自同名卡通的《MEN IN BLACK: The Series 2》，劇情從外星人入侵地球展開。阻止侵略的重任落在僅以「Men In Black」為名的祕密組織肩上。你扮演J探員，追捕包括Skraaldians與Fmeck在內的12種外星種族。所幸J擁有多種武器來終結外星威脅，其中最值得一提的是Noisy Cricket。多數外星人不難辨識，但有些會變形，要等J接近才會露出真面目，得時刻保持警覺。每過一關都會有動畫片段推進劇情。J探員能否拯救世界？玩《MEN IN BLACK: The Series 2》一探究竟。

no_intro_name: Men in Black - The Series (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Based on the cartoon series of the same name, MEN IN BLACK: The Series begins with aliens invading the Earth. It is up to a covert organization, known only as Men In Black, to stop the invasion. You take the role of Agent J as he hunts down 12 different alien races, including the Skraaldians and the Fmeck. Luckily, J has a wide range of weapons to help him put an end to the alien menace; most notable is the Noisy Cricket. While most aliens are relatively easy to spot, some can change shape and will not reveal themselves until J gets close to them so keep your eyes peeled. When a stage is cleared, you are treated to an animated sequence that advances the plot. Will Agent J be able to save the world? Play MEN IN BLACK: The Series and find out.
overview_zh: 改編自同名卡通的《MEN IN BLACK: The Series》，劇情從外星人入侵地球展開。阻止侵略的重任落在僅以「Men In Black」為名的祕密組織肩上。你扮演J探員，追捕包括Skraaldians與Fmeck在內的12種外星種族。所幸J擁有多種武器來終結外星威脅，其中最值得一提的是Noisy Cricket。多數外星人不難辨識，但有些會變形，要等J接近才會露出真面目，得時刻保持警覺。每過一關都會有動畫片段推進劇情。J探員能否拯救世界？玩《MEN IN BLACK: The Series》一探究竟。

overview_en:
Join Merlin, the greatest magician of all time, in his quest to save the five mystical worlds from the evil Dragon. Legend's told of the Dragon who would emerge from his sleep every thousand years to reign over the Earth, peace and harmony would give way to war and disaster. Already kindly magical creatures of the worlds have been enslaved by the dragon to carry out his evil designs.
Can Merlin restore peace and harmony to the mystical realms?
overview_zh:
與史上最偉大的魔法師Merlin一同踏上旅程，從邪惡巨龍手中拯救五個神祕世界。傳說這條巨龍每千年從沉睡中醒來，統治大地，使和平與和諧化為戰爭與災難。世界上善良的魔法生物已被巨龍奴役，為其邪惡計謀效力。
Merlin能否讓神祕領域恢復和平與和諧？

overview_en:
Metal Gear Solid is a 2000 Game Boy Color video game developed by Konami Computer Entertainment Japan and Tose and released by Konami Inc. in the USA on May 2, 2000.

Early 21st Century. An incident that rocks the US government takes place. The classified weapon and nuclear-launching bipedal tank Metal Gear has fallen into the hands of terrorists. Seven years after the fiasco at Outer Heaven involving the original Metal Gear, the US government calls in Solid Snake to neutralize the terrorist threat.
overview_zh:
《Metal Gear Solid》是2000年的Game Boy Color遊戲，由Konami Computer Entertainment Japan與Tose開發，Konami Inc. 於2000年5月2日在美國發行。

21世紀初。一起撼動美國政府的事件爆發。機密武器、能發射核彈的雙足戰車Metal Gear落入恐怖份子手中。在初代Metal Gear於Outer Heaven釀成慘劇的七年後，美國政府再度召回Solid Snake，前去解除這次恐怖威脅。

overview_en:
Although Metal Walker is a console RPG, battles are fought in a pinball or billiards-like atmosphere in a top-down perspective arena. As each turn of the battle starts, players decide which direction a Metal Walker will move and how hard they will move. Players are encouraged to form strategies that allow Metal Walkers to hit a single enemy, bounce off a wall, and then hit another enemy, all in a single turn. On the battlefield, players can throw several different types of items onto the field. The items are used when a Metal Walker hits them. Capsules and healing items strengthen and heal Metal Walkers, whereas attack items, such as Napalm, are only useful when the enemy hits them. There also exist Analyzers, which provide the player with Scan Data for any Metal Walker that is bounced into them. Scrap metal won after the battle can then be used with the Scan Data to create new Metal Walkers or purchase items. When an enemy is destroyed, the player's Metal Walker will gain experience points and an item might be obtained. If the player's Metal Walker runs out of Hit points, the player will lose half of the carried scraps and have to start from the last save point.

Outside of battle, players explore a top-down overworld where they can explore various towns and dungeons. Most battles occur as random encounters. The overworld has several interactable elements, such as water, which the player needs a certain number of Cores to cross. The player can only carry one Metal Walker at a time and it will follow the main character on the overworld. By defeating the game's bosses, players earn Core Units, which allow Metal Walkers to evolve into new, stronger forms.
overview_zh:
《Metal Walker》雖是家用主機RPG，戰鬥卻採俯視競技場、有如彈珠台或撞球的氛圍進行。每回合開始時，玩家決定Metal Walker要朝哪個方向移動以及力道多大。鼓勵玩家研擬戰術，讓Metal Walker在一回合內擊中一個敵人、撞牆反彈、再擊中另一個敵人。戰場上玩家可投擲多種道具，當Metal Walker撞到時即生效。膠囊與回復道具能強化或治療Metal Walker；攻擊道具如Napalm則只在敵人撞到時才有用。場上還有Analyzer，能對被反彈撞上的Metal Walker提供Scan Data。戰鬥後獲得的廢鐵可搭配Scan Data用來製造新的Metal Walker或購買道具。擊敗敵人時，玩家的Metal Walker會獲得經驗值，並可能取得道具。若Metal Walker的HP歸零，玩家會失去一半攜帶的廢鐵，並從上一個存檔點重新開始。

戰鬥之外，玩家在俯視大地圖上探索各種城鎮與地下城。多數戰鬥為隨機遇敵。地圖上有各種可互動的元素，例如水域，需要一定數量的Core才能渡過。玩家一次只能攜帶一隻Metal Walker，會在地圖上跟隨主角。擊敗各關卡的頭目可獲得Core Unit，讓Metal Walker進化為更強的形態。

overview_en: Extrasensory RPG to play with "Henshin". The story is that the main character, who longs for the justice group "Kools" that protects the peace and security of the world, trains and joins the army. Let's adventure while transforming into various shapes with the help of "Metamode", a funny, cute and strange guy. There are 90 characters that can be transformed. You can combine it with your favorite appearance and about 500 kinds of techniques such as "Night", "Archer", and "Shinobi". In addition, you can play two players using Game Boy RPG's first communication. You can also defeat monsters with your friends and teach each other how to proceed on the map. There are treasure chests, tools, and maps that can only be entered during communication.
overview_zh: 以「變身」為玩法的超能力RPG。劇情中，主角嚮往守護世界和平與安全的正義組織「Kools」，經歷訓練後加入。在搞笑、可愛又古怪的「Metamode」幫助下變身成各種形態冒險。可變身的角色有90種，能與「Night」「Archer」「Shinobi」等約500種招式自由搭配，組成你喜愛的外型。此外可使用Game Boy RPG首創的通訊功能進行雙人遊玩，與好友一同擊敗怪物，或互相教導地圖前進方法。也有只有在通訊時才能進入的寶箱、道具與地圖。

title_en: METROID II - RETURN OF SAMUS DX
no_intro_name: Metroid II - Return of Samus DX (USA)

overview_en: The thrills and excitement of international women's soccer comes to the Game Boy Color with MIA HAMM SOCCER SHOOTOUT. You can play with or against Mia on 31 different international teams. Hit the field and play an Arcade or Single Match for some quick fun. Those in it for the long haul should try to win the championship in the Tournament mode. If your players are not responding well, you can change the team formation and strategy to get better results. No matter what mode you play, you won't miss a second of the action thanks to two different camera angles. You can also adjust the game time for two, five, or 10-minute periods so you can play a complete match no matter how much free time you have. Get all of the excitement of women's international soccer with MIA HAMM SOCCER SHOOTOUT.
overview_zh: 《MIA HAMM SOCCER SHOOTOUT》將國際女子足球的刺激與興奮帶到Game Boy Color。可選擇與Mia同隊或對抗，並從31支國家代表隊中挑選。上場進行Arcade或Single Match享受快速的對戰；想長期挑戰的玩家可在Tournament模式中挑戰冠軍。如果球員表現不佳，可調整隊形與戰術以獲得更好結果。無論玩哪種模式，兩種不同的鏡頭視角讓你不漏掉任何精彩瞬間。比賽時間還可調為兩分、五分或十分鐘一節，無論空閒多少時間都能完成一場比賽。透過《MIA HAMM SOCCER SHOOTOUT》體驗女子國際足球的魅力。
publisher:
SouthPeak Interactive NA
Ubi Soft EU

overview_en: While everyone is preparing for the town carnival, Pete sends his henchmen to steal all of the decorations. Now, it is up to Mickey, Minnie, Donald, Daisy, and Goofy to race Pete's henchmen and reclaim the decorations. Race on 20 different courses that take place on land and water. By winning races, the characters earn coins that unlock bonuses. Put Pete and his cronies in their place with Mickey's Racing Adventure!
overview_zh: 全鎮正在準備嘉年華時，Pete卻派手下偷走了所有裝飾。米奇、米妮、唐老鴨、黛西與高飛得與Pete的手下競速，奪回裝飾。在20條陸上與水上賽道競速，獲勝可賺取錢幣解鎖獎勵。在《Mickey's Racing Adventure》中讓Pete與他的爪牙嚐到苦頭！

overview_en: Strap on those helmets and make sure your ears are tucked in, Mouseketeers this race is going to get going pretty fast! In the popular tradition of Mario Kart comes this adorable trip around the speedway. Choose from a list of your all-time favorite Disney characters, then rev up your engine and try to blast through the other lovable cartoon crazies in pursuit of first place. Mickey, Donald, Goofy, Minnie, and Daisy are all here, and you can play as any one of them. There are 19 different tracks in the game, so you'll have to practice a lot if you want to make it through all of them. The courses are spread across five circuits each in a different Disney locale. Mickey's Speedway USA also features an exciting Adventure mode, in which you have to save Pluto from the infamous Weasel bunch. If a day at the races with Mickey and his pals sounds like your idea of a good time, you'll love this zany game.
overview_zh: 繫好安全帽、把耳朵塞好，米奇粉絲們，這場比賽要全速衝刺了！延續《瑪利歐賽車》的人氣傳統，這趟賽道之旅可愛逗趣。從你最愛的迪士尼角色名單中挑一位，催下油門，在其他可愛卡通夥伴間奮力拼第一。米奇、唐老鴨、高飛、米妮和黛西都到齊了，任你挑選。遊戲共有19條賽道，要全部跑完得多多練習。賽道分散在五個迪士尼場景的賽事中。《Mickey's Speedway USA》還收錄精彩的冒險模式，玩家要從惡名昭彰的黃鼠狼幫手中救出布魯托。如果與米奇及夥伴們度過賽道日聽起來合你胃口，你會愛上這款瘋狂遊戲。

no_intro_name: Micro Machines 1 and 2 - Twin Turbo (USA, Europe)
overview_en: Tiny cars race through the house in MICRO MACHINES 1 AND 2: Twin Turbo. Take 15 vehicles including jeeps, helicopters, tanks, speedboats, and sports cars onto 60 different tracks like the breakfast table, the garden, and the pool table. Each track has its own obstacles and hazards, so keep your eyes peeled. For example, watch out for the rubber ducks, soapsuds, and whirlpool drain in the bathtub. The biggest hazard is falling off of the track, which costs time and puts you way behind. As an added bonus, there is a Two-Player mode that can be played on one Game Boy: one player uses direction pad and the other uses the buttons to steer his vehicle left or right, the goal being to push the opposition off of the track. With all of the track and vehicle choices, there is plenty to keep you playing MICRO MACHINES 1 AND 2: Twin Turbo.
overview_zh: 《MICRO MACHINES 1 AND 2: Twin Turbo》中，迷你車在屋內競速。15輛載具包括吉普車、直升機、坦克、快艇與跑車，可駛上60條不同賽道，例如早餐桌、花園與撞球桌。每條賽道都有自己的障礙與危險，要時刻警覺。例如浴缸關卡得小心橡皮鴨、肥皂泡和漩渦排水孔。最大的危險是掉出賽道，會浪費時間並大幅落後。額外加分的是，雙人模式可在同一台Game Boy上進行：一名玩家用方向鍵，另一名用按鈕來操控車輛左右轉，目標是把對手擠出賽道。豐富的賽道與車輛選擇，《MICRO MACHINES 1 AND 2: Twin Turbo》耐玩不已。

overview_en: Micro Machines V3 takes the immensely popular miniature-scale racing series to a new level by adding weapons and power-ups to the fray. Now you can grab turbo charges for bursts of speed or blast away opponents with grenades and force-fields. For the first time on a portable system you can still drive all of your favorite Micro Machines vehicles on all the classic tracks such as the pool tale and sand-box, but now you can do it with an attitude! Features 48 courses - breakfast table, school desk, science lab, beach, restaurant, garden, pool table, etc. Power-ups to blitz the opposition include: hammer, mines, force-field, etc. Collect, test and gamble special prize cars for up to 32 vehicles -- including monster trucks, transmutable cars, futuristic cars which are all faster than before.
overview_zh: 《Micro Machines V3》在備受歡迎的微型賽車系列中加入武器與道具，將其推向新高度。可拾取渦輪加速衝刺，或用手榴彈與力場擊退對手。在掌機上首次能駕駛所有你喜愛的Micro Machines載具，跑遍撞球桌、沙坑等經典賽道，但這次更帶勁！收錄48條賽道——早餐桌、書桌、實驗室、海灘、餐廳、花園、撞球桌等等。能擊潰對手的道具包括：鐵錘、地雷、力場等。可收集、試駕、賭注贏取最多32輛特別獎品車——包括怪獸卡車、變形車、未來車，全部比以往更快。

overview_en:
Micro Maniacs is a Racing game, developed by Hyperion Studios and published by THQ, which was released in Europe in 2001.

Micro Maniacs is set in a time where the Earth's resources are being depleted and the very planet is at risk. However a scientist named Dr. Minimizer has an idea: using a device he calls "The Minimizer Ray", he will shrink the planet's population to 1/360 of its original size, and so create a world more suitable to our current status. If this is to be successful, the doctor needs to create a supersoldier: somebody who can prepare the planet for us when we are eventually minimized. In order to do this, the doctor enlists the help of 12 volunteers for an experiment. The experiment consists of racetracks that are considered various dangerous environments as to ascertain the suitable skills for the supersoldier.
overview_zh:
《Micro Maniacs》是Hyperion Studios開發、THQ發行的賽車遊戲，2001年於歐洲推出。

故事設定在地球資源即將耗盡、星球危在旦夕的時代。一位名叫Dr. Minimizer的科學家想出辦法：用他研發的「Minimizer Ray」將全球人口縮小至原本的1/360，創造一個更適合當前狀況的世界。為使計畫成功，博士需要打造一名超級戰士：一個能在我們最終縮小化之前先把世界準備妥當的人。為此他招募12位志願者進行實驗，內容是各種被視為危險環境的賽道，藉此找出超級戰士所需的能力。

overview_en: The programmers at Microsoft are porting a game from their operating system over to the Game Boy Color with MICROSOFT PINBALL ARCADE. This pinball game was great fun on the PC, and now it is in a form that can be taken anywhere. There are seven different tables that are actually representative of real boards made by pinball giant Gottlieb throughout the last century. Each board carries a different theme, whether it is space travel or a haunted house. The boards also contain a varying number of paddles and paddle locations to make each a different playing experience. The graphics in this version are not as shiny as its computer counterpart, but they do translate well to the small color screen. The sound effects and music remain largely the same, adding to the game's arcade feel. The cartridge also contains a short but detailed history of pinball and how it has evolved over the years. MICROSOFT PINBALL ARCADE gives players the classic game with enough boards and extras to keep even the experts busy for quite a while.
overview_zh: 微軟的工程師將自家作業系統上的遊戲移植到Game Boy Color，《MICROSOFT PINBALL ARCADE》於焉誕生。這款彈珠遊戲在PC上玩起來極為有趣，如今變成可隨身攜帶的形式。共有七張不同的桌台，皆取材自彈珠台大廠Gottlieb過去一世紀以來推出的真實機台。每張桌台主題各異，從太空旅行到鬼屋皆有，撥片數量與位置也不同，帶來各具特色的玩法。本版畫面雖然不像PC版那麼亮麗，但已能很好地呈現於這塊小型彩色螢幕上。音效與音樂大致保留，更添街機氛圍。卡帶內還收錄一段簡短但詳盡的彈珠機歷史，介紹其多年來的演變。《MICROSOFT PINBALL ARCADE》提供經典玩法、豐富桌台與額外內容，連高手都能玩上一陣子。
publisher:
Classified Games NA
Cryo Interactive EU

title_en: MICROSOFT - THE 6 IN 1 PUZZLE COLLECTION ENTERTAINMENT PACK
no_intro_name: Microsoft - The 6 in 1 Puzzle Collection Entertainment Pack (USA)
publisher:
Classified Games NA
Conspiracy Entertainment EU

title_en: MICROSOFT - THE BEST OF ENTERTAINMENT PACK
no_intro_name: Microsoft - The Best of Entertainment Pack (USA)
overview_en: Microsoft: The Best of Entertainment Pack is a Puzzle game, developed by Saffire and published by Classified Games, which was released in 2001.
overview_zh: 《Microsoft: The Best of Entertainment Pack》是Saffire開發、Classified Games發行的益智遊戲，2001年推出。
publisher:
Classified Games NA
Cryo Interactive EU

title_en: MIDWAY PRESENTS ARCADE HITS - JOUST _ DEFENDER
no_intro_name: Midway presents Arcade Hits - Joust _ Defender (USA, Europe) (GB Compatible)
