overview_en: If you're really looking for arcade hits, you can't get much bigger than JOUST and DEFENDER. Lording over the game halls in the days after PAC-MAN and DONKEY KONG had lost their luster, these two giants revolutionized gaming forever. JOUST casts you in the role of a noble knight from the future mounting you on an ostrich and sending you off into battle. Making full use of the ostrich, you'll try to gain altitude and get your opponent from above, collecting magical eggs for extra points. DEFENDER puts you in the pilot's seat of an aerodynamic space ship and shoots you through the expanses of a futuristic city under siege. You'll have to fend off other spacecraft, utilize a whole lot of impressive weaponry, and keep the civilians from turning into ugly mutants. Both games are notable for their influence over those to follow, and both are replicated in fine detail for the Game Boys Color. Challenge the computer, or link up and do battle with a friend.
overview_zh: 若想找真正的街機名作，沒有比JOUST和DEFENDER更響亮的了。在PAC-MAN和DONKEY KONG光環淡去後，這兩部巨作主宰了當時的街機廳，永遠地改變了遊戲史。JOUST中你扮演來自未來的高貴騎士，騎乘鴕鳥出征。善用鴕鳥取得高度，從上方擊敗對手，並收集魔法蛋獲得額外分數。DEFENDER則讓你坐進流線型太空船的駕駛艙，飛越受圍攻的未來城市。你得擊退其他飛船、運用各式酷炫武器，並阻止居民變成醜陋的變種人。兩款都對後世遊戲影響深遠，並在Game Boy Color上精細重現。可挑戰電腦，或透過連線與好友對戰。

title_en: MIDWAY PRESENTS ARCADE HITS - MOON PATROL _ SPY HUNTER
no_intro_name: Midway presents Arcade Hits - Moon Patrol _ Spy Hunter (USA, Europe) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Look no further than ARCADE HITS: Moon Patrol & Spy Hunter for classic fun on the run for Game Boy and Game Boy Color. Featuring two classic arcade action titles, ARCADE HITS is packed full of fun. In SPY HUNTER, you play a super spy trying to thwart the nefarious plots of your adversaries. Take to the road in your souped-up roadster in a thrilling overhead chase. Collect power-ups to increase your firepower, oil slicks to give the baddies the slip, and more. Take out as many of the enemies as you can, but watch out for civilians or you'll have some explaining to do! MOON PATROL takes you to the surface of the Moon, driving a fully armed dune buggy in side-scrolling mayhem. Blast away at the Moon critters that are out to get you, and keep an eye out for craters! Both games are perfect graphical reproductions of the vintage arcade machines. Classic and modern gamers can't go wrong with this awesome duo of games!
overview_zh: 想在Game Boy和Game Boy Color上享受隨身的經典街機樂趣，《ARCADE HITS: Moon Patrol & Spy Hunter》非他莫屬。收錄兩款經典街機動作遊戲，內容紮實。在《SPY HUNTER》中，你扮演超級間諜，挫敗對手陰謀。駕駛改裝跑車從俯視角展開精彩追逐，收集道具強化火力、灑油讓敵人滑出車道等等。盡可能擊倒敵人，但小心別誤傷平民，否則就有得解釋了！《MOON PATROL》則帶你登上月球表面，駕駛全副武裝的沙灘車進行橫向卷軸激戰。轟掉想擊倒你的月球生物，並小心隕石坑！兩款遊戲都完美重現經典街機機台的畫面。新舊玩家都不會錯過這套精彩雙作！

overview_en: MILLENNIUM WINTER SPORTS allows you to experience the thrill of victory and the agony of defeat in eight winter sports. Try to get through the course as fast a possible in the bobsled; out-skate your opponent to the finish line in speed skating; see who can jump the farthest in two separate ski-jumping events; see if you can pull off twists and flips while flying through the air in the aerials competition; strap on the skis and navigate the downhill course; or strap on a snowboard to navigate the giant slalom course. For the ultimate in snowboarding action, try to impress the judges with your performance on the halfpipe. Practice any of the events in the Challenge mode or try to become the best winter athlete in the world with the Championship mode. All of the action of winter sports can be yours with MILLENNIUM WINTER SPORTS.
overview_zh: 《MILLENNIUM WINTER SPORTS》讓你體驗八種冬季運動的勝利喜悅與失敗痛苦。雪車中盡快滑完賽道；速度滑冰中超越對手率先衝線；兩項跳台滑雪比賽中比拼誰能跳得最遠；空中技巧中於空中完成翻滾與旋轉；穿上滑雪板挑戰高山速降賽道；或踏上單板挑戰大曲道。想體驗極致單板樂趣，可在U型場地上努力打動裁判。Challenge模式可練習任何項目，Championship模式則挑戰成為世界第一冬季運動員。《MILLENNIUM WINTER SPORTS》帶來全方位冬季運動體驗。

no_intro_name: Minna no Shougi - Shokyuu Hen (Japan) (GB Compatible)

title_en: MINNIE _ FRIENDS - YUME NO KUNI O SAGASHITE
no_intro_name: Minnie _ Friends - Yume no Kuni o Sagashite (Japan)
overview_en: "Minnie & Friends" is a game where you advance your adventure while using email. Email is indispensable for Minnie to solve the mystery of adventure in advancing the game. In addition to the main character Minnie Mouse, 10 characters including Pluto, Donald, Goofy, Chip & Dale, May, Jun, and April have appeared. In addition, the original characters of "Minnie & Friends" will also appear! There are 13 types of mini-games in the middle of the adventure, and after clearing each mini-game, you can play any number of times by selecting "mini-game" on the menu screen.
overview_zh: 《Minnie & Friends》是邊使用電子郵件邊推進冒險的遊戲。要解開冒險之謎，電子郵件對米妮來說不可或缺。除了主角米妮老鼠，還有布魯托、唐老鴨、高飛、奇奇與蒂蒂、May、Jun、April等10位角色登場。此外還有《Minnie & Friends》的原創角色！冒險中穿插13種迷你遊戲，過關後可在選單畫面選擇「迷你遊戲」隨意重玩。

overview_en: The arcade classic MISSILE COMMAND has made its way to the Game Boy Color. The concept of the game is simple: missiles come from the top of the screen, and you are trying to defend the six buildings in the city below. Your goal is to target the missiles and fire your defensive weaponry; if the cloud from your weapon touches the missile, it is destroyed. However, you only have a limited number of shots, and if all sections of the city are destroyed, it's Game Over. After successfully defending a city from two waves of missiles, you will be treated to a special animation that is related to the city. If your friends want to get in on the action, there is an alternating Two-Player mode. Try to defend the world's cities from destruction in MISSILE COMMAND.
overview_zh: 街機經典《MISSILE COMMAND》登陸Game Boy Color。玩法簡單：飛彈從畫面上方落下，你要保護下方的六棟建築。瞄準飛彈發射防衛武器，當武器產生的雲霧碰到飛彈即可摧毀。但彈藥有限，若全部建築被毀就遊戲結束。成功擋下兩波飛彈攻擊後，會播放一段與該城市相關的特別動畫。想與好友同樂，還有輪流進行的雙人模式。在《MISSILE COMMAND》中守護世界各城。

overview_en: The rogue leader General Reznick has threatened to attack the United States with an arsenal of nuclear weapons. In addition, he has kidnapped several UN weapons inspectors. Your mission, should you choose to accept it, is to take control of Ethan Hunt, infiltrate General Reznick's base, rescue the weapons inspectors, and destroy the nuclear arsenal. This may sound impossible, but Hunt has a number of resources available to him including keys, guns, cameras, and a grappling hook. But, Ethan's greatest weapon is stealth. By staying out of sight and not killing the guards, Ethan can earn stealth points that can be translated into additional lives. Will Ethan be able to survive 10 terrorist-filled levels? Only if he uses all of his skills in MISSION: Impossible.
overview_zh: 叛變的Reznick將軍揚言以核武庫攻擊美國，並綁架了多名聯合國武器檢查員。如果你願意接受這項任務，就操控Ethan Hunt潛入Reznick將軍的基地，營救檢查員並摧毀核武庫。聽來不可能，但Hunt擁有鑰匙、槍械、攝影機與抓鉤等多種道具。Ethan最強的武器其實是隱密。藉由不被發現、不殺守衛，他可累積隱密分數轉換為額外生命。Ethan能否撐過10個充滿恐怖份子的關卡？只有在《MISSION: Impossible》中發揮他全部技能才能辦到。

overview_en:
A portable golf game starring Mario and friends. Released with the Mobile GB adapter, you can connect to other versions of the game through a mobile phone network to challenge other players.

Based on Mario Golf, you control several golfing hopefuls as they play through a series of courses against computer or human opponents in order to win. You can play as Mario characters in multiplayer and minigame modes.

Mobile Golf was the final Game Boy Color game released by Nintendo in Japan.
overview_zh:
由瑪利歐與夥伴們主演的可攜式高爾夫球遊戲。隨Mobile GB Adapter一同推出，可透過手機網路連線至本作的其他版本，與其他玩家對戰。

以《瑪利歐高爾夫》為基礎，操控數位高爾夫新秀對抗電腦或人類對手過關奪冠。在多人模式與小遊戲模式可使用瑪利歐角色。

《Mobile Golf》是任天堂在日本推出的最後一款Game Boy Color遊戲。

overview_en: The Mobile Trainer is the operation software for Nintendo and Mobile21's Mobile System GB service, designed for both Game Boy Color and Game Boy Advance. The Mobile Trainer was originally planned to be released as the Mobile Starter Cartridge, but the name was later changed, perhaps to allude to Pokémon Trainers, as the Japanese Pokémon Crystal Version was one of the intended games to use it. The Mobile Trainer was intended to be used for the combination of a peripheral known as the Mobile GB Adapter and Japanese mobile phones to connect to the World Wide Web, similar to services such as Satellaview, Randnet and its successors such as the Nintendo Network. This included games relevant to the Mario series, such as Mobile Golf and the Japanese version of Mario Kart: Super Circuit. The Mobile Trainer's main purpose was as operation software for configuring the Game Boy Color with the user's mobile phone. However, the Mobile Trainer could also be used to connect to a limited web browser for news, and to send email between friends.
overview_zh: 《Mobile Trainer》是任天堂與Mobile21推出的Mobile System GB服務操作軟體，支援Game Boy Color與Game Boy Advance。原本預計以「Mobile Starter Cartridge」之名推出，後來改名，可能是為了暗指Pokémon訓練家——日本版《寶可夢 水晶版》是預定使用的遊戲之一。Mobile Trainer用於搭配「Mobile GB Adapter」周邊與日本手機，連接全球資訊網，類似Satellaview、Randnet以及後續的Nintendo Network等服務。可使用的遊戲包括瑪利歐系列相關作品，如《Mobile Golf》與日版《瑪利歐賽車：超級巡迴賽》。Mobile Trainer的主要用途是作為操作軟體，協助玩家用手機設定Game Boy Color。此外也可連接受限的網頁瀏覽器閱讀新聞，並與朋友收發電子郵件。

overview_en: once upon a time. Born from peaches, Momotaro was carefully raised by his grandfather and grandmother and grew up quickly. One day, Onigashima's oni and others began to attack villages here and there. Momotaro, accompanied by dogs, monkeys, and pheasants, headed for Onigashima, where Enma the Great was waiting, in order to ward off Oni, who bothers people. Peace has returned to the village thanks to Momotaro, who made the great Enma the Great. However! It has been three years since peace returned to the world. Once again, the evil hand has come to an end. The next enemy is the hell king who is in hell deeper than Enma the Great. Momotaro departs again and challenges the battle with the encouraging friends he meets during the journey. Will we be able to regain peace this time as well? ?? , "Momotaro Densetsu" and "Momotaro Densetsu II" have become one epic story and appeared exclusively for GBC. Two software as one story, one with new elements. "Time capsule" that allows you to raise the status value according to the level of Momotaro after the Enma the Great, and "Time capsule" that you can take out the tool in the middle of the trip if you put the tool in the well Full of new systems such as "System", "Point Card System" that allows you to shop with points you collect when you shop, and "Oni Zukan" that collects the collected cards in an album! It is also equipped with a "Kyukei" command that allows you to temporarily save anytime, anywhere, and an "auto mapping function" that allows you to view maps. Re-released as a low-priced version on July 31, 2001. ]
overview_zh: 從前從前，從桃子裡誕生的桃太郎被爺爺奶奶細心扶養，迅速長大。某日鬼島的鬼怪們開始四處侵擾村落，桃太郎帶著狗、猴、雉雞，前往閻魔大王所在的鬼島降伏為害人們的惡鬼。多虧桃太郎打敗閻魔大王，村莊重歸和平。然而！世界恢復和平已過三年，邪惡之手再度伸來。下一個敵人是比閻魔大王更深處地獄裡的地獄王。桃太郎再次出發，與旅途中遇到的勇敢夥伴並肩挑戰。這次能再次找回和平嗎？？《桃太郎傳說》與《桃太郎傳說II》合而為一篇宏大故事，於GBC獨家登場。兩款軟體合為一個故事，並加入新元素：可依擊敗閻魔大王時的桃太郎等級提升能力的「時間膠囊」；把工具放入水井，旅途中可隨時取出的「時間膠囊系統」；購物時累點換購的「Point Card System」；蒐集卡片彙整成冊的「鬼圖鑑」等多項新系統！還搭載可隨時隨地暫存的「休憩」指令，以及自動繪製地圖的功能。2001年7月31日推出廉價重發版。]

overview_en: Monkey Puncher (さるパンチャー Saru Panchā?) is a video game for the Game Boy Color, developed by Taito Corporation, and released in December 2000. The game's goal is to train a monkey to fight in organised boxing matches in order to save the main character's father and sibling.
overview_zh: 《Monkey Puncher》（さるパンチャー）是Taito開發的Game Boy Color遊戲，2000年12月推出。遊戲目標是訓練一隻猴子參加正式拳擊比賽，藉此營救主角的父親與手足。
publisher:
Event Evolution Entertainment EU
Taito JP

overview_en: The classic board game of property management, MONOPOLY, comes to the Game Boy Color. Choose from a wide array of tokens including the car, boot, thimble, and dog. When you get out on the board, your goal is to buy three properties of the same color. When another player lands on your property, he or she must pay you rent. Eventually, you will want to improve your property with houses and hotels so you can charge higher rents. The ultimate goal of the game is to drive all of the competition into bankruptcy. The Game Boy Color edition features all of the classic MONOPOLY gameplay and high stakes. There are eight variations of the game you can play: The Big Boys, Trader's Delight, Even Steven, Small Stuff, Money Isn't Everything, Short and Sweet, Building Shortage, and It's a Start. If you don't get this game, you will not be able to pass "Go" or collect $200.
overview_zh: 經典桌遊《大富翁》登陸Game Boy Color。可從汽車、靴子、頂針、小狗等多款棋子中選擇。上場後，目標是買下三塊同色地產。其他玩家踏上你的地產時必須付租金。最終你會想在地產上蓋房子與旅館，以收取更高租金。終極目標是讓所有對手破產。Game Boy Color版收錄全部經典玩法與賭注。可玩八種變體：The Big Boys、Trader's Delight、Even Steven、Small Stuff、Money Isn't Everything、Short and Sweet、Building Shortage、It's a Start。沒這款遊戲，你連「GO」都過不了，也領不到200元。
publisher:
Majesco Sales NA
Hasbro Interactive JP

no_intro_name: Monster Farm Battle Card GB (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: I really want to win that race! I want to get a rare Monsta! I want to make a strong monsta with a mix! A segré that answers all your questions! There is no doubt that this will win the Very Best Cup.
overview_zh: 好想贏下那場比賽！想得到稀有的Monsta！想透過混合培育出強力Monsta！為您解答所有疑問的祕笈！毫無疑問，這次絕對能拿下Very Best Cup。

no_intro_name: Monster Rancher Battle Card GB (USA) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
Before the world's continents broke up into pieces, a huge disaster hit the world. People prayed to God for help, and God created new life forms. However, new life forms brought new troubles, so God became exasperated and sealed them in "disc stones". Many years have passed since then and God entrusted the humans with the secret of "disc stones". Today people still continue searching for these missing "disc stones" to unlock the lifeforms within. In the anime, the monsters were created by scientists.
It is said that the "disc stones" are almost impossible to find among the ancient ruins. It is said that one monster is trapped inside each one. One day a group of workers excavating the ancient ruins happened to dig up one of these mythical disc stones. The worker who first discovered a disc stone took the disc to the Monsters' Temple. There the priests, using the ancient methods, unlocked the monster inside the disc stone. In a place where ranchers and monsters coexisted peacefully, the battle of the monsters began. As time passed these monster battles became extremely popular, and monster breeding became the standard pastime of the land. Eventually disc stones were found around the entire world. Now ranchers across the globe come together and enter unto battle.
overview_zh:
在世界各大陸尚未分裂前，巨大災難席捲世界。人們向神祈求救助，神創造了新的生命體。然而新生命卻帶來新麻煩，神為此惱怒，將牠們封印於「圓盤石」中。許多年過去，神將「圓盤石」之祕託付給人類。至今人們仍持續尋找那些遺失的「圓盤石」，以解放其中的生命。在動畫中，怪獸是由科學家所創造。
據說「圓盤石」極難在古代遺跡中被發現，每一塊封著一隻怪獸。某天一群在古代遺跡挖掘的工人偶然挖到一塊神話中的圓盤石。最早發現的工人將其帶到怪獸神殿，祭司運用古法解封了石中的怪獸。在牧人與怪獸和平共處之地，怪獸對戰就此展開。隨著時間流逝，怪獸對戰大為盛行，飼育怪獸成為這片土地的標準娛樂。最終全世界都發現了圓盤石，各地的牧人齊聚一堂，展開戰鬥。

overview_en: The MONSTER RANCHER franchise returns with this thoroughly entertaining adventure for handheld gamers. Help the well-meaning Cox fight through 60 enormous, puzzle-filled levels, fending off certain monsters while allying yourself with others. Each level requires you to find a hidden key in order to advance to the next stage, a task that becomes increasingly difficult as things progress. Luckily, you're not going at it alone. You can unlock such friendly beasts as Gali, Hare, Mocchi, Suezo, and Tiger in order to help you fend off all enemies. Each of the friendly monsters serves as a power-up of sorts, increasing your overall speed, granting you temporary invincibility, and more. Fans of the series know just how fun collecting and utilizing monsters can be, and the premise is at its absolute best in this GBA installment. Cool, anime-style graphics abound throughout the massive gaming experience, which allows you to play alone or square off against a fellow Rancher.
overview_zh: MONSTER RANCHER系列再度登場，為掌機玩家帶來精彩冒險。協助善良的Cox闖過60個充滿謎題的巨大關卡，擊退某些怪獸並與另一些結盟。每關都得找到隱藏鑰匙才能進入下一關，難度也逐步提升。所幸你並非孤軍奮戰，可解鎖Gali、Hare、Mocchi、Suezo、Tiger等友善怪獸協助對抗敵人。每隻友善怪獸都類似強化道具，能提升整體速度、賦予短暫無敵等。系列玩家最清楚收集與運用怪獸有多有趣，本作將這個前提發揮到極致。整個遊戲充滿酷炫的動畫風畫面，可單人遊玩或與另一位牧場主對戰。

overview_en: The evolution of a total of 150 monsters changes depending on what kind of training the player gives to the monsters. If you practice attacking, you will grow into an aggressive monster, and if you practice defending, you will grow into a defensive monster. In addition, a 3-player vs. 3-player battle is realized! The number of patterns for one character is as diverse as 30 patterns, and the character walks, hits, jumps, and performs various actions! In addition, instead of the conventional world view, the stage is set to "universe" to provide a new world view. Katsuhisa Hattori is in charge of the music! !! Wonderful sounds will liven up this world!
overview_zh: 共150種怪獸的進化方向會依玩家給予的訓練而改變。練攻擊就會成為攻擊型怪獸，練防禦則成為防禦型。此外還實現了3對3組隊對戰！單一角色擁有多達30種動作模式，會走、會打、會跳，動作豐富多變！本作捨棄傳統世界觀，將舞台改為「宇宙」，提供全新世界觀。音樂由服部克久擔綱！動聽的音樂為整個世界增添色彩。

overview_en: You are out to find the Aztec treasure in MONTEZUMA'S RETURN. The only skills you have are wits and your jumping ability. You must navigate 150 screens, each of which is constructed of platforms, ladders, poles, and rope. Use the elements of the screen to collect all of the treasure and move on to the next area. However, there are a large number of enemies out to stop you including rolling skulls, spiders, snakes, Aztec guards, scorpions, and spikes. Touch any of these hazards and it's Game Over. Luckily, you can pick up new abilities along the way, like walking through enemies and killing an attacker with one touch. Try to collect all of the Aztec's treasure that you can in MONTEZUMA'S RETURN.
overview_zh: 在《MONTEZUMA'S RETURN》中，你的目標是尋找阿茲特克寶藏。你只能依靠機智與跳躍能力，闖過150個由平台、梯子、桿子與繩索構成的畫面。利用畫面上的元素收集所有寶藏並前往下一區。然而途中有大量敵人想阻撓你，包括滾動的骷髏、蜘蛛、蛇、阿茲特克守衛、蠍子和尖刺。碰到任何一個都會Game Over。所幸沿途可獲得新能力，例如穿過敵人，或一觸即殺攻擊者。在《MONTEZUMA'S RETURN》中，盡可能蒐集阿茲特克寶藏吧。

overview_en: Moomin's Tale is an Action game, developed by Pixel and published by SunSoft, which was released in 2000.
overview_zh: 《Moomin's Tale》是Pixel開發、SunSoft發行的動作遊戲，2000年推出。

overview_en:
This really couldn't be any simpler; Moorhen features no complicated gameplay whatsoever. You just shoot things. The real skill though is in knowing just what to shoot and when to shoot it and where some targets reap sizeable rewards others will drain your score in no time at all. One addition to version three is the introduction of protected birds flying around with your intended targets which means that shooting now takes a little more thought than simply blasting into the sky. Other features remain intact and there are still items that need to be avoided such as balloons and various animals on the ground. As usual though you'll need to experiment to find out just what's worth hitting and what's not.

One of the best parts of the Moorhen series has been the hidden bonuses and secrets but they've always been well concealed and you're more likely to discover them by accident rather than actually work them out. I won't spoil some of the goodies we've discovered in this version but Moorhuhn 2 featured spiders that could be spun around trees and the first edition had you shaking trees then shooting down ten leaves for a 100 point bonus. Finally the hi-score chart is still there as is the wonderful battery back up so you can prove that you did actually get a score over 50.
overview_zh:
再簡單不過了，《Moorhen》毫無複雜的玩法。你就是射東西。真正的功夫在於知道該射什麼、何時射、哪裡射——有些目標分數豐厚，有些則會迅速扣光你的分數。第三作的新增項目是受保護的鳥類會與你的目標一同飛舞，因此射擊不再只是對著天空亂掃，得多花些心思。其他特色仍在，地面上仍有氣球與各種動物等需要避開的物品。一如以往，你得實際嘗試才能搞清楚什麼值得打、什麼不值得打。

Moorhen系列最棒的部分之一就是隱藏獎勵與祕密，但向來藏得很好，與其有意尋找，倒不如說是意外撞見。我不會劇透本作中發現的好東西，但《Moorhuhn 2》中有可繞著樹轉的蜘蛛，初代則要你搖樹再射下十片葉子賺取100點獎勵。最後，高分排行榜依舊在，搭載出色的電池存檔，你可以證明自己真的拿到了50分以上。

overview_en: Two fighters enter the arena; the winner will move on in the tournament, the other will be dead. This tournament for control of Earth has been going on for centuries and continues in MORTAL KOMBAT 4. Choose from eight different characters: Fujin, Liu Kang, Sub Zero, Tanya, Quan Chi, Raiden, Reiko, Shinnok, Scorpion, and a few hidden characters as well. Each character has unique moves, combinations, and fatalities, and when you properly execute a fatality, a short animated reenactment plays. Throughout the game, there are special Kombat Kodes that are exclusive to the Game Boy Color, and you'll also get quite a bit of in-game speech. If you think you are the strongest fighter, prove it with MORTAL KOMBAT 4.
overview_zh: 兩名鬥士進場，勝者繼續比賽，敗者死亡。這場爭奪地球控制權的比武已持續數百年，並在《MORTAL KOMBAT 4》中延續。可從八個角色中選擇：Fujin、Liu Kang、Sub Zero、Tanya、Quan Chi、Raiden、Reiko、Shinnok、Scorpion，還有幾個隱藏角色。每位角色都有獨特招式、連段與必殺技（Fatality），成功施展時會播放一段簡短的動畫重現。遊戲全程設有Game Boy Color專屬的Kombat Kodes祕技，並收錄不少遊戲中的語音。如果你自認是最強鬥士，就用《MORTAL KOMBAT 4》來證明。

overview_en: The action of motocross comes to the Game Boy Color with MOTOCROSS MANIACS 2. Hop on a motorcycle and hit the bumps, jumps, and loops of each track. Try to earn the fastest time in the Time Trial mode or take on five different tracks in the Championship mode. No matter how you play, there are power-ups scattered throughout the tracks including nitros, mini riders, jets, gasoline, super suspension, speed, and radials. If you don't like any of the 10 packaged tracks, you can create your own with the Track Editor option. There are a total of 255 obstacles and 32 different items that can be placed on any of the three tracks that you create. Once you have a masterpiece, share it with a friend via a link cable. Get motocross action with MOTOCROSS MANIACS 2.
overview_zh: 《MOTOCROSS MANIACS 2》將越野摩托的刺激帶到Game Boy Color。騎上摩托車，飛越每條賽道的顛簸、跳台與迴圈。在Time Trial模式中挑戰最快圈速，或在Championship模式中挑戰五條不同賽道。無論怎麼玩，賽道上都散布著道具，包括氮氣加速、迷你騎士、噴射、汽油、超級懸吊、加速與輻射輪胎。如果不滿意內建的10條賽道，可使用Track Editor自製。共有255種障礙與32種道具，可放在你建立的三條賽道上。一旦完成傑作，可透過連線傳給朋友。在《MOTOCROSS MANIACS 2》中盡情享受越野摩托的樂趣。

overview_en: Mr Driller is a real-time puzzle game that relies solely on quick-thinking and a bit of planning. Gameplay is a combination of Tetris and Boulder Dash: You have to drill down through multi-colored blocks to reach the bottom while avoiding the consequences of reckless drilling (blocks may fall on you and crush you).
overview_zh: 《Mr. Driller》是一款即時益智遊戲，全靠快思與一點規劃。玩法結合了《俄羅斯方塊》與《Boulder Dash》：你必須鑽穿彩色方塊一路向下到底，同時避免方塊砸下來壓死自己。

overview_en: Yeti wants to rule over the entire world, so he is using his magical powers to turn it into a large mass of ice. There is only one person who can save the day: Mr. Nutz the Squirrel. You take control of Mr. Nutz as he runs, jumps, swims, and flies through six different worlds. Along the way, you must collect acorns, coins, extra lives, and extra energy. Getting through the levels and collecting the goodies is no walk in the park, as there are plenty of bad guys waiting to stop you. Luckily, Mr. Nutz can dispose of them by jumping on their heads or whipping them with his giant tail. Will you be able to find all of the secrets and defeat Yeti in MR. NUTZ?
overview_zh: 雪人想統治整個世界，於是用魔法把世界凍成一大塊冰。能拯救眾人的只有一位：松鼠Mr. Nutz。你操控Mr. Nutz跑跳、游泳、飛越六個不同世界。途中要收集橡實、金幣、額外生命與額外能量。闖關與蒐寶並非散步那麼輕鬆，許多壞蛋等著阻撓你。所幸Mr. Nutz能踩在他們頭上，或揮動巨大的尾巴將其擊倒。你能在《MR. NUTZ》中找出所有祕密並打敗雪人嗎？

no_intro_name: Ms. Pac-Man - Special Color Edition (USA) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: All of the action and fun of the first feminist arcade game can be put in the palm of your hand with MS. PAC-MAN: Special Color Edition. You take control of the yellow disk adorned with lipstick and a pink bow, better known as the lovely Ms. Pac-Man. The goal is to guide her around the maze and eat all of the dots, avoiding the four ghosts that chase you. There are power pellets located in each corner of the maze which, when eaten, turn the ghosts blue. Once this happens, the ghosts can be eaten. Occasionally, fruit will float into the maze, which can be munched for extra points. If your friends want to play along, there is an alternating Two-Player mode. As an additional bonus, a complete version of SUPER PAC-MAN is included on the cartridge. Play as the first female arcade hero in MS. PAC-MAN: Special Color Edition.
overview_zh: 把首款女性主義街機名作的所有樂趣與動作放進掌中——《MS. PAC-MAN: Special Color Edition》。你操控塗著口紅、繫著粉紅蝴蝶結的黃色圓盤，也就是可愛的吃豆小姐。目標是引導她繞迷宮吃光所有豆子，閃避四隻追擊的鬼魂。迷宮四角各有一顆能量豆，吃下後鬼魂變藍可被吃掉。偶爾會有水果飄入迷宮，吃了得高分。多人遊玩可使用輪流的雙人模式。額外加映：卡帶中還收錄完整版《SUPER PAC-MAN》。在《MS. PAC-MAN: Special Color Edition》中扮演首位女性街機英雄。

no_intro_name: Ms. Pac-Man - Special Colour Edition (Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: MTV Sports: Pure Ride is a Sports game, developed by Visual Impact and published by THQ, which was released in 2000.
overview_zh: 《MTV Sports: Pure Ride》是Visual Impact開發、THQ發行的運動遊戲，2000年推出。

title_en: MTV SPORTS - SKATEBOARDING FEATURING ANDY MACDONALD
no_intro_name: MTV Sports - Skateboarding featuring Andy MacDonald (USA, Europe)
overview_en: MTV SPORTS: Skateboarding Featuring Andy Macdonald puts the excitement of performing a 360-kickflip in the palm of your hand. Choose from four different skaters, including Andy Macdonald himself. Get used to the board and the controls with the Free Ride mode and, when you are ready for some action, try to meet the quotas for each of the 18 stages in the game. Some require that you earn a set amount of points, which you do by collecting the MTV icons, which are spread throughout the arena. To collect each one, you must perform a different trick. Other stages have more demanding quotas including navigating an obstacle course, collecting balloons, and crashing through items. Now you can skateboard anywhere with MTV SPORTS: Skateboarding Featuring Andy Macdonald.
overview_zh: 《MTV SPORTS: Skateboarding Featuring Andy Macdonald》把360 kickflip的快感放到你掌中。可從四位滑板手中選擇，包括Andy Macdonald本人。先在Free Ride模式熟悉滑板與操作，準備好就挑戰18關各自的目標。有些要求達到指定分數，可透過收集場上的MTV圖示完成，每收一個都得施展不同招式。其他關卡的目標更具挑戰性，包括穿越障礙賽道、收集氣球、撞穿物品等等。現在你可以在《MTV SPORTS: Skateboarding Featuring Andy Macdonald》中隨時隨地玩滑板。

title_en: MTV SPORTS - T.J. LAVIN'S ULTIMATE BMX
no_intro_name: MTV Sports - T.J. Lavin's Ultimate BMX (USA, Europe)
overview_en: MTV SPORTS: T.J. Lavin's Ultimate BMX puts the action of riding a stunt BMX bike in the palm of your hand. The game offers six different professional riders: T.J. Lavin, Fuzzy Hall, Chris Duncan, Mike Ardelean, Jamie Bestwick, or Colin Winkelmann. Try to pull off the most spectacular stunts in three different play modes: Vert, Street, and Dirt. Vert has the player performing tricks on a halfpipe; Street has the player navigate a course with ramps, fun boxes, and other objects while executing tricks to win the judges attention; and the Dirt event puts the player on a dirt track to try to pull off big tricks without biting the dust. Master the skills of professional BMX in MTV SPORTS: T.J. Lavin's Ultimate BMX.
overview_zh: 《MTV SPORTS: T.J. Lavin's Ultimate BMX》把BMX特技單車放進你掌中。遊戲提供六位職業車手：T.J. Lavin、Fuzzy Hall、Chris Duncan、Mike Ardelean、Jamie Bestwick、Colin Winkelmann。在三種模式中施展最炫的特技：Vert、Street與Dirt。Vert在U型場地表演技巧；Street要在跳台、Fun Box等障礙的賽道上邊跑邊耍特技博取裁判青睞；Dirt則在土路上做大招但別摔在地上。在《MTV SPORTS: T.J. Lavin's Ultimate BMX》中精通職業BMX技巧。

overview_en: The 4th cooking series! Let's make dessert! !! Once you have decided on the dessert you want to make, go out to the town to get the ingredients and recipes. Once you have all the ingredients, start making desserts and enjoy cooking while playing mini games! When it's done, choose decorations and toppings and serve. The desserts made for each stage are evaluated and the results affect the event. There are more than 60 types of dessert main toppings and decorations, and there are many types of combinations! Let's make a delicious dessert aiming for a true ending!
overview_zh: 第4彈烹飪系列！一起來做甜點吧！！決定要做的甜點後，外出到鎮上採買食材與食譜。蒐齊材料就邊玩迷你遊戲邊製作甜點，享受料理樂趣！完成後選擇裝飾與配料端上桌。每關完成的甜點會被評鑑，結果會影響事件發展。甜點的主配料與裝飾超過60種，組合方式繁多！朝著真結局做出美味甜點吧！

title_en: NAKAYOSHI COOKING SERIES 5 - CAKE O TSUKUROU
no_intro_name: Nakayoshi Cooking Series 5 - Cake o Tsukurou (Japan)
Nakayoshi Pet Series 1 - Kawaii Hamster (Japan) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: The first of the "Nakayoshi Pet Series" that real-minded pets can keep in Game Boy is a hamster! It shows a lot of realistic and agile movements and cute facial expressions that you can enjoy as if you were really breeding.
overview_zh: 「中良ペット系列」首作，可在Game Boy上飼養貼近實際的寵物——倉鼠！展現大量逼真敏捷的動作與可愛表情，宛如真的在飼養。

no_intro_name: Nakayoshi Pet Series 2 - Kawaii Usagi (Japan) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: A pet breeding simulation based on a rabbit, which is popular among small animals. There are three types of rabbits, the real white rabbit, the dwarf fly-on, and the Netherlands dwarf, and the more you get along with each other by feeding them, the more patterns of gestures will increase. The operation method is a command selection method using icons, and anyone can play directly. Even children can enjoy it with peace of mind because they do not dare to use raw expressions such as rabbits getting sick or dying. Also, since it is compatible with a pocket printer, it is possible to print images of "memorial albums". You can also use the communication cable to go to your friend's rabbit's house or fortune about the day.
overview_zh: 以小動物中超人氣的兔子為主題的寵物飼育模擬。共有真實的白兔、迷你垂耳兔、荷蘭侏儒兔三種，餵食增進感情後動作模式也越多。操作為使用圖示的指令選擇式，任誰都能直接上手。不會出現兔子生病或死亡等較直接的表現，連小朋友也能安心遊玩。支援Pocket Printer，可列印「紀念相簿」的圖像。也能透過通訊纜線造訪朋友的兔子家或進行當日占卜。

overview_en: "Nakayoshi Pet Series" where genuine pets can be kept in GB. Five types of miniature dachshund, Labrador, Shiba Inu, Pomeranian, and Maltese are now available. The more you take care of discipline, training, feeding, cleaning, walking, etc. such as "prone" and "hands", the more patterns of emotions and emotions will increase. The walking course is riverbed, shopping street, housing complex, etc. Adult puppies can also be invited to participate in events such as dog shows and Frispeedock Championships.
overview_zh: 可在GB上飼養真實寵物的「中良ペット系列」。本作收錄迷你臘腸、拉布拉多、柴犬、博美、馬爾濟斯五種狗。多花心思進行管教、訓練、餵食、清理、散步等照顧（如「趴下」「握手」），表情與情感模式就會增加。散步路線有河岸、商店街、住宅區等。長大後的小狗還可參加狗展、Frispeedock錦標賽等活動。

overview_en: "Nakayoshi Pet Series" where genuine pets can be kept in GB. Four popular pet stores and calico cats are here! Feed and clean the kittens to raise the "good friend level" and "care points", and as the points increase, the types of food and play will increase. There is also a "cat show", which depends on the height of the "good friend level" and the condition of the kitten, so it is difficult to win the championship. Comes with "memorial album", "fortune-telling", "communication" and "printer".
overview_zh: 可在GB上飼養真實寵物的「中良ペット系列」。本作收錄四種人氣寵物店常見品種與三花貓！餵食、清潔小貓提升「好朋友等級」與「照顧分數」，分數越高，可選的食物與遊戲種類也越多。還有「貓咪秀」，依「好朋友等級」高低與小貓狀態而定，奪冠並不容易。附「紀念相簿」「占卜」「通訊」與「印表機」功能。

overview_en: The fifth in the Nakayoshi Pet series. The facial expressions and gestures of the hamster are more expressed. In addition to Golden, Jungarian, and Roborovski, there are two types of hamsters that can be bred: Campbell and Chinese. By editing the main character, you can enter the name, gender, and face, and you can reflect yourself in the game and participate in the event with the hamster. A pseudo time flow is added, and the transition of time from morning to night affects the behavior of hamsters. Items can be obtained at pet stores using "Nakayoshi Points". It supports communication cables, so you can send your hamster to your friend's hamster's house.
overview_zh: 中良ペット系列第五彈。倉鼠的表情與動作更加豐富。除了黃金、加卡利亞、羅波羅夫斯基外，還能飼養坎貝爾與中國倉鼠兩種。可編輯主角的姓名、性別與長相，把自己投射進遊戲中與倉鼠一起參加活動。新增模擬時間流動，從早到晚的時間變化會影響倉鼠行為。可用「中良點數」在寵物店換取道具。支援通訊纜線，可把自家倉鼠送到朋友的倉鼠家作客。

overview_en: Prove you can handle the thunder! Featuring more drivers - Dale Earnhardt Jr., Tony Stewart and Adam Petty join the field of 33 NASCAR drivers and 7 legends. 18 licensed NASCAR tracks, now including Homestead-Miami Speedway. New TV and Crew Chief audio - Bob Jenkins and Benny Parsons in the booth plus Crew Chief and Spotter assistance. Wheel-to-wheel NASCAR competition - go head-to-head on the split-screen! Six driving views, including behind the wheel. Multiple modes - Quick Race, Single Race, or Championship Season.
overview_zh: 證明你能駕馭雷霆！登場車手更多——Dale Earnhardt Jr.、Tony Stewart、Adam Petty加入33位NASCAR車手與7位傳奇車手陣容。18條官方授權NASCAR賽道，新增Homestead-Miami Speedway。全新電視轉播與技師團隊音訊——Bob Jenkins與Benny Parsons擔任主播，並有技師長與觀察員提供協助。並肩較勁的NASCAR競賽——分割畫面正面對決！六種駕駛視角，包括方向盤後方視角。多種模式：Quick Race、Single Race或Championship Season。

overview_en: The thrill of victory and the agony of smashing into another car comes to the Game Boy Color in NASCAR CHALLENGE. Hop in and take on the best NASCAR has to offer including Jeff Gordon, Dale Jarret, and Rusty Wallace. Try to master Topeka, Sonoma, and Seneca raceways in the Practice mode, and when you're ready for some competition, try to survive six laps on any of the tracks. To prevail in the championship, you will have to try to win the pole position on each track and beat the pack to the finish line. Depending on how well you finish in each race, you are awarded points. The driver with the most points at the end of all three races is declared the champion. Can you handle all of the excitement and action in NASCAR CHALLENGE?
overview_zh: 勝利的快感與撞車的痛苦在《NASCAR CHALLENGE》中於Game Boy Color上重現。上車挑戰NASCAR頂尖車手，包括Jeff Gordon、Dale Jarret、Rusty Wallace。在Practice模式中熟悉Topeka、Sonoma、Seneca賽道，準備好就挑戰各賽道的六圈賽事。要奪下冠軍，得在每條賽道搶下竿位並率先衝過終點線。每場比賽依名次計分，三場過後得分最高者封冠。你應付得了《NASCAR CHALLENGE》的所有刺激與動作嗎？

overview_en: Fans of stock car racing, get ready to take on the challenges of NASCAR HEAT for the Game Boy Color. Play as or against 10 stock car racing legends like Dale Earnhardt, Jeff Gordon, Bobby Labonte, and Dale Jarrett. After you pick a driver, you can learn the twists and turns of each track with the Beat the Heat mode, where each of the 10 professional drivers give the player challenges to complete. When you are ready for some competition, get after the other drivers in a Quick Race, or try to become NASCAR champion in the Championship mode. No matter which mode you choose, you will have to make strategic decisions to conquer each race. Most notably, determining when to make a pit stop can win or lose a race. Get all of the racing action you want with NASCAR HEAT.
overview_zh: 改裝房車賽迷們，準備在Game Boy Color上挑戰《NASCAR HEAT》。可扮演或對抗10位賽車傳奇人物，如Dale Earnhardt、Jeff Gordon、Bobby Labonte、Dale Jarrett。選定車手後，可在Beat the Heat模式中熟悉各賽道，由10位職業車手出題挑戰玩家。準備好就在Quick Race中正面交鋒，或在Championship模式中爭奪NASCAR冠軍。無論哪種模式都得做出戰略決策征服每場比賽，尤其是何時進站維修，往往決定勝負。在《NASCAR HEAT》中盡情享受賽車。

overview_en: Based on the Fox cartoon series of the same name, NASCAR RACERS is a glimpse of what NASCAR will be like in the future. You can choose from five different cars, each with its own abilities that increase during the course of the race including one car that becomes invincible and another that gains a huge burst of speed. After you choose the correct car for your driving style, hit one of the 20 tracks available in the game. While you're on the track, you need to keep an eye out for the oil slicks, water puddles, and random debris that will slow down or damage your car. If the car sustains too much damage, then the race is over, for you anyway. Luckily, there is a truck to refuel and repair your vehicle. Will you be able to cross the finish line in NASCAR RACERS?
overview_zh: 改編自同名福斯卡通的《NASCAR RACERS》預示了未來NASCAR的樣貌。可從五輛車中挑選，每輛擁有獨特能力，比賽過程中會強化，包括一輛變得無敵、另一輛獲得巨幅加速。挑好符合自己駕駛風格的車後，挑戰20條賽道。場上要小心油污、水坑與隨機殘骸，會讓車減速或受損。受損過重比賽就結束了——至少對你而言。所幸場上有卡車可加油與維修。你能在《NASCAR RACERS》中衝過終點線嗎？

no_intro_name: NBA 3 on 3 featuring Kobe Bryant (USA) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Experience the wide-open nature of three-on-three basketball with NBA 3-ON-3 FEATURING KOBE BRYANT. You can choose your squad from all of the NBA teams that include actual rosters. Once you have chosen your favorite team, play a Pick-Up game to get accustomed to the game style and controls. When you are ready for some competition, try to win the NBA championship in a 14, 28, 56, or 82-game Season mode. If you don't want to waste your time playing a full season, you can go straight to the Playoffs. No matter what mode you play, the rules of the game can be adjusted, including shot clock violations, backcourt violations, and the maximum number of points that can be scored. If you want to put yourself into the game, you can with the Create-A-Player option. Now you can try to conquer the NBA in NBA 3-ON-3 FEATURING KOBE BRYANT.
overview_zh: 在《NBA 3-ON-3 FEATURING KOBE BRYANT》中體驗3對3籃球的開放性。可從含有真實名單的所有NBA球隊中挑選你的隊伍。選定愛隊後，先打Pick-Up比賽熟悉風格與操作。準備好就在14、28、56或82場的Season模式中爭奪NBA總冠軍。不想花時間打整季也可直接跳到季後賽。任何模式下，比賽規則都可調整，包括24秒違例、後場違例、最高得分上限。想把自己加進遊戲，可使用Create-A-Player功能。在《NBA 3-ON-3 FEATURING KOBE BRYANT》中征服NBA。

overview_en: Are you ready to hoop it up with the pros? Do you have the skills to make it to the next level and take your opponent out like the trash? Are your moves too much to handle? Well, then you might just be ready for the most extreme three-on-three action that videogaming has ever seen. In the bold tradition of arcade classics like NBA JAM, NBA HOOPZ focuses on totally unrealistic, terrifically acrobatic basketball. Fly through the air as you pull off summersault dunks, mind-blowing alley-oops, and graceful outside jumpers. There are no complicated plays or boring rules to hold you back do what you have to do to wrestle the ball away from the other team and put it in the hole. Shaquille O'Neal takes the spotlight in this one, but there are plenty of other NBA stars to play as (though some need to be unlocked by winning games). Choose which players you want to play on your NBA franchise, then jump it up and see who's the best. Other than the regular gameplay, you can try your hand at 2-Ball, Around the World, Twenty-One, and the Three-Pont Shootout.
overview_zh: 準備好與職業球員一起鬥牛了嗎？你的技術夠進階、夠把對手清出場嗎？你的動作夠強悍嗎？那你大概準備好迎接電玩史上最極致的3對3對戰了。延續《NBA JAM》等街機經典的傳統，《NBA HOOPZ》主打完全不寫實、極盡華麗的籃球。空中翻滾灌籃、震撼空中接力、優雅外線跳投。沒有複雜戰術或無聊規則拖累你——盡你所能搶下球塞進籃框。Shaquille O'Neal是這作的焦點，但還有許多NBA球星可選（部分需要靠勝場解鎖）。挑出心儀球員組成NBA陣容，跳球，看看誰最強。除了一般比賽，你還能挑戰2-Ball、Around the World、Twenty-One與三分大賽。

no_intro_name: NBA in the Zone (USA) (Rev 1) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: NBA In The Zone is a Sports game, developed by KCEK and published by Konami, which was released in 1999.
overview_zh: 《NBA In The Zone》是KCEK開發、Konami發行的運動遊戲，1999年推出。

overview_en: It's called "The Zone." Marcus Camby found it in last year's NBA Playoffs. We took it from him and put it in this box. Open it up. Shoot the lights out! New dunking animations. Let it fly with the game on the line! All-new freethrow design - don't brick it! All-new camera angles! Smooth animations and jump shots!
overview_zh: 它叫做「The Zone」。Marcus Camby去年在NBA季後賽找到了它，我們從他那裡奪過來放進這款遊戲裡。打開它，盡情射爆對手吧！全新灌籃動畫。關鍵時刻放手一搏！全新罰球設計——別投鐵了！全新攝影機視角！流暢動畫與跳投！

overview_en: Get even more arcade-style basketball action with NBA JAM 2001. Choose from all 29 NBA teams -- over 140 professional players in all. Get used to the controls and action with the Practice mode, and when you are ready for some real action, try to become NBA champion by playing through the Season. If the Season is giving you a headache, you can skip it and go straight to the Playoffs. No matter what mode you play in, there will be plenty of fastbreaks and rim-rattling jams. Throw even more action into the game with the Fun mode that includes Hot Spots, Hang Time, Half Court Dunks, and On Fire. You can also unlock secret teams like the East and West All-Star teams. Get all of the basketball action you want in the palm of your hand with NBA JAM 2001.
overview_zh: 《NBA JAM 2001》帶來更多街機風格籃球動作。可從全部29支NBA球隊中挑選——共逾140位職業球員。在Practice模式熟悉操作，準備好就挑戰Season模式爭奪NBA總冠軍。覺得整季煩人也可直接跳到季後賽。無論哪種模式，都會有大量快攻與震撼灌籃。Fun模式更加爆笑，包括Hot Spots、Hang Time、Half Court Dunks和On Fire。還可解鎖東區、西區明星隊等隱藏隊伍。在《NBA JAM 2001》中把所有籃球熱血握在掌中。

title_en: NBA SHOW TIME - NBA ON NBC
no_intro_name: NBA Show Time - NBA on NBC (USA)
overview_en: Take on all of the action of two-on-two basketball with no rules in NBA SHOWTIME: NBA on NBC. Choose from all 29 NBA teams, featuring over 100 professional players then hit the hardwood and work on your moves in the Practice mode. When you want some competition, work your way through the Season to the Championship. If you don't want to bother with the Season, skip it, and leap right into the Playoffs. With over 30 different slam-dunk animations, you are going to see something new every time you play. If you can get a player to sink three buckets in a row, watch him light up the scoreboard while he is on fire. If you enjoy wild basketball action, you will love the action in NBA SHOWTIME: NBA on NBC.
overview_zh: 在《NBA SHOWTIME: NBA on NBC》體驗無規則的2對2籃球。可從全部29支NBA球隊中挑選，超過100位職業球員任你揮灑，先在Practice模式練動作。想找對手就在Season模式一路打進總冠軍。不想打整季可跳過，直接進入季後賽。30多種灌籃動畫，每次都能看到新東西。讓球員連進三球，看著他「燃燒起來」秀翻計分板。喜歡狂野籃球的玩家，肯定會愛上《NBA SHOWTIME: NBA on NBC》。

title_en: NEW ADVENTURES OF MARY-KATE _ ASHLEY, THE
no_intro_name: New Adventures of Mary-Kate _ Ashley, The (USA, Europe) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: NFL BLITZ is the NFL at its finest, featuring easy to run plays and unparalleled action all in breakneck speed. With no penalties, no substitutions and nowhere to hide, NFL BLITZ is more than a game, it's an NFL highlight film! Featuring all the bone-crunching, fast-paced, hard-hitting football fun you expect from the arcade hit - only smaller! Every one of the 30 NFL teams are included in this 7-on-7 pigskin extravaganza! Feel free to mash the competition using each of the 18 offensive plays and 9 defensive plays.
overview_zh: 《NFL BLITZ》是NFL最華麗的呈現，戰術簡單、動作飛快、刺激無比。沒有犯規、沒有換人、沒地方躲，《NFL BLITZ》不只是遊戲，它就是NFL精華片！承襲街機原作的硬碰硬、快節奏、痛擊到骨頭裡的美式足球樂趣——只是縮小了！全部30支NFL球隊都收錄在這場7對7的橄欖球大戰！盡情用18種進攻戰術與9種防守戰術蹂躪對手。

overview_en: NFL BLITZ 2000 brings fast-paced, no-holds-barred football action to the field. Rather than offering a standard football game, NFL BLITZ 2000 changes the rules a little. The game is played seven-on-seven, and it takes 30-yards to get a first down. But probably the most important rule change is that there are no penalties. When you start the game, you have the choice of playing in the Arcade or Season mode. Arcade has you pick a team and try to defeat all of the other teams in the league, while in the Season mode, you take your team through the grueling NFL season in hopes of making the playoffs and winning the Super Bowl. No matter how you play the game, you will not miss a second of the action, thanks to three different camera angles. Try to keep your helmet on while playing NFL BLITZ 2000.
overview_zh: 《NFL BLITZ 2000》把節奏飛快、毫無拘束的美式足球帶上球場。本作不走標準路線，而是稍稍改寫規則：採7對7比賽，要推進30碼才算First Down。但最大改變恐怕是沒有犯規。開賽時可選Arcade或Season模式。Arcade中你選一隊擊敗聯盟其他隊伍；Season則帶領自家球隊熬過漫長NFL賽季，期望進入季後賽並贏得超級盃。無論哪種模式，三種視角讓你不漏掉任何瞬間。在《NFL BLITZ 2000》中緊握住你的頭盔吧。

overview_en: If you're a football fanatic looking for arcade-style gridiron action, then NFL BLITZ 2001 from Midway is right up your alley. Take all the tiresome rules and regulations of standard football and throw them out the window BLITZ is fast, furious, and out of control. Real-life NFL stars are modeled here in a brutish, cartoon-inspired fashion and their burly physiques are perfect for inflicting damage on your opponents. Listen and laugh at humorous commentary from the in-game announcer and garner helpful hints from the sexy cheerleaders as you attack your way upfield towards the goal line. And you can savor all the bone-crushing pigskin mayhem again and again in a helmet-cracking replay mode. You'll watch in awe as your team catches fire after a series of excellent plays. Compete in four stadiums new to the franchise like the "Stadium of the Future," watch the action from a range of angles (including Blimp view), go head-to-head in Single-Player competition, and much more. Taunting, tackles, and touchdowns are all part of the "First -and-Goal Frenzy" of NFL BLITZ 2001.
overview_zh: 如果你是熱愛街機風格美式足球的狂熱粉，Midway的《NFL BLITZ 2001》正合你意。把標準美式足球那些煩人規則全丟出窗外——BLITZ快速、瘋狂、失控。真實NFL球星以粗獷卡通風重現，魁梧體格最適合對對手造成傷害。傾聽並大笑遊戲解說員的幽默評論，並從性感啦啦隊收取進攻提示，一路殺向達陣線。還可在頭盔被打碎的回放模式中一再回味精彩亂鬥。看著你的隊伍在連串好球後燃燒起來。可在四座新場館對戰，包括「Stadium of the Future」，從多種視角觀賞比賽（包括飛艇視角），還可進行單人對戰等等。叫陣、擒抱、達陣全是《NFL BLITZ 2001》「First-and-Goal Frenzy」的一部份。

overview_en: Professional hockey comes to the Game Boy Color with NHL 2000. You can choose from all of the NHL teams, including the expansion Atlanta Thrashers. Play an Exhibition game to work on your tactics and strategies, and when you are ready for long-term competition, try to endure an 82-game Season, or just skip straight to the Playoffs. While in the game, you will have to learn when to make line changes and determine when it's a good time to pull the goalie. In addition to these tactical decisions, you must also deal with penalties and infractions including offsides, two-line passes, and icing. However, you can customize the game by turning off certain rules and setting the referee's strictness. In addition, there are three different difficulty levels. Will you be able to claim the Stanley Cup? The only way to find out is by playing NHL 2000.
overview_zh: 職業冰球登陸Game Boy Color——《NHL 2000》。可選擇全部NHL球隊，包括擴張隊Atlanta Thrashers。打Exhibition比賽磨練戰術，準備好就挑戰82場的Season模式，或直接跳到季後賽。比賽中要學會何時換線、何時拉下守門員。除戰術考量外，還得處理犯規與違規，例如越位、跨線傳球與冰球非法清空。但你可關閉特定規則並調整裁判嚴格度自訂比賽。三種難度可選。能否奪下Stanley Cup？玩《NHL 2000》才知道。

overview_en: Strap on your skates and hit the ice with NHL BLADES OF STEEL. Play with or against all of the teams in the NHL in the Exhibition mode, where you can get your bearings and learn winning tactics. Then, put those tactics to the test in the Season mode and try to win the Stanley Cup. If you don't like the ups and downs of Season play, go straight to the Playoffs. And when your friends question your dominance in the rink, go after them in the Two-Player link cable option. If the game ends in a tie, you will have to try to win it all in a shootout. No matter what mode you play, you must win the fights because if you lose, you go to the box. However, you can use the Practice mode to work on your fighting skills as well as your shootout technique. Will you be able to handle the action of NHL BLADES OF STEEL?
overview_zh: 穿上冰刀踏上冰面——《NHL BLADES OF STEEL》。在Exhibition模式與所有NHL球隊對戰，熟悉操作、學習取勝戰術。再到Season模式檢驗你的戰術，挑戰Stanley Cup。若不喜歡賽季的起伏可直接跳到季後賽。當朋友質疑你的霸主地位，用連線雙人對戰把他制服。比賽平手得進入Shootout決勝。無論哪種模式，打架都得贏，輸了就被罰下。Practice模式可同時練拳與Shootout技巧。你能應付《NHL BLADES OF STEEL》的全部刺激嗎？

overview_en: Try to win Lord Stanley's Cup in NHL BLADES OF STEEL 2000. You can play with or against any NHL team and use the Exhibition mode to learn the controls and practice your skills. When you want to test your tactics, enter the race for the Stanley Cup in the Season mode. If getting through a Season is a bigger time investment than you want, just skip it and go straight to the Playoffs. When a friend challenges your domination of the rink, put him in his place with the link cable Two-Player mode. No matter what mode you play, you will have to win the game in a shootout if it's tied at the end of regulation. And if you get into a fight and lose, you will have to sit in the penalty box. Try to become the greatest hockey player in the world with NHL BLADES OF STEEL 2000.
overview_zh: 在《NHL BLADES OF STEEL 2000》中爭奪Stanley Cup。可與或對抗任何NHL球隊，並用Exhibition模式熟悉操作、磨練技巧。想檢驗戰術就進入Season模式爭奪Stanley Cup。覺得整季太花時間就直接跳到季後賽。當朋友挑戰你的霸主地位，就用連線纜線雙人模式教訓他。任何模式下若終場平手都得進入Shootout，且打架打輸就得進罰球區。在《NHL BLADES OF STEEL 2000》中成為世界最強冰球選手。

overview_en: Characters from your favorite Nicktoons are motorin' for victory in this Game Boy Color racer! Get on the Rugrats track... watch out for those Angry Beavers ... steer clear of SpongeBob SquarePants. Race on multiple tracks based on your favorite Nicktoons - Tommy, SpongeBob SquarePants, Eliza, The Angry Beavers, CatDog and Arnold. Whether you play alone or against a friend, it looks like a wild ride ahead!
overview_zh: 你最愛的Nicktoons角色們在這款Game Boy Color賽車遊戲中油門全開！跳上Rugrats賽道……小心Angry Beavers……閃躲SpongeBob SquarePants。在多條取自你最愛Nicktoons的賽道上競速——Tommy、SpongeBob SquarePants、Eliza、The Angry Beavers、CatDog和Arnold。不論單人或雙人對戰，都將是一場狂野旅程！

title_en: NINTAMA RANTAROU - NINJUTSU GAKUEN NI NYUUGAKU SHIYOU NO DAN
no_intro_name: Nintama Rantarou - Ninjutsu Gakuen ni Nyuugaku Shiyou no Dan (Japan)
overview_en: Let's practice ninjutsu (mini game) at Ninjutsu Gakuen! The game is divided into a "training volume" and a "competition volume". In "Training Volume", you can choose your favorite character from Rantaro, Kirimaru, and Shinpei to play the game. Each shinobi has its own characteristics, so let's identify and challenge each individuality! In "Battle Volume", you can play CPU battles and 2P battles using communication cables. The number of characters that can be used increases with the "Training Volume". There are five types of games: "jumping", "gunning", "shuriken", "foot rowing", and "swimming".
overview_zh: 在「忍術學園」一起練忍術（迷你遊戲）吧！遊戲分為「修行篇」與「對戰篇」。「修行篇」中可從亂太郎、霧丸、新兵衛中選一位你喜歡的角色遊玩。每位忍者都有自己的特色，找出個性、迎接挑戰吧！「對戰篇」中可進行CPU對戰，並透過通訊纜線進行2P對戰。可使用的角色會隨「修行篇」進度而增加。共有「跳躍」「射擊」「手裏劍」「划船」「游泳」五種遊戲。

title_en: NISEMON PUZZLE DA MON! - FEROMON KYUUSHUTSU DAISAKUSEN!
no_intro_name: Nisemon Puzzle da Mon! - Feromon Kyuushutsu Daisakusen! (Japan)

overview_en:
No Fear Downhill Mountain Biking is a mountain bike video game released in 1999 on PlayStation and 2001 on the Game Boy Color, Dreamcast version been planned but never released.
An extreme sports game, the mountain bike consists of mountain tracks from circuits around the world of varying difficulty. The game was inspired by tracks including San Francisco's Telegraph Hill and New Zealand's Matukituki Rapids. 
The game has eight different riders and a number of tracks for the bikes to descend.
overview_zh:
《No Fear Downhill Mountain Biking》是1999年於PlayStation、2001年於Game Boy Color推出的山地車遊戲，Dreamcast版曾規劃但未發行。
本作是極限運動遊戲，山地車路段取材自世界各地巡迴賽中難度不一的山道，靈感來源包括舊金山的Telegraph Hill與紐西蘭的Matukituki Rapids。
遊戲提供八位車手與多條下坡賽道。

title_en: NOBUNAGA NO YABOU - GAME BOY BAN 2
no_intro_name: Nobunaga no Yabou - Game Boy Ban 2 (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en:
It's Big-Ears' birthday! Can you help Noddy collect things for the party? Will Noddy earn enough pocket money to buy Big-Ears a really big cake? Explore Toyland, meet your favourite characters, and take part in 10 exciting adventures. Help Noddy find the party invitations--but watch out for Bumpy Dog. Go to the Dark Wood where Sly and Gobbo have hidden all the party hats. From gathering hidden eggs in Farmer Straw's field to jumping over rolling fruit in the market square, help Noddy get everything for Big-Ears' Birthday party. Watch out for Sly and Gobbo, who always seem to be up to mischief, and even Master Tubby Bear, Bumpy Dog and Clockwork Mouse, who accidentally get in the way sometimes.

Encourages recognition of left and right, numbers, colours and objects. There are different skill levels which cater to a range of abilities and ages from 3 upwards.
overview_zh:
今天是Big-Ears的生日！能幫Noddy蒐集派對用品嗎？Noddy能賺到足夠的零用錢，買一個超大蛋糕給Big-Ears嗎？探索Toyland，遇見你最愛的角色，參與10段刺激冒險。協助Noddy尋找派對邀請函——但小心Bumpy Dog。前往Dark Wood，那裡Sly與Gobbo藏起了所有派對帽。從Farmer Straw的田裡撿藏起的蛋，到市集廣場跳過滾動的水果，協助Noddy備齊Big-Ears生日派對的一切。當心總在搗蛋的Sly和Gobbo，連Master Tubby Bear、Bumpy Dog和Clockwork Mouse有時也會擋路。

本作協助孩童認識左右、數字、顏色與物件。內含多種難度，適合3歲以上不同程度的孩子。

overview_en: With such notable worldwide popularity, it was only a matter of time before the boys of NSYNC got their own handheld video game. Join JC, Justin, Chris, Joey, and Lance in the most daring adventure the group has ever embarked upon, helping them get to the show before curtain time. Of course, life is never easy for these highly sought-after recording artists, so you'll have to help them with such challenges as making snacks and running errands in a stretch limousine. If you can accomplish these feats, you might even get to help the band warm up for their big show with a friendly game of hackey-sack! Packed with challenges and dangerous distractions, the game's real appeal is its goofball spirit and dedication to the band itself. Each of the group's members' distinct personality shines through, making this an awesome title for anyone who likes NSYNC. They might not be the most likely of video game heroes, but have you ever seen a more handsome bunch of characters?
overview_zh: 憑著風靡全球的人氣，NSYNC的男孩們擁有自己的掌機遊戲只是時間問題。與JC、Justin、Chris、Joey、Lance一同踏上樂團史上最大膽的冒險，協助他們在開演前抵達會場。當然，這些萬眾矚目的歌手生活從不輕鬆，你得幫他們應付各種挑戰，例如做點心，或開加長禮車跑腿。若這些任務都過了，甚至能在大型演出前陪樂團熱身玩個沙包！這款遊戲塞滿挑戰與危險干擾，但真正的魅力在於它的搞笑精神，以及對樂團的真誠致敬。每位團員的鮮明個性都展現得淋漓盡致，是NSYNC粉絲不可錯過的佳作。雖然他們大概不是典型的電玩英雄，但你看過更帥氣的角色組合嗎？

title_en: NUSHI TSURI ADVENTURE - KITE NO BOUKEN
no_intro_name: Nushi Tsuri Adventure - Kite no Bouken (Japan) (Rumble Version)
overview_en: "Nushi fishing" series GBC version. While maintaining the heartwarming world view of battle = fishing role-playing game, which is the basic concept, an adventurous element is added. With the motif of pirates, we will cooperate with our friends and sail the continent while considering the ocean currents, wind, and food conditions. The five continents that appear are also Western, Inca, Japanese, and Arctic. You can enjoy the adventure feeling of the world in the field. Fish also appeared as river fish and sea fish, and the first fish in the series also appeared. A cartridge with vibration is used, and the attack and rampage of the fish become vibration and are transmitted to the hand.
overview_zh: 「主釣り」系列GBC版。沿襲「戰鬥＝釣魚」RPG的溫馨世界觀基本理念，加入冒險元素。以海盜為主題，與夥伴合作，考量洋流、風向與糧食狀況航越大陸。登場的五個大陸包括西方、印加、日本與北極，可在田野中體驗世界冒險的氣氛。魚類也分河魚與海魚，並收錄系列史上首次登場的新魚種。卡帶內建震動，魚的攻擊與掙扎會化為震動傳到手中。

overview_en: Throw yourself headlong into a frenetic race at 500 mph through New York of the "Fifth Element"! Take nosedives into the dizzying maze of streets to pick up speed, attack your opponents with fire bonuses, zip past both static and moving obstacles, leaving destruction in your wake. Take your pick from more than 25 airborne vehicles, including the famous taxi and the Police car.
overview_zh: 在《第五元素》的紐約街頭以500英里時速衝刺！俯衝穿入令人暈眩的街道迷宮加速、用火焰道具攻擊對手、閃過靜態與移動障礙，留下一路破壞。可從超過25種飛行載具中挑選，包括知名的計程車與警車。

overview_en:
O'Leary Manager 2000 is a football player-manager game released in 2000 for the Game Boy Color. The player can choose whether they want to focus on the management side of football, play the matches themselves on the game's 2D match engine, or combine the two features for a more in-depth experience. It is endorsed by Irish football manager David O'Leary, who was managing Leeds United A.F.C. at the time of the game's release.

The management side of O'Leary Manager 2000 is very comprehensive when compared to similar Game Boy Color games. The player can choose from 240 fully licensed teams from the top two leagues in England, France, Italy, Spain, Germany and the Netherlands to play as or manage, with each team having 16 players in their squad. There is also the option to promote a number of fictional youth team players. However, most of the youth team players are of low ability, so could only realistically be used for back-up when managing a decent quality team.

As with any football management game, the transfer market can often play a key role in whether the team achieves success. The player's selected team starts with either 10.5m or 5.5m to spend, depending on whether they were in the first or second tier of their country's football hierarchy. The player can also recoup some money by selling players to other teams. This is done by first offering the footballer for sale at a chosen price, from which interested clubs would then place offers that the player could choose to accept or not. Once a price is agreed, the footballer transfers clubs instantly. The values of footballers alternate greatly during the game, with the then Real Betis striker Denílson being the most expensive player at the start of the game. An unfortunate bug in the game allows the player to gain a huge sum of money (around 70m) if the club goes into a certain amount of debt, which pretty much negates the need for financial planning.

The club's board of directors constantly give assessments as to how they think the club is progressing under your management. This involves a short statement visible at the menu screen. Other features available the menu screen include options to change you team line-up, formation and tactics; all vital when creating a successful team.

Similarly, you can decide what methods of training your team will undertake for the coming week. You have the option to "do training", which generally increase the statistics of your players (but at the risk of injuring them) or to concentrate on fitness training (which helps players stay fit and injured players to recover quicker). Alternatively, you may choose to skip training entirely for the week. You also have the option to view various statistics, such as league tables from around the world, top goalscorers and to view the squads of all available teams on the game.
overview_zh:
《O'Leary Manager 2000》是2000年於Game Boy Color推出的足球球員兼經理人遊戲。玩家可選擇專注於足球管理面，自行操作2D比賽引擎打比賽，或同時兼顧獲得更深入的體驗。本作由當時執教Leeds United A.F.C.的愛爾蘭足球教練David O'Leary代言。

相較於同類Game Boy Color作品，《O'Leary Manager 2000》的管理面相當完整。可從英、法、義、西、德、荷六國頂尖兩級聯賽共240支官方授權球隊中選擇執教或擔任球員，每隊16人。也可選擇拉拔虛構青年隊球員上來，但多數能力偏低，僅能作為實力球隊的替補。

如同任何足球管理遊戲，轉會市場往往是球隊成功與否的關鍵。所選球隊起手依照所屬一級或二級而擁有1050萬或550萬資金，也可賣球員回收資金。先以指定價格掛牌，有興趣的球隊出價，玩家決定是否接受。價格談妥即立即轉隊。球員身價變動極大，遊戲開局身價最高的是當時效力Real Betis的前鋒Denílson。一個遊戲漏洞讓玩家在球隊負債到一定金額時可獲得鉅款（約7000萬），幾乎讓財務規劃失去意義。

董事會會持續評估你管理下的球隊進展，以一段短文出現在主選單畫面。主選單還可調整陣容、隊形與戰術，這些都是組成成功球隊的關鍵。

同樣可決定本週採取哪種訓練方式：「進行訓練」通常會提升球員數值（但有受傷風險），或專注於體能訓練（讓球員保持體力，並讓傷者更快恢復）。也可選擇本週不訓練。此外可查看世界各地聯賽積分榜、最佳射手榜，以及所有可選球隊的陣容等統計資料。

overview_en: Abe thought he had saved the Mudokons from the evil Glukkons with the destruction of Rupture Farms. However, a new threat has arisen: the Glukkons who run Soul Storm Brewery have created an addictive drink made from Mudokon bones. To get all of the bones they need, Soul Storm has an army of Mudokon slaves excavating the Mudokon City of Death; when one of the slaves is worked to death, he becomes part of the product. The only person who can put a stop to this is Abe. You will guide Abe as he travels through the brewery and tries to destroy the boilers. Along the way, he must also try to save his people. Luckily, Abe can talk to his people and get them to help defeat the enemies and solve puzzles he faces along the way. Help Abe save the Mudokons in Oddworld Adventures 2.
overview_zh: Abe以為摧毀Rupture Farms就把Mudokon們從邪惡的Glukkons手中救了出來。然而新威脅出現：經營Soul Storm Brewery的Glukkons以Mudokon骨頭製成讓人成癮的飲料。為取得所需骨頭，Soul Storm豢養大批Mudokon奴隸挖掘Mudokon死亡之城；奴隸過勞而死後，遺骸即成為產品的一部分。能阻止這一切的只有Abe。引導Abe穿過釀酒廠並摧毀鍋爐，途中還得救出族人。所幸Abe能與族人對話，請他們協助擊敗敵人、解開沿途謎題。在《Oddworld Adventures 2》中協助Abe拯救Mudokons。

overview_en: The production masterpiece theater series has appeared in GB, the first is "Rascal the Raccoon". The purpose of the player is to live with Rascal on behalf of the main character and return to the forest a year later. As he gets better at communicating with Rascal, Rascal becomes more and more disciplined. Besides discipline, I also learn various tricks. There are two mini-games, and the points obtained there become items for food and communication. In house making, you can freely choose the remodeling of Rascal's room and the bed.
overview_zh: 「世界名作劇場」系列登上GB，第一彈是《浣熊拉斯卡爾》。玩家代替主角與Rascal生活，目標是在一年後讓牠回歸森林。隨著與Rascal的溝通變好，Rascal會越來越守規矩。除了管教外還能教各種把戲。內含兩種迷你遊戲，賺到的點數可換食物與通訊用的道具。在房子佈置中可自由更換Rascal房間的裝潢與床鋪。

title_en: OJARUMARU - MANGAN JINJA NO ENNICHI DE OJARU!
no_intro_name: Ojarumaru - Mangan Jinja no Ennichi de Ojaru! (Japan) (GB Compatible)

title_en: OJARUMARU - TSUKIYO GA IKE NO TAKARAMONO
no_intro_name: Ojarumaru - Tsukiyo ga Ike no Takaramono (Japan) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: A game of the popular NHK educational anime "Ojarumaru". There are 3 modes: "Tabi-dachi niru (single-player mode)", "Tokukun-itashimasu (mini-game mode)", and "Welcome to me (two-player battle mode)". Set in Moonlight Town, the game is played in a sugoroku format, collecting items placed in each square, playing against each other in a mini game, and more when one of them finishes at the pond. The one who collects the points of is the winner.
overview_zh: 改編自NHK人氣教育動畫《阿茲漫畫大王》（Ojarumaru）的遊戲。共三種模式：「Tabi-dachi niru（單人模式）」、「Tokukun-itashimasu（迷你遊戲模式）」、「Welcome to me（雙人對戰模式）」。舞台設於月光町，遊戲以雙陸棋形式進行，蒐集各格內的道具，互相挑戰迷你遊戲，先有人到池塘終點即結算，蒐集點數最多者獲勝。

overview_en: It is about 16 times larger than the previous work and has a rich content. You can play against the computer by choosing from 1 to 4 levels. Equipped with modes that help Othello improve, such as a function that waits without returning the battle, a repeat function that allows you to check the battle from the beginning to the end, a focus function that tells you the best place, and an edit function that allows you to start from your favorite shape. In addition, there are plenty of contents such as a two-player battle mode, a quiz mode, and a "dan certification adventure mode" where you can receive dan certification from the Japan Othello Federation.
overview_zh: 比前作大16倍左右，內容豐富。可選1至4等級與電腦對戰。搭載多項提升黑白棋實力的模式，例如可不還原的等待功能、能從頭到尾回顧對局的Repeat功能、提示最佳落子的Focus功能、以及可從喜愛局面開始的編輯功能。此外還有大量內容，如雙人對戰模式、解謎模式，以及可獲得日本黑白棋聯盟段位認定的「段位認定冒險模式」。

no_intro_name: Other Life - Azure Dreams GB (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
Ou Dorobou Jing - Angel Version (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: The popular comic "King of Bandits JING", which was serialized in "Comic BomBom" until March 1998 and released up to Volume 7, has appeared as a monster breeding simulation RPG. Train and strengthen the monsters you get in battles and events, and acquire various abilities. The battle is a 3v3 team battle. The purpose of the final game is to get the treasure of Aqua Vitae, but even after clearing it, you can enjoy discovering new events and collecting monsters. More than 200 types of monsters can be collected, and more than 30 characters such as friends will appear. You can also exchange monsters with your friends using the communication cable.
overview_zh: 於《Comic BomBom》連載至1998年3月、單行本出至第7卷的人氣漫畫《王盜JING》登場為怪獸飼育模擬RPG。透過戰鬥與事件取得怪獸並培育強化，學會各種能力。戰鬥為3對3隊伍對戰。最終目標是奪得「Aqua Vitae」之寶，破關後仍可發現新事件、繼續蒐集怪獸。可蒐集的怪獸超過200種，並有超過30位夥伴登場。可透過通訊纜線與朋友交換怪獸。

no_intro_name: Ou Dorobou Jing - Devil Version (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: The popular comic "King of Bandits JING", which was serialized in "Comic BomBom" until March 1998 and released up to Volume 7, has appeared as a monster breeding simulation RPG. Train and strengthen the monsters you get in battles and events, and acquire various abilities. The battle is a 3v3 team battle. The purpose of the final game is to get the treasure of Aqua Vitae, but even after clearing it, you can enjoy discovering new events and collecting monsters. More than 200 types of monsters can be collected, and more than 30 characters such as friends will appear. You can also exchange monsters with your friends using the communication cable.
overview_zh: 於《Comic BomBom》連載至1998年3月、單行本出至第7卷的人氣漫畫《王盜JING》登場為怪獸飼育模擬RPG。透過戰鬥與事件取得怪獸並培育強化，學會各種能力。戰鬥為3對3隊伍對戰。最終目標是奪得「Aqua Vitae」之寶，破關後仍可發現新事件、繼續蒐集怪獸。可蒐集的怪獸超過200種，並有超過30位夥伴登場。可透過通訊纜線與朋友交換怪獸。

title_en: OWARAI YOIKO NO GEEMUMICHI - OYAJI SAGASHITE 3 CHOUME
no_intro_name: Owarai Yoiko no Geemumichi - Oyaji Sagashite 3 Choume (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
Pac-Man - Special Color Edition (USA) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
One of the most popular and influential games of the 1980's, Pac-Man stars a little, yellow dot-muncher who works his way around to clear a maze of the various dots and fruit which inhabit the board.

Pac-Man's goal is continually challenged by four ghosts: The shy blue ghost Bashful (Inky), the trailing red ghost Shadow (Blinky), the fast pink ghost Speedy (Pinky), and the forgetful orange ghost Pokey (Clyde). One touch from any of these ghosts means a loss of life for Pac-Man.

Pac-Man can turn the tables on his pursuers by eating of the four Energizers located within the maze. During this time, the ghosts turn blue, and Pac-Man can eat them for bonus points. This only lasts for a limited amount of time, as the ghost's eyes float back to their center box, and regenerate to chase after Pac-Man again.

Survive a few rounds of gameplay, and be treated to humorous intermissions between Pac-Man and the ghosts.
overview_zh:
1980年代最受歡迎、影響最深遠的遊戲之一，《Pac-Man》主角是隻可愛的黃色吃豆怪，他要在迷宮中四處清除豆子與水果。

Pac-Man的目標不斷受到四隻鬼魂阻撓：害羞的藍色鬼Bashful（Inky）、緊跟在後的紅鬼Shadow（Blinky）、迅速的粉紅鬼Speedy（Pinky）、以及健忘的橘鬼Pokey（Clyde）。任何鬼魂碰到Pac-Man都會讓他失去一條命。

Pac-Man可吃下迷宮中四顆Energizer反過來追擊鬼魂。這段時間內鬼魂變藍，Pac-Man可吃掉牠們得獎勵分。效果僅限短時間，鬼眼會飄回中央方塊重生繼續追擊。

撐過幾關後可欣賞Pac-Man與鬼魂之間的爆笑插曲。

no_intro_name: Pac-Man - Special Colour Edition (Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
Pachinko CR Mouretsu Genshijin T (Japan) (GB Compatible)

title_en: PACHINKO HISSHOU GUIDE - DATA NO OUSAMA
no_intro_name: Pachinko Hisshou Guide - Data no Ousama (Japan) (GB Compatible)
Pachipachi Pachisurou - New Pulsar Hen (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: In PAPERBOY, all you have to do is deliver the newspaper to your subscribers. While this sounds easy enough, obstacles seem to constantly get into your way...things like dogs, kids on tricycles, traffic, and pedestrians. Since this is your neighborhood, you want punish those who do not subscribe to your paper, so you break their windows with rolled up newspapers. You will even hear the glass shatter thanks to the digitized sound effects and music! At the end of each level there is a bonus course, where you can demonstrate your newspaper-flinging accuracy and earn bonus points. Fortunately, there are three difficulty levels to help you get accustomed to the controls of the game. Will you become the master of your neighborhood or just another punk on a bike? Play PAPERBOY and find out.
overview_zh: 在《PAPERBOY》中你只需把報紙送到訂戶手中。聽起來簡單，但路上的障礙物層出不窮——狗、騎三輪車的小孩、車流和行人都來阻撓。既然這是你家社區，當然要懲罰那些沒訂報的人，用捲起來的報紙砸破他們的窗戶。數位音效與音樂連玻璃碎裂聲都聽得清清楚楚！每關結束都有獎勵賽道，可秀出你的擲報精準度賺取額外分數。提供三種難度，幫你熟悉操作。你會成為街坊霸主，還是另一個騎車的小屁孩？玩《PAPERBOY》一探究竟。

overview_en:
Papyrus is an Action game, developed by Planet Interactive and published by Ubisoft, which was released in Europe in 2000.

Players are the titular Papyrus, an Egyptian fisherman tasked with rescuing the kidnapped Pharaoh's daughter Theti. The game is a platform video game in which players traverse 21 levels across areas including the Forbidden Forest to the Pharaoh's Tomb, with the objective to reach the exit of the level, defeating a boss at the end of each.
overview_zh:
《Papyrus》是Planet Interactive開發、Ubisoft發行的動作遊戲，2000年於歐洲推出。

玩家扮演同名主角Papyrus，一位埃及漁夫，受命營救被綁架的法老之女Theti。本作為平台遊戲，玩家穿越21個關卡，地點涵蓋禁忌森林乃至法老陵墓，目標是抵達關底並擊敗每關的頭目。

overview_en: A simulation racing game that develops a racing game using Choro-Q, which winds and runs a mainspring. Aim to be a true Choro Q racer. Various events occur, such as exploring the map to find new areas, finding Takara boxes, and finding mysterious shops. By adjusting the output of the steering wheel and mainspring, it is possible to perform targeted bargaining such as line driving. Like the real Choro-Q, by applying the perfect custom of the body, it is possible to step into the wasteland and run on the wall of the cliff. There are more than 250 types of modified parts. Of course, you can bet on parts for online competition.
overview_zh: 以發條轉動奔跑的Choro-Q為主角的賽車模擬遊戲。目標是成為真正的Choro Q車手。途中會發生各種事件，例如探索地圖找新區域、發現Takara盒、發現神祕商店等。透過調整方向盤與發條輸出，可進行精準的入彎攻略。如同實體Choro-Q，只要妝點完美的車身，就能踏入荒原、爬上崖壁。改裝零件超過250種，當然也可在通訊對戰中以零件作為賭注。

overview_en:
Perfect Dark is a 2000 Game Boy Color video game developed by Rare and released by Rare Inc., under license by Nintendo of America, in the USA on August 28, 2000.

Joanna Dark has almost finished her training, but she isn't a Carrington Institute agent just yet. She has only one test left - but this time, her mission is for real. In it, she will uncover a far-reaching conspiracy that will introduce her to the shadowy dataDyne Corporation and hint at things to come... From the creators of GoldenEye 007 for the N64 comes Rare's masterpiece... Perfect Dark.

• Lots of ways to play! Snipe from long range, commandeer an enemy vehicle - even shoot from a first-person view.
• Multiplayer games! Link up and get blown away with eight 2-player games and a total of 35 maps. (Game Link cable sold separately.)
• Huge bosses! From helicopters to giant cyborg spiders, go up against some of the most intimidating bosses ever to appear on Game Boy.
• Amazing voice and sound! Hear more digitized voices and sound effects in Perfect Dark than in any other handheld game.
overview_zh:
《Perfect Dark》是2000年的Game Boy Color遊戲，由Rare開發，由Rare Inc. 在Nintendo of America授權下於2000年8月28日在美國推出。

Joanna Dark的訓練即將完成，但她還不是Carrington Institute的正式幹員，還有最後一項測試——但這次任務貨真價實。在這場任務中，她將揭發一場深廣的陰謀，引出神祕的dataDyne Corporation，並暗示後續發展……由N64《GoldenEye 007》的開發團隊呈現的Rare傑作——《Perfect Dark》。

• 多種玩法！遠距狙擊、奪取敵人載具，甚至還有第一人稱視角射擊。
• 多人遊戲！連線後可玩八種雙人遊戲，共35張地圖。（連線纜線另售。）
• 巨型頭目！從直升機到巨型半機械蜘蛛，挑戰Game Boy上最具壓迫感的頭目。
• 驚人的語音與音效！比任何其他掌機遊戲都更多的數位語音與音效。

overview_en: A complete sequel to "2", a story between "3". The stage is "Pia Carrot Nakasugi Dori Store". Four months have passed since that summer story, and Koji Maeda, the main character of "2," has been busy with the university entrance exams. However, just before the winter vacation, he began to wonder, "Is this really the course of my life?" To find the answer, Koji visits the Nakasugi-dori store again. There are three junior high school girls with nostalgic people! Thus, the days of the suffering of Koji began again. Of course, the "album" mode where you can collect event visuals, the "music" mode where you can enjoy the BGM of the game, and the "uniform select" function are still alive! 6 types of mini games are also recorded, and the fun is more than 2.2 times! !!
overview_zh: 《Pia Carrot e Youkoso!! 2》的完整續作，是介於《2》與《3》之間的故事。舞台是「Pia Carrot 中杉通店」。距那年夏天的故事已過四個月，《2》的主角前田耕司忙於大學入學考試。然而就在寒假前，他開始疑惑：「這真的是我想要的人生嗎？」為尋找答案，耕司再度造訪中杉通店，那裡有三位令人懷念的女中學生！於是耕司的辛甘日子又開始了。當然，可蒐集事件圖的「相簿」模式、可欣賞遊戲BGM的「音樂」模式、還有「制服選擇」功能依舊保留！收錄6種迷你遊戲，樂趣比2.2倍還多！

no_intro_name: Pitfall - Beyond the Jungle (USA, Europe) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: An evil force known as Scourge is manipulating the Red Lucense in order to take over the jungle. Now it is up to Pitfall Harry Jr. to use the Blue Lucense to restore peace to the land. You control Harry as he battles through 15 levels that span jungles, volcanoes, prisons, and caverns. Each world has unique variations; for example, you have to swing from vines in the jungle stages, while using a pickaxe to battle scorpions and other monsters. For some additional help, Harry has quick reflexes to allow him to dodge bullets and jump over some of the bad guys. In addition to Harry's innate skills, there are power-ups scattered throughout the levels including extra lives, gold bars, crystals, and extra health. Help Harry restore peace to the jungle in PITFALL: Beyond the Jungle.
overview_zh: 邪惡勢力Scourge正操控Red Lucense試圖征服叢林。Pitfall Harry Jr.必須使用Blue Lucense恢復這片土地的和平。操控Harry闖過15個關卡，橫跨叢林、火山、監獄與洞穴。每個世界都有獨特的玩法，例如叢林關卡要靠藤蔓擺盪，並用鎬擊退蠍子等怪物。Harry反應靈敏，可閃過子彈與部分敵人。除了與生俱來的技巧外，關卡中還散布著額外生命、金條、水晶與額外體力等道具。在《PITFALL: Beyond the Jungle》中協助Harry讓叢林重歸和平。
publisher:
Crave Entertainment NA
Interplay Entertainment EU
Pony Canyon JP

overview_en: Released in conjunction with the 2001 cinematic remake, PLANET OF THE APES, the game actually takes its plot from the 1968 original film. Play as Ulysses (the character that Charlton Heston originated), a human who has fallen to a post-apocalyptic Earth ruled by primates. Ulysses quickly discovers that he is being considered a sort of messiah by many of the apes (he's considered an enemy by others), and it is becoming readily apparent that the creatures want him to save them from the dangers of this new world. The game is packed with puzzles to solve, and the graphics are among the best ever created for the Game Boy Color. Modes of play include: Normal, in which Ulysses walks from location to location; Athletic, in which the hero runs and jumps through each level of the story; and Stealth, which requires Ulysses to crawl and slink into hidden areas not accessible in other modes. It's not easy to compare PLANET OF THE APES to any other video game, and that's really its charm.
overview_zh: 《PLANET OF THE APES》配合2001年同名電影翻拍版上市，但劇情實際取自1968年原作。玩家扮演Ulysses（Charlton Heston飾演的角色），一位墜落到由靈長類統治的後末日地球的人類。Ulysses很快發現自己被許多猩猩視為救世主（也被另一些視為敵人），這些生物希望他能拯救牠們脫離這個世界的危機。遊戲塞滿謎題，畫面是Game Boy Color上數一數二的水準。模式包括：Normal，Ulysses從一處走到另一處；Athletic，主角跑跳穿越每個關卡；Stealth，要求Ulysses匍匐潛入其他模式無法進入的隱藏區域。《PLANET OF THE APES》難以與其他電玩相提並論，這正是其魅力所在。

overview_en: Player Manager 2001 is a Sports game, developed by G3 Interactive and published by THQ, which was released in Europe in 2001.
overview_zh: 《Player Manager 2001》是G3 Interactive開發、THQ發行的運動遊戲，2001年於歐洲推出。

overview_en: Pocket Bomberman features gameplay that revolves around using bombs to box in enemies and blowing them to bits. Once all enemies are defeated, Bomberman has to go to the door at the end of the stage to complete the level. There is a total of 5 worlds and 25 levels. These worlds include a jungle world, an ocean world, a wind world, a cloud world, and a world with the name of "Evil". Each world has a boss fight at the end in which Bomberman must expose the boss's weak points and bomb the boss until it has no health left.
overview_zh: 《Pocket Bomberman》的玩法核心是用炸彈把敵人圍住炸成碎片。打倒所有敵人後，Bomberman要前往關底的門完成關卡。共五個世界、25個關卡，包括叢林、海洋、風、雲，以及名為「Evil」的世界。每個世界結尾都有頭目戰，Bomberman要露出頭目的弱點並用炸彈打到牠HP歸零。

overview_en: The action and excitement of using a big ball to knock down white pins comes to the Game Boy Color with POCKET BOWLING. Make your selection from six different bowlers, including an android. Once you have a bowler that matches your style of play, use the Training mode to work on picking up spares and to get the hang of the game controls. When you are ready for some action, play against a human or computer opponent in the Standard mode. If you want an extra challenge, try to win a tournament against four opponents in four different alleys. In all of the modes, getting the perfect shot requires lining it up, setting the proper amount of spin and power, and letting the ball go at the right time. Play POCKET BOWLING, and become master of the lanes.
overview_zh: 用大球撞倒白色球瓶的刺激登陸Game Boy Color——《POCKET BOWLING》。可從六位保齡球手中挑選，包括一位機器人。挑到合適的球手後，在Training模式中練習補中與熟悉操作。準備好就在Standard模式對抗人類或電腦對手。想要更具挑戰，可挑戰四條球道、四位對手的錦標賽。任何模式下的完美一擊都需要對好瞄準、設定旋轉與力道，並在恰當時機放球。玩《POCKET BOWLING》成為球道大師。

overview_en: A four-player mahjong that you can hit with a unique character. You can choose a member from 12 people, such as cheap, full-fledged professionals, and screaming. Communication battles are possible using a communication cable. You can enjoy full-scale mahjong with an advanced thinking circuit.
overview_zh: 可使用獨特角色對打的四人麻將。可從12位成員中選擇，包括小氣的、職業級的、愛大叫的等等。可透過通訊纜線進行通訊對戰。具備進階思考演算的正統麻將。

overview_en: Realistic play with communication cable settings. You can enjoy 5 types of games: "Millionaire", "Speed", "Page One", "Dobon", and "Blackjack".
overview_zh: 搭配通訊纜線可進行寫實對戰。可享受五種遊戲：「大富豪」「Speed」「Page One」「Dobon」「21點」。

overview_en: A cooking simulation game where you practice cooking with your helper "Food Angel". The purpose is to make the restaurant prosper, aiming to be a true chef in order to revive the leaning restaurant. Select ingredients from the storage location and reproduce the actual work such as cutting, simmering, stir-frying, and seasoning in the game to complete the dish. Set the menu considering the price of food, the number of dishes, etc., and open the shop. If the customer's reaction is bad, the store's reputation will decline, the number of customers will decrease, and events such as eating away will occur. Occupations are Japanese, Western, Chinese, and ethnic. Cultivation of ingredients in the garden at home and cooking confrontation with rivals. You can exchange original dishes with your friends using the communication cable.
overview_zh: 由助手「Food Angel」陪你練廚藝的料理模擬遊戲。目標是讓店裡生意興隆，朝真正的廚師之路邁進，重振日漸式微的餐廳。從倉庫挑選食材，重現切、燉、炒、調味等實際工序完成料理。考量食材成本與菜色數量等設定菜單，再開店營業。若客人反應不佳，店家口碑下滑，客人變少，還會發生吃霸王餐等事件。可選日式、西式、中式與民族料理。可在自家庭院栽培食材，並與對手進行料理對決。也能透過通訊纜線與朋友交換原創料理。

overview_en: This time, with the cooperation of Odakyu Electric Railway and Nankai Electric Railway, Odakyu Romance Car, Nankai Rapi: t, etc. will appear. Beginner's subway mode, and after clearing, new routes will appear and there will be plenty of content! The expression of landscapes and curves that could not be expressed in the previous work, the coloring of trains, etc. have been greatly enhanced. You can enjoy the scenery of Odawara Castle, Hakone Mountain, Kansai Airport, and Koyasan. The site view is also powered up. In addition to the stations, you can enjoy tunnels, railway bridges, and elevated tracks from the site view.
overview_zh: 本作獲得小田急電鐵與南海電鐵協力，登場列車包括小田急浪漫特快、南海Rapi:t等。新增初學者地下鐵模式，破關後還會解鎖新路線，內容豐富！前作未能呈現的風景與彎道、列車塗裝等大幅強化。可欣賞小田原城、箱根群山、關西機場、高野山等景色。場邊視角也增強，除車站外，可從場邊欣賞隧道、鐵橋與高架軌道。

overview_en: The graphic of the car in the game is displayed about twice as large. Therefore, not only the back view of the car, but also the details such as the lighting of the brake lamps are realistically reproduced. Because it is exclusively for color, you can enjoy authentic racing games anytime, anywhere with vivid visuals of up to 56 colors. A total of 32 types of popular cars in the city have appeared. Four types of color schemes are available, and many parts can be attached by tune-up. There are 24 types of original courses, 6 courses each for mountain passes, circuits, general roads, and highways. The modes are equipped with "Challenge Mode", "Time Attack Mode", "Communication Mode", and "Config Mode" where you can get parts and machines if you win the battle with a rival car.
overview_zh: 遊戲中車輛的圖像顯示放大約兩倍，因此不只是車尾視角，連煞車燈點亮等細節都寫實重現。彩色機種專屬，最多56色的鮮艷視覺，讓你隨時隨地享受正統賽車遊戲。共32款城市熱門車登場，每款有四種塗裝可選，並可透過調校加裝大量零件。原創賽道共24條，山路、賽道、一般道路、高速公路各6條。模式包括「挑戰模式」「計時賽模式」「通訊模式」「設定模式」，戰勝對手車後可獲得零件與車輛。

overview_en: Perform a "Hanafuda game" with 12 unique characters. The Hanafuda game is played by selecting two types of games, "Flower Matching" and "Koi-Koi". The player plays 12 games with each character, and the one with the most wins advances to the next. And if you win all the characters, it will be the ending! !! Of course, it is also possible to play "Flower Matching" and "Koi-Koi" alone.
overview_zh: 與12位獨特角色玩「花札」。花札遊戲可選擇「花合」與「Koi-Koi」兩種，每位角色玩12局，勝場最多者進入下一關。打敗所有角色就能看到結局！！當然也可單獨玩「花合」與「Koi-Koi」。

overview_en: A fantasy simulation game that inherits the pedigree of the masterpiece "King of Kings". There are plenty of original elements such as more than 150 types of units and characters such as humans, fairies, and dragons, 179 types of special skills, "class change" items and "party formation" that strengthen the units! You can also exchange units with friends using a communication cable, and you can enjoy the collection to complete the unit picture book. Not only those who are addicted to "King of Kings" but also those who are new to the series can enjoy it widely.
overview_zh: 繼承名作《King of Kings》血脈的奇幻模擬遊戲。獨創元素豐富——包含人類、妖精、龍等150種以上單位與角色，179種特殊技能，以及強化單位的「轉職」道具與「組隊編成」系統！可透過通訊纜線與朋友交換單位，蒐集完成單位圖鑑也很有趣。不僅《King of Kings》迷會著迷，新接觸系列的玩家也能輕鬆樂在其中。

overview_en: The goal is for the player to become a boy who loves fishing, acquire lures and fishing techniques while competing with rivals in various places, and finally win the "legendary fisherman" in the fishing game. You can create a "fish picture book" by releasing the fish you caught during the adventure to your own lake. There are 60 kinds of fish that appear in the game! Collecting all of these is also one of the players' goals. Also, if you use a communication cable, you can play fishing games and exchange lures and fish with your friends.
overview_zh: 玩家扮演愛釣魚的少年，在各地與對手較量蒐集擬餌與釣魚技巧，最終目標是在釣魚遊戲中奪下「傳說之釣魚人」稱號。冒險中釣到的魚可放生到自家湖泊，建立「魚圖鑑」。出場魚種共60種！蒐集齊全也是玩家的目標之一。使用通訊纜線可進行釣魚對戰、與朋友交換擬餌與魚。

overview_en:
The latest in the Gold & Silver series!
Travel back to the world of Johto as the Gold & Silver series continues with brand new features! Whether you're reading the fresh descriptions in your Pokédex, using the unique sort function to organize your Pokémon in new ways, watching the all-new battle animations, or discovering another way to capture Suicune, you'll need all of your Poké-skills to master Pokémon Crystal on your Game Boy Color!
