Unlock the mysteries of the Unown! All-new puzzles and rewards await you in the Ruins of Alph!
Fight through the Battle Tower, a challenging tournament featuring Johto's best trainers!
For the first time, play as a male or female trainer!
Trade with Gold, Silver, Red, Blue, and Yellow versions to catch 'em all!
Compatible with Pokémon Stadium 2 for the Nintendo 64!
overview_zh:
金銀系列最新作！
隨著金銀系列繼續推進，回到Johto的世界，享受全新功能！讀著圖鑑中的全新介紹文、用獨特排序整理寶可夢、欣賞全新戰鬥動畫，或發掘另一種捕捉Suicune（水君）的方式——你需要使出渾身解術才能在Game Boy Color上征服《寶可夢 水晶版》！

揭開Unown未知圖騰之謎！全新解謎與獎勵在Alph遺跡等著你！
挑戰Battle Tower，與Johto最強訓練家對戰！
首次可選擇男性或女性訓練家！
與金、銀、紅、藍、黃版交換捕捉所有寶可夢！
與Nintendo 64的《寶可夢競技場2》連動！

overview_en: Enter a whole new world, with new Pokémon to capture, train and battle! Meet Professor Elm and get the all-new Poké Gear, including map, radio, cell phone and clock. Set the clock then watch as day turns to night and events take place in real time— and be sure to keep an eye out for Pokémon that come out only at night!
overview_zh: 進入嶄新世界，捕捉、訓練與對戰新寶可夢！認識大木博士，獲得全新Poké Gear，包括地圖、收音機、行動電話與時鐘。設定時鐘，看著日夜更替，事件依現實時間發生——別忘了留意只有夜間出沒的寶可夢！

overview_en: Enter a whole new world, with new Pokémon to capture, train and battle! Meet Professor Elm and get the all-new Poké Gear, including map, radio, cell phone and clock. Set the clock then watch as day turns to night and events take place in real time— and be sure to keep an eye out for Pokémon that come out only at night!
overview_zh: 進入嶄新世界，捕捉、訓練與對戰新寶可夢！認識大木博士，獲得全新Poké Gear，包括地圖、收音機、行動電話與時鐘。設定時鐘，看著日夜更替，事件依現實時間發生——別忘了留意只有夜間出沒的寶可夢！

overview_en: Make music on the move with Pocket Music, the music creation game. Create your own music from a selection of samples, drum beats, baselines, melodies, and other musical instruments. Play them back, save them to your cartridge, or swap them with a friend. Features include more than 600 different high quality samples and instruments, custom drumbeats, baselines, melodies and sound effects, a riff editor to allow you to create your own sounds, and prearranged tracks to demonstrate the capabilities of the game.
overview_zh: 用《Pocket Music》隨身玩音樂——音樂創作遊戲。從音色取樣、鼓點、貝斯線、旋律與其他樂器中挑選，創作自己的音樂。可即時播放、存到卡帶，或與朋友交換。特色包括：超過600種高品質取樣與樂器、自訂鼓點、貝斯線、旋律與音效，可創作自己聲響的Riff編輯器，以及示範遊戲能耐的預設曲目。

overview_en: A full-scale professional wrestling game that uses a 3D ring that can move freely not only left and right but also up and down on the ring. There are many elements that are indispensable for professional wrestling, such as out-of-field brawls and performances. There are 12 unique wrestlers, including hidden characters. Each player has different skills, but each player can use more than 20 types of skills, so it is necessary to use them properly according to the situation.
overview_zh: 本作為正統職業摔角遊戲，使用可在擂台上自由左右、上下移動的3D擂台。許多職業摔角不可或缺的元素皆收錄其中，例如場外亂鬥與動作秀。共有12位獨特角色，包含隱藏角色。每位角色技能不同，但都能使用超過20種招式，需依情況靈活運用。

overview_en: The game development just like an actual professional baseball game is reproduced on the screen. In one-player play, you can play pennant races or play against computers. Communication battle is possible with two people. Pennant race can be selected up to 135 games. You can play up to 4-7 games in the Japan Series. Both professional baseball Central League players are officially recognized by the Nippon Professional Baseball Organization and appear with their real names and data. Infrared input from remote control signals of household appliances changes the player's parameters. There are 45 registered players per team (30 fielders, 15 pitchers). Foreign player participation rules, etc. also comply with the "official baseball rules". The edit function also supports sudden trades and the addition of foreign players. Fictitious trades and dream team creation are also possible by changing the player name.
overview_zh: 畫面重現一如真實的職業棒球比賽進行方式。單人模式可進行職棒聯賽或與電腦對戰。雙人可透過通訊對戰。聯賽最多可選135場，日本大賽最多可打4-7場。中央聯盟雙隊球員均經日本職業棒球機構正式授權，以本名與真實數據登場。透過家電遙控器的紅外線輸入可改變球員參數。每隊註冊45名球員（30名野手、15名投手）。外籍球員出賽規則等也遵循「公認棒球規則」。編輯功能支援突發交易與外籍球員加入，亦可透過更改球員名建立虛構交易與夢幻隊伍。

overview_en: This time Puyo talks! Introduced the long-awaited "chain voice" to GB. The voices of "Ei!", "Fire!", And "Ice Storm!", Which are familiar at the event, will make the battle even more exciting. Equipped with "official battle mode". Bet a sign with your name on it and fight in online battles. If you win the online match, the rank of "Puyo class" will rise and the official handicap will be calculated automatically. With this, even beginners who can not make chains and advanced players who can make big chains can experience a close battle.
overview_zh: 這次魔法氣泡會說話了！GB上首度導入久候的「連鎖語音」。「Ei！」「Fire！」「Ice Storm！」等活動上熟悉的台詞讓對戰更熱血。搭載「公式對戰模式」，可寫上自己名字的招牌作為賭注進行通訊對戰。贏下對戰，「魔法氣泡段位」就會升等，並自動計算公式讓分。連無法連鎖的初學者與能拉大連鎖的高手都能體驗勢均力敵的對戰。

no_intro_name: Pocket Puyo Puyo Sun (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: The game mode is "Tokonazo Taisen", which is a communication battle to compete for which one to clear problems such as 2 Rensa, "Tokonnazopuyo", which solves the questions to be asked, and "Tokonpuyopuyo", which erases Puyo. , "Puyo Puyo alone" and "Puyo Puyo two people". In "Tokon Puyo Puyo", you can get a certificate (class) depending on the score and play time. Let's increase the number of illustrations and complete the illustration gallery by getting a certificate. The All Japan Puyo Association (AJPA) officially recognized skill judgment function is also included, so you can see your own Puyo's ability!
overview_zh: 遊戲模式包括「特訓挑戰」（通訊對戰，比看誰先解開2連鎖等問題）、「特訓謎題魔法氣泡」（解答提問）、「特訓魔法氣泡」（消除魔法氣泡），還有「魔法氣泡單人」與「魔法氣泡雙人」。「特訓魔法氣泡」中可依分數與遊戲時間取得段位（級位）認定。多取得認定，增加插畫蒐藏，完成插畫廊吧。內建全日本魔法氣泡協會（AJPA）官方認可的實力判定功能，可了解自己的魔法氣泡實力！

overview_en: Pocket Racing is a Racing game, which was released in Japan in 1999.
overview_zh: 《Pocket Racing》是1999年於日本推出的賽車遊戲。

overview_en: Pocket Soccer is a Sports game, developed by Game-Play Studios and published by Nintendo, which was released in Europe in 2001.
overview_zh: 《Pocket Soccer》是Game-Play Studios開發、Nintendo發行的運動遊戲，2001年於歐洲推出。

overview_en: Japanese version.
overview_zh: 日本版。

title_en: POKEMON CARD GB 2 - GR DAN SANJOU!
no_intro_name: Pokemon Card GB 2 - GR Dan Sanjou! (Japan)

overview_en:
Pokémon Crystal Version is a 2001 Game Boy Color strategy role-playing video game developed by Game Freak and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on July 29, 2001.

The latest in the Gold & Silver series!
Travel back to the world of Johto as the Gold & Silver series continues with brand new features! Whether you're reading the fresh descriptions in your Pokédex, using the unique sort function to organize your Pokémon in new ways, watching the all-new battle animations, or discovering another way to capture Suicune, you'll need all of your Poké-skills to master Pokémon Crystal on your Game Boy Color!

Unlock the mysteries of the Unown! All-new puzzles and rewards await you in the Ruins of Alph!
Fight through the Battle Tower, a challenging tournament featuring Johto's best trainers!
For the first time, play as a male or female trainer!
Trade with Gold, Silver, Red, Blue, and Yellow versions to catch 'em all!
Compatible with Pokémon Stadium 2 for the Nintendo 64!
overview_zh:
《寶可夢 水晶版》是2001年的Game Boy Color戰略角色扮演遊戲，由Game Freak開發，Nintendo of America於2001年7月29日在美國推出。

金銀系列最新作！
隨著金銀系列繼續推進，回到Johto的世界，享受全新功能！讀著圖鑑中的全新介紹文、用獨特排序整理寶可夢、欣賞全新戰鬥動畫，或發掘另一種捕捉Suicune（水君）的方式——你需要使出渾身解術才能在Game Boy Color上征服《寶可夢 水晶版》！

揭開Unown未知圖騰之謎！全新解謎與獎勵在Alph遺跡等著你！
挑戰Battle Tower，與Johto最強訓練家對戰！
首次可選擇男性或女性訓練家！
與金、銀、紅、藍、黃版交換捕捉所有寶可夢！
與Nintendo 64的《寶可夢競技場2》連動！

no_intro_name: Pokemon - Gold Version (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
Pokémon Gold Version is a 2000 Game Boy Color video game developed by Game Freak and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on October 15, 2000.

Enter a whole new world, with new Pokémon to capture, train and battle! Meet Professor Elm and get the all-new Poké Gear, including map, radio, cell phone and clock. Set the clock then watch as day turns to night and events take place in real time—and be sure to keep an eye out for Pokémon that come out only at night!

• Dozens of never-before-seen Pokémon! Find new evolutions for some familiar Pokémon and discover whole new species. Your Pokédex will even reveal genders of some Pokémon.
• A whole new world! Explore Johto, where there are new gym leaders to beat and eight new badges to earn.
• Two new types! Introducing Dark and Steel-type Pokémon.
• Trade with Silver, Red, Blue, and Yellow versions to catch ‘em all!
overview_zh:
《寶可夢 金版》是2000年的Game Boy Color遊戲，由Game Freak開發，Nintendo of America於2000年10月15日在美國推出。

進入嶄新世界，捕捉、訓練與對戰新寶可夢！認識大木博士，獲得全新Poké Gear，包括地圖、收音機、行動電話與時鐘。設定時鐘，看著日夜更替，事件依現實時間發生——別忘了留意只有夜間出沒的寶可夢！

• 數十隻前所未見的寶可夢！為熟悉的寶可夢找到新進化形態，並發現全新物種。圖鑑甚至會顯示部分寶可夢的性別。
• 嶄新世界！探索Johto，挑戰新道館館長，贏取八枚新徽章。
• 兩種新屬性！惡屬性與鋼屬性首次登場。
• 與銀、紅、藍、黃版交換，捕捉所有寶可夢！

overview_en:
Die Goldene Edition und die Silberne Edition spielen in Johto, einer fiktiven Region, die nach dem Vorbild der japanischen Regionen Kansai und Tokai gestaltet wurde, und in Kanto, der Region, die schon aus den Spielen Rote Edition und Blaue Edition bekannt ist. Die Städte sind durch mehrere Routen miteinander verbunden. Einige Orte sind nur dann erreichbar, wenn ein Pokémon des Spielers eine bestimmte Fähigkeit erlernt oder ein bestimmtes Item erhält, z. B. VM Surfer, wodurch die Spielfigur über Flüsse und Seen schwimmen kann.

Der Protagonist der Goldenen Edition und der Silbernen Edition ist ein Junge aus Neuborkia. Zu Beginn des Spiels wählt der Spieler eines der Pokémon Endivie, Feurigel, Karnimani als Starter-Pokémon. Danach stiehlt der Junge Silber – der Name ist im Spiel jedoch frei wählbar – ein Pokémon von Prof. Lind und ist ab da an der Rivale.

Das grundlegende Ziel der Spiele ist es, der beste Trainer von Johto und Kanto zu werden; welches erreicht ist, wenn man den Pokédex vervollständigt, alle acht Arenaleiter in Johto besiegt, die Top Vier und den Champion geschlagen, die acht Arenaleiter in Kanto besiegt und zuletzt die Herausforderung des Trainers Rot, Protagonist der Roten Edition und der Blauen Edition, innerhalb des Silberbergs gemeistert hat. Außerdem bekämpft der Spieler im Laufe des Spiels eine Verbrecherorganisation, namens Team Rocket, die Pokémon für bösartige Zwecke missbraucht.

Die Handlung spielt sich drei Jahre nach Pokèmon Rot und Blau ab. In dieser Zeit haben sich in Kanto einige Orte verändert: Die Safarizone wurde geschlossen, der Vulkan auf der Zinnoberinsel ist ausgebrochen, das Kraftwerk ist wieder in Betrieb und die Azuria-Höhle ist eingestürzt.
overview_zh:
《寶可夢 金版》與《寶可夢 銀版》的舞台設於Johto——一個以日本關西與東海地區為原型的虛構區域，以及《紅版》與《藍版》中已熟悉的Kanto區域。城市之間以多條路線相連。某些地方需玩家的寶可夢學會特定能力或取得特定道具（如祕傳機HM「衝浪」，可讓主角穿越河湖）才能抵達。

《金版》與《銀版》主角是來自Neuborkia的男孩。遊戲開始時，玩家從菊草葉、火球鼠、小鋸鱷三隻中挑選一隻為起始寶可夢。隨後男孩Silver——遊戲中名字可自訂——從Lind博士那裡偷走一隻寶可夢，自此成為主角的勁敵。

遊戲基本目標是成為Johto與Kanto的最強訓練家：完成圖鑑、擊敗Johto八位道館館長、四天王與冠軍、再擊敗Kanto八位道館館長，最後在銀山內擊敗《紅版》與《藍版》主角訓練家紅。此外途中也要對抗利用寶可夢做壞事的犯罪組織火箭隊。

劇情發生於《寶可夢 紅／藍》之後三年。期間Kanto有些地方已改變：Safari Zone關閉、紅蓮島火山爆發、發電所重新運轉、華藍洞窟坍塌。

overview_en:
Pokémon Kristall-Edition ist die Spezial-Edition der Goldenen Edition und der Silbernen Edition und wurde am 14. Dezember 2000 in Japan als Pocket Monsters Crystal (ポケットモンスター クリスタル, Poketto Monsutā Kurisutaru) veröffentlicht. In Nordamerika und Europa erschien das Spiel 2001. Die Kristall-Edition ist das einzige Pokémon-Spiel, welches exklusiv für den Game Boy Color erschien und auf älteren Modellen nicht mehr lauffähig ist.

Die Handlung und Spielmechanik der Kristall-Edition ist nahezu identisch mit der der Goldenen Edition und der Silbernen Edition, hat aber auch einige neue Features zu bieten. Es ist das erste Pokémon-Spiel, in dem der Spieler zwischen einer männlichen und einer weiblichen Hauptfigur wählen kann und die Pokémongraphiken sind erstmals animiert. Außerdem wurden einige Handlungen eingefügt, in der das legendäre Pokémon Suicune eine Rolle spielt und eine, in der die Icognito involviert sind. Die größte Erweiterung ist allerdings der „Duellturm“, ein neues Gebäude, das es dem Spieler ermöglicht, an Pokémon Stadium-ähnlichen Kämpfen teilzunehmen.
overview_zh:
《寶可夢 水晶版》是《金版》與《銀版》的特別版，於2000年12月14日在日本以《Pocket Monsters Crystal》（ポケットモンスター クリスタル）之名推出。北美與歐洲於2001年發行。本作是唯一Game Boy Color獨佔、無法在舊機型運作的寶可夢遊戲。

劇情與遊戲機制幾乎與《金版》《銀版》相同，但加入了一些新功能。本作是首款可選男性或女性主角的寶可夢遊戲，寶可夢圖像也首次有動畫。此外加入了與傳說寶可夢Suicune相關的新劇情，以及與Unown相關的劇情。最大新增則是「對戰塔」（Duellturm），玩家可在這座新建築中參與類似《寶可夢競技場》的對戰。

overview_en:
Pokémon Picross (Japanese: ポケモンピクロス Pokémon Picross), not to be confused with the 3DS game with the same name, was a Game Boy Color game slated for release in 1999, with snapshots of the game published in several video game magazines, but was ultimately scrapped.

A near-final prototype dump of the game was surfaced online on September 10, 2020, as part of a major leak of Game Boy / Game Boy Color prototypes, which was dubbed "Nintendo Gigaleak 3" by the fans.
overview_zh:
《Pokémon Picross》（不要與同名的3DS遊戲混淆）是預定於1999年推出的Game Boy Color遊戲，多家電玩雜誌曾刊載遊戲畫面，但最後遭中止。

2020年9月10日，本作的近完成原型於網路曝光，成為粉絲口中「Nintendo Gigaleak 3」這次大型Game Boy／Game Boy Color原型外洩的一部份。

overview_en:
Pokémon Pinball is a 1999 Game Boy Color video game developed by HAL Laboratory and Jupiter and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on June 28, 1999.

There are two tables in the game, red and blue. Each table has its own details and gameplay elements.

Each table has different "locations" that you play, which determine which Pokémon are available for capture. A subset of available locations are displayed slot-machine style in the beginning of a game, and pressing A will select your starting location and launch the first ball into play. After that, each table has its own mechanism for advancing to the next location, including the locations not available at the start of the game.

"Catch Mode," when activated, starts a 2 minute window of opportunity where you can attempt to capture a Pokémon. Once you activate "catch mode," you must hit the pop bumpers 6 times. Each hit unlocks 1/6 of an image of the Pokémon currently up for capture. Once the image is complete, the Pokémon appears on the table, where it must be hit 4 times with the ball to capture it.

"Evolution Mode," when activated, starts a 2 minute window of opportunity where you select a captured Pokémon (from the current game in progress only) and attempt to evolve it into another form. This is the only way to add the evolved form to your Pokédex. Once you select a Pokémon, you must hit targets on the playfield. There are up to 6 targets, but only 3 of them have items in them you need to evolve a Pokémon. The others create a time-wasting sequence before you can hit targets again. If you hit a target with an item, the item appears on the playfield and must be collected with the ball. Once you've collected 3 items, the hole in the center of the board opens up. Sinking the ball in the hole successfully evolves the Pokémon.
overview_zh:
《寶可夢彈珠台》是1999年的Game Boy Color遊戲，由HAL Laboratory與Jupiter開發，Nintendo of America於1999年6月28日在美國推出。

遊戲有紅、藍兩張桌台，各有獨特細節與玩法。

每張桌台都有不同「地點」可遊玩，決定可捕捉哪些寶可夢。遊戲開始時會以拉霸機方式顯示部分可選地點，按A鈕選擇起始地點並射出第一顆球。之後每張桌台各有自己的方式可前往下一地點，包括起始時無法選擇的地點。

啟動「Catch Mode」後，會開啟2分鐘的捕捉視窗。啟動後須打中Pop Bumper 6次，每打一次解鎖目標寶可夢圖像的1/6。圖像完整後，寶可夢出現在桌台上，需用球擊中4次才能捕捉。

啟動「Evolution Mode」後，會開啟2分鐘的進化視窗，從目前進行中對局裡已捕捉的寶可夢中選一隻嘗試進化成新形態。這是把進化形登錄到圖鑑的唯一方式。選定寶可夢後須擊中桌面上的目標。最多有6個目標，但只有3個含進化所需道具，其他會觸發拖延的時序，須等過後才能再擊中目標。擊中含道具的目標時道具會出現在桌面上，需用球收集。蒐集滿3個道具後，桌面中央的洞會打開，將球投入洞中即可成功進化寶可夢。

overview_en:
Pokémon Puzzle Challenge is a 2000 Game Boy Color video game developed by Intelligent Systems and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on December 4, 2000.

In a rising pit of colored blocks, it's your task to continuously eliminate these tiles by switching two tiles' positions on the horizontal row. When three or more tiles link up in a up/down or left/right fashion, they disappear. Gravity kicks in and settles the rest of the tiles into the bin ? this can cause a chain reaction to occur since other blocks of the same color can fall into place next to each other. It's up to you to continuously work the bin to wipe out tiles by making combination connections and chain reactions. That's the game in a nutshell, but there are several modes of play that'll keep your fingers busy. In the game's Challenge mode, for example, you're up against a computer opponent and you'll have to make combos and chain reactions to send garbage blocks to his unseen screen -- but keep in mind your opponent's doing the same to you.
overview_zh:
《Pokémon Puzzle Challenge》是2000年的Game Boy Color遊戲，由Intelligent Systems開發，Nintendo of America於2000年12月4日在美國推出。

在不斷上升的彩色方塊堆中，你的任務是透過交換水平列上兩塊方塊的位置，持續消除這些方塊。當三塊或以上同色方塊上下或左右相連時即會消失。重力作用會讓其餘方塊掉入空格——這可能引發連鎖反應，因為其他同色方塊也可能掉到一起。要不斷操作消除方塊，靠組合與連鎖來清除盤面。這就是核心玩法，但本作有多種模式讓你的手指停不下來。例如Challenge模式中，你要對抗電腦對手，靠組合與連鎖把垃圾方塊送到對手看不見的畫面——但對手也對你做一樣的事。

no_intro_name: Pokemon - Silver Version (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
Pokémon Silver Version is a 2000 Game Boy Color video game developed by Game Freak and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on October 15, 2000.

Enter a whole new world, with new Pokémon to capture, train and battle!  Meet Professor Elm and get the all-new Poké Gear, including map, radio, cell phone and clock. Set the clock then watch as day turns to night and events take place in real time—and be sure to keep an eye out for Pokémon that come out only at night!

• Dozens of never-before-seen Pokémon!  Find new evolutions for some familiar Pokémon and discover whole new species.  Your Pokédex will even reveal genders of some Pokémon.
• A whole new world!  Explore Johto, where there are new gym leaders to beat and eight new badges to earn.
• Two new types!  Introducing Dark and Steel-type Pokémon.
• Trade with Gold, Red, Blue, and Yellow versions to catch ‘em all!

title_en: POKEMON - YELLOW VERSION - SPECIAL PIKACHU EDITION DX
no_intro_name: Pokemon - Yellow Version - Special Pikachu Edition DX (USA)
